kaṭuḥ eva ca nirhārī saṃhataḥ snigdhaḥ rūkṣaḥ viśadaḥ eva ca śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca rūpam ca rasaḥ ca apām guṇāḥ smṛtāḥ rasa jñānam tu vakṣyāmi tat mama nigadataḥ śṛṇu madhuraḥ lavaṇaḥ tiktaḥ kaṣāyaḥ amlaḥ kaṭuḥ tathā eṣa ṣaḍvidha vistāraḥ rasaḥ vāri mayaḥ smṛ śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca rūpam ca triguṇam jyotiḥ ucyate jyotiḥ paśyati rūpāṇi rūpam ca bahudhā smṛtam hrasvaḥ dīrghaḥ tathā sthūlaḥ caturasraḥ aṇu vṛttavān śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ tathā raktaḥ nīlaḥ pītaḥ aruṇaḥ tathā evam dvādaśan vistāraḥ jyotiḥ rūpa guṇaḥ smṛ vāyavyaḥ tu guṇaḥ sparśaḥ sparśaḥ ca bahudhā smṛtaḥ kaṭhinaḥ cikkaṇaḥ ślakṣṇaḥ picchalaḥ mṛdu dāruṇaḥ uṣṇaḥ śītaḥ sukhaḥ duḥkhaḥ snigdhaḥ viśadaḥ eva ca evam dvādaśa vistāraḥ vāyavyaḥ guṇaḥ ucyate tatra eka guṇam ākāśam śabdaḥ iti eva tat smṛtam śāntaḥ ghoraḥ ca mūḍhaḥ ca tān asaṃgharṣa jaḥ tathā ṣaḍjaḥ ṛṣabha gāndhārau madhyamaḥ pañcamaḥ tathā dhaivataḥ ca api vijñeyaḥ tathā ca api niṣādakaḥ eṣa saptavidhaḥ proktaḥ guṇaḥ ākāśa lakṣaṇaḥ mṛdaṅga bherī śaṅkhānām stanayitnoḥ rathasya ca yaḥ kaḥ cit śrūyate śabdaḥ prāṇinaḥ aprāṇinaḥ api vā eteṣām eva sarveṣām viṣaye saṃprakīrtitaḥ evam bahuvidha ākāraḥ śabdaḥ ākāśa saṃbhavaḥ ākāśa jam śabdam āhuḥ ebhiḥ vāyu guṇaiḥ saha apaḥ agniḥ mārutaḥ ca eva nityam jāgrati dehiṣu mūlam ete śarīrasya vyāpya prāṇān iha sthitāḥ pārthiva dhātum āśri śārīra agniḥ katham bhavet avakāśa viśeṣeṇa katham vartayate anilaḥ uvāca prāṇinām anilaḥ dehān yathā ceṣṭayate balī śritaḥ mūrdhānam agniḥ tu śarīram paripālayan prāṇaḥ mūrdhani ca agnau ca vartamānaḥ viceṣṭate sa jantuḥ sarva bhūta ātmā puruṣaḥ sa sanātanaḥ manaḥ buddhiḥ ahaṃkāraḥ bhūtāni viṣayāḥ ca saḥ pṛṣṭhatas ca samānena svām svām gatim upāśritaḥ vasti mūlam gudam ca eva pāvakam ca samāśritaḥ vahat mūtram purīṣam ca api apānaḥ parivartate udānaḥ iti tam prāhuḥ adhyātma viduṣaḥ janāḥ saṃdhiṣu api ca sarveṣu saṃniviṣṭaḥ tathā anilaḥ śarīreṣu manuṣyāṇām vyānaḥ iti upadiśyate dhātuṣu agniḥ tu vitataḥ samānena samīritaḥ rasān dhātūn ca doṣān ca vartayan avatiṣṭhati apāna prāṇayoḥ madhye prāṇa apāna samāhitaḥ samanvitaḥ su adhiṣṭhānaḥ samyak pacati pāvakaḥ āsyam hi pāyu saṃyuktam ante syāt guda saṃjñitam prāṇānām saṃnipātāt ca saṃnipātaḥ prajāyate ūṣmā ca agniḥ iti jñeyaḥ yaḥ annam pacati dehinām pakvāśayaḥ tu adhas nābheḥ ūrdhvam āmāśayaḥ sthitaḥ nābhi madhye śarīrasya sarve prāṇāḥ samāhitāḥ vahanti anna rasān nāḍyaḥ daśa prāṇa pracoditāḥ jita klama āsanāḥ dhīrāḥ mūrdhani ātmānam ādadhuḥ evam sarveṣu vihitaḥ prāṇa apāneṣu dehinām yadi prāṇāyate vāyuḥ vāyuḥ eva viceṣṭate śvasiti ābhāṣate ca eva tasmāt jīvaḥ nirarthakaḥ vāyuḥ eva jahāti enam ūṣma bhāvaḥ ca naśyati yadi vāta upamaḥ jīvaḥ saṃśleṣaḥ yadi vāyunā vāyu maṇḍala vat dṛśyaḥ gacchet saha marut gaṇaiḥ śleṣaḥ yadi ca vātena yadi tasmāt praṇaśyati kūpe vā salilam dadyāt pradīpam vā hutāśane prakṣiptam naśyati kṣipram yathā naśyati asau tathā tat naśyati ubhayam tadvat jīvaḥ vāta anala ātmakaḥ pañca sādhāraṇe hi asmin śarīre jīvitam kutas yeṣām anyatara tyāgāt caturṇām na asti saṃgrahaḥ naśyanti apaḥ hi anāhārāt vāyuḥ ucchvāsa nigrahāt pīḍite anyatarasmin hi eṣām saṃghātaḥ yāti pañcadhā kim vedayati vā jīvaḥ kim śṛṇoti bravīti vā eṣā gauḥ para loka stham tārayiṣyati mām iti yaḥ dattvā mriyate jantuḥ sā gauḥ kam tārayiṣyati gauḥ ca pratigrahītā ca dātā ca eva samam yadā iha eva vilayam yānti kutas teṣām samāgama agninā ca upayuktasya kutas saṃjīvanam punar bīja mātram purā sṛṣṭam yat etat parivartate mṛtāḥ mṛtāḥ praṇaśyanti bījāt bījam pravartate uvāca na praṇāśaḥ asti jīvānām dattasya ca kṛtasya ca yāti deha antaram prāṇī śarīram tu viśīryate na śarīra āśritaḥ jīvaḥ tasmin naṣṭe praṇaśyati yathā samitsu dagdhāsu na praṇaśyati pāvakaḥ naśyati iti eva jānāmi śāntam agnim an indhanam gatiḥ yasya pramāṇam vā saṃsthānam vā na dṛśyate uvāca jīvasya ca indhana agneḥ ca sadā nāśaḥ na vidyate ākāśa anugata tvāt hi durgrahaḥ sa nirāśrayaḥ tathā śarīra saṃtyāge jīvaḥ hi ākāśa vat sthitaḥ na gṛhyate su sūkṣma tvāt yathā jyotiḥ na saṃśayaḥ prāṇān dhārayate hi agniḥ sa jīvaḥ upadhāryatām vāyu saṃdhāraṇaḥ hi agniḥ naśyati ucchvāsa nigrahāt tasmin naṣṭe śarīra agnau śarīram tat acetanam patitam yāti bhūmi tvam ayanam tasya hi kṣitiḥ jaṅgamānām hi sarveṣām sthāvarāṇām tathā eva ca tatra trayāṇām eka tvam dvayam bhūmau pratiṣṭhitam amūrtayaḥ te vijñeyāḥ apaḥ mūrtāḥ tathā kṣitiḥ yadi agni mārutau bhūmiḥ kham apaḥ ca śarīriṣu jīvaḥ kiṃlakṣaṇaḥ tatra iti etat ācakṣva me anagha pañca ātmake pañca ratau pañca vijñāna saṃyute śarīre prāṇinām jīvam jñātum icchāmi yādṛśam māṃsa śoṇita saṃghāte medaḥ snāyu asthi saṃcaye yadi ajīvam śarīram tu pañcabhūta samanvitam śārīre mānase duḥkhe kaḥ tām vedayate rujam śṛṇoti kathitam jīvaḥ karṇābhyām na śṛṇoti tat sarvam paśyati yat dṛśyam manaḥ yuktena cakṣuṣā icchati dhyāyati dveṣṭi vācam īrayate ca kaḥ uvāca na pañca sādhāraṇam atra kim cit śarīram ekaḥ vahate antarātmā sa vetti gandhān ca rasān śrutim ca sparśam ca rūpam ca guṇāḥ ca ye anye pañcātmake pañcaguṇa pradarśī sa sarva gātra anugataḥ antarātmā yadā na rūpam na sparśaḥ na ūṣma bhāvaḥ ca pāvake tadā śānte śarīra agnau deham tyaktvā sa naśyati ap mayam sarvam eva idam āpaḥ mūrtiḥ śarīriṇām tatra ātmā mānasaḥ brahmā sarva bhūteṣu loka kṛt ātmā kṣetrajñaḥ iti uktaḥ saṃyuktaḥ prākṛtaiḥ guṇaiḥ ātmānam tam vijānīhi sarvaloka hita ātmakam kṣetrajñam tam vijānīhi nityam loka hita ātmakam tamaḥ rajaḥ ca sattvam ca viddhi jīva guṇān imān jīvam ātma guṇam vindyāt ātmānam paramātmanaḥ sa cetanam jīva guṇam vadanti sa ceṣṭate ceṣṭayate ca sarvam jīvaḥ tu deha antaritaḥ prayāti śarīra bhedaḥ evam sarveṣu bhūteṣu gūḍhaḥ carati saṃvṛtaḥ dṛśyate tu agryayā buddhyā sūkṣmayā tattva darśibhiḥ tam pūrva apararātreṣu yuñjānaḥ satatam budhaḥ laghu āhāraḥ viśuddha ātmā paśyati ātmānam ātmani mānasa agni śarīreṣu jīva iti abhidhā sṛṣṭiḥ prajāpateḥ eṣā bhūta adhyātma viniścaye uvāca asṛjat brāhmaṇān eva pūrvam brahmā prajāpatiḥ ācāram ca eva śaucam ca svargāya vidadhe prabhuḥ yakṣa rākṣasa nāgāḥ ca piśācāḥ manujāḥ tathā brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ ca dvijasattama ye ca anye bhūta saṃghānām saṃghāḥ tān ca api nirmame brāhmaṇānām sitaḥ varṇaḥ kṣatriyāṇām tu lohitaḥ vaiśyānām pītakaḥ varṇaḥ śūdrāṇām asitaḥ tathā sarveṣām khalu varṇānām dṛśyate varṇa saṃkaraḥ kāmaḥ krodhaḥ bhayam lobhaḥ śokaḥ cintā kṣudhā śramaḥ sveda mūtra purīṣāṇi śleṣmā pittam sa śoṇitam tanuḥ kṣarati sarveṣām kasmāt varṇaḥ vibhajyate jaṅgamānām asaṃkhyeyāḥ sthāvarāṇām ca jātayaḥ teṣām vividha varṇānām kutas varṇa viniścayaḥ uvāca na viśeṣaḥ asti varṇānām sarvam brāhmam idam jagat brahmaṇā pūrva sṛṣṭam hi karmabhiḥ varṇa tām gatam kāma bhoga priyāḥ tīkṣṇāḥ krodhanāḥ priya sāhasāḥ tyakta svadharmāḥ rakta aṅgāḥ te dvijāḥ kṣatra tām gatāḥ goṣu vṛttim samādhāya pītāḥ kṛṣi upajīvinaḥ svadharmam na anutiṣṭhanti te dvijāḥ vaiśya tām gatāḥ hiṃsā anṛta priyāḥ lubdhāḥ sarva karma upajīvinaḥ kṛṣṇāḥ śauca paribhraṣṭāḥ te dvijāḥ śūdra tām gatāḥ iti etaiḥ karmabhiḥ vyastāḥ dvijāḥ varṇa antaram gatāḥ dharmaḥ yajña kriyā ca eṣām nityam na pratiṣidhyate varṇāḥ catvāraḥ ete hi yeṣām brāhmī sarasvatī vihitāḥ brahmaṇā pūrvam lobhāt tu ajñāna tām gatāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ dharma tantra sthāḥ tapaḥ teṣām na naśyati brahma dhārayatām nityam vratāni niyamān tathā brahma ca etat purā sṛṣṭam ye na jānanti a tad vidaḥ teṣām bahuvidhāḥ tu anyāḥ tatra tatra hi jātayaḥ piśācāḥ rākṣasāḥ pretāḥ bahudhā mleccha jātayaḥ pranaṣṭa jñāna vijñānāḥ svacchanda ācāra ceṣṭitāḥ prajāḥ brāhmaṇa saṃskārāḥ svadharma kṛta niścayāḥ ṛṣibhiḥ svena tapasā sṛjyante ca apare paraiḥ ādideva samudbhūtā brahma mūlā akṣayā avyayā sā sṛṣṭiḥ mānasī nāma dharma tantra parāyaṇā vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca vipra ṛṣe tat brūhi vadatām vara uvāca jātakarma ādibhiḥ yaḥ tu saṃskāraiḥ saṃskṛtaḥ śuciḥ śauca ācāra sthitaḥ samyak vighasa āśī guru priyaḥ satyam dānam damaḥ adrohaḥ ānṛśaṃsyam kṣamā ghṛṇā tapaḥ ca dṛśyate yatra sa brāhmaṇaḥ iti smṛtaḥ kṛṣi gorakṣya vāṇijyam yaḥ viśati aniśam śuciḥ veda adhyayana saṃpannaḥ sa vaiśyaḥ iti saṃjñitaḥ tyakta vedaḥ tu anācāraḥ sa vai śūdraḥ iti smṛtaḥ na vai śūdraḥ bhavet śūdraḥ brāhmaṇaḥ na ca brāhmaṇaḥ etat pavitram jñātavyam tathā ca eva ātma saṃyamaḥ vidyām māna avamānābhyām ātmānam tu pramādataḥ ahiṃsraḥ sarva bhūtānām maitrāyaṇa gataḥ caret aśokam sthānam ātiṣṭhet iha ca amutra ca abhayam ajitam jetu kāmena bhāvyam saṅgeṣu asaṅginā manaḥ prāṇe nigṛhṇīyāt prāṇam brahmaṇi dhārayet nirvāṇāt eva nirvāṇaḥ na ca kim cit vicintayet sa anukrośaḥ ca bhūteṣu tat dvijātiṣu lakṣaṇam uvāca satyam brahma tapaḥ satyam satyam sṛjati ca prajāḥ anṛtam tamasaḥ rūpam tamasā nīyate hi adhas tamaḥ grastāḥ na paśyanti prakāśam tamasā āvṛtam satya anṛtāt tat ubhayam prāpyate jagatīcaraiḥ dharma adharmau prakāśaḥ ca tamaḥ duḥkham sukham tathā śārīraiḥ mānasaiḥ duḥkhaiḥ sukhaiḥ ca api asukha udayaiḥ loka sṛṣṭim prapaśyantaḥ na muhyanti vicakṣaṇāḥ tatra duḥkha vimokṣa artham prayateta vicakṣaṇaḥ tathā tamaḥ abhibhūtānām bhūtānām bhraśyate sukham tad khalu dvividha sukham ucyate śārīra mānasa ca yad etad bhavat abhidhā sukhānām parama striyaḥ iti tad na grah na hi etad ṛṣi mahat sthā a prāp etad guṇa viśeṣa na ca enad abhilaṣ śrūyate ca bhagavant tri loka kṛt brahmā prabhuḥ ekākī tiṣṭhati brahmacārī na kāma sukheṣu ātmānam avadadhāti bhagavant tu vac sukhānām parama strī iti uvāca caṇḍa vāta ati uṣṇa ati śīta kṛ ca pratibhayaiḥ śārīra duḥkhaiḥ upatapyante bandhu dhana vināśa viprayoga kṛ ca mānasa śokaiḥ abhibhū jarā mṛtyu kṛ ca anya iti yaḥ tu etaiḥ śārīraiḥ mānasaiḥ duḥkhaiḥ na spṛśyate sa sukham veda kṣudh pipāsā śramaḥ na asti na jarā na ca pāpakam pṛthivī sarva bhūtānām janitrī tadvidhāḥ striyaḥ iti etat loka nirmāṇam brahmaṇā vihitam purā prajāḥ viparivartante svaiḥ svaiḥ karmabhiḥ āvṛtāḥ uvāca hutena śāmyate pāpam svādhyāye śāntiḥ uttamā yādṛśam dīyate dānam tādṛśam phalam āpyate kim kasya dharma caraṇam kim vā dharmasya lakṣaṇam uvāca svadharma caraṇe yuktāḥ ye bhavanti manīṣiṇaḥ yat etat cāturāśramyam brahmarṣi vihitam purā teṣām sve sve ye ācārāḥ tān me vaktum iha arhasi uvāca pūrvam eva bhagavant loka hita anuṣṭhā dharma saṃrakṣaṇa artha āśrama catur abhinirdiś samyak atra śauca saṃskāra vinaya niyama praṇītaḥ vinīta ātmā ubhe saṃdhye bhāskara agni daivatāni upasthāya vihāya tandrā ālasye guroḥ abhivādana veda abhyāsa śravaṇa pavitrīkṛta antarātmā triṣavaṇam upaspṛśya brahmacarya agni paricaraṇa guru śuśrūṣā nityaḥ bhaikṣa ādi sarva niveday antarātmā guru vacana nirdeśa anuṣṭhāna a pratikūlaḥ guru prasāda labdha svādhyāya tatparaḥ syāt bhavati ca atra ślokaḥ gārhasthyam khalu dvitīyam āśramam vadanti tasya samudācāra lakṣaṇam sarvam anuvyākhyāsyāmaḥ samāvṛt sa dāra sahadharma caryā phala arthin gṛhāśramaḥ vidhīyate tat hi sarva āśramāṇām mūlam udāharanti guru kula vāsin parivrājaka yad ca anya saṃkalpay vrata niyama dharma anuṣṭhāyin tad api atas eva bhikṣā bali saṃvibhāga pravṛt vānaprastha dravya upaskāra iti prāyaśas khalu etad sādhu sādhu pathya darśana svādhyāya prasaṅgin tīrtha abhigamana deśa darśana artha pṛthivī paryaṭ teṣām pratyutthāna abhivādana anasūyā vāc pradāna saumukhya śakti āsana śayana abhyavahāra satkriyāḥ ca iti bhavati ca atra ślokaḥ sa dattvā duṣkṛtam tasmai puṇyam ādāya gacchati api ca atra yajña kriyābhiḥ devatāḥ prīyante nivāpena pitaraḥ veda abhyāsa śravaṇa dhāraṇena ṛṣayaḥ vatsalāḥ sarva bhūtānām vācyāḥ śrotra sukhāḥ giraḥ ślokau ca atra bhavataḥ parivāda upaghātau ca pāruṣyam ca atra garhitam avajñānam ahaṃkāraḥ dambhaḥ ca eva vigarhitaḥ ahiṃsā satyam akrodhaḥ sarva āśrama gatam tapaḥ api ca atra mālya ābharaṇa vastra abhyaṅga gandha upabhoga nṛtta gīta vāditra śruti sukha nayana abhirāma saṃdarśana prāpti bhakṣya bhojya peya lehya cūṣ abhyavahārya vividha upabhoga sva dāra vihāra saṃtoṣaḥ kāma sukha avāpti iti sa sukhāni anubhūya iha śiṣṭānām gatim āpnuyāt uvāca vānaprastha khalu ṛṣi dharma anusṛ puṇya tīrthāni nadī prasravaṇa su vivic araṇyeṣu mṛga mahiṣa varāha sṛmara gaja ākṛ tapasy anusaṃcar tyaj grāmya vastra āhāra upabhoga vanya auṣadhi mūla phala parṇa parimā vicitra niyam āhāra sthāna āsanin bhūmi pāṣāṇa sikatā śarkarā vālukā bhasman śāyin kāśa kuśa carman valkala saṃvṛ aṅga keśa śmaśru nakha roman dhārin niyam kāla upasparśana a skand homa bali kāla anuṣṭhāyin samidh kuśa kusuma upahāra homa arjana labh viśrāma śīta uṣṇa pavana niṣṭap vibhid sarva tvac vividha niyama yoga caryā vidhā dharma anuṣṭhāna hṛ māṃsa śoṇi yaḥ tu etām niyataḥ caryām brahmarṣi vihitām caret sa dahet agni vat doṣān jayet lokān ca durjayān parivrājakānām punar ācāraḥ tat yathā vimuc agni dhana kalatra paribarha saṅga ātman sneha pāśa avadhū parivraj sama loṣṭa aśman kāñcana trivarga pravṛt ārambha asakta buddhi ari mitra udāsīna tulya vṛtti sthāvara jarāyu ja aṇḍa ja sveda ja udbhid ja bhūta vāc manas karman anabhidrohin aniketa parvata pulina vṛkṣa mūla devatāyatana anucar vāsa artha upe nagara grāma vā nagara pañcarātrika grāma ekarātrika praviśya ca prāṇa dhāraṇa mātra artham dvijātīnām bhavanāni asaṃkīrṇa karmaṇām upatiṣṭheyuḥ pātra patita a yāc bhaikṣāḥ kāma krodha darpa moha lobha kārpaṇya dambha parivāda abhimāna hiṃsā nivṛt iti bhavati ca atra ślokaḥ kṛtvā agnihotram sva śarīra saṃstham śārīram agnim sva mukhe juhoti mokṣa āśramam yaḥ kurute yathoktam śuciḥ su saṃkalpita buddhi yuktaḥ uvāca puṇyaḥ kṣemyaḥ ca kāmyaḥ ca sa varaḥ lokaḥ ucyate tatra hi a pāpa karmāṇaḥ śucayaḥ atyanta nirmalāḥ sa svarga sadṛśaḥ deśaḥ tatra hi uktāḥ śubhāḥ guṇāḥ śayyā yāna āsana upetāḥ prāsāda bhavana āśrayāḥ sarva kāmaiḥ vṛtāḥ ke cid hema ābharaṇa bhūṣitāḥ prāṇa dhāraṇa mātram tu keṣām cit upapadyate śrameṇa mahatā ke cit kurvanti prāṇadhāraṇam iha dharma pare ke cit ke cid naikṛtikāḥ narāḥ iha śramaḥ bhayam mohaḥ kṣudhā tīvrā ca jāyate lobhaḥ ca artha kṛtaḥ nṝṇām yena muhyanti paṇḍitāḥ sa upadham nikṛtiḥ steyam parivādaḥ abhyasūya tā para upaghātaḥ hiṃsā ca paiśunyam anṛtam tathā karma bhūmiḥ iyam loke iha kṛtvā śubha aśubham śubhaiḥ śubham avāpnoti kṛtvā aśubham atas anyathā iha prajāpatiḥ pūrvam devāḥ sa ṛṣi gaṇāḥ tathā iṣṭvā iṣṭa tapasaḥ pūtāḥ brahma lokam upāśritāḥ uttaraḥ pṛthivī bhāgaḥ sarva puṇyatamaḥ śubhaḥ ihatyāḥ tatra jāyante ye vai puṇya kṛtaḥ janāḥ kṣīṇa āyuṣaḥ tathā eva anye naśyanti pṛthivī tale panthānam sarva lokānām te jānanti manīṣiṇaḥ iti uktaḥ ayam mayā dharmaḥ saṃkṣepāt brahma nirmitaḥ uvāca iti uktaḥ bhṛguṇā rājan bharadvājaḥ pratāpavān eṣa te prabhavaḥ rājan jagataḥ saṃprakīrtitaḥ nikhilena mahā prājña kim bhūyas śrotum icchasi uvāca ācārasya vidhim tāta procyamānam tvayā anagha uvāca durācārāḥ durviceṣṭāḥ duṣprajñāḥ priya sāhasāḥ asantaḥ hi abhivikhyātāḥ santaḥ ca ācāra lakṣaṇāḥ purīṣam yadi vā mūtram ye na kurvanti mānavāḥ rājamārge gavām madhye dhānya madhye ca te śubhāḥ agnyāgāre tathā tīre ye na kurvanti te śubhāḥ śaucam āvaśyakam kṛtvā devatānām ca tarpaṇam dharmam āhuḥ manuṣyāṇām upaspṛśya nadīm taret sāyam prātar japan saṃdhyām tiṣṭhet pūrvām tathā aparām pañca ārdraḥ bhojanam kuryāt prāc mukhaḥ maunam āsthitaḥ na nindet anna bhakṣyān ca svādu asvādu ca bhakṣayet na ārdra pāṇiḥ samuttiṣṭhet na ārdra pādaḥ svapet niśi deva ṛṣi nārada proktam etat ācāra lakṣaṇam śuci kāmam anaḍvāham devagoṣṭham catuṣpatham brāhmaṇam dhārmikam ca eva nityam kuryāt pradakṣiṇam atithīnām ca sarveṣām preṣyāṇām sva janasya ca sāmānyam bhojanam bhṛtyaiḥ puruṣasya praśasyate sāyam prātar manuṣyāṇām aśanam deva nirmitam na antarā bhojanam dṛṣṭam upavāsī tathā bhavet an anya strī janaḥ prājñaḥ brahmacārī tathā bhavet amṛtam brāhmaṇa ucchiṣṭam jananyāḥ hṛdayam kṛtam upāsīta janaḥ satyam satyam santaḥ upāsate loṣṭha mardī tṛṇa chedī nakha khādī tu yaḥ naraḥ nitya ucchiṣṭaḥ śaṅku śukaḥ na iha āyuḥ vindate mahat yajuṣā saṃskṛtam māṃsam nivṛttaḥ māṃsa bhakṣaṇāt na bhakṣayet vṛthāmāṃsam pṛṣṭha māṃsam ca varjayet kāmyam karma phalam labdhvā gurūṇām upapādayet gurūn abhyarcya yujyante āyuṣā yaśasā śriyā tīrthānām hṛdayam tīrtham śucīnām hṛdayam śuciḥ sarvam ārya kṛtam śaucam vāla saṃsparśanāni ca sāyam prātar ca viprāṇām pradiṣṭam abhivādanam devagoṣṭhe gavām madhye brāhmaṇānām kriyāpathe svādhyāye bhojane ca eva dakṣiṇam pāṇim uddharet sāyam prātar ca viprāṇām pūjanam ca yathāvidhi paṇyānām śobhanam paṇyam kṛṣīṇām bādyate kṛṣiḥ bahu kāram ca sasyānām vāhye vāhyam tathā gavām saṃpannam bhojane nityam pānīye tarpaṇam tathā su śṛtam pāyase brūyāt yavāgvām kṛsare tathā śmaśrukarmaṇi saṃprāpte kṣute snāne atha bhojane vyādhitānām ca sarveṣām āyuṣyam abhinandanam prati ādityam na meheta na paśyet ātmanaḥ śakṛt tvaṃkāram nāmadheyam ca jyeṣṭhānām parivarjayet avarāṇām samānānām ubhayeṣām na duṣyati hṛdayam pāpa vṛttānām pāpam ākhyāti vaikṛtam jñāna pūrvam vinaśyanti gūhamānāḥ mahājane jñāna pūrvam kṛtam pāpam chādayanti a bahu śrutāḥ na enam manuṣyāḥ paśyanti paśyanti tridivaukasaḥ pāpena hi kṛtam pāpam pāpam eva anuvartate pāpam kṛtam na sphurate yathā aghaiḥ pāpam kṛtam na smarati iha mūḍhaḥ vivartamānasya tat eti kartuḥ āśayā saṃcitam dravyam yat kāle na iha bhujyate tat budhāḥ na praśaṃsanti maraṇam na pratīkṣate mānasam sarva bhūtānām dharmam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ tasmāt sarveṣu bhūteṣu manasā śivam ācaret kevalam vidhim āsādya sahāyaḥ kim kariṣyati devāḥ yoniḥ manuṣyāṇām devānām amṛtam divi uvāca kutas sṛṣṭam idam viśvam jagat sthāvara jaṅgamam uvāca sṛṣṭi pralaya saṃyuktam ācāryaiḥ paridarśitam yat jñātvā puruṣaḥ loke prītim saukhyam ca vindati ātmānam amalam rājan āvṛtya evam vyavasthitam tat vidvān naṣṭa pāpmā eṣa brahma bhūyāya kalpate aṇḍa āvaraṇa bhūtānām paryantam hi yathā tamaḥ pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśam apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamam mahābhūtāni bhūtānām sarveṣām prabhava apyayau tatas sṛṣṭāni tatra eva tāni yānti punar punar mahābhūtāni bhūteṣu sāgarasya ūrmayaḥ yathā prasārya ca yathā aṅgāni kūrmaḥ saṃharate punar tadvat bhūtāni bhūtātmā sṛṣṭvā saṃharate punar sa teṣām guṇa saṃghātaḥ śarīre bharata ṛṣabha yat vinā na eva śṛṇute na paśyati na dīpyate jñānam tat eka rūpa ākhyam nānā prajñā anvitam tadā na te vācā anurūpam syāt yayā atha rā rasa vivarjitam ākāśāt khalu yājyeṣu bhavanti su mahā guṇāḥ mahābhūteṣu bhūtātmā sṛṣṭvā saṃharate punar mahābhūtāni pañca eva sarva bhūteṣu bhūta kṛt śabdaḥ śrotram tathā khāni trayam ākāśa yoni jam vāyoḥ tvac sparśa ceṣṭāḥ ca vāc iti etat catuṣṭayam rasaḥ kledaḥ ca jihvā ca trayaḥ jala guṇāḥ smṛtāḥ ghreyam ghrāṇam śarīram ca te tu bhūmi guṇāḥ trayaḥ mahābhūtāni pañca eva ṣaṣṭham tu manaḥ ucyate indriyāṇi manaḥ ca eva vijñānāni asya bhārata saptamī buddhiḥ iti āhuḥ kṣetrajñaḥ punar aṣṭamaḥ cakṣuḥ ālokanāya eva saṃśayam kurute manaḥ buddhiḥ adhyavasāyāya kṣetrajñaḥ sākṣi vat sthitaḥ cicchaktyā adhiṣṭhitā buddhiḥ cetanā iti abhiviśrutā na utsṛjan visṛjan ca eva śarīram dṛśyate yadā ūrdhvam pāda talābhyām yat arvāk ūrdhvam ca paśyati puruṣe ca indriyāṇi iha veditavyāni kṛtsnaśas tamaḥ rajaḥ ca sattvam ca viddhi bhāvān tad āśrayān etām buddhvā naraḥ buddhyā bhūtānām āgatim gatim manaḥ ṣaṣṭhāni sarvāṇi buddhi abhāve kutas guṇāḥ yena paśyati tat cakṣuḥ śṛṇoti śrotram ucyate jighrati ghrāṇam iti āhuḥ rasam jānāti jihvayā adhiṣṭhānāni buddheḥ hi pṛthak arthāni pañcadhā pañca indriyāṇi yāni āhuḥ tāni adṛśyaḥ adhitiṣṭhati puruṣa dhiṣṭhitā buddhiḥ triṣu bhāveṣu vartate evam narāṇām manasi triṣu bhāveṣu avasthitā sā iyam bhāva ātmakā bhāvān trīn etān na ativartate saritām sāgaraḥ bhartā mahā velām iva ūrmimān indriyāṇi hi sarvāṇi pradarśayati tā sadā prītiḥ sattvam rajaḥ śokaḥ tamaḥ mohaḥ ca te trayaḥ iti buddhi gatiḥ sarvā vyākhyātā tava bhārata indriyāṇi ca sarvāṇi vijetavyāni dhīmatā sattvam rajaḥ tamaḥ ca eva prāṇinām saṃśritāḥ sadā sāttvikā rājasā ca eva tāmasā ca iti bhārata sukha sparśaḥ sattva guṇaḥ duḥkha sparśaḥ rajas guṇaḥ praharṣaḥ prītiḥ ānandaḥ sukham saṃśānta citta tā atuṣṭiḥ paritāpaḥ ca śokaḥ lobhaḥ tathā akṣamā liṅgāni rajasaḥ tāni dṛśyante hetu ahetubhiḥ katham cit abhivartante vividhāḥ tāmasāḥ guṇāḥ dūra gam bahudhā āgāmi prārthanā saṃśaya ātmakam sattva kṣetrajñayoḥ etat antaram paśya sūkṣmayoḥ sṛjate tu guṇān ekaḥ ekaḥ na sṛjate guṇān na guṇāḥ viduḥ ātmānam sa guṇān vetti sarvaśas paridraṣṭā guṇānām ca saṃsraṣṭā manyate sadā nirviceṣṭaiḥ a jānadbhiḥ paramātmā pradīpa vat sṛjate hi guṇān sattvam kṣetrajñaḥ paripaśyati sattvam manaḥ saṃsṛjati na guṇān vai kadā cana raśmīn teṣām sa manasā yadā samyak niyacchati tadā prakāśate asya ātmā ghaṭe dīpaḥ jvalan iva tyaktvā yaḥ prākṛtam karma nityam ātma ratiḥ muniḥ sarva bhūta ātma bhūtaḥ syāt sa gacchet paramām gatim yathā vāri caraḥ pakṣī lipyamānaḥ na lipyate a śocan a prahṛṣyan ca caret vigata matsaraḥ svabhāva siddhyā saṃsiddhān sa nityam sṛjate guṇān ūrṇanābhiḥ yathā sraṣṭā vijñeyāḥ tantu vat guṇāḥ iti imam hṛdaya granthim buddhi bheda mayam dṛḍham vimucya sukham āsīta na śocet chinna saṃśayaḥ malina prāpnuyuḥ śuddhim yathā pūrṇām nadīm narāḥ avagāhya su vidvasaḥ viddhi jñānam idam tathā mahā nadīm hi pāra jñaḥ tapyate na taran yathā etām buddhvā naraḥ sarvām bhūtānām āgatim gatim avekṣya ca śanais buddhyā labhate śam param tatas na ca ātmā śakyate draṣṭum indriyeṣu vibhāgaśaḥ tatra tatra visṛṣṭeṣu durjayeṣu akṛtātmabhiḥ dhiṣṇya adhipe prasanne tu sthitim etām nirīkṣate ati dūrāt ca sūkṣma tvāt prasthānam na prakāśate prapadya tat śruta āhvāni cit mayam svīkṛtam vinā vijñāya tat hi manyante kṛtakṛtyāḥ manīṣiṇaḥ uvāca yam jñātvā śāśvatīm siddhim gacchanti parama ṛṣayaḥ yathā su anuṣṭhitam dhyānam tathā kurvanti yogin mahā ṛṣayaḥ jñāna tṛptāḥ nirvāṇa gata mānasāḥ na āvṛt punar pārtha muktāḥ saṃsāra doṣa janma doṣa parikṣīṇāḥ svabhāve paryavasthitāḥ nirdvaṃdvāḥ nitya sattva sthāḥ vimuktāḥ nityam āśritāḥ a saṅgīni a vivādīni manaḥ śānti karāṇi ca tatra svādhyāya saṃśliṣṭam ekāgram dhārayet manaḥ piṇḍīkṛtya indriya grāmam āsīnaḥ kāṣṭha vat muniḥ rūpam na cakṣuṣā vidyāt jihvayā na rasān tathā tatas manasi saṃsajya pañcavargam vicakṣaṇaḥ visaṃcāri nirālambam pañca dvāram calācalam indriyāṇi manaḥ ca eva yadā piṇḍīkaroti ayam eṣa dhyāna pathaḥ pūrvaḥ mayā samanuvarṇitaḥ tasya tat pūrva saṃruddham manaḥ ṣaṣṭham anantaram samāhitam kṣaṇam kim cit dhyāna vartmani tiṣṭhati muneḥ samādadhānasya prathamam dhyānam āditas manasā kliśyamānaḥ tu samādhānam ca kārayet pāṃsu bhasma karīṣāṇām yathā vai rāśayaḥ citāḥ sahasā vāriṇā siktāḥ na yānti paribhāvanām kim cit snigdham yathā ca syāt śuṣka cūrṇam a bhāvitam pūrvam dhyāna patham prāpya nitya yogena śāmyati uvāca nānā āśrayāḥ ca bahavaḥ itihāsāḥ pṛthagvidhāḥ śrutāḥ tvattaḥ kathāḥ ca eva dharma yuktāḥ mahāmate jāpakānām phala avāptim śrotum icchāmi bhārata kim phalam japatām uktam kva vā tiṣṭhanti jāpakāḥ jāpakāḥ iti kim ca etat sāṃkhya yoga kriyā vidhiḥ uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam ikṣvākoḥ ca eva mṛtyoḥ ca vivādaḥ dharma kāraṇāt veda vāda abhinirvṛttā śāntiḥ brahmaṇi avasthitau mārgau tau api ubhau etau saṃśritau na ca saṃśritau yathā saṃśrūyate rājan kāraṇam ca atra vakṣyate sa ālambanam iti jñeyam japa yajña ātmakam śubham dhyānam tapaḥ damaḥ kṣāntiḥ anasūyā mita aśanam viṣaya pratisaṃhāraḥ mita jalpaḥ tathā śamaḥ eṣa pravṛttakaḥ dharmaḥ nivṛttakam atho śṛṇu yujyate nṛpa śārdūla su saṃvedyam hi tat kila yathā saṃśrūyate jāpaḥ yena vai jāpakaḥ bhavet saṃhitā praṇavena eva sāvitrī ca parā matā trividham mārgam āsādya vyakta avyaktam anāśrayam kuśa uccaya niṣaṇṇaḥ san kuśa hastaḥ kuśaiḥ śikhī dhyānam utpādayati atra saṃhitā bala saṃśrayāt śuddha ātmā tapasā dāntaḥ nivṛtta dveṣa kāmavān atha abhimata mantreṇa praṇava ādyam japet kṛtī na kartā akaraṇīyānām na kāryāṇām iti sthitiḥ na ca ātma grahaṇe yuktaḥ na avamānī na ca akriyaḥ dhyāna kriyā paraḥ yuktaḥ dhyānavān dhyāna niścayaḥ sa vai tasyām avasthāyām sarva tyāga kṛtaḥ sukhī nirīhaḥ tyajati prāṇān brāhmīm saṃśrayate tanum nirālambaḥ bhavet smṛtvā maraṇāya samādhimān ātma buddhim samāsthāya śāntībhūtaḥ nirāmayaḥ amṛtam virajaḥ śuddham ātmānam pratipadyate uvāca gatīnām uttamā prāptiḥ kathitā jāpakeṣu iha ekā eva eṣā gatiḥ teṣām uta yānti aparām api uvāca śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ rājan jāpakānām gatim vibho yathā uktam etat pūrvam yaḥ na anutiṣṭhati jāpakaḥ īdṛśaḥ jāpakaḥ yāti nirayam na atra saṃśayaḥ ahaṃkāra kṛtaḥ ca eva sarve niraya gāminaḥ para avamānī puruṣaḥ bhavitā niraya upagaḥ a kṛta prajñakaḥ bālaḥ moham gacchati jāpakaḥ dṛḍhagrāhī karomi iti japyam japati jāpakaḥ uvāca sat bhūtaḥ jāpakaḥ kasmāt sa śarīram atha āviśet uvāca duṣprajñānena nirayāḥ bahavaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ praśastam jāpaka tvam ca doṣāḥ ca ete tad ātmakāḥ uvāca kīdṛśaḥ jāpakaḥ yāti nirayam varṇayasva me uvāca dharmasya aṃśaḥ prasūtaḥ asi dharmiṣṭhaḥ asi svabhāvataḥ dharma mūla āśrayam vākyam śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ anagha amūni yāni sthānāni devānām parama ātmanām nānā saṃsthāna varṇāni nānā rūpa phalāni ca divyāni kāma cārīṇi vimānāni sabhāḥ tathā ākrīḍāḥ vividhāḥ rājan padminyaḥ ca amala udakāḥ caturṇām lokapālānām śukrasya atha bṛhaspateḥ marutām viśvadevānām sādhyānām aśvinoḥ api rudra āditya vasūnām ca tathā anyeṣām divaukasām abhayam ca animittam ca na ca kleśa bhaya āvṛtam catur lakṣaṇa varjam tu catur kāraṇa varjitam etat vai brahmaṇaḥ sthānam jāpakasya mahātmanaḥ tatrastham paramātmānam dhyāyan vai su samāhitaḥ hiraṇyagarbha sāyujyam prāpnuyāt vā nṛpa uttama ātma kevala tām prāptaḥ tatra gatvā na śocati īdṛśam paramam sthānam nirayāḥ te ca tādṛśāḥ uvāca kāla mṛtyu yamānām ca brāhmaṇasya ca sattama vivādaḥ vyāhṛtaḥ pūrvam tat bhavān vaktum arhati uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam ikṣvākoḥ sūrya putrasya yat vṛttam brāhmaṇasya ca yathā sa teṣām saṃvādaḥ yasmin sthāne api ca abhavat brāhmaṇaḥ jāpakaḥ kaḥ cit dharma vṛttaḥ mahā yaśāḥ ṣaḍaṅga vid mahā prājñaḥ paippalādiḥ sa kauśikaḥ tasya aparokṣam vijñānam ṣaḍaṅgeṣu tathā eva ca vedeṣu ca eva niṣṇātaḥ himavat pāda saṃśrayaḥ saḥ antyam brāhmam tapaḥ tepe saṃhitām saṃyataḥ japan sa devyā darśitaḥ sākṣāt prītā asmi iti tadā kila japyam āvartayan tūṣṇīm na ca tām kim cit abravīt tasya anukampayā devī prītā samabhavat tadā caturbhiḥ akṣaraiḥ yuktā soma pāne akṣara aṣṭakā jagat bīja samāyuktā caturviṃśa akṣara ātmakā samāpta japyaḥ tu utthāya śirasā pādayoḥ tathā papāta devyāḥ dharma ātmā vacanam ca idam abravīt diṣṭyā devi prasannā tvam darśanam ca āgatā mama uvāca kim prārthayasi viprarṣe kim ca iṣṭam karavāṇi te prabrūhi japatām śreṣṭha sarvam tat te bhaviṣyati uvāca idam ca eva aparam prāha devī tad priya kāmyayā nirayam na eva yātāsi yatra yātāḥ dvijarṣabhāḥ bhavitā ca vivādaḥ atra tava teṣām ca dharmataḥ brāhmaṇaḥ api japan āste divyam varṣa śatam tadā sākṣāt prītaḥ tadā dharmaḥ darśayām āsa tam dvijam dvijāte paśya mām dharmam aham tvām draṣṭum āgataḥ japyasya ca phalam yat te saṃprāptam tat ca me śṛṇu jitāḥ lokāḥ tvayā sarve ye divyāḥ ye ca mānuṣāḥ devānām nirayān sādho sarvān utkramya yāsyasi tyaktvā ātmanaḥ śarīram ca tatas lokān avāpsyasi uvāca acalam te manaḥ kṛtvā tyaja deham mahāmate anena kim te saṃyogaḥ katham moham gamiṣyasi avaśyam bhoḥ śarīram te tyaktavyam muni puṃgava uvāca alam dehe manaḥ kṛtvā tyaktvā deham sukhī bhava uvāca rame japan mahābhāga kṛtam lokaiḥ sanātanaiḥ eṣa kālaḥ tathā mṛtyuḥ yamaḥ ca tvām upāgatāḥ uvāca brāhmaṇam tam mahābhāgam upāgamya idam abruvan phala prāptiḥ tava śreṣṭhā yamaḥ aham tvām upabruve kālaḥ te svargam āroḍhum kālaḥ aham tvām upāgataḥ mṛtyum mā viddhi dharma jña rūpiṇam svayam āgatam uvāca svāgatam sūryaputrāya kālāya ca mahātmane mṛtyave ca atha dharmāya kim kāryam karavāṇi vaḥ uvāca abravīt parama prītaḥ sva śaktyā kim karomi vaḥ bhavantaḥ loka sāmānyāḥ kimartham brūta sattamāḥ uvāca coditāḥ dhāvamānāḥ vai karma bhāgam anuvratāḥ tasmin eva atha kāle tu tīrtha yātrām upāgataḥ sarvān eva tu rājarṣiḥ saṃpūjya abhipraṇamya ca kuśala praśnam akarot sarveṣām rāja sattamaḥ abravīt brāhmaṇaḥ vākyam kṛtvā kuśala saṃvidam uvāca rājā aham brāhmaṇaḥ ca tvam yadi ṣaṭkarma saṃsthitaḥ uvāca dvividhāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ rājan dharmaḥ ca dvividhaḥ smṛtaḥ aham na pratigṛhṇāmi kim iṣṭam kim dadāni te brūhi tvam nṛpati śreṣṭha tapasā sādhayāmi kim uvāca kṣatriyaḥ aham na jānāmi dehi iti vacanam kva cit uvāca tuṣyasi tvam svadharmeṇa tathā tuṣṭāḥ mayam nṛpa uvāca sva śaktyā aham dadāni iti tvayā pūrvam prabhāṣitam yāce tvām dīyatām mahyam japyasya asya phalam dvija uvāca yuddham mama sadā vāṇī yācati iti vikatthase na ca yuddham mayā sārdham kimartham yācase punar uvāca vāc vajrāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ proktāḥ kṣatriyāḥ bāhu jīvinaḥ uvāca sā eva adya api pratijñā me sva śaktyā kim pradīyatām uvāca yat tat varṣa śatam pūrṇam japyam vai japatā tvayā uvāca paramam gṛhyatām tasya phalam yat japitam mayā uvāca kṛtam sarveṇa bhadram te japyam yat yācitam mayā uvāca phala prāptim na jānāmi dattam yat japitam mayā ayam dharmaḥ ca kālaḥ ca yamaḥ mṛtyuḥ ca sākṣiṇaḥ uvāca uvāca na ādade apara vaktavyam dattam vācā phalam mayā vākyam pramāṇam rājarṣe mama api tava ca eva hi sakṛt aṃśaḥ nipatati sakṛt kanyā pradīyate sakṛt eva dadāni iti trīṇi etāni sakṛt sakṛt na abhisaṃdhiḥ mayā japye kṛta pūrvaḥ katham cana japyasya rāja śārdūla katham jñāsyāmi aham phalam dadasva iti tvayā ca uktam dadāmi iti tathā mayā na vācam dūṣayiṣyāmi satyam rakṣa sthiraḥ bhava mahān adharmaḥ bhavitā tava rājan mṛṣā kṛtaḥ na yuktam tu mṛṣā vāṇī tvayā vaktum ariṃdama tathā mayā api abhyadhikam mṛṣā vaktum na śakyate saṃśrutam ca mayā pūrvam dadāni iti avicāritam tat gṛhṇīṣva avicāreṇa yadi satye sthitaḥ bhavān iha āgamya hi mām rājan jāpyam phalam ayācithāḥ tat mad nisṛṣṭam gṛhṇīṣva bhava satye sthiraḥ api ca kutas eva avarān rājan mṛṣāvāda parāyaṇaḥ na yajña adhyayane dānam niyamāḥ tārayanti hi tapāṃsi yāni cīrṇāni cariṣyasi ca yat tapaḥ samāḥ śataiḥ sahasraiḥ ca tat satyāt na viśiṣyate satyam eka akṣaram brahma satyam eka akṣaram tapaḥ satyam eka akṣaraḥ yajñaḥ satyam eka akṣaram śrutam satyam vedāḥ tathā aṅgāni satyam yajñaḥ tathā vidhiḥ prāṇinām jananam satyam satyam saṃtatiḥ eva ca satyam yajñaḥ tapaḥ vedāḥ stobhāḥ mantrāḥ sarasvatī samām kakṣām dhārayataḥ yatas satyam tatas adhikam satye kuru sthiram bhāvam mā rājan anṛtam kṛthāḥ kasmāt tvam anṛtam vākyam dehi iti kuruṣe aśubham yadi japya phalam dattam mayā na iṣiṣyase nṛpa ubhau ānṛtikau etau na mṛṣā kartum arhasi uvāca dātāraḥ kṣatriyāḥ proktāḥ gṛhṇīyām bhavataḥ katham uvāca iha āgamya tu yācitvā na gṛhṇīṣe punar katham svargam mām viddhi rāja indra rūpiṇam svayam āgatam uvāca uvāca bālye yadi syāt ajñānāt mayā hastaḥ prasāritaḥ nivṛtti lakṣaṇam dharmam upāse saṃhitām japan nivṛttam mām ciram rājan vipram lobhayase katham tapaḥ svādhyāya śīlaḥ aham nivṛttaḥ ca pratigrahāt uvāca dvijāḥ pratigrahe yuktāḥ dātāraḥ rāja vaṃśa jāḥ mā vā bhūt sahabhojyam mau madīyam phalam āpnuhi uvāca gṛhītvā anyonyam āveṣṭya ku celau ūcatuḥ vacaḥ na me dhārayasi iti ekaḥ dhārayāmi iti ca aparaḥ iha asti mau vivādaḥ ayam ayam rājā anuśāsakaḥ anṛtam vadasi iha tvam ṛṇam te dhārayāmi aham tau ubhau bhṛśa saṃtaptau rājānam idam ūcatuḥ parīkṣyatām yathā syāva naūnām iha vigarhitau uvāca dadataḥ ca na gṛhṇāti vikṛtaḥ me mahīpate uvāca mithyā bravīti ayam hi tvā mithyā bhāsam narādhipa uvāca śrutvā tathā kariṣyāmi iti evam mama dhīyate matiḥ uvāca śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ rājan yathā etat dhārayāmi aham dhenuḥ viprāya rājarṣe tapaḥ svādhyāya śīline tasyāḥ ca ayam mayā rājan phalam abhyetya yācitaḥ vikṛtena ca me dattam viśūddhena antarātmanā yathāvidhi yathāśraddham tat asya aham punar prabho ekasyāḥ puruṣa vyāghra kaḥ śuddhaḥ kaḥ atra doṣavān evam vivadamānau svaḥ tvām iha abhyāgatau nṛpa uvāca dīyamānam na gṛhṇāsi ṛṇam kasmāt tvam adya vai yathā eva te abhyanujñātam tathā gṛhṇīṣva māciram uvāca dīyatām iti anena uktam dadāni iti tathā mayā na ayam me dhārayati atra gamyatām yatra vāñchati uvāca dadataḥ asya na gṛhṇāsi viṣamam pratibhāti me daṇḍay hi tvam mama man na as atra khalu saṃśayaḥ uvāca mad asya dā rājarṣe gṛhṇīyām tat katham punar kāmam atra aparādhaḥ mama daṇḍyam ājñāpaya prabho uvāca dīyamāna yadi mayā na iṣ katham cana niyam tvad nṛpati ayam dharma anuśāsaka uvāca gṛhṇīyām gacchatu bhavān abhyanujñām dadāni te uvāca pratijñātam mayā yat te tat gṛhāṇa avicāritam uvāca jāpakasya dṛḍhīkāraḥ katham etat bhaviṣyati yadi tāvat na gṛhṇāmi brāhmaṇena apavarjitam uvāca tau ca uvāca sa rājarṣiḥ kṛta kāryau gamiṣyathaḥ na idānīm mām iha āsādya rāja dharmaḥ bhavet mṛṣā svadharmaḥ paripālyaḥ ca rājñām eṣa viniścayaḥ vipra dharmaḥ ca su guruḥ mām anātmānam āviśat uvāca gṛhāṇa dhāray mad tvad yācitam te śru mayā na ced grahīṣyase rājan śapiṣye tvām na saṃśayaḥ uvāca dhik rāja dharmam yasya ayam kāryasya iha viniścayaḥ eṣa pāṇiḥ apūrvam bho nikṣepa artham prasāritaḥ yad mad dhāray vipra tad idānīm pradā uvāca saṃhitām japatā yāvān mayā kaḥ cit guṇaḥ kṛtaḥ tat sarvam pratigṛhṇīṣva yadi kim cit iha asti me uvāca uvāca kāma krodhau vid mad tvad mā kāray bhavat na ayam dhārayate kim cit jijñāsā tvad kṛte kṛtā kālaḥ dharmaḥ tathā mṛtyuḥ kāma krodhau tathā yuvam sarve gacchāma yatra svān svān lokān ca tathā vayam gaccha lokān jitān svena karmaṇā yatra vāñchasi mākam yaḥ smṛtaḥ mūrdhā brahma lokam iti smṛtam tvayoḥ kāmaḥ āpannaḥ tat kāmyam aviśaṅkayā uvāca jāpakānām phala avāptiḥ mayā te saṃprakīrtitā gatiḥ sthānam ca lokāḥ ca jāpakena yathā ji prayāti saṃhitā adhyāyī brahmāṇam parameṣṭhinam atha vā agnim samāyāti sūryam āviśate api vā guṇān teṣām samādatte rāgeṇa pratimohitaḥ evam some tathā vāyau bhūmi ākāśa śarīra gaḥ sa rāgaḥ tatra vasati guṇān teṣām samācaran amṛtāt ca amṛtam prāptaḥ śītībhūtaḥ nirātmavān brahma bhūtaḥ sa nirdvaṃdvaḥ sukhī śāntaḥ nirāmayaḥ aduḥkham ajaram śāntam sthānam tat pratipadyate catur lakṣaṇaiḥ hā tathā ṣaḍbhiḥ sa ṣoḍaśa puruṣam samatikramya ākāśam pratipadyate atha vā vīkṣate lokān sarvān niraya saṃsthā evam eṣā mahā rāja jāpakasya gatiḥ yathā etat te sarvam ākhyātam kim bhūyas śrotum icchasi uvāca brāhmaṇaḥ vā atha vā rājā tat me brūhi pitāmaha saṃvādaḥ vā tayoḥ kaḥ abhūt kim vā tau tatra cakratuḥ uvāca yamam kālam ca mṛtyum ca svargam saṃpūjya ca arhataḥ pūrvam ye ca apare tatra sametāḥ brāhmaṇa ṛṣabhāḥ sarvān saṃpūjya śirasā rājānam saḥ abravīt vacaḥ bhavatā ca abhyanujñātaḥ japeyam bhūyas eva hi śraddhā te japataḥ nityam bhavitā iti viśām pate uvāca uvāca kṛtaḥ prayatnaḥ su mahān sarveṣām saṃnidhau iha uvāca sādhyāḥ viśve atha marutaḥ jyotīṃṣi su mahānti ca nadyaḥ śailāḥ samudrāḥ ca tīrthāni vividhāni ca tapāṃsi saṃyoga vidhiḥ vedāḥ stobhāḥ sarasvatī nāradaḥ parvataḥ ca eva viśvāvasuḥ hahā huhūḥ nāgāḥ siddhāḥ ca munayaḥ devadevaḥ prajāpatiḥ viṣṇuḥ sahasra śīrṣaḥ ca devaḥ acintyaḥ samāgamat avādyanta antarikṣe ca bheryaḥ tūryāṇi ca abhibho puṣpa varṣāṇi divyāni tatra teṣām mahātmanām nanṛtuḥ ca apsaraḥ saṃghāḥ tatra tatra samantataḥ atha svargaḥ tathā rūpī brāhmaṇam vākyam abravīt saṃsiddhaḥ tvam mahābhāga tvam ca siddhaḥ tathā nṛpa prāṇa apānau tathā udānam samānam vyānam eva ca evam tān manasi sthāpya dadhatuḥ prāṇayoḥ manaḥ kuṅkuṇyām ca eva manasā śanais dhārayataḥ sma tau niśceṣṭābhyām śarīrābhyām sthira dṛṣṭī samāhitau jita āsanau tathā ādhāya mūrdhani ātmānam eva ca tālu deśam atha uddālya brāhmaṇasya mahātmanaḥ jyotiḥ jvālā su mahatī jagāma tridivam tadā hāhākāraḥ tatas dikṣu sarvāsu su mahān abhūt tat jyotiḥ stūyamānam sma brahmāṇam prāviśat tadā tatas svāgatam iti āha tat tejaḥ sa pitāmahaḥ prādeśa mātram puruṣam pratyudgamya viśām pate bhūyas ca eva aparam prāha vacanam madhuram sma saḥ jāpakaiḥ tulya phala tā yogānām na atra saṃśayaḥ jāpakānām viśiṣṭam tu pratyutthānam samādhikam uṣyatām mayi ca iti uktvā acetayat sa tatas punar atha asya praviveśa āsyam brāhmaṇaḥ vigata jvaraḥ jāpaka artham ayam yatnaḥ tad artham vayam āgatāḥ kṛta pūjau imau tulyam tvayā tulya phalau imau yoga jāpakayoḥ dṛṣṭam phalam su mahat adya vai sarvān lokān atītya etau gacchetām yatra vāñchitam mahāsmṛtim paṭhet yaḥ tu tathā eva anusmṛtim śubhām gamyatām sādhayiṣyāmi yathāsthānāni siddhaye uvāca āmantrya tam tatas devāḥ yayuḥ svam svam niveśanam pṛṣṭhatas anuyayuḥ rājan sarve su prīta mānasāḥ etat phalam jāpakānām gatiḥ ca eva prakīrtitā yathāśrutam mahā rāja kim bhūyas śrotum icchasi uvāca kim phalam jñāna yogasya vedānām niyamasya ca bhūtātmā vā katham jñeyaḥ tat me brūhi pitāmaha uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam manoḥ prajāpateḥ vādam mahā ṛṣeḥ ca bṛhaspateḥ prajāpatim śreṣṭhatamam pṛthivyām devarṣi saṃgha pravaraḥ mahā ṛṣiḥ bṛhaspatiḥ praśnam imam purāṇam papraccha śiṣyaḥ atha gurum praṇamya yad kāraṇam mantra vidhiḥ pravṛt jñāne phalam yat pravadanti viprāḥ mahī mahī jāḥ pavanaḥ antarikṣam jalaukasaḥ ca eva jalam divam ca na ca api aham veda param purāṇam mithyāpravṛttim ca katham nu kuryām ṛc sāma saṃghān ca yajūṃṣi ca aham chandāṃsi nakṣatra gatim niruktam adhītya ca vyākaraṇam sa kalpam śikṣām ca bhūtaprakṛtim na vedmi sa me bhavān śaṃsatu sarvam etat jñāne phalam karmaṇi vā yat asti sāmānya śabdaiḥ ca viśeṣaṇaiḥ ca sa me bhavān śaṃsatu tāvat etat yathā ca dehāt cyavate śarīrī punar śarīram ca yathā abhyupaiti iṣṭam ca me syāt itarat ca na syāt etad kṛte karma vidhiḥ pravṛttaḥ iṣṭam tu aniṣṭam ca na mām bhajeta iti etad kṛte jñāna vidhiḥ pravṛt iṣṭam tu aniṣṭam ca sukha asukhe ca param hi tat karma pathāt apetam brahma param hi avaśyam prajāḥ sṛṣṭāḥ manasā karmaṇā ca dvau api etau sat pathau loka juṣṭau dṛṣṭvā karma śāśvatam ca antavat ca manaḥ tyāgaḥ kāraṇam na anyat asti svena ātmanā cakṣuḥ iva praṇetā niśā atyaye tamasā saṃvṛta ātmā jñānam tu vijñāna guṇena yuktam karma aśubham paśyati varjanīyam sarpān kuśa agrāṇi tathā udapānam jñātvā manuṣyāḥ parivarjayanti ajñānataḥ tatra patanti mūḍhāḥ jñāne phalam paśya yathā viśiṣṭam anna pradānam manasaḥ samādhiḥ pañca ātmakam karma phalam vadanti śabdāḥ ca rūpāṇi rasāḥ ca puṇyāḥ sparśāḥ ca gandhāḥ ca śubhāḥ tathā eva śarīram eva āyatanam sukhasya duḥkhasya ca api āyatanam śarīram yathāguṇam karma gaṇam phala arthī karoti ayam karma phale niviṣṭaḥ tathā tathā ayam guṇa saṃprayuktaḥ śubha aśubham karma phalam bhunakti śubhe tu asau tuṣyati duṣkṛte tu na tuṣyate vai paramaḥ śarīrī yat mantra śabdaiḥ a kṛta prakāśam tat ucyamānam śṛṇu me param yat agrāhyam avyaktam avarṇam ekam pañca prakāram sasṛje prajānām jalāt prasūtā jagatī jagatyām jāyate jagat na uṣṇam na śītam mṛdu na api tīkṣṇam na amlam kaṣāyam madhuram na tiktam sparśam tanuḥ veda rasam tu jihvā ghrāṇam ca gandhān śravaṇe ca śabdān rūpāṇi cakṣuḥ na ca tad param yat gṛhṇanti an adhyātma vidaḥ manuṣyāḥ nivartayitvā rasanam rasebhyaḥ ghrāṇam ca gandhāt śravaṇe ca śabdāt sparśāt tanum rūpa guṇāt tu cakṣuḥ tatas param paśyati svam svabhāvam yasmin ca yat yena ca yaḥ ca kartā tad kāraṇam tam samupāyam āhuḥ yaḥ sarva hetuḥ parama artha kārī tat kāraṇam kāryam atas yat anyat yathā ca kaḥ cit sukṛtaiḥ manuṣyaḥ śubha aśubham prāpnute atha avirodhāt evam śarīreṣu śubha aśubheṣu sva karma jaiḥ jñānam idam nibaddham yathā pradīpaḥ puratas pradīptaḥ prakāśam anyasya karoti dīpyan tathā iha pañca indriya dīpavṛkṣāḥ jñāna pradīptāḥ paravantaḥ eva yathā hi rājñaḥ bahavaḥ hi amātyāḥ pṛthak pramānam pravadanti yuktāḥ tadvat śarīreṣu bhavanti pañca jñāna eka deśaḥ paramaḥ sa tebhyaḥ yathā arciṣaḥ agneḥ pavanasya vegāḥ marīcayaḥ arkasya nadīṣu ca apaḥ gacchanti ca āyānti ca tanyamānāḥ tadvat śarīrāṇi śarīriṇām tu yathā ca kaḥ cit paraśum gṛhītvā dhūmam na paśyet jvalanam ca kāṣṭhe tāni eva kāṣṭhāni yathā vimathya dhūmam ca paśyet jvalanam ca yogāt yathā ātmanaḥ aṅgam patitam pṛthivyām svapna antare paśyati ca ātmanaḥ anyat na cakṣuṣā paśyati rūpam ātmanaḥ na ca api saṃsparśam upaiti kim cit na ca api taiḥ sādhayate atha kāryam te tam na paśyanti sa paśyate tān yathā manuṣyaḥ parimucya kāyam adṛśyam anyat viśate śarīram kham vāyum agnim salilam tathā urvīm samantataḥ abhyāviśate śarīrī nānā āśrayāḥ karmasu vartamānāḥ śrotra ādayaḥ pañca guṇān śrayante śrotram khāt ghrāṇam atha u pṛthivyāḥ tejaḥ mayam rūpam atha u vipākaḥ jala āśrayaḥ svedaḥ uktaḥ rasaḥ ca vāyu ātmakaḥ sparśa kṛtaḥ guṇaḥ ca calam yathā dṛṣṭi patham paraiti sūkṣmam mahat rūpam iva abhipāti yat indriyaiḥ tu upakṛtān purastāt prāptān guṇān saṃsmarate cirāya teṣu indriyeṣu upahateṣu paścāt sa buddhi rūpaḥ paramaḥ svabhāvaḥ yathābalam saṃcarate sa vidvān tasmāt saḥ ekaḥ paramaḥ śarīrī rajaḥ tamaḥ sattvam atho tṛtīyam gacchati asau jñāna guṇān virūpān na ca anuyāti iha guṇān parātmā tathā indriyāṇi āviśate śarīrī hutāśanam vāyuḥ iva indhana stham na śrotra liṅgam śravaṇe nidarśanam tathāgatam paśyati tat vinaśyati śrotra ādīni na paśyanti svam svam ātmānam ātmanā sarvajñaḥ sarva darśī ca kṣetrajñaḥ tāni paśyati yathā himavataḥ pārśvam pṛṣṭham candramasaḥ yathā na dṛṣṭa pūrvam manujaiḥ na ca tat na asti tāvatā tadvat bhūteṣu bhūtātmā sūkṣmaḥ jñāna ātmavān asau a dṛṣṭa pūrvaḥ cakṣurbhyām na ca asau na asti tāvatā rūpavantam arūpa tvāt udaya astamaye budhāḥ pratyāsannam ninīṣanti jñeyam jñāna abhisaṃhitam mṛgaiḥ mṛgāṇām grahaṇam pakṣiṇām pakṣibhiḥ yathā gajānām ca gajaiḥ evam jñeyam jñānena gṛhyate ahiḥ eva hi aheḥ pādān paśyati iti nidarśanam tadvat mūrtiṣu mūrtiṣṭham jñeyam jñānena paśyati yathā candraḥ hi amāvāsyām aliṅga tvāt na dṛśyate na ca nāśaḥ asya bhavati tathā viddhi śarīriṇam kṣīṇa kośaḥ hi amāvāsyām candramāḥ na prakāśate yathā kośa antaram prāpya candramāḥ bhrājate punar tadvat liṅga antaram prāpya śarīrī bhrājate punar candraḥ eva tu amāvāsyām tathā bhavati mūrtimān na abhisarpat vimuñcat vā śaśinam dṛśyate tamaḥ visṛjan ca upasarpan ca tadvat paśya śarīriṇam yathā candraḥ hi amāvāsyām nakṣatraiḥ yujyate gataḥ yathā ambhasi prasanne tu rūpam paśyati cakṣuṣā tadvat prasanna indriyavān jñeyam jñānena paśyati tathā indriya ākulībhāve jñeyam jñāne na paśyati abuddhiḥ ajñāna kṛtā abuddhyā duṣyate manaḥ duṣṭasya manasaḥ pañca saṃpraduṣyanti mānasāḥ ajñāna tṛptaḥ viṣayeṣu avagāḍhaḥ na dṛśyate a dṛṣṭvā eva tu pūta ātmā viṣayebhyaḥ nivartate nivartate tathā tarṣaḥ pāpam antam gatam yathā śubha aśubha vikāreṇa na sa bhūyas abhijāyate viṣayeṣu ca saṃsargāt śāśvatasya na saṃśrayāt manasā ca anyat ākāṅkṣan param na pratipadyate jñānam utpadyate puṃsām kṣayāt pāpasya karmaṇaḥ buddheḥ parataram jñānam jñānāt parataram param avyaktāt prasṛtam jñānam tatas buddhiḥ tatas manaḥ manaḥ śrotra ādibhiḥ yuktam śabda ādīn sādhu paśyati yaḥ tān tyajati śabda ādīn sarvāḥ ca vyaktayaḥ tathā prasṛtāni indriyāṇi eva pratisaṃharati kūrma vat vimuñcati ākṛti grāmān tān muktvā amṛtam aśnute dṛśyate maṇḍalam tasya na ca dṛśyeta maṇḍalī tadvat dehaḥ tu saṃdṛśyaḥ ātma adṛśyaḥ paraḥ sadā bālye rathābhyām yogena tattva jñānam tu saṃmatam ādatte sarva bhūtānām rasa bhūtam vikāsavān antarātmā tathā deham āviśya indriya raśmibhiḥ raśmi maṇḍala hīnaḥ tu na ca asau na asti tāvatā praṇītam karmaṇā mārgam nīyamānaḥ punar punar asparśanam aśṛṇvānam anāsvādam adarśanam avyaktāt prasṛtam jñānam tatas buddhiḥ tatas manaḥ ātmanaḥ prasṛtā buddhiḥ avyaktam jñānam ucyate tasmāt buddhiḥ smṛtā tajjñaiḥ manaḥ tasmāt tatas smṛtam tasmāt ākṛtayaḥ pañca manaḥ paramam ucyate tasmāt paratarā buddhiḥ jñānam tasmāt param smṛtam tatas sūkṣmaḥ tatas hi ātmā tasmāt parataram na ca indriyāṇi nirīkṣante manasā etāni sarvaśas matiḥ tu atigatā jñānam jñānam tu abhigatam param duḥkha upaghāte śārīre mānase ca api upasthite prajñayā mānasam duḥkham hanyāt śārīram auṣadhaiḥ etat vijñāna sāmarthyam na bālaiḥ sama tām iyāt anityam yauvanam rūpam jīvitam dravya saṃcayaḥ ārogyam priya saṃvāsaḥ gṛdhyet tatra na paṇḍitaḥ sukhāt bahutaram duḥkham jīvite na asti saṃśayaḥ duḥkhena ca adhigamyante nāśam eṣām na cintayet jñānam jñeya abhinirvṛttam viddhi jñāna guṇam manas tadā prajñāyate brahma dhyāna yoga samādhinā sā iyam guṇavatī buddhiḥ guṇeṣu eva abhivartate avatāra abhiniḥsrotam gireḥ śṛṅgāt iva udakam yadā nirguṇam āpnoti dhyānam manasi pūrva jam tadā prajñāyate brahma nikaṣyam nikaṣe yathā na samakṣam guṇa avekṣi nirguṇasya nidarśanam sarvāṇi etāni saṃvārya dvārāṇi manasi sthitaḥ yathā mahānti bhūtāni nivartante guṇa kṣaye vyavasāya guṇa upetā tadā saṃpadyate manaḥ guṇavadbhiḥ guṇa upetam yadā dhyāna guṇam manaḥ tadā sarva guṇān hitvā nirguṇam pratipadyate yatra na asti pada nyāsaḥ kaḥ tam viṣayam āpnuyāt tapasā ca anumānena guṇaiḥ jātyā śrutena ca ninīṣet tat param brahma viśuddhena antarātmanā guṇa hīnaḥ hi tam mārgam bahis samanuvartate guṇa abhāvāt prakṛtyā ca nistarkyam jñeya saṃmitam guṇa prasāriṇī buddhiḥ hutāśanaḥ iva indhane evam prakṛtitaḥ sarve prabhavanti śarīriṇaḥ puruṣaḥ prakṛtiḥ buddhiḥ viśeṣāḥ ca indriyāṇi ca ahaṃkāraḥ abhimānaḥ ca saṃbhūtaḥ bhūta saṃjñakaḥ dharmāt utkṛṣyate śreyaḥ tathā aśreyaḥ api adharmataḥ rāgavān prakṛtim hi eti viraktaḥ jñānavān bhavet yathā hi sāram jānāti na katham cana saṃsthitam vinā kāyam na sā chāyā tām vinā kāyam asti uta idam vinā param na asti na idam asti param vinā vimuktaiḥ ca mṛgaḥ saḥ api dṛśyate saṃyata indriyaḥ brāhmaṇasya samādṛśyaḥ vartate saḥ api kim punar vidyate paramaḥ śuddhaḥ sākṣi bhūtaḥ vibhāvasuḥ śrutiḥ eṣā tatas nityā tasmāt ekaḥ paraḥ mataḥ na prayojanam uddiśya ceṣṭā tasya mahātmanaḥ tādṛśaḥ astu iti mantavyaḥ tathā satyam mahātmanā tad tad guṇa viśeṣeṇa saṃjñānām anusaṃyutam sarva ātmakaḥ sarva śaktiḥ sarva kāraṇa kāraṇam sarva sādhāraṇaḥ sarvaiḥ upāsyaḥ ca mahātmabhiḥ vāsudeva iti vikhyātaḥ tam viditvā aśnute amṛtam yadā te pañcabhiḥ pañca vimuktāḥ manasā saha muktāsu atha pravāleṣu mṛd maye rājate tathā tadvat goṣu manuṣyeṣu tadvat hasti mṛga ādiṣu tadvat kīṭa pataṃgeṣu prasakta ātmā sva karmabhiḥ yathā hi eka rasā bhūmiḥ oṣadhi ātma anusāriṇī tathā karma anugā buddhiḥ antarātma anudarśinī jñāna pūrva udbhavā lipsā lipsā pūrva abhisaṃdhi tā phalam karma ātmakam vidyāt karma jñeya ātmakam tathā jñeyam jñāna ātmakam vidyāt jñānam sat asat ātmakam jñānānām ca phalānām ca jñeyānām karmaṇām tathā kṣaya ante tat phalam divyam jñānam jñeya pratiṣṭhitam mahat hi paramam bhūtam yuktāḥ paśyanti yoginaḥ abudhāḥ tam na paśyanti hi ātma sthāḥ guṇa buddhayaḥ tat gatvā kāla viṣayāt vimuktāḥ mokṣam āśritāḥ guṇaiḥ tu etaiḥ prakāśante nirguṇa tvāt tatas param ṛcaḥ yajūṃṣi sāmāni śarīrāṇi vyapāśritāḥ jihvā agreṣu pravartante yatna sādhyāḥ vināśinaḥ ṛcām ādiḥ tathā sāmnām yajuṣām ādiḥ ucyate antaḥ ca ādimatām dṛṣṭaḥ na ca ādiḥ brahmanaḥ smṛtaḥ avyaya tvāt ca nirdvaṃdvam dvaṃdva abhāvāt tatas param adṛṣṭatas anupāyāt ca api abhisaṃdheḥ ca karmaṇaḥ viṣayeṣu ca saṃsargāt śāśvatasya ca darśanāt manasā ca anyat ākāṅkṣan param na pratipadyate param na eva abhikāṅkṣanti nirguṇa tvāt guṇa arthinaḥ guṇaiḥ yaḥ tu avaraiḥ yuktaḥ katham vidyāt guṇān imān sūkṣmeṇa manasā vidmaḥ vācā vaktum na śaknumaḥ jñānena nirmalīkṛtya buddhim buddhyā tathā manaḥ buddhi prahīṇaḥ manasā asamṛddhaḥ tathā nirāśīḥ guṇa tām upaiti guṇa ādāne viprayoge ca teṣām anena eva vidhinā saṃpravṛttaḥ guṇa ādāne brahma śarīram eti sarvaiḥ ayam ca indriyaiḥ saṃprayuktaḥ dehaḥ prāptaḥ pañcabhūta āśrayaḥ syāt pṛthvyāḥ naraḥ paśyati na antam asyāḥ hi antaḥ ca asyāḥ bhavitā ca iti viddhi param nayanti iha vilobhyamānam yathā plavam vāyuḥ iva arṇava stham anāgatim sukṛtimatām parām gatim svayaṃbhuvam prabhava nidhānam avyayam sanātanam yat amṛtam avyayam padam vicārya tam śamam amṛta tvam aśnute uvāca pitāmaha mahā prājña duḥkha śoka samākule saṃsāra cakre lokānām nirvedaḥ na asti kim nu idam uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam munim nibandhanam śuṣkam dhamanīya ākṛtim tathā putram dṛṣṭvā api uvāca ārtam mātā bhogavatī tadā uttiṣṭha mūḍha kim śeṣe nirapekṣaḥ suhṛd janaiḥ paitṛkam me mahat mātar sarva duḥkha ālayam tu iha asti etat tad vighātāya yatiṣye tatra mā śucaḥ idam śarīram ati ugram pitrā dattam asaṃśayam tam eva pitaram gatvā dhanam tiṣṭhati śāśvatam siṃha vyāghra gaja ākāraiḥ ati ghoraiḥ mahā aśanaiḥ samantāt su parikṣiptam sa dṛṣṭvā vyathate pumān vīkṣamāṇaḥ diśaḥ sarvāḥ śaraṇa artham pradhāvati athā apaśyat vanam rūḍham samantāt vāgurā āvṛtam vana madhye ca tatra āsīt udapānaḥ samāvṛtaḥ vallibhiḥ tṛṇa saṃchinnaiḥ gūḍhābhiḥ abhisaṃvṛtaḥ vilagnaḥ ca abhavat tasmin latā saṃtāna saṃkule bāhubhyām saṃpariṣvaktaḥ tayā parama sattvayā sa tathā lambate tatra ūrdhva pādaḥ hi adhaḥśirāḥ adhas tatra eva jātaḥ ca jambu vṛkṣaḥ su dustaraḥ vṛkṣam bahuvidham vyoma vallī puṣpa samākulam nānā rūpāḥ madhukarāḥ tasmin vṛkṣe abhavan kila teṣām madhūnām bahudhā dhārā pravavṛte tadā vilambamānaḥ sa pumān dhārām pibati sarvadā na tasya tṛṣṇā viratā pīyamānasya saṃkaṭe parīpsati ca tām nityam atṛptaḥ sa punar punar evam sa vasate tatra duḥkhi duḥkhī punar punar sā ca tyaktvā artha saṃkalpam jagāma paramām gatim evam saṃsāra cakrasya sva rūpa jñāḥ nṛpa uttama uvāca evam saṃsāra cakrasya svarūpam viditam na me paitṛkam tu dhanam proktam kim tat vidvas mahātmanā kāntāram iti kim proktam kaḥ hastī sa tu kūpakaḥ kiṃsaṃjñikaḥ mahā vṛkṣaḥ madhu vā api pitāmaha uvāca upākhyānam idam sarvam mokṣa vidbhiḥ udāhṛtam etat uktam hi kāntāram mahān saṃsāraḥ eva saḥ ye te pratiṣṭhitāḥ vyālāḥ vyādhayaḥ te prakīrtitāḥ yā sā nārī mahā ghorā varṇa rūpa vināśinī tām āhuḥ ca jarām prājñāḥ pariṣvaktam yayā jagat ye tu kṛṣṇāḥ sitāḥ rājan mūṣikāḥ rātri ahāni vai dvi ṣaṭka pada saṃyuktaḥ yaḥ hastī ṣaṣ mukha ākṛtiḥ sa ca saṃvatsaraḥ proktaḥ pāda māsa ṛtavaḥ mukhāḥ etat saṃsāra cakrasya svarūpam vyāhṛtam mayā evam labdha dhanam rājan tat sva rūpam vināśaya etat jñātvā tu sā rājan param vairāgyam āsthitā yathā ukta vidhinā bhūyas param padam avāpa saḥ tat gaccha ca amṛtam śuddham hiraṇyam amṛtam tapaḥ tad sva rūpaḥ mahādevaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ devakī nandanaḥ tasya prasādāt duḥkhasya nāśam prāpsyasi mānada ekaḥ kartā sa kṛṣṇaḥ ca jñāninām paramā gatiḥ bhūtānām antarātmā asau sa nitya pada saṃvṛtaḥ śrūyatām asya sadbhāvaḥ samyak jñānam yathā tava purā deva ṛṣiḥ śrīmān nāradaḥ parama arthavān cacāra pṛthivīm kṛtsnām tīrthāni anucaran prabhuḥ himavatpādam āśritya vicārya ca punar punar dadarśa kanyām tad tīre sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitām śobhamānām śriyā rājan krīḍantīm utpalaiḥ tathā sā mahātmānam ālokya nārada iti āha bhāminī tasyāḥ samīpam āsādya tasthau vismita mānasaḥ vīkṣamāṇam tam ājñāya sā kanyā cāru hāsinī vijajṛmbhe mahābhāgā smayamānā punar punar tasmāt samabhavat vaktrāt puruṣa ākṛti saṃyutaḥ ratna bindu cita aṅgaḥ tu sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ āditya sadṛśa ākāraḥ śirasā dhārayan maṇim punar eva tad ākāra sadṛśaḥ samajāyata tṛtīyaḥ tu mahā rāja vividha ābharaṇaiḥ yutaḥ pradakṣiṇam tu tām kṛtvā vividha dhvanayaḥ tu tām tatas sarveṇa viprarṣiḥ kanyām papraccha tām śubhām kā tvam parama kalyāṇe padma indu sadṛśa ānane sāvitrī nāma viprarṣe śṛṇu bhadram tava astu vai uvāca tṛtīyaḥ sāmavedaḥ tu saṃśayaḥ vyetu te mune vedāḥ ca bindu saṃyuktāḥ yajñasya phala saṃśritāḥ ṛṣe jñeyam mayā ca api iti uktvā ca antaradhīyata tatas sa vismaya āviṣṭaḥ nāradaḥ puruṣa ṛṣabha tatas snātvā mahā tejāḥ vāgyataḥ niyata indriyaḥ tuṣṭāva puruṣa vyāghraḥ jijñāsuḥ ca tat adbhutam tatas varṣa śate pūrṇe bhagavān loka bhāvanaḥ prāduḥ cakāra viśvātmā ṛṣeḥ parama sauhṛdāt tam āgatam jagannātham sarva kāraṇa kāraṇam pīta ambara lasat kāñcī dāma baddha kaṭi taṭam śrīvatsa vakṣasam cāru maṇi kaustubha kaṃdharam nānā ratna maṇī vajra sphurat makara kuṇḍalam tatas sa bhagavān śrīmān megha gambhīrayā girā prāha īśaḥ sarva bhūtānām nāradam patitam kṣitau provāca hṛdi saṃrūḍham śaṅkha cakra gadā dharam vivakṣitam jagannātha mayā jñātam tvayā acyuta tat prasīda hṛṣīkeśa śrotum icchāmi tat hare tatas smayan mahā viṣṇuḥ abhyabhāṣata nāradam yat dṛṣṭam mama rūpam tu vedānām śirasi tvayā nirdvaṃdvāḥ nirahaṃkārāḥ śucayaḥ śuddha locanāḥ tam mām paśyanti satatam tān pṛccha yat iha icchasi ye yoginaḥ mahā prājñāḥ mad aṃśāḥ ye vyavasthitāḥ uvāca teṣām prasādam deva ṛṣe mad prasādam avaihi tat iti uktvā sa jagāma atha bhagavān bhūtabhāvanaḥ tasmāt vraja hṛṣīkeśam kṛṣṇam devakī nandanam etam ārādhya govindam gatāḥ muktim mahā ṛṣayaḥ eṣa kartā vikartā ca sarva kāraṇa kāraṇam svayam eva samācaṣṭa nāradaḥ bhagavān muniḥ samasta saṃsāra vighāta kāraṇam bhajanti ye viṣṇum an anya mānasāḥ iti iva nityam hṛdi varṇayanti uvāca pitāmaha mahā prājña puṇḍarīkākṣam acyutam kartāram akṛtam viṣṇum bhūtānām prabhava apyayam nārāyaṇam hṛṣīkeśam govindam aparājitam uvāca nāradasya ca deva ṛṣeḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanasya ca asitaḥ devalaḥ tāta vālmīkiḥ ca mahā tapāḥ keśavasya mayā rājan na śakyāḥ varṇitum guṇāḥ īdṛśaḥ asau hṛṣīkeśaḥ vāsudevaḥ parāt paraḥ keśavaḥ bharata śreṣṭha bhagavant īśvaraḥ prabhuḥ puruṣaḥ sarvam iti eva śrūyate bahudhā vibhuḥ kim tu yāni viduḥ loke brāhmaṇāḥ śārṅgadhanvanaḥ māhātmyāni mahā bāho śṛṇu tāni yudhiṣṭhira yāni ca āhuḥ manuṣya indra ye purāṇa vidaḥ janāḥ aśeṣeṇa hi govinde kīrtayiṣyāmi tāni aham mahābhūtāni bhūtātmā mahātmā puruṣottamaḥ vāyuḥ jyotiḥ tathā ca apaḥ kham gām ca eva anvakalpayat sa dṛṣṭvā pṛthivīm ca eva sarva bhūta īśvaraḥ prabhuḥ apsu eva śayanam cakre mahātmā puruṣottamaḥ sarva tejaḥ mayaḥ tasmin śayānaḥ śayane śubhe saḥ agrajam sarva bhūtānām saṃkarṣaṇam acintayat āśrayam sarva bhūtānām manasā iti viśuśruma sa dhārayati bhūtātmā ubhe bhūta bhaviṣyatī apsu vyoma gamaḥ śrīmān yoganidrām upeyivān tasmāt saṃjajñire devāḥ brahma viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ bhāskara pratimam divyam nābhau padmam ajāyata tamasaḥ pūrvajaḥ jajñe madhuḥ nāma mahā asuraḥ tasya tāta vadhāt sarve deva dānava mānavāḥ madhusūdanam iti āhuḥ vṛṣabham sarva sātvantām brahmā tu sasṛje putrān mānasān dakṣa saptamān marīciḥ kaśyapam tāta putram ca asṛjat agrajam aṅguṣṭhāt asṛjat brahmā marīceḥ api pūrvajam saḥ abhavat bharata śreṣṭha dakṣaḥ nāma prajāpatiḥ prajāpateḥ duhitaraḥ tāsām jyeṣṭhā bhavat ditiḥ sarva dharma viśeṣa jñaḥ puṇya kīrtiḥ mahā yaśāḥ mārīcaḥ kaśyapaḥ tāta sarvāsām abhavat patiḥ utpādya tu mahābhāgaḥ tāsām avarajāḥ daśa viśvedevāḥ ca sādhyāḥ ca marutvantaḥ ca bhārata aparāḥ tu yavīyasyaḥ tābhyaḥ anyāḥ saptaviṃśatiḥ somaḥ tāsām mahābhāgaḥ sarvāsām abhavat patiḥ gāḥ ca kiṃpuruṣān matsyān audbhidān ca vanaspatīn ādityān aditiḥ jajñe deva śreṣṭhān mahā balān teṣām viṣṇuḥ vāmanaḥ abhūt govindaḥ ca abhavat prabhuḥ tasya vikramaṇāt eva devānām śrīḥ vyavardhata dānavāḥ ca parābhūtāḥ daiteyī ca āsurī prajā vipracitti pradhānān ca dānavān asṛjat danuḥ hartāram sarva bhūtānām sasarja ca janārdanaḥ ahorātram ca kālam ca yathartu madhusūdanaḥ pūrvāhṇam ca aparāhṇam ca sarvam eva anvakalpayat saḥ asṛjat meghān tathā sthāvara jaṅgamān pṛthivīm saḥ asṛjat viśvām sahitām bhūri tejasā tatas kṛṣṇaḥ mahat bāhuḥ punar eva yudhiṣṭhira brāhmaṇānām śatam śreṣṭham mukhāt asṛjata prabhuḥ bāhubhyām kṣatriya śatam vaiśyānām ūrutaḥ śatam padbhyām śūdra śatam ca eva keśavaḥ bharata ṛṣabha saḥ evam caturaḥ varṇān samutpādya mahā yaśāḥ adhyakṣam sarva bhūtānām dhātāram akarot prabhuḥ veda vidyā vidhātāram brahmānam amita dyutim bhūta mātṛ gaṇa adhyakṣam virūpākṣam ca saḥ asṛjat śāsitāram ca pāpānām pitṝṇām samavartinam yādasām asṛjat nātham varuṇam ca jaleśvaram yāvat yāvat abhūt śraddhā deham dhārayitum nṛṇām tāvat tāvat ajīvan te na āsīt yama kṛtam bhayam tatra tretā yuge kāle saṃkalpāt jāyate prajā tathā kali yuge rājan dvaṃdvam āpedire janāḥ eṣa bhūtapatiḥ tāta su adhyakṣaḥ ca prakīrtitaḥ niradhyakṣān tu kaunteya kīrtayiṣyāmi tān api dakṣiṇāpatha janmānaḥ sarve talavara āndhrakāḥ utsāḥ pulindāḥ śabarāḥ cūcupāḥ maṇḍapaiḥ saha uttarāpatha janmānaḥ kīrtayiṣyāmi tān api yauna kāmboja gāndhārāḥ kirātāḥ barbaraiḥ saha ete pāpa kṛtaḥ tāta caranti pṛthivīm imām śva kāka bala gṛdhrāṇām sadharmāṇaḥ narādhipa aindram rūpam samāsthāya hi asurebhyaḥ caran mahīm evaṃbhūte bhūta sṛṣṭiḥ nārasiṃha ādayaḥ kramāt prādurbhāvāḥ smṛtāḥ viṣṇoḥ jagatī rakṣaṇāya vai eṣa kṛṣṇaḥ mahā yogī tad tad kārya anurūpaṇam hiraṇyakaśipum daityam hiraṇyākṣam tathā eva ca rāvaṇam ca mahā daityam hatvā asau puruṣottamaḥ bhūmeḥ duḥkha upanāśa artham brahma śakra ādibhiḥ stutaḥ ātmanaḥ aṅgāt mahā tejāḥ janārdanaḥ sita kṛṣṇau mahā rāja keśau hariḥ udāra dhīḥ dehavān iha viśvātmā saṃbandhī te janārdanaḥ acintyaḥ puruṣa vyāghra na eva kevala mānuṣaḥ avyakta ādi viśeṣa antam parīmāṇa artha saṃyutam krīḍā hareḥ idam sarvam kṣaram iti eva dhāryatām akṣaram tat param nityam vairūpyam jagantaḥ hareḥ tat eva kṛṣṇaḥ dāśārhaḥ śrīmān śrīvatsa lakṣaṇaḥ na bhūta sṛṣṭi saṃsthānam dehaḥ asya paramātmanaḥ dehavān iha yaḥ viṣṇuḥ asau māyā mayaḥ hariḥ ātmanaḥ loka rakṣā artham dhyāhi nityam sanātanam aṅgāni caturaḥ vedāḥ mīmāṃsā nyāya vistaraḥ itihāsa purāṇāni dharmāḥ svāyaṃbhuva ādayaḥ sarva bhūteṣu bhūtātmā tad tad buddhim samāsthitaḥ evam eṣa kuruśreṣṭha prādurbhāvaḥ mahātmanaḥ deva deva ṛṣiḥ ācaṣṭa nāradaḥ sarva loka dṛś nāradaḥ api atha kṛṣṇasya param mene narādhipa śāśvata tvam mahā bāho yathāvat bharata ṛṣabha evam eṣa mahā bāhuḥ keśavaḥ satya vikramaḥ acintyaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ na eṣa kevala mānuṣaḥ uvāca ke pūrvam āsan patayaḥ prajānām bharata ṛṣabha ke ca ṛṣayaḥ mahābhāgāḥ dikṣu pratyekaśaḥ smṛtāḥ uvāca śrūyatām bharata śreṣṭha yat mā tvam paripṛcchasi prajānām patayaḥ ye sma dikṣu pratyekaśaḥ smṛtāḥ ekaḥ svayaṃbhūḥ bhagavān ādyaḥ brahmā sanātanaḥ brahmanaḥ sapta putrāḥ vai mahātmānaḥ svayambhoḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca mahābhāgaḥ sadṛśāḥ vai svayambhunā sapta brahmāṇaḥ iti eṣa purāṇe niścayaḥ gataḥ atas ūrdhvam pravakṣyāmi sarvān eva prajāpatīn prācīnabarhīḥ bhagavān tasmāt prācetasaḥ daśa daśānām tanayaḥ tu ekaḥ dakṣaḥ nāma prajāpatiḥ marīceḥ kaśyapaḥ putraḥ tasya dve nāmanī śrute ariṣṭanemiḥ iti ekam kaśyapa iti aparam viduḥ aṅgaḥ ca eva aurasaḥ śrīmān rājā bhaumaḥ ca vīryavān sahasram yaḥ ca divyānām yugānām paryupāsitā ete pradeśāḥ kathitāḥ bhuvanānām prabhāvanāḥ śaśabindoḥ ca bhāryāṇām sahasrāṇi daśa acyuta ekaikasyām sahasram tu tanayānām abhūt tadā evam śata sahasrāṇām śatam tasya mahātmanaḥ putrāṇām na ca te kam cit icchanti anyam prajāpatim prajām ācakṣate viprāḥ paurāṇīm śāśabindavīm sa vṛṣṇi vaṃśa prabhavaḥ mahān vaṃśaḥ prajāpateḥ ete prajānām patayaḥ samuddiṣṭāḥ yaśasvinaḥ śaśabinduḥ tu rājarṣiḥ mahā yogī mahā manāḥ adhyātma vid sahasrāṇām bhāryāṇām daśa madhya gaḥ sa yogī yogam āpannaḥ tatas sāyujya tām gataḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi devān tribhuvana īśvarān bhagaḥ aṃśaḥ ca aryamā ca eva mitraḥ atha varuṇaḥ tathā savitā ca eva dhātā ca vivasvant ca mahā balaḥ pūṣā tvaṣṭā tathā eva indraḥ dvādaśaḥ viṣṇuḥ ucyate te ete dvādaśa ādityāḥ kaśyapasya ātmasaṃbhavāḥ nāsatyaḥ ca eva dasraḥ ca smṛtau dvau aśvinau api mārtāṇḍasya ātmajau etau aṣṭamasya prajāpateḥ tvaṣṭuḥ ca eva ātmajaḥ śrīmān viśvarūpaḥ mahā yaśāḥ sāvitraḥ ca jayantaḥ ca pinākī ca aparājitaḥ ekādaśā ete kathitāḥ rudrāḥ tribhuvana īśvarāḥ dharaḥ dhruvaḥ ca somaḥ ca āpaḥ ca eva anilaḥ analaḥ pratyūṣaḥ ca mahābhāgaḥ sāvitraḥ ca aṣṭamaḥ smṛtaḥ pūrvam eva mahābhāgāḥ vasavaḥ aṣṭau prakīrtitāḥ te ca pūrve surāḥ ca iti dvividhāḥ pitaraḥ smṛtāḥ śīla rūpa ratāḥ tu anye tathā anye siddha sādhyayoḥ ṛbhavaḥ marutaḥ ca eva devānām coditāḥ gaṇāḥ evam ete samāmnātāḥ viśvedevāḥ tathā aśvinau ādityāḥ kṣatriyāḥ teṣām viśaḥ tu marutaḥ tathā smṛtāḥ tu aṅgirasaḥ devāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ iti niścayaḥ iti etat sarva devānām cāturvarṇyam prakīrtitam auśijaḥ ca eva kakṣīvant nalaḥ ca aṅgirasaḥ sutāḥ ṛṣeḥ medhātitheḥ putraḥ kaṇvaḥ barhiṣadaḥ tathā trailokya bhāvanāḥ tāta prācyām saptarṣayaḥ tathā pramucaḥ ca idhmavāhaḥ ca bhagavān ca dṛḍha vrataḥ mitrāvaruṇayoḥ putraḥ tathā agastyaḥ pratāpavān ete brahmarṣayaḥ nityam āśritāḥ dakṣiṇām diśam ruṣadguḥ kavaṣaḥ dhaumyaḥ parivyādhaḥ ca vīryavān atreḥ putraḥ ca bhagavān tathā sārasvataḥ prabhuḥ ete nava mahātmānaḥ paścimām āśritāḥ diśam ātreyaḥ ca vasiṣṭhaḥ ca kaśyapaḥ ca mahān ṛṣiḥ jamadagniḥ ca saptā ete udañcam diśam āśritāḥ sākṣi bhūtāḥ mahātmānaḥ bhuvanānām prabhāvanāḥ evam ete mahātmānaḥ sthitāḥ pratyekaśaḥ diśaḥ eteṣām kīrtanam kṛtvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate yasyām yasyām diśi hi ete tām diśam śaraṇam gataḥ mucyate sarva pāpebhyaḥ svastimān ca gṛhān vrajet uvāca śrotum icchāmi kārtsnyena kṛṣṇam avyayam īśvaram tiryagyoni gatam rūpam katham dhāritavan hariḥ uvāca purā aham mṛgayām yātaḥ mārkaṇḍeya āśrame sthitaḥ tatra apaśyam muni gaṇān samāsīnān sahasraśas pratigṛhya ca tām pūjām pratyanandam ṛṣīn aham kathā eṣā kathitā tatra kaśyapena mahā ṛṣiṇā manaḥ prahlādinīm divyām tām iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu dharmaḥ hi bhagavān viṣṇuḥ varāhaḥ yajña rūpadhṛk balena mattāḥ śataśas naraka ādyāḥ mahā asurāḥ na sahante sma devānām samṛddhim tām anuttamām naraka ādyāḥ mahā ghorāḥ hiraṇyākṣam upāśritāḥ udyogam paramam cakruḥ devānām nigrahe tadā niyutam vatsarāṇām tu vāyubhakṣaḥ abhavat tadā hiraṇyākṣaḥ mahā raudraḥ lebhe devāt pitāmahāt varān acintyān atulān śataśas atha sahasraśas dānavaiḥ ardyamānāḥ tu devāḥ devarṣayaḥ tathā na śarma lebhire rājan viśamānāḥ tatas tatas pṛthivīm ca ārta rūpām te samapaśyan divaukasaḥ dānavaiḥ abhisaṃkīrṇām ghora rūpaiḥ mahā balaiḥ bhāra ārtām apakṛṣṭām ca duḥkhitām saṃnimajjatīm gṛhītvā pṛthivī devī pātāle nyavasat tadā niḥsvādhyāyavaṣaṭkāram abhūt sarvam samantataḥ atha āditeyāḥ saṃtrastāḥ brahmāṇam idam abruvan hiraṇyākṣeṇa bhagavan gṛhītā iyam vasuṃdharā na śakṣyāmaḥ vayam tatra praveṣṭum jala durgamam tān āha bhagavān brahmā muniḥ eva prasādyatām agastyaḥ asau mahā tejāḥ pātu tat jalam añjasā tathā iti ca uktvā te devāḥ munim ūcuḥ mudā anvitāḥ dhyāyan jalāda nivaham sa kṣaṇena papau jalam śoṣite tu samudre ca devāḥ sa ṛṣi purogamāḥ brahmāṇam praṇipatya ūcuḥ muninā śoṣitam jalam iti bhūyas samācakṣva kim kariṣyāmahe vibho svayambhuḥ tān uvāca idam nisṛṣṭaḥ atra vidhiḥ mayā na avabhotsyanti saṃmūḍhāḥ viṣṇum avyakta darśanam varāha rūpiṇam devam adhṛṣyam amaraiḥ api eṣa vegena gatvā hi yatra te dānava adhamāḥ śamayiṣyati śrutvā te jahṛṣuḥ sura sattamāḥ tatas viṣṇuḥ mahā tejāḥ vārāham rūpam āśritaḥ dṛṣṭvā ca sahitāḥ sarve daityāḥ sattvam amānuṣam saṃkruddhāḥ ca varāham tam vyakarṣanta samantataḥ dānava indrāḥ mahā kāyāḥ mahā vīryāḥ bala ucchritāḥ na aśaknuvan ca kim cit te tasya kartum tadā vibho saṃśayam gatam ātmānam menire ca sahasraśas tatas deva ādidevaḥ sa yoga ātmā yoga sārathiḥ vinanāda mahā nādam kṣobhayan daitya dānavān saṃnāditāḥ yena lokāḥ sarvāḥ ca eva diśaḥ daśa tena saṃnāda śabdena lokāḥ saṃkṣobham āgaman saṃbhrāntāḥ ca diśaḥ sarvāḥ devāḥ śakra purogamāḥ nirviceṣṭam jagat ca api babhūva ati bhṛśam tadā tatas te dānavāḥ sarve tena śabdena bhīṣitāḥ petuḥ gatāsavaḥ ca eva viṣṇu tejaḥ vimohitāḥ trastān ca devān ālokya brahmā prāha pitāmahaḥ yogeśvaraḥ ayam bhagavant vārāham rūpam āsthā nard atra saṃyāti mā bhaiṣṭa sura sattama rasātala gatān ca eva varāhaḥ tridaśa dviṣaḥ khuraiḥ saṃdārayām āsa māṃsa medaḥ usthi saṃcayam padmanābhaḥ mahā yogī bhūta ācāryaḥ sa bhūta rāj nādaḥ ayam kīdṛśaḥ deva na enam vidma vayam vibho devāḥ ca dānavāḥ ca eva mohitāḥ tasya tejasā etasmin antare viṣṇuḥ vārāham rūpam āsthitaḥ udatiṣṭhat mahādevaḥ stūyamānaḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ divyam yuddham asīt mahātmanoḥ hiraṇyākṣasya viṣṇoḥ ca sarva saṃkṣobha kāraṇam jaghāna ca hiraṇyākṣam antar bhūmi gatam hariḥ tat ākarṇya mahā tejāḥ brahmā madhuram abravīt uvāca nihatya dānava patīn mahā varṣmā mahā balaḥ eṣa devaḥ mahā yogī bhūtātmā bhūtabhāvanaḥ sarva bhūta īśvaraḥ yogī yoniḥ ātmā tathā ātmanaḥ sthirībhavata kṛṣṇaḥ ayam sarva pāpa praṇāśanaḥ samāyātaḥ svam ātmānam mahābhāgaḥ mahā dyutiḥ padmanābhaḥ mahā yogī bhūtātmā bhūtabhāvanaḥ na saṃtāpaḥ na bhī kāryā śokaḥ vā sura sattamāḥ vidhiḥ eṣa prabhāvaḥ ca kālaḥ saṃkṣaya kārakaḥ lokān dhārayatā anena nādaḥ muktaḥ mahātmanā acyutaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ sarva bhūta samudbhavaḥ uvāca pitāmaha mahā prājña keśavasya mahātmanaḥ na tṛpyāmi aham api enam paśyan śṛṇvan ca bhārata uvāca evam kṛṣṇam mahā bāho tasmāt etat bravīhi me śṛṇu rājan kathām etām vaiṣṇavīm pāpa nāśanīm nāradaḥ mām purā prāha yām aham te vadāmi tām deva ṛṣiḥ nāradaḥ pūrvam tattvam vetsyāmi vai hareḥ himālaye śubhe divye divyam varṣa śatam kila an ucchvasan nirāhāraḥ saṃyata ātmā jita indriyaḥ megha gambhīra nirghoṣā divyā bāhya aśarīriṇī aham dadāmi te jñānam dharma ādyam vā vṛṇīṣva mām tat śrutvā muniḥ ālocya saṃbhrama āviṣṭa mānasaḥ kim nu syāt iti saṃcintya vākyam āha aparam prati īdṛgvidhaḥ tvam samadhiṣṭhitaḥ asi na mām mūḍhāḥ vijānanti jñāninaḥ mām vidanti uta tam pratyāha muniḥ śrīmān praṇataḥ vinaya anvitaḥ tasya tat vacanam śrutvā nāradam prāha lokapaḥ jñānena mām vijānīhi na anyathā śaktiḥ asti te uvāca kīdṛgvidham tu tat jñānam yena jānāmi te tanum vikalpa hīnam vipulam tasya cūḥ dūram śivam param jñānam tat tena jānāsi sādhanam prati te mune uvāca bhavantam jñātum icchāmi kīdṛś bhūtaḥ tvam avyaya prāha īśaḥ sarva bhūtānām na me śrutiḥ na ca katham vakṣyāmi ca ātmānam aśarīraḥ tathā api aham tat jñātvā vismaya āviṣṭaḥ muniḥ āha praṇamya tam yena tvam pūrvam ātmānam anantaḥ aham bṛhattaraḥ punar tam āha bhagavān tava api akṣāṇi santi vai tvam enam brūhi ca ātmānam yadi śaknoṣi nārada mām ca jānāsi tena tvam ekam sādhanam āvayoḥ sthitvā sa dīrgha kālam ca muniḥ vyāmūḍha mānasaḥ āha mām bhagavān devaḥ tu anantaḥ aham bṛhattaraḥ kā iyam urvī hi ananta ākhyā bṛhatī nūnam eva sā yasyām jānanti bhūtāni vilīnāni tatas tatas enām pṛcchāmi taruṇīm sā eṣā nūnam uvāca mām iti evam sa muniḥ śrīmān kṛtvā niścayam ātmanaḥ āścaryā asi ca dhanyā asi bṛhatī tvam vasuṃdhare tvām atra vettum icchāmi yādṛś bhūtā asi śobhane tat śrutvā dharaṇī devī smayamānā bravīt idam na aham hi bṛhatī vipra na ca anantā ca sattama kāraṇam mama yaḥ gandhaḥ gandha ātmānam bravīhi tam kāraṇam me jalam mattaḥ bṛhattaratamam hi tat kāraṇam me atra saṃpṛccha rasa ātmānam bṛhattaram mama api kāraṇam pṛccha tejaḥ rūpam vibhāvasum yajña ātmānam mahā vāsam sarva bhūta namaskṛtam tatas prahasya bhagavat munim sviṣṭakṛt abravīt kāraṇam mama rūpam yat tam pṛccha muni sattama rūpa ātmānam praṇamya āha nāradaḥ vadatām varaḥ utsmayitvā tu rūpa ātmā tam munim pratyuvāca ha vāyuḥ mama kāraṇam brahman tam pṛccha muni sattama mattaḥ bahutaraḥ śrīmān anantaḥ ca mahā balim yoga siddhaḥ mahā yogī jñāna vijñāna pāragaḥ kāraṇam pṛccha bhagavant sparśa ātmānam mama adya vai mattaḥ bṛhattaraḥ śrīmān anantaḥ ca tathā eva saḥ tatas asya vacanam śrutvā sparśa ātmānam uvāca saḥ tasya tat vacanam śrutvā sparśa ātmā munim abravīt kāraṇam mama ca eva imam ākāśam ca bṛhattaram tat śrutvā nāradaḥ śrīmān vākyam vākya viśāradaḥ ākāśam samupāgamya praṇamya āha kṛtāñjaliḥ na aham bṛhattaraḥ brahman śabdaḥ vai kāraṇam mama tam pṛccha muni śārdūla sa vai mattaḥ bṛhattaraḥ tatas hi āviśya ca ākāśam śabda ātmānam uvāca ha svara vyañjana saṃyuktam nānā hetu vibhūṣitam veda ātmā pratyuvāca idam nāradam muni puṃgavam mayā kāraṇa bhūtena sarva vettā pitāmahaḥ tam pṛccha muni śārdūla sarva kāraṇa kāraṇam sevyamānam mahātmānam lokapālaiḥ marut gaṇaiḥ upāsyamānam brahmāṇam lokanātham parāt param hiraṇyagarbham viśveśam caturvaktreṇa bhūṣitam praṇamya prāñjaliḥ prahvaḥ tam āha muni puṃgavaḥ lokānām mama sarveṣām nātha bhūtaḥ bṛhattaraḥ samasta jagatām goptā gopa veṣeṇa saṃsthitaḥ mad rūpam ca samāsthāya jagat sṛṣṭim karoti saḥ aiśānam āsthitaḥ śrīmān hanti nityam hi pāti ca viṣṇuḥ svarūpa rūpaḥ asau kāraṇam sa hari mama tam pṛccha muni śārdūla sa ca anantaḥ bṛhattaraḥ nanda gopa kule viṣṇum enam kṛṣṇam jagatpatim bāla krīḍanaka āsaktam vatsa jāla vibhūṣitam pāyayitvā atha badhnantam dhūli dhūmra ānanam param pāṇi vādanakaiḥ ca eva saṃvṛtam veṇu vādakaiḥ praṇipatya abravīt enam nāradaḥ bhagavān muniḥ vettā asi ca avyayaḥ ca asi vettum icchāmi yādṛśam mattaḥ parataram na asti mattaḥ sarvam pratiṣṭhitam ākāśe ca sthitaḥ pūrvam uktavān aham eva te na mām vetti janaḥ kaḥ cit māyā mama duratyayā bhaktyā tu ananyayā yuktāḥ mām vijānanti yoginaḥ anyeṣām ca eva bhaktānām mama yoga rata ātmanām uvāca evam uktvā yayau kṛṣṇaḥ nanda gopa gṛham hariḥ bhajasva enam viśāla akṣam japan kṛṣṇa iti sattama mohayan mām tathā tvām ca śṛṇoti eṣa mayā īritān dharma ātmā ca mahā bāho bhaktān rakṣati na anyathā uvāca pitāmaha mahā prājña sarva śāstra viśārada prayāṇa kāle kim japyam mokṣibhiḥ tattva cintakaiḥ uvāca prāpnuyāt paramām siddhim śrotum icchāmi tattvataḥ śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ rājan nāradena purā śrutam śrīvatsa aṅkam jagadbījam anantam lokasākṣiṇam purā nārāyaṇam devam nāradaḥ paripṛṣṭavān tvām akṣaram param brahma nirguṇam tamasaḥ param kim japyam kim japet nityam kālyam utthāya mānavaḥ katham yuñjan sadā dhyāyet brūhi tattvam sanātanam śrutvā ca nārada uktam tu devānām īśvaraḥ svayam provāca bhagavant viṣṇuḥ nāradam vara daḥ prabhuḥ hanta te kathayiṣyāmi imām divyām anusmṛtim yām adhītya prayāṇe tu mad bhāvāya upapadyate oṃkāram agratas kṛtvā mām namaskṛtya nārada iti uktaḥ nāradaḥ prāha prāñjaliḥ praṇataḥ sthitaḥ sarva sarva deva īśvaram viṣṇum sarva ātmānam harim prabhum avyaktam śāśvatam devam prabhavam puruṣottamam prapadye prāñjaliḥ viṣṇum akṣaram paramam padam purāṇam prabhavam nityam akṣayam lokasākṣiṇam prapadye puṇḍarīkākṣam īśam bhakta anukampinam sraṣṭāram sarva lokānām anantam sarvatomukham padmanābham hṛṣīkeśam prapadye satyam acyutam sahasra śīrṣam puruṣam mahā ṛṣim tattva bhāvanam nārāyaṇam purāṇa ṛṣim yoga ātmānam sanātanam saṃsthānam sarva tattvānām prapadye dhruvam īśvaram yaḥ prabhuḥ sarva bhūtānām yena sarvam idam tatam carācara guruḥ viṣṇuḥ sa me devaḥ prasīdatu brahma yoniḥ hi viśvātmā sa me viṣṇuḥ prasīdatu yaḥ purā pralaye prāpte naṣṭe sthāvara jaṅgame brahma brahman ādiṣu pralīneṣu naṣṭe loke parāvare ābhūtasaṃplave ca eva pralīne aprākṛtaḥ mahān ekaḥ tiṣṭhati viśvātmā sa me viṣṇuḥ prasīdatu hūyate ca punar dvābhyām sa me viṣṇuḥ prasīdatu parjanyaḥ pṛthivī sasyam kālaḥ dharmaḥ kriyā akriye guṇa ākaraḥ sa me babhruḥ vāsudevaḥ prasīdatu agnīṣoma arka tārāṇām brahma rudra indra yoginām yaḥ tejayati tejāṃsi sa me viṣṇuḥ prasīdatu caturmūrte param dhāma lakṣmī āvāsa para arcita ajaḥ tu anāmayaḥ pathī hi amūrtiḥ viśva mūrti dhṛk vikartar pañcan kāla jña namaḥ te jñānasāgara yasmāt parataram na asti tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ niścayam na adhigacchanti tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ jita indriyāḥ mahātmānaḥ jñāna dhyāna parāyaṇāḥ eka aṃśena jagant sarvam avaṣṭabhya vibhuḥ sthitaḥ agrāhyaḥ nirguṇaḥ nityam tam asmi śaraṇam gataḥ soma arka agni mayam tejaḥ yā ca tāra mayī dyutiḥ divi saṃjāyate yaḥ ayam sa mahātmā prasīdatu guṇādiḥ nirguṇaḥ ca ādyaḥ lakṣmīvān cetanaḥ hi ajaḥ sūkṣmaḥ sarva gataḥ yogī sa mahātmā prasīdatu avyaktam samadhiṣṭhātā acintyaḥ sat asat paraḥ āsthitaḥ paramam bhuṅkte sa mahātmā prasīdatu kṣetrajñaḥ pañcadhā bhuṅkte prakṛtim pañcabhiḥ mukhaiḥ mahān guṇān ca yaḥ bhuṅkte sa mahātmā prasīdatu bhūta bāhyā ca yā dīptiḥ sa mahātmā prasīdatu ye ca tvām na abhijānanti saṃsāre saṃsaranti te mānya bhaktāḥ vijānanti na punar mārakāḥ dvijāḥ ekākinaḥ hi nirdvaṃdvāḥ jñāna agni dagdha karmāṇaḥ tvām viśanti viniścitāḥ aśarīram śarīra stham samam sarveṣu dehiṣu puṇya pāpa vinirmuktāḥ bhaktāḥ tvām praviśanti uta sama tvam abhikāṅkṣe aham bhaktyā vai na anya cetasā tvayā tvayi eva tat protam sūtre maṇi gaṇāḥ iva sraṣṭā bhoktā asi kūṭasthaḥ hi atattvaḥ tattva saṃjñitaḥ na me bhūteṣu saṃyogaḥ bhūta tattva guṇa adhikaḥ ahaṃkāreṇa buddhyā vā na me yogaḥ tribhiḥ guṇaiḥ jarā maraṇa mokṣa artham tvām prapannaḥ asmi sarvaga pṛthivīm yātu mama ghrāṇam yātu mama rasanam jalam rūpam hutāśanam yātu sparśaḥ yātu ca mārutam śrotram ākāśam api etu manaḥ vaikārikam punar indriyāṇi api saṃyāntu svāsu svāsu ca yoniṣu vāyuḥ ākāśam api etu manaḥ ca ākāśaḥ eva ca ahaṃkāram manaḥ yātu mohanam sarva dehinām niṣkevalam padam deva kāṅkṣe aham paramam tava pūrva deha kṛtāḥ mama tu vyādhayaḥ praviśantu mām ardayantu ca duḥkhāni ṛṇam me pratimuñcatu tasmāt bravīmi karmāṇi ṛṇam me na bhavet iti na upatiṣṭhantu mām sarve vyādhayaḥ pūrva saṃcitāḥ śrī bhagavant uvāca anṛṇaḥ gantum icchāmi tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam tasya aham na praṇaśyāmi sa ca me na praṇaśyati karmendriyāṇi saṃyamya pañca buddhīndriyāṇi ca daśa daśan indriyāṇi manasi ahaṃkāre tathā manaḥ api pāpa samācāraḥ sa yāti paramām gatim nārāyaṇāya bhaktānām eka niṣṭhāya śāśvate imām anusmṛtim divyām vaiṣṇavīm su samāhitaḥ paurṇamāsyām amāvāsyām dvādaśyām ca viśeṣataḥ śrāvayet śraddadhānān ca mad bhaktān ca viśeṣataḥ yadi ahaṃkāram āśritya yajña dāna tapaḥ kriyāḥ yajñaḥ dānam tapaḥ ca eva pāvanāni śarīriṇām yajñam dānam tapaḥ tasmāt kuryāt āśīḥ vivarjitaḥ tasya akṣayaḥ bhavet lokaḥ śvapākasya api nārada śraddhāvantaḥ yata ātmānaḥ te mām yānti mad āśritāḥ ajñānāya ca yaḥ jñānam dadyāt dharma upadeśanam kṛtsnām vā pṛthivīm dadyāt tena tulyam na tat phalam evam dattvā nara śreṣṭha śreyaḥ vīryam ca vindati aśvamedha sahasrāṇām sahasram yaḥ samācaret uvāca evam pṛṣṭaḥ purā tena nāradena sura ṛṣiṇā tvam api ekamanāḥ bhūtvā dhyāhi jñeyam guṇa atigam śrutvā evam nāradaḥ vākyam divyam nārāyaṇa īritam nārāyaṇam ṛṣim devam daśa varṣāṇi ananya bhāj namaḥ nārāyaṇāya iti mantraḥ sarva artha sādhakaḥ imām rahasyām paramām anusmṛtim vihāya duḥkhāni avamucya saṃkaṭāt uvāca deva asura manuṣyeṣu ṛṣi mukhyeṣu vā punar viṣṇoḥ tattvam yathā ākhyātam kaḥ vidvān anuvetti tat uvāca aham tvayā rājan yat vṛttam ca purā mama garuḍena purā mahyam saṃvādaḥ bhūbhṛt uttama purā aham tapaḥ āsthāya vāsudeva parāyaṇaḥ gaṅgādvīpe samāsīnaḥ daśa varṣāṇi bhārata mātā ca mama sā devī jananī loka pāvanī samāsīnā samīpe me rakṣaṇa artham mama acyuta tasmin kāle adbhutaḥ śrīmān sarva veda mayaḥ prabhuḥ suparṇaḥ patatām śreṣṭhaḥ meru mandara saṃnibhaḥ ājagāma viśuddha ātmā gaṅgām draṣṭum mahā yaśāḥ tam āgatam mahātmānam pratyudgamya aham arthitaḥ praṇipatya yathānyāyam kṛtāñjaliḥ avasthitaḥ tayā ca pūjitaḥ śrīmān upopāviśat āsane nārāyaṇam hṛṣīkeśam sahamānaḥ aniśam harim jānāsi tam yathā vaktum yādṛś bhūtaḥ janārdanaḥ uvāca śṛṇu bhīṣma yathānyāyam purā tva tvā iha sattamāḥ papracchuḥ mām mahā prājñāḥ vāsudeva parāyaṇāḥ tvayā samaḥ na tasya asti saṃnikṛṣṭa priyaḥ api ca teṣām aham vacaḥ śrutvā praṇipatya mahā harim abravam ca yathāvṛttam mama nārāyaṇasya ca śṛṇudhvam muni śārdūlāḥ hṛtvā somam aham purā ākāśe patamānaḥ tu vākyam tatra śṛṇomi vai sādhu sādhu mahā bāho prītaḥ asmi te darśanāt vṛṇīṣva vacanam mattaḥ pakṣi indra garuḍa adhunā ṛṣiḥ asmi mahā vīrya na mām jānāti vā mayi asūyati ca mām mūḍhaḥ tat śrutvā garvam āsthitaḥ ṛṣe pūrvam varam mattaḥ tvam vṛṇīṣva tatas hi aham vṛṇe tvattaḥ varam paścāt iti evam muni sattamāḥ yasmāt tvām bhagavān devaḥ śrīmān śrīvatsa lakṣaṇaḥ adya paśyati pakṣi indra vāhanam bhava me sadā tathā iti tam vīkṣya mātām anahaṃkāram āsthitam jetu kāmaḥ hi aham viṣṇum māyayā māyinam harim iti uktvā bhagavān devaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ sahasra caraṇaḥ śrīmān sahasra āditya saṃnibhaḥ sahasra śīrṣā puruṣaḥ sahasra nayanaḥ mahān vidyut mālā nibhaiḥ divyaiḥ nānā ābharaṇa rājibhiḥ kva cit saṃdṛśyamānaḥ tu catur bāhuḥ kva cit hariḥ asyāḥ vimucya jananīm mayā saha muni īśvarāḥ kīdṛgvidhaḥ sa bhagavant iti matvā tam āsthā adrākṣam puṇḍarīkākṣam vahamānaḥ aham adbhutam vibhūṣitam hiraṇyena bhāsvareṇa samantataḥ divyam jyotiḥ samāyuktam gīta vāditra śobhitam śṛṇomi śabdam tatra aham na paśyāmi śarīriṇam vepamānaḥ hi aham tatra viṣṭhitaḥ aham kṛtāñjaliḥ brahmāṇam puratas kṛtvā kṛta añjali puṭāḥ tadā tatas tad antare tasmin kṣīroda arṇava śīkaraiḥ bodhyamānaḥ mahā viṣṇuḥ āvirbhūtaḥ iva ābabhau phaṇā sahasra mālā āḍhyam śeṣam avyakta saṃsthitam paśyāmi aham mud ākāśe yasya upari janārdanam dīrgha vṛttaiḥ samaiḥ pīnaiḥ keyūra valaya ujjvalaiḥ pīta ambareṇa saṃvītam kaustubhena virājitam vakṣaḥ sthalena saṃyuktam ca īṣat unmīlita akṣam tam sarva kāraṇa kāraṇam kṣīrodasya upari babhau nīla abhram paramam yathā bhrukuṭi kuṭila akṣāḥ te nānā bhūta gaṇāḥ sthitāḥ tatas acintyaḥ hariḥ śrīmān ālokya ca pitāmaham kṛtvā ca prasthitam tatra jagatām hita kāmyayā gacchadhvam iti mām uktvā garuḍa iti āha mām tatas tatas aham praṇipatya agre kṛtāñjaliḥ avasthitaḥ ayutam niyutam ca aham prayutam ca arbudam tathā nanu tat tvām aham bhaktaḥ viṣṭhitaḥ asmi praśāstu naḥ āgaccha garuḍa iti evam punar āha sa mādhavaḥ tatas bhūyas hi aham pātam patamānaḥ vihāyasam ājagāma tatas ghoram śata koṭi samāvṛtam tāmasāni iva bhūtāni parvata ābhāni tatra ha samānāni iva padmāni tatas aham bhītaḥ āsthitaḥ tatas mām kiṃkaraḥ ghoraḥ śata yojanam āyatam nigṛhya pāṇinā tasmāt cikṣepa ca sa loṣṭa vat huṃkāra ghoṣān tatra aham aśanīpāta saṃnibhān karṇa mūle hi aśṛṇavam tatas bhūtaiḥ samāsthitaḥ tatas aham devadeveśa trāhi mām puṣkarekṣaṇa suṣirasya mukhe kaḥ cit mām cikṣepa bhayaṃkaraḥ atītaḥ aham kṣaṇāt agnim apaśyam vāyu maṇḍalam ākāśam iva saṃprekṣya kṣeptu kāmam upāgataḥ tatra aham duḥkhitaḥ bhūtaḥ krośamānaḥ hi avasthitaḥ kṣaṇa antareṇa ghoreṇa kruddhaḥ hi paramātmanā sva pakṣa rājinā dṛṣṭvā mām cikṣepa bhayaṃkaraḥ mām dṛṣṭvā api atha saṃsthe atha hi alpa kālaḥ ati durbalaḥ aho vihaṃgamaḥ prāptaḥ iti vismaya mānasāḥ mām dṛṣṭvā ūcuḥ aham tatra paśyāmi garuḍadhvajam sahasra garuḍa ārūḍham garuḍāḥ te mahā balāḥ su alpa prāṇaḥ su alpa kāyaḥ kaḥ asau pakṣī iha āgataḥ tat śrutvā aham naṣṭa garvaḥ bhītaḥ lajjā samanvitaḥ svayam buddhaḥ ca saṃvignaḥ tatas hi aśṛṇavam punar āgaccha garuḍa iti eva tatas aham yānam āsthitaḥ parārdhyam ca tatas gatvā yojanānām śatam punar tatra apaśyam aham yaḥ vai brahmāṇam parameṣṭhinam tatra api ca aparam tatra śata koṭi pitāmahān mahā kulam tatas apaśyam pramāṇāni tam avyayam kapittha phala saṃkāśaiḥ aṇḍa ākāraiḥ samāśritam tatra sthitaḥ hariḥ śrīmān aṇḍam ekam bibheda ha mahat bhūtam hi mām gṛhya dattvā vai prākṣipat punar tad madhye sāgarān sapta brahmāṇam ca tathā surān paśyāmi aham yathāyogam mātaram sva kulam tathā evam mayā anubhūtam hi tattva anveṣaṇa kāṅkṣiṇā śibikā sadṛśam mām vai paśyadhvam muni sattamāḥ yoginaḥ tam prapaśyanti jñānam dṛṣṭvā param harim na anyathā śakya rūpaḥ asau jñāna gamyaḥ paraḥ pumān ananyayā ca bhaktyā ca prāptum śakyaḥ mahāhariḥ uvāca iti evam uktvā bhagavān suparṇaḥ pakṣirāj prabhuḥ tasmāt rāja indra sarva ātmā vāsudevaḥ pradhāna kṛt uvāca tam aham tattvataḥ jñātum icchāmi vadatām vara bhūyas api jñāna sadbhāve sthiti artham tvām bravīmi aham uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam saṃvādam mokṣa saṃyuktam śiṣyasya guruṇā saha kaḥ cit brāhmaṇam āsīnam ācāryam ṛṣi sattamam tejaḥ rāśim mahātmānam satya saṃdham jita indriyam śiṣyaḥ parama medhāvī śreyaḥ arthī su samāhitaḥ caraṇau upasaṃgṛhya sthitaḥ prāñjaliḥ abravīt samyak vṛttāḥ nivartante viparītāḥ kṣaya udayāḥ vedeṣu ca api yat vākyam laukikam vyāpakam ca yat śṛṇu śiṣya mahā prājña brahma guhyam idam param adhyātmam sarva bhūtānām āgamānām ca yat vasu krīḍate bhagavant devaḥ bāla krīḍanakaiḥ iva satyam dānam atho yajñaḥ titikṣā damaḥ ārjavam puruṣam sanātanam viṣṇum yat tat veda vidaḥ viduḥ tat idam brahma vārṣṇeyam itihāsam śṛṇuṣva me brāhmaṇaḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ śrāvyaḥ rājanyaḥ kṣatriyaiḥ tathā vaiśyaḥ vaiśyaiḥ tathā śrāvyaḥ śūdraḥ śūdraiḥ mahāmanāḥ māhātmyam devadevasya viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ arhaḥ tvam asi kalyāṇa vārṣṇeyam śṛṇu yat param nirvāṇam amṛtam śrīmat tat viṣṇoḥ parama padam puruṣa dhiṣṭhitam nityam pradhānam brahma kāraṇam kāla svarūpam rūpeṇa viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā kṣobhyamāṇam sṛjati eva nānā bhūtāni bhāgaśas tat dṛṣṭvā puruṣaḥ atattvam sākṣī bhūtvā pravartate kālacakram anādi antam bhāva abhāva sva lakṣaṇam vadanti puruṣa vyāghram keśavam puruṣa ṛṣabham paśya kāla ākhyam aniśam na ca uṣṇam na ati śītalam śītalaḥ ayam anuprāptaḥ kālaḥ grīṣmaḥ tathā eva ca āgacchanti nivartanti sa kālaḥ guṇa rāśayaḥ puruṣa dhiṣṭhā nityam prakṛtiḥ sūyate parā pitṝn devān ṛṣīn ca eva tathā vai yakṣa dānavān nāga asura manuṣyān ca sṛjate paramaḥ avyayaḥ tathā eva veda śāstrāṇi loka dharmān ca śāśvatān yathā ṛtuṣu ṛtu liṅgāni nānā rūpāṇi paryaye dṛśyante tāni tāni eva tathā brahma aha rātriṣu atha yat yat yadā bhāvi kāla yogāt yuga ādiṣu śrutiḥ eṣā samākhyātā tad artham kāraṇa ātmanā an āmnāya vidhānāt vai vedāḥ hi antarhitāḥ yathā yuga ante hi asta bhūtāni śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca sarva sattva vināśāt vai jīva ātma nityayā smṛtāḥ anyasmin aṇḍa sadbhāve vartamānāni nityaśas yuga ante antarhitān vedān sa itihāsān mahā ṛṣayaḥ lebhire tapasā pūrvam anujñātāḥ svayambhunā veda vid veda bhagavān vedāṅgāni bṛhaspatiḥ bhārgavaḥ nīti śāstram ca jagāda jagantaḥ hitam deva ṛṣi caritam gārgyaḥ kṛṣṇātreyaḥ cikitsitam dvaipāyanaḥ nijagrāha śilpa śāstram bhṛguḥ punar nyāya tantrāṇi anekāni taiḥ taiḥ uktāni vādibhiḥ anādyam yat param brahma na devāḥ na ṛṣayaḥ viduḥ ekaḥ tat veda bhagavān dhātā nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ nārāyaṇāt ṛṣi gaṇāḥ tathā mukhyāḥ sura asurāḥ rājarṣayaḥ purāṇāḥ ca paramam duḥkha bheṣajam vakṣye aham tava yat prāptam ṛṣeḥ dvaipāyanāt mayā puruṣa dhiṣṭhā bhāvam prakṛtiḥ sūyate sadā dīpāt anye yathā dīpāḥ pravartante sahasraśas prakṛtiḥ sṛjate tadvat ānantyāt na apacīyate ākāśam ca api ahaṃkārāt vāyuḥ ākāśa saṃbhavaḥ mūlaprakṛtayaḥ aṣṭau tāḥ jagat etāsu avasthitam jñāna indriyāṇi atas pañca pañca karmendriyāṇi api viṣayāḥ pañca ca ekam ca vikāre ṣoḍaśam manaḥ śrotram tvac cakṣuṣī jihvā ghrāṇam pañca indriyāṇi api vijñeyam vyāpakam cittam teṣu sarva gatam manaḥ buddhīndriya arthāḥ iti uktāḥ daśa saṃsarga yonayaḥ vyavasāya guṇāḥ buddhiḥ ahaṃkāraḥ abhimānakaḥ rasa jñāne tu jihvā iyam vyāhṛte vāc tathā eva ca vidyāt tu ṣoḍaśa etāni daivatāni vibhāgaśaḥ deheṣu jñāna kartāram upāsīnam upāsate tadvat soma guṇā jihvā gandhaḥ tu pṛthivī guṇaḥ śrotram śabda guṇam ca eva cakṣuḥ agneḥ guṇaḥ tathā sparśam vāyu guṇam vidyāt sarva bhūteṣu sarvadā manaḥ sattva guṇam prāhuḥ sattvam avyakta jam tathā śritāḥ virajasam devam yam āhuḥ paramam padam vyāpya śete mahān ātmā tasmāt puruṣaḥ ucyate vyāpakaḥ sa guṇaḥ sūkṣmaḥ sarva bhūta guṇa āśrayaḥ yathā dīpaḥ prakāśa ātmā hrasvaḥ vā yadi vā mahān jñāna ātmānam tathā vidyāt puruṣam sarva jantuṣu kāraṇam tasya dehaḥ ayam sa kartā sarva karmaṇām tathā eva ātmā śarīra sthaḥ yogena eva atra dṛśyate agniḥ yathā hi upāyena mathitvā dāru dṛśyate tathā eva ātmā śarīra sthaḥ yogena eva atra dṛśyate nadīṣu āpaḥ yathā yuktāḥ yathā sūrye marīcayaḥ saṃtanvānāḥ
