brāhmaṇaḥ ayam sakhiḥ tava devānām śāsanāt tāvat asaṃkhyeyam dadāmi aham vicārya kuṇḍadhāraḥ tu mānuṣyam calam adhruvam uvāca na aham dhanāni yācāmi brāhmaṇāya dhana prada anyam eva aham icchāmi bhaktāya anugraham kṛtam pṛthivīm ratna pūrṇām vā mahat vā dhana saṃcayam phalāni eva ayam aśnātu kāya kleśa vivarjitaḥ uvāca tatas tat eva bahuśas kuṇḍadhāraḥ mahā yaśāḥ bhaviṣyati eṣa dharma ātmā dharme ca ādhāsyate matiḥ uvāca tatas prītaḥ jaladharaḥ kṛta kāryaḥ yudhiṣṭhira brāhmaṇaḥ sa ca saṃtaptaḥ rājya lobhāt ariṃdama tatas apaśyata cīrāṇi sūkṣmāṇi dvijasattamaḥ uvāca gacchāmi vanam eva aham varam dharmeṇa jīvitum uvāca nirvedāt devatānām ca prasādāt sa dvijottamaḥ vanam praviśya su mahat tapaḥ ārabdhavan tadā devatā atithi śeṣeṇa phala mūla aśanaḥ dvijaḥ tyaktvā mūla phalam sarvam parṇa āhāraḥ abhavat dvijaḥ parṇam tyaktvā jala āhāraḥ tadā āsīt dvijasattamaḥ vāyubhakṣaḥ tatas paścāt bahūn varṣa gaṇān abhūt kālena mahatā tasya divyā dṛṣṭiḥ ajāyata rājyam vā mama saṃtuṣṭaḥ naṣṭaḥ aham syām na saṃśaya tuṣṭaḥ kasmai cit eva aham na mithyā vāc bhavet mama tatas prahṛṣṭa vadanaḥ bhūyas ārabdhavān tapaḥ tasya sākṣāt kuṇḍadhāraḥ darśayām āsa bhārata brāhmaṇasya tapaḥ yogāt sauhṛdena abhicoditaḥ samāgamya sa tena atha pūjām cakre yathāvidhi brāhmaṇaḥ kuṇḍadhārasya vismitaḥ ca abhavat nṛpa paśya rājñām gatim vipra lokān ca avekṣa cakṣuṣā tatas rājñām sahasrāṇi magnāni niraye tadā dūrāt apaśyat vipraḥ sa divya yuktena cakṣuṣā uvāca mām pūjayitvā bhāvena yadi tvam duḥkham āpnuyāḥ paśya paśya ca bhūyas tvam kāmān icchet katham naraḥ svarga dvāram hi saṃruddham mānuṣeṣu viśeṣataḥ uvāca nidrām tandrām tathā ālasyam āvṛtya puruṣān sthitān uvāca etaiḥ lokāḥ su saṃruddhāḥ devānām mānuṣāt bhayam eṣa śaktaḥ asi tapasā rājyam dātum dhanāni ca uvāca tatas papāta śirasā brāhmaṇaḥ toyadhāriṇe uvāca ca enam dharma ātmā mahān me anugrahaḥ kṛtaḥ kṣāntam eva mayā iti vac kuṇḍadhāraḥ dvijarṣabham saṃpariṣvajya bāhubhyām tatra eva antaradhīyata tatas sarvān imān lokān brāhmaṇaḥ anucacāra ha kuṇḍadhāra prasādena tapasā yojitaḥ purā vihāyasā ca gamanam tathā saṃkalpita artha tā dharmāt śaktyā tathā yogāt yā ca eva paramā gatiḥ devatāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ santaḥ yakṣāḥ mānuṣa cāraṇāḥ dhārmikān pūjayanti iha na dhana āḍhyān na kāminaḥ uvāca bahūnām yajña tapasām eka arthānām pitāmaha dharma artham na sukha artha artham katham yajñaḥ samāhitaḥ uvāca uñcha vṛtteḥ purāvṛttam yajña arthe brāhmaṇasya ha rāṣṭre dharma uttare śreṣṭhe vidarbheṣu abhavat dvijaḥ uñcha vṛttiḥ ṛṣiḥ kaḥ cit yajñe yajñam samādadhe śyāmākam asanam tatra sūrya patnī suvarcalā tiktam ca virasam śākam tapasā svādu tām gatam upagamya vane pṛthvīm sarva bhūta vihiṃsayā tasya bhāryā vrata kṛśā śuciḥ puṣkara cāriṇī yajñapatnī tvam ānītā satyena anuvidhīyate sā tu śāpa paritrastā na svabhāva anuvartinī mayūra jīrṇa parṇānām vastram tasyāḥ ca parṇinām akāmāyāḥ kṛ tatra yajñe hotra anumārgataḥ vacobhiḥ abravīt satyam tvayā duṣkṛtakam kṛtam yadi mantra aṅga hīnaḥ ayam yajñaḥ bhavati vaikṛtaḥ tatas tu yajñe sāvitrī sākṣāt tam saṃnyamantrayat evam uktā nivṛttā sā praviṣṭā yajña pāvakam kim nu duścaritam yajñe didṛkṣuḥ sā rasātalam sā tu baddhāñjalim satyam ayācat hariṇam punar satyena saṃpariṣvajya saṃdiṣṭaḥ gamyatām iti tatas sa hariṇaḥ gatvā padāni aṣṭau nyavartata sādhu hiṃsaya mām satya hataḥ yāsyāmi sat gatim paśya hi apsarasaḥ divyāḥ mayā dattena cakṣuṣā vimānāni vicitrāṇi gandharvāṇām mahātmanām tatas su ruciram dṛṣṭvā spṛhā lagnena cakṣuṣā mṛgam ālokya hiṃsāyām svarga vāsam samarthayat samādhānam ca bhāryāyāḥ lebhe sa tapasā param ahiṃsā sakalaḥ dharmaḥ hiṃsā yajñe asamāhitā satyam te aham pravakṣyāmi yaḥ dharmaḥ satya vādinām uvāca katham bhavati pāpa ātmā katham dharmam karoti vā uvāca śṛṇu mokṣam sa nirvedam pāpam dharmam ca mūlatas vijñāna artham hi pañcānām icchā pūrvam pravartate prāpya tān jāyate kāmaḥ dveṣaḥ vā bharata ṛṣabha iṣṭānām rūpa gandhānām abhyāsam ca cikīrṣati suhṛdbhiḥ vāryamāṇaḥ api paṇḍitaiḥ ca api bhārata tasya adharma pravṛttasya doṣān paśyanti sādhavaḥ eka śīlāḥ ca mitra tvam bhajante pāpa karmiṇaḥ evam bhavati pāpa ātmā dharma ātmānam tu me śṛṇu kuśalena eva dharmeṇa gatim iṣṭām prapadyate yaḥ etān prajñayā doṣān pūrvam eva anupaśyati kuśalaḥ sukha duḥkhānām sādhūn ca api upasevate atṛpyamāṇaḥ nirvedam ādatte jñānacakṣuṣā prajñācakṣuḥ yadā kāme doṣam eva anupaśyati sarva tyāge ca yatate dṛṣṭvā lokam kṣaya ātmakam tatas mokṣāya yatate na anupāyāt upāyatas pāpam dharmam tathā mokṣam nirvedam ca eva bhārata dharme sthitānām kaunteya siddhiḥ bhavati śāśvatā uvāca mokṣaḥ pitāmahena uktaḥ upāyāt na anupāyataḥ tam upāyam yathānyāyam śrotum icchāmi bhārata uvāca evam dharma abhyupāyeṣu na anyat dharmeṣu kāraṇam ekaḥ panthāḥ hi mokṣasya tat me vistarāt śṛṇu kṣamayā krodham ucchindyāt kāmam saṃkalpa varjanāt apramādāt bhayam rakṣet śvāsam kṣetrajña śīlanāt icchām dveṣam ca kāmam ca dhairyeṇa vinivartayet nidrām ca pratibhām ca eva jñāna abhyāsena tattva vid upadravān tathā rogān hita jīrṇa mita aśanāt lobham moham ca saṃtoṣāt viṣayān tattva darśanāt āyatyā ca jayet āśām artham saṅga vivarjanāt kāruṇyena ātmanaḥ mānam tṛṣṇām ca paritoṣāt yacchet vāc manasī buddhyā tām yacchet jñānacakṣuṣā jñānam ātmā mahān yacchet tam yacchet śāntiḥ ātmanaḥ jñānam ātma avabodhena yacchet ātmānam ātmanā tat etat upaśāntena boddhavyam śuci karmaṇā kāmam krodham ca lobham ca bhayam svapnam ca pañcamam dhyānam adhyayanam dānam satyam hrīḥ ārjavam kṣamā śaucam āhārāt śuddhiḥ indriyāṇām ca saṃyamaḥ dhūta pāpaḥ sa tejasvī laghu āhāraḥ jita indriyaḥ kāma krodhau vaśe kṛtvā ninīṣet brahmaṇaḥ padam eṣa mārgaḥ hi mokṣasya prasannaḥ vimalaḥ śuciḥ tathā vāc kāya manasām niyamaḥ kāmataḥ anyathā uvāca āsīnam devalam vṛddham buddhvā buddhimatām varaḥ nāradaḥ paripapraccha bhūtānām prabhava apyayam kutas sṛṣṭam idam viśvam brahman sthāvara jaṅgamam yebhyaḥ sṛjati bhūtāni kālaḥ bhāva pracoditaḥ mahābhūtāni pañca iti tāni āhuḥ bhūta cintakāḥ tebhyaḥ sṛjati bhūtāni kālaḥ ātma pracoditaḥ etebhyaḥ yaḥ param brūyāt asat brūyāt asaṃśayam viddhi nārada pañca etān śāśvatān acalān dhruvān mahataḥ tejasaḥ rāśīn kāla ṣaṣṭhān svabhāvāt apaḥ ca eva antarikṣam ca pṛthivī vāyu pāvakau na upapattyā na vā yuktyā tu asat brūyāt asaṃśayam vettha tān abhinirvṛttān ṣaṭ ete yasya rāśayaḥ pañca eva tāni kālaḥ ca bhāva abhāvau ca kevalau aṣṭau bhūtāni bhūtānām śāśvatāni bhava apyayau tasya bhūmi mayaḥ dehaḥ śrotram ākāśa saṃbhavam cakṣuṣī nāsikā karṇau tvac jihvā iti ca pañcamī indriyāṇi indriya arthānām jñānāni kavayaḥ viduḥ darśanam śravaṇam ghrāṇam sparśanam rasanam tathā upapattyā guṇān viddhi pañca pañcasu pañcadhā rūpam gandhaḥ rasaḥ sparśaḥ śabdaḥ ca eva atha tad guṇāḥ rūpam gandham rasam sparśam śabdam ca etān tu tad guṇān cittam indriya saṃghātāt param tasmāt param manaḥ cittam indriya saṃghātam manaḥ buddhim tathā aṣṭamām aṣṭau jñāna indriyāṇi āhuḥ etāni adhyātma cintakāḥ pāṇi pādam ca pāyuḥ ca mehanam pañcamam mukham iti saṃśabdyamānāni śṛṇu karmendriyāṇi api balam ṣaṣṭham ṣaḍ etāni vācā samyak yathāgamam jñāna ceṣṭā indriya guṇāḥ sarve saṃśabditāḥ mayā indriyāṇām sva karmabhyaḥ śramāt uparamaḥ yadā sāttvikāḥ ca eva ye bhāvāḥ tathā rājasa tāmasāḥ karma yuktān praśaṃsanti sāttvikān itarān tathā ānandaḥ karmaṇām siddhiḥ pratipattiḥ parā gatiḥ sāttvikasya nimittāni bhāvān saṃśrayate smṛtiḥ jantuṣu ekatameṣu evam bhāvāḥ ye vidhim āsthitāḥ bhāvayoḥ īpsitam nityam pratyakṣa gamanam dvayoḥ indriyāṇi ca bhāvāḥ ca guṇāḥ saptadaśa smṛtāḥ teṣām aṣṭādaśaḥ dehī yaḥ śarīre sa śāśvataḥ atha vā sa śarīrāḥ te guṇāḥ sarve śarīriṇām saṃśritāḥ tad viyoge hi sa śarīrāḥ na santi te atha vā saṃnipātaḥ ayam śarīram pāñcabhautikam ekaḥ ca daśa ca aṣṭau ca guṇāḥ saha śarīriṇām ūṣmaṇā saha viṃśaḥ vā saṃghātaḥ pāñcabhautikaḥ mahān saṃdhārayati etat śarīram vāyunā saha puṇya pāpa vināśa ante puṇya pāpa samīritam hitvā hitvā hi ayam praiti dehāt deham kṛta āśrayaḥ kāla saṃcoditaḥ kṣetrī viśīrṇāt vā gṛhāt gṛham tatra na eva anutapyante prājñāḥ niścita niścayāḥ kṛpaṇāḥ tu anutapyante janāḥ sambandhi māninaḥ yāti deham ayam bhuktvā kadā cit paramām gatim puṇya pāpa mayam deham kṣapayan karma saṃcayāt puṇya pāpa kṣaya artham ca sāṃkhyam jñānam vidhīyate uvāca bhrātaraḥ pitaraḥ putrāḥ jñātayaḥ suhṛdaḥ tathā artha hetoḥ hatāḥ krūraiḥ asmābhiḥ pāpa buddhibhiḥ yā iyam artha udbhavā tṛṣṇā katham etām pitāmaha nivartayema pāpam hi tṛṣṇayā kāritāḥ vayam uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam gītam videha rājena māṇḍavyāya anupṛcchate mithilāyām pradīptāyām na me dahyati kim cana arthāḥ khalu samṛddhāḥ hi bāḍham duḥkham vijānatām asamṛddhāḥ tu api sadā mohayanti avicakṣaṇān tṛṣṇā kṣaya sukhasya ete na arhataḥ ṣoḍaśīm kalām yathā eva śṛṅgam goḥ kāle vardhamānasya vardhate tat eva paritāpāya nāśe saṃpadyate punar na kāmān anurudhyeta duḥkham kāmeṣu vai ratiḥ vidvān sarveṣu bhūteṣu vyāghra māṃsa upamaḥ bhavet bhaya abhaye ca saṃtyajya saṃpraśāntaḥ nirāmayaḥ yaḥ asau prāṇāntikaḥ rogaḥ tām tṛṣṇām tyajataḥ sukham cāritram ātmanaḥ paśyan candra śuddham anāmayam rājñaḥ tat vacanam śrutvā prītimān abhavat dvijaḥ pūjayitvā ca tat vākyam māṇḍavyaḥ mokṣam āśritaḥ uvāca kiṃśīlaḥ kiṃsamācāraḥ kiṃvidyaḥ kiṃparāyaṇaḥ uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam hārītena purā gītam tat nibodha yudhiṣṭhira sva gṛhāt abhiniḥsṛtya lābha alābhe samaḥ muniḥ samupoḍheṣu kāmeṣu nirapekṣaḥ parivrajet na cakṣuṣā na manasā na vācā dūṣayet api na pratyakṣam parokṣam vā dūṣaṇam vyāharet kva cit na hiṃsyāt sarva bhūtāni maitrāyaṇa gatiḥ caret na idam jīvitam āsādya vairam kurvīta kena cit ativādān titikṣeta na abhimanyet katham cana krodhyamānaḥ priyam brūyāt ākruṣṭaḥ kuśalam vadet avakīrṇaḥ su guptaḥ ca na vācā hi apriyam vadet mṛduḥ syāt apratikrūraḥ visrabdhaḥ syāt aroṣaṇaḥ atīte pātrasaṃcāre bhikṣām lipseta vai muniḥ anuyātrikam arthasya mātrā lābheṣu an ādṛtaḥ lābham sādhāraṇam na icchet na bhuñjīta abhipūjitaḥ abhipūjita lābham hi jugupseta eva tādṛśaḥ na ca anna doṣān nindeta na guṇān abhipūjayet śūnya āgāram vṛkṣa mūlam araṇyam atha vā guhām ajñāta caryām gatvā anyām tatas anyatra eva saṃviśet sukṛtam duṣkṛtam ca ubhe na anurudhyeta karmaṇi nitya tṛptaḥ su saṃtuṣṭaḥ prasanna vadana indriyaḥ dhyāna japya paraḥ maunī vairāgyam samupāśritaḥ a su antam bhautikam sargam paśyan bhūta ātmikām gatim ātma ārāmaḥ praśānta ātmā laghu āhāraḥ nirāmayaḥ madhyasthaḥ eva tiṣṭheta praśaṃsā nindayoḥ samaḥ mahātmā su vrataḥ dāntaḥ sarvatra eva anapāśritaḥ a pūrva cārakaḥ saumyaḥ a niketaḥ samāhitaḥ vānaprastha gṛhasthābhyām na saṃsṛjyeta karhi cit ajñāta lipsām lipseta na ca enam harṣaḥ āviśet vijānatām mokṣaḥ eṣa śramaḥ syāt a vijānatām mokṣa yānam idam kṛtsnam viduṣām hāritaḥ abravīt uvāca prāpya jātim manuṣyeṣu devaiḥ api pitāmaha kadā vayam kariṣyāmaḥ saṃnyāsam duḥkha saṃjñakam duḥkham etat śarīrāṇām dhāraṇam kurusattama vimuktāḥ saptadaśabhiḥ hetu bhūtaiḥ ca pañcabhiḥ indriya arthaiḥ guṇaiḥ ca eva aṣṭābhiḥ prapitāmaha na gacchanti punarbhāvam munayaḥ saṃśita vratāḥ kadā vayam bhaviṣyāmaḥ rājyam hitvā paraṃtapa uvāca na asti anantam mahā rāja sarvam saṃkhyāna gocaram na ca api gamyate rājan na eṣa doṣaḥ prasaṅgataḥ īśaḥ ayam satatam dehī nṛpate puṇya pāpayoḥ yathā añjana mayaḥ vāyuḥ punar mānaḥśilam rajaḥ anupraviśya tad varṇaḥ dṛśyate rañjayan diśaḥ jñānena hi yadā jantuḥ ajñāna prabhavam tamaḥ tvayā ca lokena ca sa amareṇa tasmāt na śāmyanti mahā ṛṣi saṃghāḥ asmin arthe purā gītam śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ nṛpa yathā daityena vṛtreṇa bhraṣṭa aiśvaryeṇa ceṣṭitam a śocatā śatru madhye buddhim āsthāya kevalām bhraṣṭa aiśvaryam purā vṛtram uśanāḥ vākyam abravīt uvāca na śocāmi na hṛṣyāmi bhūtānām āgatim gatim kāla saṃcoditāḥ jīvāḥ majjanti narake avaśāḥ paridṛṣṭāni sarvāṇi divyāni āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ kṣapayitvā tu tam kālam gaṇitam kāla coditāḥ sa avaśeṣeṇa kālena saṃbhavanti punar punar nirgacchanti avaśāḥ jīvāḥ kāla bandhana bandhanāḥ evam saṃsaramāṇāni jīvāni aham a dṛṣṭavān yathā karma tathā lābhaḥ iti śāstra nidarśanam gatam gacchanti ca adhvānam sarva bhūtāni sarvadā uvāca kāla saṃkhyāna saṃkhyātam sṛṣṭi sthiti parāyaṇam tam bhāṣamāṇam bhagavān uśanā pratyabhāṣata bhīmān duṣṭa pralāpān tvam tāta kasmāt prabhāṣase uvāca pratyakṣam etat bhavataḥ tathā anyeṣām manīṣiṇām gandhān ādāya bhūtānām rasān ca vividhān api jvālā mālā parikṣiptaḥ vaihāyasa caraḥ tathā ajeyaḥ sarva bhūtānām āsam nityam apeta bhīḥ aiśvaryam tapasā prāptam bhraṣṭam tat ca sva karmabhiḥ yuyutsatā mahā indreṇa purā sārdham mahātmanā tatas mama bhagavant dṛṣṭaḥ hariḥ nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ vaikuṇṭhaḥ puruṣaḥ viṣṇuḥ śuklaḥ anantaḥ sanātanaḥ muñja keśaḥ hari śmaśruḥ sarva bhūta pitāmahaḥ nūnam tu tasya tapasaḥ sa avaśeṣam mama asti vai yat aham praṣṭum icchāmi bhavantam karmaṇaḥ phalam kim vā phalam param prāpya jīvaḥ tiṣṭhati śāśvataḥ kena vā karmaṇā śakyam atha jñānena kena vā iti idam uktaḥ sa muniḥ tadānīm pratyāha yat tat śṛṇu rāja siṃha uvāca yasya pṛthvī talam tāta sa ākāśam bāhu gocaram tasya aham te pravakṣyāmi viṣṇoḥ māhātmyam uttamam uvāca tayoḥ saṃvadatoḥ evam ājagāma mahā muniḥ niṣasāda āsane rājan mahārhe muni puṃgavaḥ tam āsīnam mahā prājñam uśanāḥ vākyam abravīt brūhi asmai dānava indrāya viṣṇoḥ māhātmyam uttamam viṣṇoḥ māhātmya saṃyuktam dānava indrāya dhīmate śṛṇu sarvam idam daitya viṣṇoḥ māhātmyam uttamam sṛjati eṣa mahā bāho bhūta grāmam carācaram eṣa ca ākṣipate kāle kāle visṛjate punar na eṣa dānavatā śakyaḥ tapasā na eva ca ijyayā saṃprāptum indriyāṇām tu saṃyamena eva śakyate tadvat jāti śataiḥ jīvaḥ śudhyate alpena karmaṇā līlayā alpam yathā gātrāt pramṛjyāt ātmanaḥ rajaḥ yathā ca alpena mālyena vāsitam tila sarṣapam evam jāti śataiḥ yuktaḥ guṇaiḥ eva prasaṅgiṣu yathā karma viśeṣān ca prāpnuvanti tathā śṛṇu tat te ānupūrvyā vyākhyāsye tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu an ādi nidhanaḥ śrīmān hariḥ nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ sa vai sṛjati bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca eṣa sarveṣu bhūteṣu kṣaraḥ ca akṣaraḥ eva ca ekādaśa vikāra ātmā jagat pibati raśmibhiḥ bāhavaḥ tu diśaḥ daitya śrotram ākāśam eva ca nakṣatra cakram netrābhyām pādayoḥ bhūḥ ca dānava tam viśvabhūtam viśvādim paramam viddhi ca īśvaram pādayoḥ bhūḥ sa pātāḷā hṛta sūryasya eva maṇḍalam saḥ mukham tāta karmaṇaḥ tat phalam viduḥ chandāṃsi tasya romāṇi akṣaram ca sarasvatī bahu āśrayaḥ bahu mukhaḥ dharmaḥ hṛdi samāśritaḥ śruti śāstra graha upetaḥ ṣoḍaśartvikkratuḥ ca saḥ pitāmahaḥ ca viṣṇuḥ ca saḥ aśvinaḥ sa puraṃdaraḥ jantuḥ paśyati jñānena tatas sattvam prakāśate saṃhāra vikṣepa sahasra koṭīḥ tiṣṭhanti jīvāḥ pracaranti ca anye prajā visargasya ca pārimāṇyam vāpī sahasrāṇi bahūni daitya vāpī punar yojana vistṛ tāḥ krośam ca gambhīra tayā avagāh āyāmataḥ pañcaśatāḥ ca sarvāḥ pratyekaśaḥ yojanataḥ pravṛddhāḥ vāpyāḥ jalam kṣipyati vāla koṭyā tu ahnā sakṛt ca api atha na dvitīyam tāsām kṣaye viddhi kṛtam visargam saṃhāram ekam ca tathā prajānām ṣaṭ jīva varṇāḥ paramam pramāṇam kṛṣṇaḥ dhūmraḥ nīlam atha asya madhyam raktam punar sahyataram sukham tu hāridra varṇam su sukham ca śuklam gatim ca yām darśanam āha devaḥ gatvā śubham darśanam eva ca āha gatiḥ punar varṇa kṛtā prajānām varṇaḥ tathā kāla kṛtaḥ asura indra śatam sahasrāṇi caturdaśa iha parā gatiḥ jīva guṇasya daitya ārohaṇam tat kṛtam eva viddhi sthānam tathā niḥsaraṇam ca teṣām kṛṣṇa varṇasya gatiḥ nikṛṣṭā sa majjate narake pacyamānaḥ śatam sahasrāṇi tatas caritvā prāpnoti varṇam haritam tu paścāt sa ca eva tasmin nivasati anīśaḥ yuga kṣaye tamasā saṃvṛta ātmā tatas sa hāridram upaiti varṇam saṃhāra vikṣepa śate vyatīte gatīḥ sahasrāṇi ca pañca tasya catvāri saṃvarta kṛtāni ca eva sa deva loke viharati abhīkṣṇam tatas cyutaḥ mānuṣa tām upaiti saṃhāra vikṣepa śatāni ca aṣṭau martyeṣu tiṣṭhan amṛta tvam eti saḥ asmāt atha bhraśyati kāla yogāt kṛṣṇe tale tiṣṭhati sarva kaṣṭe saṃśritya saṃdhāvati śuklam etam aṣṭāparān arcyatamān sa lokān aṣṭau ca ṣaṣṭim ca śatāni yāni śuklasya varṇasya parā gatiḥ yā trīṇi eva ruddhāni mahā anubhāva saṃhāra vikṣepam aniṣṭam ekam catvāri ca anyāni vasati anīśaḥ ṣaṣṭhasya varṇasya parā gatiḥ yā siddhā viśiṣṭasya gata klamasya sapta uttaram teṣu vasati anīśa saṃhāra vikṣepa śatam sa śeṣa tasmāt upāvṛtya manuṣya loke tatas mahān mānuṣa tām upaiti tasmāt upāvṛtya tatas krameṇa saḥ agre sma saṃtiṣṭhati bhūta sargam sa sapta kṛtvas ca paraiti lokān saṃhāra vikṣepa kṛta pravāsaḥ saṃhāra kāle paridagdha kāyāḥ brahmāṇam āyānti sadā prajāḥ hi ceṣṭā ātmanaḥ deva gaṇāḥ ca sarve ye brahma lokāt amarāḥ sma te api prajā visargam tu sa śeṣa kālam sthānāni sva eva sṛ jīva niḥśeṣāṇām tat padam yānti ca ante sarva āpadā ye sadṛśāḥ manuṣyāḥ ye tu cyutāḥ siddha lokāt krameṇa teṣām gatim yānti tathā ānupūrvyā jīvāḥ pare tad bala veṣa rūpāḥ vidhim svakam yānti viparyayeṇa tāvat tadā teṣu viśuddha bhāvaḥ saṃyamya pañca indriya rūpam etat śuddhām gatim tām paramām paraiti śuddhena nityam manasā vicinvan iti etat ākhyātam ahīna sattva nārāyaṇasya iha balam mayā te uvāca sanatkumāraḥ madhura abhibhāṣī viṣṇoḥ anantasya sanātanam tat sthānam sargāḥ yatra sarve pravṛttāḥ uvāca evam uktvā sa kaunteya vṛtraḥ prāṇān avāsṛjat yojayitvā tathā ātmānam param sthānam avāptavān uvāca ayam sa bhagavant devaḥ pitāmaha janārdanaḥ sanatkumāraḥ vṛtrāya yat tat ākhyātavan purā uvāca mūla sthāyī sa bhagavān svena anantena tejasā tad sthaḥ sṛjati tān bhāvān nānā rūpān mahā tapāḥ turīyārdhena brahmāṇam tasya viddhi mahātmanaḥ turīyārdhena lokān trīn bhāvayati eṣa buddhimān tān vidhātā prasanna ātmā lokān carati śāśvatān sarvāṇi a śūnyāni karoti anantaḥ sanatkumāraḥ saṃcarate ca lokān uvāca vṛtra parama artha jña dṛś man gatiḥ śuklaḥ śukla abhijātīyaḥ sādhyaḥ na āvartate anagha vayam tu bhṛśam āpannāḥ raktāḥ kaṣṭa mukhe asukhe kām gatim pratipatsyāmaḥ nīlām kṛṣṇa adhamām atha uvāca śuddha abhijana saṃpannāḥ pāṇḍavāḥ saṃśita vratāḥ sukhena saṃyāsyatha siddha saṃkhyām mā vaḥ bhayam bhūt vimalāḥ stha sarve uvāca aho dharmiṣṭha tā tāta vṛtrasya amita tejasaḥ yasya vijñānam atulam viṣṇoḥ bhaktiḥ ca tādṛśī durvijñeyam idam tāta viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ katham vā rāja śārdūla padam tat jñātavan asau dharmiṣṭhaḥ viṣṇu bhaktaḥ ca tattva jñaḥ ca pada anvaye vṛtraḥ tu rāja śārdūla yathā śakreṇa nirjitaḥ vistareṇa mahā bāho param kautūhalam hi mama uvāca rathena indraḥ prayātaḥ vai sārdham sura gaṇaiḥ purā dadarśa atha agratas vṛtram viṣṭhitam parvata upamam yojanānām śatāni ūrdhvam pañca ucchritam ariṃdama śatāni vistareṇa atha trīṇi eva abhyadhikāni tu tat prekṣya tādṛśam rūpam trailokyena api durjayam vṛtrasya devāḥ saṃtrastāḥ na śāntim upalebhire bhayāt vṛtrasya sahasā dṛṣṭvā tat rūpam uttamam tatas nādaḥ samabhavat vāditrāṇām ca nisvanaḥ deva asurāṇām sarveṣām tasmin yuddhe upasthite na saṃbhramaḥ na bhī kā cit āsthā vā samajāyata asibhiḥ paṭṭiśaiḥ śūlaiḥ śakti tomara mudgaraiḥ śilābhiḥ vividhābhiḥ ca kārmukaiḥ ca mahā svanaiḥ pitāmaha purogāḥ ca sarve deva gaṇāḥ tathā ṛṣayaḥ ca mahābhāgāḥ tat yuddham draṣṭum āgaman vimāna agryaiḥ mahā rāja siddhāḥ ca bharata ṛṣabha tatas antarikṣam āvṛtya vṛtraḥ dharma bhṛtām varaḥ aśma varṣeṇa deva indram parvatāt samavākirat tatas deva gaṇa krudh sarvatas śastra vṛṣṭibhiḥ vṛtraḥ ca kuru śārdūla mahā māyaḥ mahā balaḥ mohayām āsa deva indram māyā yuddhena sarvatas uvāca eṣa brahmā ca viṣṇuḥ ca śivaḥ ca eva jagatprabhuḥ samudvignam samīkṣya tvām svasti iti ūcuḥ jayāya te mā kārṣīḥ kaśmalam śakra kaḥ cit eva itaraḥ yathā āryām yuddhe matim kṛtvā jahi śatrum sureśvara nirīkṣate tvām bhagavant tyaja moham sureśvara uvāca evam saṃbodhyamānasya vasiṣṭhena mahātmanā tatas buddhim upāgamya bhagavān pākaśāsanaḥ yogena mahatā yuktaḥ tām māyām vyapakarṣata tatas aṅgiraḥ sutaḥ śrīmān te ca eva parama ṛṣayaḥ dṛṣṭvā vṛtrasya vikrāntam upagamya maheśvaram ūcuḥ vṛtra vināśa artham lokānām hita kāmyayā samāviśat mahā raudram vṛtram daitya varam tadā viṣṇuḥ ca bhagavant devaḥ sarva loka abhipūjitaḥ aindram samāviśat vajram loka saṃrakṣaṇe rataḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca mahā tejāḥ sarve ca parama ṛṣayaḥ te samāsādya vara dam vāsavam loka pūjitam eṣa vṛtraḥ mahān śakra balena mahatā vṛtaḥ viśva ātmā sarva gaḥ ca eva bahu māyaḥ ca viśrutaḥ jahi tvam yogam āsthāya mā avamaṃsthāḥ sureśvara ṣaṣṭim varṣa sahasrāṇi brahmā ca asmai varam dadau mahā bala tvam ca tathā tejaḥ ca agryam sureśvara etat vai māmakam tejaḥ samāviśati vāsava uvāca uvāca āviśyamāne daitye tu jvareṇa atha mahā asure devatānām ṛṣīṇām ca harṣāt nādaḥ mahān abhūt tatas dundubhayaḥ ca eva śaṅkhāḥ ca su mahā svanāḥ murajāḥ ḍiṇḍimāḥ ca eva prāvādyanta sahasraśas asurāṇām tu sarveṣām smṛti lopaḥ abhavat mahān prajñā nāśaḥ ca balavān kṣaṇena samapadyata tam āviṣṭam atho jñātvā ṛṣayaḥ devatāḥ tathā stuvantaḥ śakram īśānam tathā prācodayan api ṛṣibhiḥ stūyamānasya rūpam āsīt su durdṛśam uvāca vṛtrasya tu mahā rāja jvara āviṣṭasya sarvaśas abhavan yāni liṅgāni śarīre tāni me śṛṇu gātra kampaḥ ca su mahān śvāsaḥ ca api abhavat mahān romaharṣaḥ ca tīvraḥ abhūt niḥśvāsaḥ ca mahān nṛpa śivā ca aśiva saṃkāśā tasya vaktrāt su dāruṇā niṣpapāta mahā ghorā smṛtiḥ sā tasya bhārata ulkāḥ ca jvalitāḥ tasya dīptāḥ pārśve prapedire gṛdhra kaṅka vaḍāḥ ca eva vācaḥ amuñcan su dāruṇāḥ vṛtrasya upari saṃhṛṣṭāḥ cakra vat paribabhramuḥ tatas tam ratham āsthāya deva āpyāyitam āhave amānuṣam atho nādam sa mumoca mahā asuraḥ sa vajraḥ su mahā tejāḥ kālāgni sadṛśa upamaḥ kṣipram eva mahā kāyam vṛtram daityam apātayat vṛtram vinihatam dṛṣṭvā devānām bharata ṛṣabha vṛtram tu hatvā bhagavat dānavāri mahat yaśas atha vṛtrasya kauravya śarīrāt abhiniḥsṛtā brahmahatyā mahā ghorā raudrā loka bhaya āvahā karāla daśanā bhīmā vikṛtā kṛṣṇa piṅgalā kapāla mālinī ca eva kṛśā ca bharata ṛṣabha sā abhiniṣkramya rāja indra tādṛś rūpā bhaya āvahā vajriṇam mṛgayām āsa tadā bharata sattama svargāya abhimukhaḥ prāyāt lokānām hita kāmyayā bisāt niḥsaramāṇam tu dṛṣṭvā śakram mahat ojasam kaṇṭhe jagrāha devendram su lagnā ca abhavat tadā nalinyām bisa madhya sthaḥ babhūva abda gaṇān bahūn tadā gṛhītaḥ kauravya niśceṣṭaḥ samapadyata tasyāḥ vyapohane śakraḥ param yatnam cakāra ha jñātvā gṛhītam śakram tu dvija pravara hatyayā tām uvāca mahā bāho brahma hatyām pitāmahaḥ tvayā kṛtā iyam maryādā loka saṃrakṣaṇa arthinā śakrāt apagamiṣyāmi nivāsam tu vidhatsva me uvāca tathā iti tām prāha tadā brahma hatyām pitāmahaḥ śakrasya adya vimokṣa artham catur bhāgam pratīccha me yaḥ tvām jvalantam āsādya svayam vai mānavaḥ kva cit uvāca tatas vṛkṣa oṣadhi tṛṇam samāhūya pitāmahaḥ iyam vṛtrāt anuprāptā brahmahatyā mahā bhayā puruhūtam caturtha aṃśam asyāḥ yūyam pratīcchata tatas vṛkṣa oṣadhi tṛṇam tathā eva uktam yathātatham vayam agnim tathā śītam varṣam ca pavana īritam grahīṣyāmaḥ triloka īśa mokṣam cintayatām bhavān uvāca tatas vṛkṣa oṣadhi tṛṇam evam uktam mahātmanā brahmāṇam abhisaṃpūjya jagāma āśu yathāgatam vācā madhurayā prāha sāntvayan iva bhārata iyam indrāt anuprāptā brahma hatyā vara aṅganāḥ caturtham asyāḥ bhāgam hi mayā uktāḥ saṃpratīcchata ūcuḥ grahaṇe kṛtabuddhīnām deveśa te śāsanāt tam eṣā yāsyati kṣipram vyetu vaḥ mānasaḥ jvaraḥ uvāca tathā iti hṛṣṭa manasaḥ vac atha apsarasām gaṇāḥ apaḥ saṃcintayām āsa dhyātāḥ tāḥ ca api atha agaman imāḥ sma deva saṃprāptāḥ tvad sakāśam ariṃdama śāsanāt te deveśa samājñāpaya naḥ vibho iyam vṛtrāt anuprāptā puruhūtam mahā bhayā brahmahatyā caturtha aṃśam asyāḥ yūyam pratīcchata ūcuḥ śleṣma mūtra purīṣāṇi yuṣmāsu pratimokṣyati tathā vaḥ bhavitā mokṣaḥ iti satyam bravīmi vaḥ uvāca yathā nisṛṣṭam tam deśam agacchat deva śāsanāt evam śakreṇa saṃprāptā brahmahatyā janādhipa śrūyate hi mahā rāja saṃprāptā vāsavena vai samavāpya śriyam devaḥ hatvā arīn ca sahasraśas praharṣam atulam lebhe vāsavaḥ pṛthivīpate vṛtrasya rudhirāt ca eva khukhuṇḍāḥ pārtha jajñire dvijātibhiḥ abhakṣyāḥ te dīkṣitaiḥ ca tapodhanaiḥ sarva avastham tvam api eṣām dvijātīnām priyam kuru evam śakreṇa kauravya buddhi saukṣmyāt mahā asuraḥ upāya pūrvam nihataḥ vṛtraḥ atha amita tejasā ye tu śakra kathām divyām imām parvasu parvasu uvāca pitāmaha mahā prājña sarva śāstra viśārada katham eṣa mahā prājña jvaraḥ prādurabhūt kutas uvāca śṛṇu rājan jvarasya iha saṃbhavam loka viśrutam vistaram ca asya vakṣyāmi yādṛśam ca eva bhārata purā meroḥ mahā rāja śṛṅgam trailokya viśrutam jyotiṣkam nāma sāvitram sarva ratna vibhūṣitam aprameyam anādhṛṣyam sarva lokeṣu bhārata khyātam āsīt sva tejobhiḥ āvārya arka prabham sthitam śailarājasutā ca asya nityam pārśve sthitā babhau tathā devāḥ mahātmānaḥ vasavaḥ ca mahā ojasaḥ tathā eva ca mahātmānau aśvinau bhiṣajām varau tathā vaiśravaṇaḥ rājā guhyakaiḥ abhisaṃvṛtaḥ yakṣāṇām adhipaḥ śrīmān kailāsa nilayaḥ prabhuḥ upāsanta mahātmānam uśanā ca mahā kaviḥ aṅgiraḥ pramukhāḥ ca eva tathā devarṣayaḥ apare apsaraḥ gaṇa saṃghāḥ ca samājagmuḥ anekaśas vavau śivaḥ sukhaḥ vāyuḥ nānā gandha vahaḥ śuciḥ sarva ṛtu kusuma upetāḥ puṣpavantaḥ mahā drumāḥ tathā vidyādharāḥ ca eva siddhāḥ ca eva tapodhanāḥ mahādevam paśupatim paryupāsanta bhārata bhūtāni ca mahā rāja nānā rūpa dharāṇi atha rākṣasāḥ ca mahā raudrāḥ piśācāḥ ca mahā balāḥ bahu rūpa dharāḥ hṛṣṭāḥ nānā praharaṇa udyatāḥ pragṛhya jvalitam śūlam dīpyamānam sva tejasā gaṅgā ca saritām śreṣṭhā sarva tīrtha jala udbhavā paryupāsata tam devam rūpiṇī kuru nandana evam sa bhagavān tatra pūjyamānaḥ surarṣibhiḥ prasthitāḥ devatāḥ dṛṣṭvā śailarājasutā tadā uvāca vacanam sādhvī devam paśupatim patim dakṣaḥ nāma mahābhāge prajānām patiḥ uttamaḥ uvāca uvāca ajeyaḥ ca apradhṛṣyaḥ ca tejasā yaśasā śriyā uvāca evam uktvā tu sā devī devam paśupatim patim tūṣṇīṃbhūtā bhavat rājan dahyamānena cetasā atha devyāḥ matam jñātvā hṛd gatam yat cikīrṣitam sa samājñāpayām āsa tiṣṭha tvam iti nandinam tatas yoga balam kṛtvā sarva yoga īśvara īśvaraḥ tam yajñam su mahā tejāḥ bhīmaiḥ anucaraiḥ tadā sahasā ghātayām āsa devadevaḥ pinākadhṛk ke cit nādān amuñcanta ke cit hāsān ca cakrire rudhireṇa apare rājan tatra agnim samavākiran ke cit yūpān samutpāṭya babhramuḥ vikṛta ānanāḥ tatas sa yajñaḥ nṛpate vadhyamānaḥ samantataḥ āsthāya mṛga rūpam vai kham eva abhyapatat tadā tam tu yajñam tathārūpam gacchantam upalabhya saḥ dhanuḥ ādāya bāṇam ca tadā anvasarata prabhuḥ prādurbabhūva su mahān agniḥ kāla anala upamaḥ tatra ca ajāyata tadā puruṣaḥ puruṣa ṛṣabha hrasvaḥ atimātra rakta akṣaḥ hari śmaśruḥ vibhīṣaṇaḥ ūrdhva keśaḥ atiloma aṅgaḥ śyena ulūkaḥ tathā eva ca karālaḥ kṛṣṇa varṇaḥ ca rakta vāsāḥ tathā eva ca tam yajñam sa mahā sattvaḥ adahat kakṣam iva analaḥ vyacarat sarvatas devān prādravat saḥ ṛṣīn tathā devāḥ ca api adravan sarve tatas bhītāḥ diśaḥ daśa tena tasmin vicaratā puruṣeṇa viśām pate hāhā bhūte pravṛtte tu nāde loka bhayaṃkare hāhā bhūtam jagant sarvam upalakṣya tadā prabhuḥ pitāmahaḥ mahādevam darśayan pratyabhāṣata kriyatām pratisaṃhāraḥ sarva deva īśvara tvayā imāḥ hi devatāḥ sarvāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca paraṃtapa yaḥ ca eṣa puruṣaḥ jātaḥ svedāt te vibudha uttama samarthā sakalā pṛthvī bahudhā sṛjyatām ayam parām ca prītim agamat utsmayan ca pinākadhṛk avāpa ca tadā bhāgam yathoktam brahmaṇā bhavaḥ śānti artham sarva bhūtānām śṛṇu tat ca api putraka śīrṣa abhitāpaḥ nāgānām parvatānām śilājatuḥ apām tu nīlikām vidyāt nirmokam bhujageṣu ca khorakaḥ saurabheyāṇām ūṣaram pṛthivī tale paśūnām api dharma jña dṛṣṭi pratyavarodhanam randhrāgatam atha aśvānām śikhā udbhedaḥ ca barhinām netra rogaḥ kokilānām jvaraḥ proktaḥ mahātmanā ap jānām pitta bhedaḥ ca sarveṣām iti naḥ śrutam śukānām api sarveṣām hikkikā procyate jvaraḥ mānuṣeṣu tu dharma jña jvaraḥ nāma eṣa viśrutaḥ etat māheśvaram tejaḥ jvaraḥ nāma su dāruṇaḥ namasyaḥ ca eva mānyaḥ ca sarva prāṇibhiḥ īśvaraḥ anena hi samāviṣṭaḥ vṛtraḥ dharma bhṛtām varaḥ praviśya vajraḥ vṛtram tu dārayām āsa bhārata dāritaḥ ca sa vajreṇa mahā yogī mahā asuraḥ jagāma parama sthāna viṣṇoḥ amita tejas viṣṇu bhaktyā hi tena idam jagat vyāptam abhūt purā tasmāt ca nihataḥ yuddhe viṣṇoḥ sthānam avāptavān imām jvara utpattim adīna mānasaḥ paṭhet sadā yaḥ su samāhitaḥ naraḥ vimukta rogaḥ sa sukhī mudā yutaḥ labheta kāmān sa yathā manīṣitān devyāḥ manyu kṛtam matvā kruddhaḥ sarva ātmakaḥ prabhuḥ prasādāt tasya dakṣeṇa sa yajñaḥ saṃdhitaḥ katham uvāca purā himavataḥ pṛṣṭhe dakṣaḥ vai yajñam āharat gaṅgādvāre śubhe deśe ṛṣi siddha niṣevite gandharva apsarasā ākīrṇe nānā druma latā āvṛte ṛṣi saṃghaiḥ parivṛtam dakṣam yajñabhṛtām varam deva dānava gandharvāḥ piśāca uraga rākṣasāḥ hāhā hūhūḥ ca gandharvau tumburuḥ nāradaḥ tathā ādityāḥ vasavaḥ rudrāḥ sādhyāḥ saha marut gaṇaiḥ indreṇa sahitāḥ sarve āgatāḥ yajña bhāginaḥ ūṣmapāḥ somapāḥ ca eva dhūmapāḥ ājyapāḥ tathā ṛṣayaḥ pitaraḥ ca eva āgatāḥ brahmaṇā saha jarāyu ja aṇḍa jāḥ ca eva sveda ja udbhida jāḥ tathā āhūtāḥ mantritāḥ sarve devāḥ ca saha virājante vimāna sthāḥ dīpyamānāḥ iva agnayaḥ tān dṛṣṭvā manyunā āviṣṭaḥ dadhīciḥ vākyam abravīt iti uktvā sa mahā yogī paśyati dhyānacakṣuṣā sa paśyati mahādevam devīm ca vara dām śubhām nāradam ca mahātmānam dṛṣṭvā devyāḥ samīpatas apūjya pūjane ca eva pūjyānām ca api apūjane tripātaka samam pāpam śaśvat prāpnoti mānavaḥ anṛtam na ukta pūrvam me na ca vakṣye kadā cana devatānām ṛṣīṇām ca madhye satyam bravīmi aham āgatam paśubhartāram sraṣṭāram jagataḥ patim uvāca santi naḥ bahavaḥ rudrāḥ śūla hastāḥ kapardinaḥ ekādaśa sthāna gatā na aham vedmi maheśvaram yathā aham śaṃkarāt ūrdhvam na anyam paśyāmi daivatam uvāca etat makha īśāya suvarṇa pātre viṣṇoḥ nayāmi apratimasya bhāgam prabhuḥ vibhuḥ ca āhavanīyaḥ eṣaḥ kim nāma dānam niyamam tapaḥ vā uvāca bhāgasya ca ardham atha vā tṛtīyam evam bruvāṇām bhagavān sva patnīm prahṛṣṭa rūpaḥ kṣubhitām uvāca na vetsi mām devi kṛśa udara aṅgi aham hi jānāmi viśāla netre lokāḥ trayaḥ sarvatas eva mūḍhāḥ mām adhvare śaṃsitāraḥ stuvanti rathaṃtaram sāmagāḥ ca upagānti mām brāhmaṇāḥ brahmasatre yajante stauti garvāyate ca api svam ātmānam na saṃśayaḥ uvāca yam srakṣyāmi varārohe tava arthe varavarṇini iti uktvā bhagavān patnīm umām prāṇaiḥ api priyām saḥ asṛjat bhagavant vaktrāt bhūtam ghoram praharṣaṇam tam uvāca ākṣipa makham dakṣasya iti maheśvaraḥ manyunā ca mahā bhīmā mahākālī maheśvarī ātmanaḥ karma sākṣi tve tena sārdham saha anugā devasya anumatam matvā praṇamya śirasā tatas ātmanaḥ sadṛśaḥ śauryāt bala rūpa samanvitaḥ saḥ asṛjat romakūpebhyaḥ raumyān nāma gaṇeśvarān rudra anugāḥ gaṇāḥ raudrāḥ rudra vīrya parākramāḥ te nipetuḥ tatas tūrṇam dakṣa yajña vihiṃsayā bhīma rūpāḥ mahā kāyāḥ śataśas atha sahasraśas tatas kilakilā śabdaiḥ ākāśam pūrayan iva mārutāḥ ca eva ghūrṇante cukṣubhe varuṇālayaḥ grahāḥ na eva prakāśante nakṣatrāṇi na candramāḥ ṛṣayaḥ na prakāśante na devāḥ na ca mānuṣāḥ evam tu timirībhūte nirdahanti avamānitāḥ ādhāvanti pradhāvanti vāyu vegāḥ manaḥ javāḥ cūrṇyante yajña pātrāṇi divyāni ābharaṇāni ca viśīryamāṇāḥ dṛśyante tārāḥ iva nabhastalāt divya anna pāna bhakṣyāṇām rāśayaḥ parvata upamāḥ kṣīra nadyaḥ atha dṛśyante ghṛta pāyasa kardamāḥ dadhimaṇḍa udakāḥ divyāḥ khaṇḍa śarkara vālukāḥ ṣaṣ rasāḥ nivahanti etāḥ guḍakulyāḥ manoramāḥ uccāvacāni māṃsāni bhakṣyāṇi vividhāni ca pānakāni ca divyāni lehya coṣyāṇi yāni ca rudra kopāt mahā kāyāḥ kālāgni sadṛśa upamāḥ krīḍanti vikṛta ākāraiḥ cikṣipuḥ sura yoṣitaḥ tam yajñam adahat śīghram bhadrakālī samantataḥ tatas brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ dakṣaḥ ca eva prajāpatiḥ ūcuḥ prāñjalayaḥ sarve kathyatām kaḥ bhavān iti na aham rudraḥ na vā devī na eva bhoktum iha āgataḥ devyāḥ manyu kṛtam matvā kruddhaḥ sarva ātmakaḥ prabhuḥ tava yajña vināśa artham saṃprāptam viddhi mām iha vīrabhadraḥ iti khyātaḥ rudra kopāt viniḥsṛtaḥ bhadrakālī iti vijñeyā devyāḥ kopāt viniḥsṛtā uvāca vīrabhadra vacaḥ śrutvā dakṣaḥ dharma bhṛtām varaḥ toṣayām āsa stotreṇa praṇipatya maheśvaram prapadye devam īśānam śāśvatam dhruvam avyayam mahādevam mahātmānam viśvasya jagantaḥ patim āhūtāḥ devatāḥ sarvāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ devaḥ na āhūyate tatra viśvakarmā maheśvaraḥ pradīpte yajña vāṭe tu vidruteṣu dvijātiṣu tārā gaṇam anuprāpte raudre dīpte mahātmani śūla nirbhinna hṛdayaiḥ kūjadbhiḥ paricārakaiḥ utpatadbhiḥ patadbhiḥ ca gṛdhraiḥ āmiṣa gṛddhibhiḥ pakṣa vāta vinirdhūtaiḥ śivā śata nināditaiḥ yakṣa gandharva saṃghaiḥ ca piśāca uraga rākṣasaiḥ prāṇa apānau saṃnirudhya vaktra sthānena yatnatas vicārya sarvatas dṛṣṭim bahu dṛṣṭiḥ amitra jit sahasā devadeveśaḥ agnikuṇḍāt samutthitaḥ smitam kṛtvā abravīt vākyam brūhi kim karavāṇi te śrāvite ca makhādhyāye devānām guruṇā tatas tam uvāca añjalim kṛtvā dakṣaḥ devam prajāpatiḥ bhīta śaṅkita vitrastaḥ sa bāṣpa vadana īkṣaṇaḥ yat dagdham bhakṣitam pītam aśitam yat ca na aśitam cūrṇīkṛta apaviddham ca yajña saṃbhāram īhitam dharmādhyakṣaḥ virūpākṣaḥ tryakṣaḥ devaḥ prajāpatiḥ jānubhyām avanīm gatvā dakṣaḥ labdhvā bhavāt varam uvāca nāmnām aṣṭa sahasreṇa stutavān vṛṣabhadhvajam yaiḥ nāmadheyaiḥ stutavān dakṣaḥ devaḥ prajāpatiḥ uvāca śrūyatām devadevasya nāmāni adbhuta karmaṇaḥ gūḍha vratasya guhyāni prakāśāṇi ca bhārata uvāca sahasrākṣa virūpākṣa tryakṣa yakṣādhipa priya sarvatas sarvatas pāṇi pāda anta sarvatas akṣi śiras mukha śaṅkukarṇa mahākarṇa kumbhakarṇa arṇava ālaya śatodara śatāvarta śatajihva śatānana gāyanti tvām gāyatriṇaḥ arcayanti arkam arkiṇaḥ brahmāṇam tvām śatakratum ūrdhvam kham iva menire sarvāḥ vai devatāḥ hi asmin gāvaḥ goṣṭhe iva āsate ādityam atha vai viṣṇum brahmāṇam ca bṛhaspatim bhagavān kāraṇam kāryam kriyā karaṇam eva ca trijaṭāya triśīrṣāya triśūla vara pāṇine namaḥ caṇḍāya muṇḍāya aṇḍāya aṇḍa dharāya ca daṇḍine samakarṇāya daṇḍi muṇḍāya vai namaḥ namaḥ ūrdhva daṃṣṭra keśāya śuklāya avatatāya ca vilohitāya dhūmrāya nīlagrīvāya vai namaḥ namaḥ astu apratirūpāya virūpāya śivāya ca sūryāya sūrya mālāya sūrya dhvaja patākine śatruṃdamāya daṇḍāya parṇa cīra paṭāya ca hiraṇya kṛta cūḍāya hiraṇyapataye namaḥ namaḥ stutāya stutyāya stūyamānāya vai namaḥ namaḥ nābhāya nābhyāya namaḥ kaṭakaṭāya ca namaḥ astu kṛśa nāsāya kṛśa aṅgāya kṛśāya ca saṃhṛṣṭāya vihṛṣṭāya namaḥ kilakilāya ca namaḥ astu śayamānāya śayitāya utthitāya ca sthitāya dhāvamānāya muṇḍāya jaṭilāya ca na adya upahāra lubdhāya gīta vāditra śāline namaḥ jyeṣṭhāya śreṣṭhāya bala pramathanāya ca kālanāthāya kalyāya kṣayāya upakṣayāya ca vibhīṣaṇāya bhīṣmāya bhīma vrata dharāya ca namaḥ vikṛta vaktrāya khaḍga jihvāya daṃṣṭriṇe pakva āma māṃsa lubdhāya tumbī vīṇā priyāya ca namaḥ vṛṣāya vṛṣyāya govṛṣāya vṛṣāya ca kaṭaṃkaṭāya caṇḍāya namaḥ pacapacāya ca namaḥ sarva variṣṭhāya varāya vara dāya ca namaḥ rakta viraktāya bhāvanāya akṣa māline saṃbhinnāya vibhinnāya chāyāya ātapanāya ca namaḥ śivāya śāntāya namaḥ śāntatamāya ca ekapād bahu netrāya ekaśīrṣa namaḥ namaḥ namaḥ kṣudrāya lubdhāya saṃvibhāga priyāya ca pañcālāya sita aṅgāya namaḥ śama śamāya ca namaḥ caṇḍika ghaṇṭāya ghaṇṭāya a ghaṇṭa ghaṇṭine sahasra śata ghaṇṭāya ghaṇṭā mālā priyāya ca prāṇaghaṇṭāya gandhāya namaḥ kalakalāya ca hūṃ hūm hūṃkāra pārāya hūṃhūṃkāra priyāya ca namaḥ śama śame nityam giri vṛkṣa ālayāya ca garbha māṃsa śṛgālāya tārakāya tarāya ca yajña vāhāya dāntāya tapyāya a tapanāya ca namaḥ taṭāya taṭyāya taṭānām pataye namaḥ namaḥ sahasra śīrṣāya sahasra caraṇāya ca namaḥ bāla arka varṇāya bāla rūpa dharāya ca bāla anucara goptrāya bāla krīḍanakāya ca namaḥ vṛddhāya lubdhāya kṣubdhāya kṣobhaṇāya ca taraṅga aṅkita keśāya muñja keśāya vai namaḥ namaḥ ṣaṣ karṇa tuṣṭāya trikarma niratāya ca varṇa āśramāṇām vidhivat pṛthakkarma nivartine namaḥ ghuṣyāya ghoṣāya namaḥ kalakalāya ca śveta piṅgala netrāya kṛṣṇa rakta īkṣaṇāya ca prāṇa bhagnāya daṇḍāya sphoṭanāya kṛśāya ca dharma artha kāma mokṣāṇām kathyāya kathanāya ca sāṃkhyāya sāṃkhya mukhyāya sāṃkhya yoga pravartine kṛṣṇājina uttarīyāya vyāla yajña upavītine īśāna vajra saṃghāta harikeśa namaḥ astu te kāma kāma da kāma ghna tṛpta atṛpta vicāriṇe sthūla jīrṇa aṅga jaṭile valkala ajina dhāriṇe dīpta sūrya agni jaṭile valkala ajina vāsase unmādana śatāvarta gaṅgā toya ārdra mūrdhaja jarāyu ja aṇḍa jāḥ ca eva sveda jāḥ ca tathā udbhijāḥ manasaḥ paramā yoniḥ kham vāyuḥ jyotiṣām nidhiḥ ṛk sāmāni tathā uṃkāram āhuḥ tvām brahma vādinaḥ asakṛt gāyanti tvām suraśreṣṭha sāmagāḥ brahma vādinaḥ ṛk mayaḥ ca tvām āhuti mayaḥ tathā paṭhyase stutibhiḥ tvam hi veda upaniṣadām gaṇaiḥ brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ varṇa avarāḥ ca ye yugāḥ nimeṣāḥ kāṣṭhāḥ tvam nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ kalāḥ vṛkṣāṇām kakudaḥ asi tvam girīṇām śikharāṇi ca vyāghraḥ mṛgāṇām patatām tārkṣyaḥ anantaḥ ca bhoginām kṣīrodaḥ hi udadhīnām ca yantrāṇām dhanuḥ eva ca vajraḥ praharaṇānām ca vratānām satyam eva ca tvam eva dveṣaḥ icchā ca rāgaḥ mohaḥ kṣamā a kṣame tvam gadī tvam śarī cāpī khaṭvāṅgī jharjharī tathā chettā bhettā prahartā tvam netā mantā pitā mataḥ daśa lakṣaṇa saṃyuktaḥ dharmaḥ arthaḥ kāmaḥ eva ca gaṅgā samudrāḥ saritaḥ palvalāni sarāṃsi ca latāḥ vallyaḥ tṛṇa oṣadhyaḥ paśavaḥ mṛga pakṣiṇaḥ ādiḥ ca antaḥ ca devānām gāyatrī oṃkāraḥ eva ca haritaḥ lohitaḥ nīlaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ raktaḥ tathā aruṇaḥ avarṇaḥ ca suvarṇaḥ ca varṇakāraḥ hi anaupamaḥ trisauparṇam tathā brahma yajuṣām śatarudriyam pavitram ca pavitrāṇām maṅgalānām ca maṅgalam girikaḥ hiṇḍukaḥ vṛkṣaḥ jīvaḥ pudgalaḥ eva ca prāṇaḥ sattvam rajaḥ ca eva tamaḥ ca apramadaḥ tathā prāṇaḥ apānaḥ samānaḥ ca udānaḥ vyānaḥ eva ca unmeṣaḥ ca nimeṣaḥ ca kṣutam jṛmbhitam eva ca lohita antargatā dṛṣṭiḥ mahā vaktraḥ mahā udaraḥ śuci romā hari śmaśruḥ ūrdhva keśaḥ cala acalaḥ gīta vāditra tattva jñaḥ gīta vādanaka priyaḥ akālaḥ ca atikālaḥ ca duṣkālaḥ kālaḥ eva ca mṛtyuḥ kṣuraḥ ca kṛtyaḥ ca pakṣaḥ apakṣa kṣayaṃkaraḥ meghakālaḥ mahādaṃṣṭraḥ saṃvartaka balāhakaḥ ghaṇṭaḥ aghaṇṭaḥ ghaṭī ghaṇṭī carucelī milīmilī brahmakāyikam agnīnām daṇḍī muṇḍaḥ cāturāśramya netā ca cāturvarṇya karaḥ ca yaḥ sadā ca akṣa priyaḥ dhūrtaḥ gaṇādhyakṣaḥ gaṇādhipaḥ śilpikaḥ śilpinām śreṣṭhaḥ sarva śilpa pravartakaḥ bhaga netra aṅkuśaḥ caṇḍaḥ pūṣṇaḥ danta vināśanaḥ svāhā svadhā vaṣaṭkāraḥ namaskāraḥ namaḥ namaḥ dhātā vidhātā saṃdhātā vidhātā dhāraṇaḥ adharaḥ bhūtātmā bhūta kṛt bhūtaḥ bhūta bhavya bhava udbhavaḥ dīkṣitaḥ a dīkṣitaḥ kṣāntaḥ durdāntaḥ a dānta nāśanaḥ candrāvartaḥ yugāvartaḥ saṃvartaḥ saṃpravartakaḥ kāmaḥ binduḥ aṇuḥ sthūlaḥ karṇikāra sraja priyaḥ adharmahā mahāpārśvaḥ daṇḍadhāraḥ raṇapriyaḥ gonardaḥ gopratāraḥ ca govṛṣa īśvara vāhanaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ sthiraḥ ca sthāṇuḥ ca niṣkampaḥ kampaḥ eva ca śaśaḥ śaśāṅkaḥ śamanaḥ mama yajña mṛgavyādhaḥ vyādhīnām āgamaḥ gamaḥ śikhaṇḍī puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ puṇḍarīka vana ālayaḥ daṇḍadhāraḥ tryambakaḥ ca ugradaṇḍaḥ aṇḍanāśanaḥ viṣāgnipāḥ suraśreṣṭhaḥ somapāḥ tvam marutpatiḥ tvam jagannātha devadeva gaṇeśvaraḥ viṣāgnipāḥ mṛtyupāḥ ca kṣīrapāḥ somapāḥ tathā madhuścyutānām agra pāḥ tvam eva tuṣita ājya pāḥ tvam strī pumān tvam ca napuṃsakam ca bālaḥ yuvā sthaviraḥ jīrṇa daṃṣṭraḥ tvam viśva bāhuḥ tejasvī viśvatomukhaḥ candra ādityau hṛdayam ca pitāmahaḥ ahar rātraḥ nimeṣa unmeṣa kartā na brahmā na ca govindaḥ paurāṇāḥ ṛṣayaḥ na te māhātmyam veditum śaktāḥ yāthātathyena te śiva yāḥ mūrtayaḥ su sūkṣmāḥ te na mahyam yānti darśanam trāhi mām satatam rakṣa pitā putram iva aurasam rakṣa mām rakṣaṇīyaḥ aham te anagha namaḥ astu te bhakta anukampī bhagavān bhaktaḥ ca aham sadā tvayi yaḥ sahasrāṇi anekāni puṃsām āvṛtya durdṛśaḥ tiṣṭhati ekaḥ samudra ante sa me goptā tu nityaśas yam vinidrāḥ jita śvāsāḥ sattva sthāḥ sama darśinaḥ jyotiḥ paśyanti yuñjānāḥ tasmai yoga ātmane namaḥ jaṭile daṇḍine nityam lamba udara śarīriṇe kamaṇḍalu niṣaṅgāya tasmai rudra ātmane namaḥ yasya keśeṣu jīmūtāḥ nadyaḥ sarva aṅga saṃdhiṣu praviśya vadanam rāhoḥ yaḥ somam pibate niśi grasati arkam ca svarbhānuḥ bhūtvā mām saḥ abhirakṣatu ye ca anupatitāḥ garbhāḥ yathābhāgān upāsate ye aṅguṣṭha mātrāḥ puruṣāḥ deha sthāḥ sarva dehinām rakṣantu te hi mām nityam nityam ca āpyāyayantu ca vṛkṣa mūleṣu goṣṭheṣu kāntāra gahaneṣu ca catuṣpatheṣu rathyāsu catvareṣu taṭeṣu ca hasti aśva ratha śālāsu jīrṇa udyāna ālayeṣu ca ye ca pañcasu bhūteṣu diśāsu vidiśāsu ca yeṣām na vidyate saṃkhyā pramāṇam rūpam eva ca atha vā māyayā deva sūkṣmayā tava mohitaḥ etasmāt kāraṇāt vā api tena tvam na nimantritaḥ stutvā evam sa mahādevam virarāma prajāpatiḥ bhagavān api su prītaḥ punar dakṣam abhāṣata āśvāsana karam vākyam vākya vid vākya saṃmitam aham yajña haraḥ tubhyam dṛṣṭam etat purātanam bhūyas ca te varam dadmi tam tvam gṛhṇīṣva suvrata prasanna vadanaḥ bhūtvā tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu vedāt ṣaṣ aṅgāt uddhṛtya sāṃkhya yogāt ca yuktyāḥ tapaḥ su taptam vipulam duścaram deva dānavaiḥ abdaiḥ daśa aha saṃyuktam gūḍham aprājña ninditam mayā pāśupatam dakṣa yogam utpāditam purā tat ca astu te mahābhāga tyajyatām mānasaḥ jvaraḥ evam uktvā mahādevaḥ sa patnīkaḥ vṛṣadhvajaḥ dakṣa proktam stavam imam kīrtayet yaḥ śṛṇoti vā na aśubham prāpnuyāt kim cit dīrgham āyuḥ avāpnuyāt yathā sarveṣu deveṣu variṣṭhaḥ bhagavant śivaḥ tathā stavaḥ variṣṭhaḥ ayam stavānām brahma saṃmitaḥ yaśaḥ rājya sukha aiśvarya kāma artha dhana kāṅkṣibhiḥ śrotavyaḥ bhaktim āsthāya vidyā kāmaiḥ ca yatnataḥ anena eva tu dehena gaṇānām sama tām vrajet na rākṣasāḥ piśācāḥ vā na bhūtāḥ na vināyakāḥ śṛṇuyāt ca eva yā nārī tad bhaktā brahmacāriṇī pitṛ pakṣe mātṛ pakṣe pūjyā bhavati deva vat śṛṇuyāt yaḥ stavam kṛtsnam kīrtayet vā samāhitaḥ tasya sarvāṇi karmāṇi siddhim gacchanti abhīkṣṇaśas tatas tu yuktaḥ gṛhṇīyāt nāmāni āśu yathākramam īpsitān labhate saḥ arthān kāmān bhogān ca mānavaḥ iti aha bhagavān vyāsaḥ parāśara sutaḥ prabhuḥ kathā iyam kathitā puṇyā dharmyā dharma bhṛtām vara uvāca śokāt duḥkhāt ca mṛtyoḥ ca trasyanti prāṇinaḥ sadā uvāca nāradasya ca saṃvādam samaṅgasya ca bhārata uvāca saṃprahṛṣṭa manāḥ nityam viśokaḥ iva lakṣyase uvāca bhūtam bhavyam bhaviṣyat ca sarvam sattveṣu mānada teṣām tattvāni jānāmi tatas na vimanāḥ hi aham agādhāḥ ca apratiṣṭhāḥ ca gatimantaḥ ca nārada andhāḥ jaḍāḥ ca jīvanti paśya asmān api jīvataḥ sahasriṇaḥ ca jīvanti jīvanti śatinaḥ tathā śākena ca anye jīvanti paśya asmān api jīvataḥ yadā na śocemahi kim nu na syāt dharmeṇa vā nārada karmaṇā vā kṛtānta vaśyāni yadā sukhāni duḥkhāni vā yat na vidharṣayanti yasmai prajñām kathayante manuṣyāḥ prajñā mūlaḥ hi indriyāṇām prasādaḥ muhyanti śocanti yadā indriyāṇi prajñā lābhaḥ na asti mūḍha indriyasya bhāva ātmakam saṃparivartamānam na mādṛśaḥ saṃjvaram jātu kuryāt iṣṭān bhogān na anurudhyet sukham vā na cintayet duḥkham abhyāgatam vā samāhitaḥ na spṛhayet pareṣām na anāgatam na abhinandeta lābham na ca api hṛṣyet vipule artha lābhe tathā artha nāśe ca na vai viṣīdet duḥkhāt trātum sarve eva utsahante paratra śīle na tu yānti śāntim dhṛtiḥ ca duḥkha tyāgaḥ ca api ubhayam naḥ sukha udayam etān śoka bhaya utsekān mohanān sukha duḥkhayoḥ paśyāmi sākṣi vat loke dehasya asya viceṣṭanāt tṛṣṇā mohau tu saṃtyajya carāmi pṛthivīm imām pīta amṛtasya iva atyantam iha ca amutra vā bhayam tena nārada saṃprāptaḥ na mām śokaḥ prabādhate uvāca a tattva jñasya śāstrāṇām satatam saṃśaya ātmanaḥ uvāca guru pūjā ca satatam vṛddhānām paryupāsanam śravaṇam ca eva vidyānām kūṭastham śreyaḥ ucyate atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam gālavasya ca saṃvādam deva ṛṣeḥ nāradasya ca sva āśramam samanuprāptam nāradam deva varcasam vīta moha klamam vipram jñāna tṛptam jita indriyam śreyaskāmam jita ātmānam nāradam gālavaḥ abravīt yaiḥ kaiḥ cit saṃmataḥ loke guṇaiḥ tu puruṣaḥ nṛṣu bhavati anapagān sarvān tān guṇān lakṣayāmi aham bhavān evaṃvidhaḥ asmākam saṃśayam chettum arhati amūḍhaḥ cira mūḍhānām loka tattvam a jānatām jñāne hi evam pravṛttiḥ syāt kārya akārye vijñā bhagavan āśramāḥ sarve pṛthak ācāra darśinaḥ idam śreyaḥ idam śreyaḥ iti nānā pradhāvitāḥ tān tu viprasthitān dṛṣṭvā śāstraiḥ śāstra abhinandinaḥ sva śāstraiḥ parituṣṭān ca śreyaḥ na upalabhāmahe śāstram yadi bhavet ekam vyaktam śreyaḥ bhavet tadā śāstraiḥ ca bahubhiḥ bhūyas śreyaḥ guhyam praveśitam etasmāt kāraṇāt śreyaḥ kalilam pratibhāti mām uvāca āśramāḥ tāta catvāraḥ yathā saṃkalpitāḥ pṛthak tān sarvān anupaśya tvam samāśritya eva gālava teṣām teṣām tathā hi tvam āśramāṇām tatas tatas nānā rūpa guṇa uddeśam paśya viprasthitam pṛthak ṛju paśyan tathā samyak āśramāṇām parām gatim yat tu niḥśreyasam samyak tat ca eva asaṃśaya ātmakam anugraham ca mitrāṇām amitrāṇām ca nigraham saṃgraham ca trivargasya śreyaḥ āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ nivṛttiḥ karmaṇaḥ pāpāt satatam puṇya śīla tā sadbhiḥ ca samudācāraḥ śreyaḥ etat asaṃśayam mārdavam sarva bhūteṣu vyavahāreṣu ca ārjavam vāc ca eva madhurā proktā śreyaḥ etat asaṃśayam devatābhyaḥ pitṛbhyaḥ ca saṃvibhāgaḥ atithiṣu api a saṃtyāgaḥ ca bhṛtyānām śreyaḥ etat asaṃśayam satyasya vacanam śreyaḥ satya jñānam tu duṣkaram ahaṃkārasya ca tyāgaḥ praṇayasya ca nigrahaḥ saṃtoṣaḥ ca eka caryā ca kūṭastham śreyaḥ ucyate dharmeṇa veda adhyayanam vedāṅgānām tathā eva ca vidyā arthānām ca jijñāsā śreyaḥ etat asaṃśayam naktaṃcaryā divāsvapnam ālasyam paiśunam madam karma utkarṣam na mārgeta pareṣām parinindayā nirguṇāḥ tu eva bhūyiṣṭham ātma saṃbhāvinaḥ narāḥ doṣaiḥ anyān guṇavataḥ kṣipanti ātma guṇa kṣayāt guṇavattaram ātmānam svena mānena darpitāḥ vipaścit guṇa saṃpannaḥ prāpnoti eva mahat yaśaḥ evamādīni ca anyāni parityaktāni medhayā na loke dīpyate mūrkhaḥ kevala ātma praśaṃsayā api ca apihitaḥ śvabhre kṛtavidyaḥ prakāśate mūḍhānām avaliptānām asāram bhāṣitam bahu darśayati antarātmānam divā rūpam iva aṃśumant etasmāt kāraṇāt prajñām mṛgayante pṛthagvidhām prajñā lābhaḥ hi bhūtānām uttamaḥ pratibhāti mām na apṛṣṭaḥ kasya cit brūyāt na ca anyāyena pṛcchataḥ jñānavān api medhāvī jaḍa vat lokam ācaret tatas vāsam parīkṣeta dharma nityeṣu sādhuṣu caturṇām yatra varṇānām dharma vyatikaraḥ bhavet puṇyam puṇyeṣu vimalam pāpam pāpeṣu ca āpnuyāt tathā paśyāmahe sparśam ubhayoḥ pāpa puṇyayoḥ a paśyantaḥ anna viṣayam bhuñjate vighasa āśinaḥ bhuñjānam ca anna viṣayān viṣayam viddhi karmaṇām yatra āgamayamānānām asatkāreṇa pṛcchatām prabrūyāt brahmaṇaḥ dharmam tyajet tam deśam ātmavān kaḥ parityajya gām duṣṭām duhyet śīlavatīm kharīm paṇḍitasya api śūdrasya sarva śāstra ratasya ca vacanam tasya na grāhyam śvanā ucchiṣṭam haviḥ yathā śiṣya upādhyāyikāḥ vṛttiḥ yatra syāt su samāhitā yathāvat śāstra saṃpannā kaḥ tam deśam parityajet ākāśa sthāḥ dhruvam yatra doṣam brūyuḥ vipaścitām ātma pūjā abhikāmāḥ vai kaḥ vaset tatra paṇḍitaḥ yatra saṃloḍitāḥ lubdhaiḥ prāyaśas dharma setavaḥ pradīptam iva śaila antam kaḥ tam deśam na saṃtyajet yatra dharmam anāśaṅkāḥ careyuḥ vīta matsarāḥ caret tatra vaset ca eva puṇya śīleṣu sādhuṣu na tān anuvaset jātu te hi pāpa kṛtaḥ janāḥ vyavadhāvet tatas tūrṇam sa sarpāt śaraṇāt iva yena khaṭvām samārūḍhaḥ karmaṇā anuśayī bhavet yatra rājā ca rājñaḥ ca puruṣāḥ pratyanantarāḥ kuṭumbinām agra bhujaḥ tyajet tat rāṣṭram ātmavān śrotriyāḥ tu agra bhoktāraḥ dharma nityāḥ sanātanāḥ yājana adhyāpane yuktā yatra tat rāṣṭram āvaset svāhā svadhā vaṣaṭkārāḥ yatra samyak anuṣṭhitāḥ aśucīni atra paśyeta brāhmaṇān vṛtti karśitān tyajet tat rāṣṭram āsannam upasṛṣṭam iva āmiṣam prīyamāṇāḥ narāḥ yatra prayaccheyuḥ a yācitāḥ daṇḍaḥ yatra avinīteṣu satkāraḥ ca kṛtātmasu caret tatra vaset ca eva puṇya śīleṣu sādhuṣu upasṛṣṭeṣu a dānteṣu durācāreṣu a sādhuṣu avinīteṣu lubdheṣu su mahat daṇḍadhāraṇam apāsya kāmān kāma īśaḥ vaset tatra a vicārayan tathāśīlāḥ hi rājānaḥ sarvān viṣaya vāsinaḥ pṛcchataḥ te mayā tāta śreyaḥ etat udāhṛtam na hi śakyam pradhānena śreyaḥ saṃkhyātum ātmanaḥ evam pravartamānasya vṛttim praṇihita ātmanaḥ uvāca katham nu muktaḥ pṛthivīm caret asmadvidhaḥ nṛpaḥ nityam kaiḥ ca guṇaiḥ yuktaḥ saṅga pāśāt vimucyate uvāca ariṣṭaneminā proktam sagarāya anupṛcchate uvāca evam uktaḥ tadā tārkṣyaḥ sarva śāstra viśāradaḥ vibudhya saṃpadam ca agryām sat vākyam idam abravīt sneha pāśa sitaḥ mūḍhaḥ na sa mokṣāya kalpate sneha jān iha te pāśān vakṣyāmi śṛṇu tān mama sa karṇakena śirasā śakyāḥ chettum vijānatā samarthān jīvane jñātvā muktaḥ cara yathāsukham bhāryām putravatīm vṛddhām lālitām putra vatsalām jñātvā prajahi kāle tvam para artham anudṛśya ca eṣa tāvat samāsena tava saṃkīrtitaḥ mayā mokṣa arthaḥ vistareṇa api bhūyas vakṣyāmi tat śṛṇu sakta bhāvāḥ vinaśyanti narāḥ tatra na saṃśayaḥ āhāra saṃcayāḥ ca eva tathā kīṭa pipīlikāḥ asaktāḥ sukhinaḥ loke saktāḥ ca eva vināśinaḥ ime mayā vinābhūtāḥ bhaviṣyanti katham tu iti dhātrā vihita bhakṣyāṇi sarva bhūtāni medinīm kaḥ hetuḥ sva janam poṣṭum rakṣitum vā adṛḍha ātmanaḥ jīvantam api ca eva enam bharaṇe rakṣaṇe tathā yadā mṛtaḥ ca sva janam na jñāsyasi katham cana mṛte vā tvayi jīve vā yadi bhokṣyati vai janaḥ mokṣe niveśaya manaḥ bhūyas ca api upadhāraya kṣudh pipāsā ādayaḥ bhāvāḥ jitāḥ yasya iha dehinaḥ dyūte pāne tathā strīṣu mṛgayāyām ca yaḥ naraḥ ātma bhāvam tathā strīṣu muktam eva punar punar saṃbhavam ca vināśam ca bhūtānām ceṣṭitam tathā prastham vāha sahasreṣu yātrā artham ca eva koṭiṣu prāsāde mañcaka sthānam yaḥ paśyati sa mucyate mṛtyunā abhyāhatam lokam vyādhibhiḥ ca upapīḍitam yaḥ paśyati sukhī tuṣṭaḥ na paśyan ca vihanyate agnīṣomau idam sarvam iti yaḥ ca anupaśyati paryaṅka śayyā bhūmiḥ ca samāne yasya dehinaḥ śālayaḥ ca kadannam ca yasya syāt muktaḥ eva saḥ kṣaumam ca kuśa cīram ca kauśeyam valkalāni ca pañcabhūta samudbhūtam lokam yaḥ ca anupaśyati tathā ca vartate dṛṣṭvā loke asmin muktaḥ eva saḥ rakta mūtra purīṣāṇām doṣāṇām saṃcayam tathā śarīram doṣa bahulam dṛṣṭvā ca idam vimucyate valī palita saṃyogam kārśyam vaivarṇyam eva ca puṃstva upaghātam kālena darśana uparamam tathā bādhiryam prāṇa manda tvam yaḥ paśyati sa mucyate gatān ṛṣīn tathā devān asurān ca tathā gatān lokāt asmāt param lokam yaḥ paśyati sa mucyate prabhāvaiḥ anvitāḥ taiḥ taiḥ pārthiva indrāḥ sahasraśas ye gatāḥ pṛthivīm tyaktvā iti jñātvā vimucyate arthān ca durlabhān loke kleśān ca sulabhān tathā apatyānām ca vaiguṇyam janam viguṇam eva ca paśyan bhūyiṣṭhaśas loke kaḥ mokṣam na abhipūjayet śāstrāt lokāt ca yaḥ buddhaḥ sarvam paśyati mānavaḥ asāram iva mānuṣyam sarvathā muktaḥ eva saḥ mokṣa jaiḥ ca guṇaiḥ yuktaḥ pālayām āsa ca prajāḥ uvāca sthate mama sadā tāta kautūhalam idam hṛdi katham deva ṛṣiḥ uśanāḥ sadā kāvyaḥ mahāmatiḥ asurāṇām priya karaḥ surāṇām apriye rataḥ nityam vaira nibaddhāḥ ca dānavāḥ sura sattamaiḥ katham ca api uśanāḥ prāpa śukra tvam amara dyutiḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājan avahitaḥ sarvam etat yathātatham eṣa bhārgava dāyādaḥ muniḥ satyaḥ dṛḍha vrataḥ asurāṇām priya karaḥ nimitte karuṇā ātmake prabhaviṣṇuḥ ca kośasya jagataḥ ca tathā prabhuḥ tasya ātmānam atha āviśya yoga siddhaḥ mahā muniḥ nivedayām āsa tadā śivāya amita tejase deva śreṣṭhāya rudrāya saumyāya bahu rūpiṇe yoga ātmakena uśanasā ruddhvā mama hṛtam vasu yogena ātma gatim kṛtvā niḥsṛtaḥ ca mahā tapāḥ uvāca saṃrakta nayanaḥ rājan śūlam ādāya tasthivān kva asau kva asau iti prāha gṛhītvā parama āyudham uśanāḥ dūratas tasya babhau jñātvā cikīrṣitam sa mahā yoginaḥ buddhvā tam roṣam vai mahātmanaḥ saṃcintya ugreṇa tapasā mahātmānam maheśvaram uśanāḥ yoga siddha ātmā śūla agre pratyadṛśyata vijñāta rūpaḥ sa tadā tapaḥ siddhena dhanvinā jñātvā śūlam ca deveśaḥ pāṇinā samanāmayat ānatena atha śūlena pāṇinā amita tejasā pinākam iti ca uvāca śūlam ugra āyudhaḥ prabhuḥ sa tu praviṣṭaḥ uśanāḥ pāṇim māheśvaram prabhuḥ pāṇi madhya gatam dṛṣṭvā bhārgavam tam umāpatiḥ āsyam vivṛtya pāṇim saṃprākṣipat śanais sa tu praviṣṭaḥ uśanāḥ koṣṭham māheśvaram prabhuḥ uvāca jaṭhare devadevasya kim ca akārṣīt mahā dyutiḥ uvāca purā saḥ antar jala gataḥ sthāṇu bhūtaḥ mahā vrataḥ varṣāṇām abhavat rājan prayutāni arbudāni ca udatiṣṭhat tapaḥ taptvā duścaram sa mahā hradāt tapaḥ su cīrṇam iti ca provāca vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ tad saṃyogena vṛddhim ca api apaśyat sa tu śaṃkaraḥ vyarājata mahā rāja triṣu lokeṣu vīryavān tatas pinākī yoga ātmā dhyāna yogam samāviśat tuṣṭāva ca mahā yogī devam tatrasthaḥ eva ca niḥsāram kāṅkṣamāṇaḥ tu tejasā pratyahanyata uśanāḥ tu tadā uvāca jaṭhara sthaḥ mahā muniḥ tam uvāca mahādevaḥ gaccha śiśnena mokṣaṇam iti srotāṃsi sarvāṇi ruddhvā tridaśa puṃgavaḥ apaśyamānaḥ sa dvāram sarvatas pihitaḥ muniḥ niṣkrāntam atha tam dṛṣṭvā jvalantam iva tejasā bhavaḥ roṣa samāviṣṭaḥ śūla udyata karaḥ sthitaḥ hiṃsanīyaḥ tvayā na eṣa mama putra tvam āgataḥ na hi deva udarāt kaḥ cit niḥsṛtaḥ nāśam archati uvāca tatas prītaḥ abhavat devyāḥ prahasan ca idam abravīt gacchatu eṣa yathākāmam iti rājan punar punar tatas praṇamya vara dam devam devīm umām tathā uśanāḥ prāpa tat dhīmān gatim iṣṭām mahā muniḥ caritam bharata śreṣṭha yat mām tvam paripṛcchasi uvāca kim karma puruṣaḥ kṛtvā śubham puruṣa sattama uvāca atra te vartayiṣyāmi yathā pūrvam mahā yaśāḥ parāśaram mahātmānam papraccha janakaḥ nṛpaḥ kim śreyaḥ sarva bhūtānām idam loke paratra ca nṛpāya anugraha manāḥ muniḥ vākyam atha abravīt tasmāt hi paramam na asti yathā prāhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ tasmin āśramiṇaḥ santaḥ sva karmāṇi iha kurvate martyāḥ yatra avatiṣṭhante sā ca kāmāt pravartate su kṛta a su kṛtam karma niṣevya vividhaiḥ kramaiḥ daśārdha pravibhaktānām bhūtānām bahudhā gatiḥ sauvarṇam rājatam vā api yathā bhāṇḍam niṣicyate tathā niṣicyate jantuḥ pūrva karma vaśa anugaḥ na a bījāt jāyate kim cit na a kṛtvā sukham edhate sukṛtī vindati sukham prāpya deha kṣayam naraḥ pretya jāti kṛ karma na smaranti sadā janāḥ lokayātrā āśrayaḥ ca eva śabdaḥ veda āśrayaḥ kṛ śānti artham manasaḥ tāta na etat vṛddha anuśāsanam cakṣuṣā manasā vācā karmaṇā ca caturvidham kurute yādṛśam karma tādṛśam pratipadyate kalyāṇam yadi vā pāpam na tu nāśaḥ asya vidyate kadā cit sukṛtam tāta kūṭastham iva tiṣṭhati tatas duḥkha kṣayam kṛtvā su kṛtam karma sevate sukṛta kṣayāt duṣkṛtam ca tat viddhi manuja adhipa damaḥ kṣamā dhṛtiḥ tejaḥ saṃtoṣaḥ satya vādi tā hrīḥ ahiṃsā avyasani tā dākṣyam ca iti sukha āvahāḥ nityam manaḥ samādhāne prayateta vicakṣaṇaḥ na ayam parasya sukṛtam duṣkṛtam vā api sevate karoti yādṛśam karma tādṛśam pratipadyate pareṣām yat asūyeta na tat kuryāt svayam naraḥ bhīruḥ rājanyaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ sarva bhakṣaḥ vaiśyaḥ anīhāvān hīna varṇaḥ alasaḥ ca vidvān ca aśīlaḥ vṛtta hīnaḥ kulīnaḥ satyāt bhraṣṭaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ strī ca duṣṭā rāgī muktaḥ pacamānaḥ mūrkhaḥ vaktā nṛpa hīnam ca rāṣṭram ete sarve śocya tām yānti rājan yaḥ ca ayuktaḥ sneha hīnaḥ prajāsu uvāca sevā āśritena manasā vṛtti hīnasya śasyate āyuḥ na sulabham labdhvā na avakarṣet viśām pate utkarṣa artham prayatate naraḥ puṇyena karmaṇā varṇa utkarṣam avāpnoti naraḥ puṇyena karmaṇā ajñānāt hi kṛtam pāpam tapasā eva abhinirṇudet na tat seveta medhāvī śuciḥ ku salilam yathā kiṃkaṣṭam anupaśyāmi phalam pāpasya karmaṇaḥ viraktam śodhyate vastram na tu kṛṣṇa upasaṃhitam svayam kṛtvā tu yaḥ pāpam śubham eva anutiṣṭhati prāyaścittam naraḥ kartum ubhayam saḥ aśnute pṛthak ajñānāt tu kṛtām hiṃsām ahiṃsā vyapakarṣati brāhmaṇāḥ śāstra nirdeśāt iti āhuḥ brahma vādinaḥ tathā kāma kṛtam ca asya vihiṃsā eva apakarṣati iti āhuḥ dharma śāstra jñāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ vedapāragāḥ guṇa yuktam prakāśam ca pāpena anupasaṃhitam yathā sūkṣmāṇi karmāṇi phalanti iha yathātatham buddhi yuktāni tāni iha kṛtāni manasā saha a buddhi pūrvam dharma jña kṛtam ugreṇa karmaṇā kṛtāni yāni karmāṇi daivataiḥ munibhiḥ tathā na ācaret tāni dharma ātmā śrutvā ca api na kutsayet saṃcintya manasā rājan viditvā śaktim ātmanaḥ nave kapāle salilam saṃnyastam hīyate yathā evam karmāṇi yāni iha buddhi yuktāni bhūpate na samā iha hīnāni tāni puṇyatamāni api rājñā jetavyāḥ sa āyudhāḥ ca unnatāḥ ca samyak kartavyam pālanam ca prajānām dama anvitaḥ puruṣaḥ dharma śīlaḥ bhūtāni ca ātmānam iva anupaśyet garīyasaḥ pūjayet ātma śaktyā satyena śīlena sukham narendra uvāca prāṇī karoti ayam karma sarvam ātma artham ātmanā viśiṣṭasya viśiṣṭāt ca tulyau dāna pratigrahau saṃrakṣyam yatnam āsthāya dharma artham iti niścayaḥ na dharma arthī nṛśaṃsena karmaṇā dhanam arjayet apaḥ hi prayataḥ śītāḥ tāpitāḥ jvalanena vā śaktitas atithaye dattvā kṣudhā ārtāya aśnute phalam rantidevena loka iṣṭā siddhiḥ prāptā mahātmanā tasmāt lebhe param sthānam śaibyaḥ api pṛthivīpatiḥ ṛṇavān jāyate martyaḥ tasmāt anṛṇa tām vrajet pitṛbhyaḥ śrāddha dānena nṛṇām abhyarcanena ca vācaḥ śeṣa avahāryeṇa pālanena ātmanaḥ api ca ṛgbhiḥ stutvā mahābhāgaḥ devān vai yajña bhāginaḥ gataḥ śukra tvam uśanāḥ devadeva prasādanāt devīm stutvā tu gagane modate tejasā vṛtaḥ kakṣīvant jāmadagnyaḥ ca rāmaḥ tāṇḍyaḥ tathā aṃśumant bharadvājaḥ hariśmaśruḥ kuṇḍadhāraḥ śrutaśravāḥ ete mahā ṛṣayaḥ stutvā viṣṇum ṛgbhiḥ samāhitāḥ anarhāḥ ca arha tām prāptāḥ santaḥ stutvā tam eva ha dharmam vai śāśvatam loke na jahyāt dhana kāṅkṣayā āhitāgniḥ hi dharma ātmā yaḥ sa puṇya kṛt uttamaḥ agniḥ ātmā ca mātā ca pitā janayitā tathā guruḥ ca nara śārdūla paricaryāḥ yathātatham mānam tyaktvā yaḥ naraḥ vṛddha sevī vidvān klībaḥ paśyati prīti yogāt uvāca vṛttiḥ sakāśāt varṇebhyaḥ tribhyaḥ hīnasya śobhanā prītyā upanītā nirdiṣṭā dharmiṣṭhān kurute sadā vṛttiḥ ced na asti śūdrasya pitṛpaitāmahī dhruvā na vṛttim paratas mārget śuśrūṣām tu prayojayet tathā sat saṃnikarṣeṇa hīna varṇaḥ api dīpyate yādṛśena hi varṇena bhāvyate śuklam ambaram tasmāt guṇeṣu rajyethāḥ mā doṣeṣu kadā cana anityam iha martyānām jīvitam hi calācalam sukhe vā yadi vā duḥkhe vartamānaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ yaḥ cinoti śubhāni eva sa bhadrāṇi iha paśyati yaḥ hṛtvā go sahasrāṇi nṛpaḥ dadyāt arakṣitā svayaṃbhūḥ asṛjat ca agre dhātāram loka pūjitam dhātā asṛjat putram ekam prajānām dhāraṇe ratam śūdraiḥ nirmārjanam kāryam evam dharmaḥ na naśyati sukhena tāsām rāja indra modante divi devatāḥ tasmāt yaḥ rakṣati nṛpaḥ sa dharmeṇa abhipūjyate adhīte ca api yaḥ vipraḥ vaiśyaḥ yaḥ ca arjane rataḥ yaḥ ca śuśrūṣate śūdraḥ satatam niyata indriyaḥ prāṇa saṃtāpa nirdiṣṭāḥ kākiṇyaḥ api mahā phalāḥ nyāyena upārjitāḥ dattāḥ kim uta anyāḥ sahasraśas yādṛśam tādṛśam nityam aśnāti phalam ūrjitam abhigamya dattam tuṣṭyā yat dhanyam āhuḥ abhiṣṭutam avajñayā dīyate yat tathā eva aśraddhayā api ca tat āhuḥ adhamam dānam munayaḥ satya vādinaḥ tathā prayatnam kurvīta yathā mucyeta saṃśayāt dhanena vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ tu nityam dākṣyeṇa śobhate uvāca vaiśye nyāya arjitāḥ ca eva śūdre śuśrūṣayā arjitāḥ arthāḥ praśasyante dharmasya arthe mahā phalāḥ nityam trayāṇām varṇānām śūdraḥ śuśrūṣuḥ ucyate kṣatra dharmāḥ vaiśya dharmāḥ na āvṛttiḥ patati dvijaḥ śūdra karmā yadā tu syāt tadā patati vai dvijaḥ vāṇijyam pāśupālyam ca tathā śilpa upajīvanam śūdrasya api vidhīyante yadā vṛttiḥ na jāyate raṅga avataraṇam ca eva tathā rūpa upajīvanam madya māṃsa upajīvyam ca vikrayaḥ loha carmaṇoḥ śrūyante hi purāṇe vai prajāḥ dhigdaṇḍa śāsanāḥ dāntāḥ dharma pradhānāḥ ca nyāya dharma anuvartakāḥ dharmaḥ eva sadā nṝṇām iha rājan praśasyate tam dharmam asurāḥ tāta na amṛṣyanta janādhipa vivardhamānāḥ kramaśas tatra te anvāviśan prajāḥ teṣām darpaḥ samabhavat prajānām dharma nāśanaḥ darpa ātmanām tatas krodhaḥ punar teṣām ajāyata tatas krodha abhibhūtānām vṛttam lajjā samanvitam hrīḥ ca eva api anaśat rājan tatas mohaḥ vyajāyata tatas moha parītāḥ te na apaśyanta yathā purā tatas abhyagacchan devān ca brāhmaṇān ca avamanya ha agacchan śaraṇam vīram bahu rūpam gaṇādhipam tena sma te gaganagāḥ sa purāḥ pātitāḥ kṣitau teṣām adhipatiḥ tu āsīt bhīmaḥ bhīma parākramaḥ devatānām bhaya karaḥ sa hataḥ śūlapāṇinā prāvartanta ca vedāḥ vai śāstrāṇi ca yathā purā tatas abhyaṣiñcan rājyena devānām divi vāsavam saptarṣayaḥ ca anvayuñjan narāṇām daṇḍa dhāraṇe saptarṣīṇām atha ūrdhvam ca vipṛthuḥ nāma pārthivaḥ rājānaḥ kṣatriyāḥ ca eva maṇḍaleṣu pṛthak pṛthak mahā kuleṣu ye jātāḥ vṛttāḥ pūrvatarāḥ ca ye teṣām atha asuraḥ bhāvaḥ hṛdayāt na apasarpati tasmāt tena eva bhāvena sa anuṣaṅgena pārthivāḥ āsurāṇi eva karmāṇi nyaṣevan bhīma vikramāḥ pratyatiṣṭhan ca teṣu eva tāni eva sthāpayanti ca bhajante tāni ca adya api ye bāliśatamāḥ narāḥ tasmāt aham bravīmi tvām rājan saṃcintya śāstrataḥ saṃsiddha adhigamam kuryāt karma hiṃsā ātmakam tyajet na saṃkareṇa draviṇam vicinvīta vicakṣaṇaḥ sa tvam evaṃvidhaḥ dāntaḥ kṣatriyaḥ priya bāndhavaḥ prajāḥ bhṛtyān ca putrān ca svadharmeṇa anupālaya iṣṭa aniṣṭa samāyogaḥ vairam sauhārdam eva ca tasmāt guṇeṣu rajyethāḥ mā doṣeṣu kadā cana mānuṣeṣu mahā rāja dharma adharmau pravartataḥ na tathā anyeṣu bhūteṣu manuṣya rahiteṣu iha dharma śīlaḥ naraḥ vidvān īhakaḥ anīhakaḥ api vā ātma bhūtaḥ sadā loke caret bhūtāni a hiṃsayan na anṛtam ca eva bhavati tadā kalyāṇam ṛcchati uvāca tapaḥ vidhim tu vakṣyāmi tat me nigadataḥ śṛṇu prāyeṇa hi gṛhasthasya mamatvam nāma jāyate saṅga āgatam nara śreṣṭha bhāvaiḥ tāmasa rājasaiḥ gṛhāṇi āśritya gāvaḥ ca kṣetrāṇi ca dhanāni ca dārāḥ putrāḥ ca bhṛtyāḥ ca bhavanti iha narasya vai rāga dveṣa abhibhūtam ca naram dravya vaśa anugam kṛtārthaḥ bhogataḥ bhūtvā sa vai rati parāyaṇaḥ lābham grāmya sukhāt anyam ratitaḥ na anupaśyati puṣṭi artham ca eva tasya iha janasya artham cikīrṣati bāla sneha parīta ātmā tad kṣayāt ca anutapyate tapaḥ hi buddhi yuktānām śāśvatam brahma darśanam anvicchatām śubham karma narāṇām tyajatām sukham sneha āyatana nāśāt ca dhana nāśāt ca pārthiva nirvedāt ātma saṃbodhaḥ saṃbodhāt śāstra darśanam śāstra artha darśanāt rājan tapaḥ eva anupaśyati tapaḥ sarva gatam tāta hīnasya api vidhīyate prajāpatiḥ prajāḥ pūrvam asṛjat tapasā vibhuḥ ādityāḥ vasavaḥ rudrāḥ tathā eva agni aśvi mārutāḥ viśvedevāḥ tathā sādhyāḥ pitaraḥ atha marut gaṇāḥ yakṣa rākṣasa gandharvāḥ siddhāḥ ca anye divaukasaḥ saṃsiddhāḥ tapasā tāta ye ca anye svarga vāsinaḥ ye ca ādau brahmaṇā sṛṣṭāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tapasā purā te bhāvayantaḥ pṛthivīm vicaranti divam tathā kauśikāni ca vastrāṇi śubhāni ābharaṇāni ca vāhana āsana yānāni sarvam tat tapasaḥ phalam manonukūlāḥ pramadāḥ rūpavatyaḥ sahasraśas vāsaḥ prāsāda pṛṣṭhe ca tat sarvam tapasaḥ phalam abhipretāni sarvāṇi bhavanti kṛta karmaṇām upabhoga parityāgaḥ phalāni akṛta karmaṇām avekṣya manasā śāstram buddhyā ca nṛpa sattama naṣṭa prajñaḥ yadā bhavati tadā nyāyam na paśyati yat iṣṭam tat sukham prāhuḥ dveṣyam duḥkham iha ucyate kṛta akṛtasya tapasaḥ phalam paśyasva yādṛśa nityam bhadrāṇi paśyanti viṣayān ca upabhuñjate prākāśyam ca eva gacchanti kṛtvā niṣkalmaṣam tapaḥ apriyāṇi avamānān ca duḥkham bahuvidha ātmakam sva vṛttāt yaḥ na calati śāstra cakṣuḥ sa mānavaḥ iṣu prapāta mātram hi sparśa yoge ratiḥ smṛ rasane darśane ghrāṇe śravaṇe ca viśām pate tatas asya jāyate tīvrā vedanā tad kṣayāt punar tatas phala artha carati bhavanti jyāyasaḥ guṇāḥ dharma vṛttyā ca satatam kāma arthābhyām na hīyate aprayatna āgatāḥ sevyāḥ gṛhasthaiḥ viṣayāḥ sadā mānin kula jātānām nityam śāstra artha cakṣuṣām dharma kriyā viyuktānām aśaktyā saṃvṛta ātmanām kriyamāṇam yadā karma nāśam gacchati mānuṣam teṣām na anyat ṛte loke tapasaḥ karma vidyate dākṣyeṇa havya kavya artham svadharmam vicaret nṛpa yathā nadīnadāḥ sarve sāgare yānti saṃsthitim evam āśramiṇaḥ sarve gṛhasthe yānti saṃsthitim varṇaḥ viśeṣa varṇānām mahā ṛṣe kena jāyate etat icchāmi aham śrotum tat brūhi vadatām vara katham brāhmaṇataḥ jātaḥ viśeṣa grahaṇam gataḥ uvāca tapasaḥ tu apakarṣeṇa jāti grahaṇa tām gataḥ su kṣetrāt ca su bījāt ca puṇyaḥ bhavati saṃbhavaḥ vaktrāt bhujābhyām ūrubhyām padbhyām ca eva atha jajñire mukha jāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tāta bāhu jāḥ kṣatra bandhavaḥ ūru jāḥ dhaninaḥ rājan pāda jāḥ paricārakāḥ caturṇām eva varṇānām āgamaḥ puruṣa ṛṣabha atas anye tu atiriktāḥ ye te vai saṃkara jāḥ smṛtāḥ kṣatra jātiḥ atha ambaṣṭhāḥ ugrāḥ vaidehakāḥ tathā śvapākāḥ pulkasāḥ stenāḥ niṣādāḥ sūta māgadhāḥ āyogāḥ karaṇāḥ vrātyāḥ caṇḍālāḥ ca narādhipa brahmaṇā ekena jātānām nānātvam gotrataḥ katham yatra tatra katham jātāḥ sva yonim munayaḥ gatāḥ uvāca mahātmanām samutpattiḥ tapasā bhāvitātmanām svena eva tapasā teṣām ṛṣi tvam vidadhuḥ punar pitāmahaḥ ca me pūrvam ṛśyaśṛṅgaḥ ca kāśyapaḥ vaṭaḥ tāṇḍyaḥ kṛpaḥ ca eva kakṣīvant kamaṭha ādayaḥ yavakrītaḥ ca nṛpate droṇaḥ ca vadatām varaḥ ete svām prakṛtim prāptāḥ vaideha tapasaḥ mūla gotrāṇi catvāri samutpannāni pārthiva aṅgirāḥ kaśyapaḥ ca eva vasiṣṭhaḥ bhṛguḥ eva ca nāmadheyāni tapasā tāni ca grahaṇam satām viśeṣa dharmān varṇānām prabrūhi bhagavat mama tathā sāmānya dharmān ca sarvatra kuśalaḥ hi asi uvāca viśeṣa dharmaḥ viprāṇām rakṣā kṣatrasya śobhanā kṛṣiḥ ca pāśupālyam ca vāṇijyam ca viśām api dvijānām paricaryā ca śūdra karma narādhipa viśeṣa dharmāḥ nṛpate varṇānām parikīrtitāḥ dharmān sādhāraṇān tāta vistareṇa śṛṇuṣva mama ānṛśaṃsyam ahiṃsā ca apramādaḥ saṃvibhāgi tā sveṣu dāreṣu saṃtoṣaḥ śaucam nitya anasūya tā ātma jñānam titikṣā ca dharmāḥ sādhāraṇāḥ nṛpa brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ trayaḥ varṇāḥ dvijātayaḥ atra teṣām adhīkāraḥ dharmeṣu dvipadām vara vikarma avasthitāḥ varṇāḥ patanti nṛpate trayaḥ na ca api śūdraḥ patati iti niścayaḥ na ca api saṃskāram iha arhati iti vā vaidehakam śūdram udāharanti dvijāḥ mahā rāja śruta upapannāḥ aham hi paśyāmi narendra devam viśvasya viṣṇum jagataḥ pradhānam satām vṛttam anuṣṭhāya nihīnāḥ ujjihīrṣavaḥ mantra varjam na duṣyanti kurvāṇāḥ pauṣṭikīḥ kriyāḥ yathā yathā hi sat vṛttam ālambanti itare janāḥ uvāca asaṃśayam mahā rājaḥ ubhayam doṣa kārakam karma ca eva hi jātiḥ ca viśeṣam tu niśāmaya jātyā ca karmaṇā ca eva duṣṭam karma niṣevate jātyā duṣṭaḥ ca yaḥ pāpam na karoti sa pūruṣaḥ jātyā pradhānam puruṣam kurvāṇam karma dhikkṛtam na hiṃsanti iha bhūtāni kriyamāṇāni sarvadā uvāca śṛṇu me atra mahā rāja yat mām tvam paripṛcchasi yāni karmāṇi ahiṃsrāṇi naram trāyanti sarvadā saṃnyasya agnīn upāsīnāḥ paśyanti vigata jvarāḥ praśritāḥ vinaya upetāḥ dama nityāḥ su saṃśitāḥ sarve varṇāḥ dharma kāryāṇi samyak kṛtvā rājan satya vākyāni ca uktvā tyaktvā adharmam dāruṇam jīva loke yānti svargam na atra kāryaḥ vicāra uvāca an anya bhaktāḥ priya vādinaḥ ca hitāḥ ca vaśyāḥ ca tathā eva rājan pitā param daivatam mānavānām mātuḥ viśiṣṭam pitaram vadanti jñānasya lābham paramam vadanti jita indriya arthāḥ param āpnuvanti raṇa ajire yatra śara agni saṃstare nṛpa ātmajaḥ ghātam avāpya dahyate śrāntam bhītam bhraṣṭa śastram rudantam parāṅmukham paribarhaiḥ ca hīnam an udyatam rogiṇam yācamānam na vai hiṃsyāt bāla vṛddhau ca rājan atikrameta nṛpatiḥ saṃgrāme kṣatriya ātmajam tulyāt iha vadhaḥ śreyāḥ viśiṣṭāt ca iti niścayaḥ nihīnāt kātarāt ca eva nṛpāṇām garhitaḥ vadhaḥ pāpāt pāpa samācārāt nihīnāt ca narādhipa na kaḥ cit trāti vai rājan diṣṭānta vaśam āgatam sa avaśeṣa āyuṣam ca api kaḥ cit eva apakarṣati snigdhaiḥ ca kriyamāṇāni karmāṇi iha nivartayet hiṃsā ātmakāni karmāṇi na āyuḥ icchet para āyuṣā gṛhasthānām tu sarveṣām vināśam abhikāṅkṣatām nidhanam śobhanam tāta pulineṣu kriyāvatām na akāraṇāt tat bhavati kāraṇaiḥ upapāditam tathā śarīram bhavati dehāt yena upapāditam adhvānam gatakaḥ ca ayam prāptaḥ ca ayam gṛhāt gṛham dvitīyam kāraṇam tatra na anyat kim cana vidyate tat deham dehinām yuktam mokṣa bhūteṣu vartate sirā snāyu asthi saṃghātam bībhatsa amedhya saṃkulam bhūtānām indriyāṇām ca guṇānām ca samāgamam tvac antam deham iti āhuḥ vidvāṃsaḥ adhyātma cintakāḥ guṇaiḥ api parikṣīṇam śarīram martya tām gatam śarīriṇā parityaktam niśceṣṭam gata cetanam tad svabhāvaḥ aparaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ visargaḥ karmaṇaḥ tathā na jāyate tu nṛpate kam cit kālam ayam punar sa punar jāyate rājan prāpya iha āyatanam nṛpa dvividhānām ca bhūtānām jaṅgamāḥ paramāḥ nṛpa jaṅgamānām api tathā dvipadāḥ paramāḥ matāḥ dvipadānām api tathā dvijāḥ vai paramāḥ smṛtāḥ dvijānām api rāja indra prajñāvantaḥ pare matāḥ prājñānām ātma saṃbuddhāḥ saṃbuddhānām amāninaḥ jātam anveti maraṇam nṛṇām iti viniścayaḥ antavanti hi karmāṇi sevante guṇataḥ prajāḥ āpanne tu uttarām kāṣṭhām sūrye yaḥ nidhanam vrajet nakṣatre ca muhūrte ca puṇye rājan sa puṇya kṛt a yojayitvā kleśena janam plāvya ca duṣkṛtam mṛtyunā aprākṛtena iha karma kṛtvā ātma śaktitaḥ daṃṣṭribhyaḥ ca paśubhyaḥ ca prākṛtaḥ vadhaḥ ucyate na ca ebhiḥ puṇya karmāṇaḥ yujyante na abhisaṃdhi jaiḥ ūrdhvam hitvā pratiṣṭhante prāṇāḥ puṇya kṛtām nṛpa madhyatas madhya puṇyānām adhas duṣkṛta karmaṇām ekaḥ śatruḥ na dvitīyaḥ asti śatruḥ ajñāna tulyaḥ puruṣasya rājan yena āvṛtaḥ kurute saṃprayuktaḥ ghorāṇi karmāṇi su dāruṇāni adhītya vedān tapasā brahmacārī yajñān śaktyā saṃnisṛjya iha pañca vanam gacchet puruṣaḥ dharma kāmaḥ śreyaḥ citvā sthāpayitvā sva vaṃśam caṇḍāla tve api mānuṣyam sarvathā tāta durlabham iyam hi yoniḥ prathamā yām prāpya jagatīpate ātmā vai śakyate trātum karmabhiḥ śubha lakṣaṇaiḥ kurvanti dharmam manujāḥ śruti prāmāṇya darśanāt yaḥ tu prīti purogeṇa cakṣuṣā tāta paśyati dīpa upamāni bhūtāni yāvat arciḥ na naśyati dāna tyāga śobhana mūrtiḥ adbhyaḥ bhūyas plāvyam tapas vai śarīram sarasvatī naimiṣa puṣkareṣu ye ca api anye puṇya deśāḥ pṛthivyām gṛheṣu yad asavaḥ patanti teṣām atho nirharaṇam praśaṃs yānena vai prāpaṇam ca śmaśāne śaucena nūnam vidhinā ca eva dāhaḥ iṣṭiḥ puṣṭiḥ yajanam yājanam ca śaktyā pitryam yat ca kim cit praśastam sarvāṇi ātma arthe mānavaḥ yaḥ karoti dharma śāstrāṇi vedāḥ ca ṣaṣ aṅgāni narādhipa śreyasaḥ arthe vidhīyante narasya akliṣṭa karmaṇaḥ uvāca vai sarvam ākhyātam muninā su mahātmanā uvāca parāśaram mahātmānam dharme parama niścayam kim śreyaḥ kā gatiḥ brahman kim kṛtam na vinaśyati uvāca asaṅgaḥ śreyasaḥ mūlam jñānam jñāna gatiḥ parā cīrṇam tapaḥ na praṇaśyet vāpaḥ kṣetre na naśyati dattvā abhaya kṛtam dānam tadā siddhim avāpnuyāt yaḥ dadāti sahasrāṇi gavām aśva śatāni ca na adharmaḥ śliṣyate prājñam āpaḥ puṣkaraparṇa vat aprājñam adhikam pāpam śliṣyate jatu kāṣṭha vat na adharmaḥ kāraṇa apekṣī kartāram abhimuñcati śubha aśubheṣu sakta ātmā prāpnoti su mahat bhayam puṣṭa srotaḥ iva āyattaḥ sphītaḥ bhavati saṃcayaḥ yathā bhānu gatam tejaḥ maṇiḥ śuddhaḥ samādhinā ādatte rāja śārdūla tathā yogaḥ pravartate yathā tilānām iha puṣpa saṃśrayāt pṛthak pṛthak yāti guṇaḥ ati saumya tām tathā narāṇām bhuvi bhāvitātmanām yathāśrayam sattva guṇaḥ pravartate jahāti dārān ihate na saṃpadaḥ sat aśva yānam vividhāḥ ca yāḥ kriyāḥ sa sarva bhāva anugatena cetasā nṛpa āmiṣeṇa iva jhaṣaḥ vikṛṣyate saṃghātavān martya lokaḥ parasparam apāśritaḥ na dharma kālaḥ puruṣasya niścitaḥ na ca api mṛtyuḥ puruṣam pratīkṣate yathā mṛṇālaḥ anugatam āśu muñcati kardamam tathā śarīram tapasā taptam viṣayam aśnute nīhāreṇa hi saṃvītaḥ śiśna udara parāyaṇaḥ jāti andhaḥ iva panthānam āvṛta ātmā na budhyate tathā martya arṇave jantoḥ karma vijñānāt gatiḥ svayam kṛtāni karmāṇi jātaḥ jantuḥ prapadyate śayānam yāntam āsīnam pravṛttam viṣayeṣu ca śubha aśubhāni karmāṇi prapadyante naram sadā tathā manaḥ abhiyogāt vai śarīram pratikarṣati yathā samudram abhitas saṃsyūtāḥ saritaḥ aparāḥ tathā ādyā prakṛtiḥ yogāt abhisaṃsyūyate sadā śarīragṛha saṃsthasya śauca tīrthasya dehinaḥ vistarāḥ kleśa saṃyuj saṃkṣepāḥ tu sukha āvaha para artham vistarāḥ sarve tyāgam ātma hitam viduḥ saṃkalpa jaḥ mitra vargaḥ jñātayaḥ kāraṇa ātmakāḥ bhāryā dāsāḥ ca putrāḥ ca svam artham anuyuñjate mātā putraḥ pitā bhrātā bhāryā mitra janaḥ tathā sarvāṇi karmāṇi purā kṛtāni śubha aśubhāni ātmanaḥ yānti jantoḥ a dvaidha manasam yuktam śūram dhīram vipaścitam na śrīḥ saṃtyajate nityam ādityam iva raśmayaḥ āstikya vyavasāyābhyām upāyāt vismayāt dhiyā sarvaḥ svāni śubha aśubhāni niyatam karmāṇi jantuḥ svayam garbhāt saṃpratipadyate tat ubhayam yat tena pūrvam kṛtam mṛtyuḥ ca aparihāravān sama gatiḥ kālena viccheditā dāruḥ cūrṇam iva aśmasāra vihitam karma antikam prāpayet svarūpa tām ātma kṛtam ca vistaram kula anvayam dravya samṛddhi saṃcayam naraḥ hi sarvaḥ labhate yathākṛtam śubha aśubhena ātma kṛtena karmaṇā uvāca iti uktaḥ janakaḥ rājan yathātathyam manīṣiṇā śrutvā dharma vidām śreṣṭhaḥ parām mudam avāpa ha uvāca satyam kṣamām damam prajñām praśaṃsanti pitāmaha uvāca sādhyānām iha saṃvādam haṃsasya ca yudhiṣṭhira haṃsaḥ bhūtvā atha sauvarṇaḥ tu ajaḥ nityaḥ prajāpatiḥ ūcuḥ pṛcchāmaḥ tvām mokṣa dharmam bhavān ca kila mokṣa vid śrutaḥ asi naḥ paṇḍitaḥ dhīra vādī sādhu śabdaḥ patate te patatrin tat naḥ kāryam pakṣi vara praśādhi yat kāryāṇām manyase śreṣṭham ekam uvāca idam kāryam amṛta āśāḥ śṛṇomi tapaḥ damaḥ satyam ātma abhiguptiḥ na aruntudaḥ syāt na nṛśaṃsa vādī na hīnatas param abhyādadīta yayā asya vācā paraḥ udvijeta na tām vadet ruśatīm pāpa lokyām vāc sāyakāḥ vadanāt niṣpatanti yaiḥ āhataḥ śocati rātri ahāni paraḥ ced enam ativāda bāṇaiḥ bhṛśam vidhyet śamaḥ eva iha kāryaḥ saṃroṣyamāṇaḥ pratimṛṣyate yaḥ saḥ ādatte sukṛtam vai parasya kṣepa abhimānāt abhiṣaṅga vyalīkam nigṛhṇāti jvalitam yaḥ ca manyum aduṣṭa cetāḥ muditaḥ anasūyuḥ saḥ ādatte sukṛtam vai pareṣām ākruśyamānaḥ na vadāmi kim cit kṣamāmi aham tāḍyamānaḥ ca nityam śreṣṭham hi etat kṣamam api āhuḥ āryāḥ satyam tathā eva ārjavam ānṛśaṃsyam etān vegān yaḥ viṣahati udīrṇān tam manye aham brāhmaṇam vai munim ca akrodhanaḥ krudhyatām vai viśiṣṭaḥ tathā titikṣuḥ atitikṣoḥ viśiṣṭaḥ amānuṣāt mānuṣaḥ vai viśiṣṭaḥ tathā ajñānāt jñānavān vai pradhānaḥ ākruśyamānaḥ na ākrośet manyuḥ eva titikṣataḥ ākroṣṭāram nirdahati sukṛtam ca asya vindati yaḥ na atyuktaḥ prāha rūkṣam priyam vā yaḥ vā hataḥ na pratihanti dhairyāt pāpīyasaḥ kṣameta eva śreyasaḥ sadṛśasya ca vimānitaḥ hataḥ evam siddhim gamiṣyati sadā aham āryān nibhṛtaḥ api upāse na me vivitsā na ca me asti roṣaḥ na ca api aham lipsamānaḥ paraimi na ca eva kim cit viṣameṇa yāmi na aham śaptaḥ pratiśapāmi kim cit damam dvāram hi amṛtasya iha vedmi guhyam brahma tat idam vaḥ bravīmi na mānuṣāt śreṣṭhataram hi kim cit virajāḥ kālam ākāṅkṣan dhīraḥ dhairyeṇa sidhyati yasmai vācam su praśastām vadanti sa vai devān gacchati saṃyata ātmā na tathā vaktum icchanti kalyāṇān puruṣe guṇān yathā eṣām vaktum icchanti nairguṇyam anuyuñjakāḥ vedāḥ tapaḥ ca tyāgaḥ ca saḥ idam sarvam āpnuyāt ākrośana avamānābhyām abudhāt vardhate budhaḥ catvāri yasya dvārāṇi su guptāni amara uttamāḥ satyam damam hi ārjavam ānṛśaṃsyam svādhyāya nityaḥ a spṛhayan pareṣām ekānta śīlī ūrdhva gatiḥ bhavet saḥ yādṛśaiḥ saṃnivasati yādṛśān ca upasevate yādṛś icchet ca bhavitum tādṛś bhavati pūruṣaḥ vāsaḥ yathā raṅga vaśam prayāti tathā sa teṣām vaśam abhyupaiti sadā devāḥ sādhubhiḥ saṃvadante na mānuṣam viṣayam yānti draṣṭum na induḥ samaḥ syāt asamaḥ hi vāyuḥ uccāvacam viṣayam yaḥ sa veda aduṣṭam vartamāne tu hṛdaya antara pūruṣe śiśna udare ye abhiratāḥ sadā eva stenāḥ narāḥ vāc paruṣāḥ ca nityam apeta doṣān iti tān viditvā dūrāt devāḥ saṃparivarjayanti na vai devāḥ hīna sattvena toṣyāḥ sarva āśinā duṣkṛta karmaṇā vā satya vratāḥ ye tu narāḥ kṛtajñāḥ dharme ratāḥ taiḥ saha saṃbhajante a vyāhṛtam vyāhṛtāt śreyaḥ āhuḥ satyam vadet vyāhṛtam tat dvitīyam dharmam vadet vyāhṛtam tat tṛtīyam priyam vadet vyāhṛtam tat caturtham ūcuḥ kena ayam āvṛtaḥ lokaḥ kena vā na prakāśate uvāca ajñānena āvṛtaḥ lokaḥ mātsaryāt na prakāśate ūcuḥ kaḥ svid ekaḥ ramate brāhmaṇānām kaḥ svid ekaḥ bahubhiḥ joṣam āste uvāca prājñaḥ ekaḥ ramate brāhmaṇānām prājñaḥ ekaḥ bahubhiḥ joṣam āste prājñaḥ ekaḥ balavān durbalaḥ api prājñaḥ eṣām kalaham na anvavaiti ūcuḥ kim brāhmaṇānām deva tvam kim ca sādhu tvam ucyate asādhu tvam ca kim teṣām kim eṣām mānuṣam matam uvāca svādhyāyaḥ eṣām deva tvam vratam sādhu tvam ucyate asādhu tvam parīvādaḥ mṛtyuḥ mānuṣam ucyate uvāca sādhyaiḥ deva gaṇaiḥ sārdham divam eva āruroha saḥ saṃvādaḥ iti ayam śreṣṭhaḥ sādhyānām parikīrtitaḥ kṣetram vai karmaṇām yoniḥ sadbhāvaḥ satyam ucyate uvāca sāṃkhye yoge ca me tāta viśeṣam vaktum arhasi uvāca sāṃkhyāḥ sāṃkhyam praśaṃsanti yogāḥ yogam dvijātayaḥ vadanti kāraṇaiḥ śraiṣṭhyam sva pakṣa udbhāvanāya vai anīśvaraḥ katham mucyet iti evam śatru karśana vadanti kāraṇaiḥ śraiṣṭhyam yogāḥ samyak manīṣiṇaḥ vadanti kāraṇam ca idam sāṃkhyāḥ samyak dvijātayaḥ vijñāya iha gatīḥ sarvāḥ viraktaḥ viṣayeṣu yaḥ etat āhuḥ mahā prājñāḥ sāṃkhyam vai mokṣa darśanam sva pakṣe kāraṇam grāhyam samartham vacanam hitam śiṣṭānām hi matam grāhyam tvadvidhaiḥ śiṣṭa saṃmataiḥ pratyakṣa hetavaḥ yogāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ śāstra viniścayāḥ ubhe ca ete mate jñāne nṛpate śiṣṭa saṃmate anuṣṭhite yathāśāstram nayetām paramām gatim tulyam śaucam tayoḥ yuktam dayā bhūteṣu ca anagha vratānām dhāraṇam tulyam darśanam na samam tayoḥ uvāca yadi tulyam vratam śaucam dayā ca atra pitāmaha uvāca rāgam moham tathā sneham kāmam krodham ca kevalam yogāt chittvā āditas doṣān pañca etān prāpnuvanti tat yathā ca animiṣāḥ sthūlāḥ jālam chittvā punar jalam prāpnuvanti tathā yogāḥ tat padam vīta kalmaṣāḥ tathā eva vāgurām chittvā balavantaḥ yathā mṛgāḥ prāpnuyuḥ vimalam mārgam vimuktāḥ sarva bandhanaiḥ lobha jāni tathā rājan bandhanāni bala anvitāḥ chittvā yogāḥ param mārgam gacchanti vimalāḥ śivam abalāḥ ca mṛgāḥ rājan vāgurāsu tathā apare bala hīnāḥ ca kaunteya yathā jāla gatāḥ jhaṣāḥ antam gacchanti rāja indra tathā yogāḥ su durbalāḥ yathā ca śakunāḥ sūkṣmāḥ prāpya jālam ariṃdama alpakaḥ ca yathā rājan vahniḥ śāmyati durbalaḥ samīraṇa yutaḥ kṛtsnām dahet kṣipram mahīm api tadvat jāta balaḥ yogī dīpta tejāḥ mahā balaḥ antakāle iva ādityaḥ kṛtsnam saṃśoṣayet jagat tat eva ca yathā srotaḥ viṣṭambhayati vāraṇaḥ viśanti ca avaśāḥ pārtha yogāḥ yoga bala anvitāḥ prajāpatīn ṛṣīn devān mahābhūtāni ca īśvarāḥ ātmanām ca sahasrāṇi bahūni bharata ṛṣabha yogaḥ kuryāt balam prāpya taiḥ ca sarvaiḥ mahīm caret prāpnuyāt viṣayān ca eva punar ca ugram tapaḥ caret saṃkṣipet ca punar pārtha sūryaḥ tejaḥ guṇān iva balāni yoge proktāni mayā etāni viśām pate nidarśana artha sūkṣmāṇi vakṣyāmi ca punar tvad ātmanaḥ ca samādhāne dhāraṇām prati ca abhibho nidarśanāni sūkṣmāṇi śṛṇu mama bharata ṛṣabha yuktaḥ samyak tathā yogī mokṣam prāpnoti asaṃśayam sneha pūrṇe yathā pātre manaḥ ādhāya niścalam puruṣaḥ yattaḥ ārohet sopānam yukta mānasaḥ yuktvā tathā ayam ātmānam yogaḥ pārthiva niścalam yathā ca nāvam kaunteya karṇadhāraḥ samāhitaḥ mahā arṇava gatām śīghram nayet pārthiva pattanam durgamam sthānam āpnoti hitvā deham imam nṛpa sārathiḥ ca yathā yuktvā sat aśvān su samāhitaḥ deśam iṣṭam nayati āśu dhanvinam puruṣa ṛṣabha tathā eva nṛpate yogī dhāraṇāsu samāhitaḥ prāpnoti āśu param sthānam lakṣam muktaḥ iva āśugaḥ āveśya ātmani ca ātmānam yogī tiṣṭhati yaḥ acalaḥ pāpam hantā iva mīnānām padam āpnoti saḥ ajaram nābhyām kaṇṭhe ca śīrṣe ca hṛdi vakṣasi pārśvayoḥ darśane sparśane ca api ghrāṇe ca amita vikrama sthāneṣu eteṣu yaḥ yogī mahā vrata samāhitaḥ ātmanā sūkṣmam ātmānam yuṅkte samyak viśām pate sa śīghram amala prajñaḥ karma dagdhvā śubha aśubham uvāca āhārān kīdṛśān kṛtvā kāni jitvā ca bhārata uvāca kaṇānām bhakṣaṇe yuktaḥ piṇyākasya ca bhakṣaṇe snehānām varjane yuktaḥ yogī balam avāpnuyāt bhuñjānaḥ yāvakam rūkṣam dīrgha kālam ariṃdama eka ārāmaḥ viśuddha ātmā yogī balam avāpnuyāt pakṣān māsān ṛtūn citrān saṃcaran ca guhāḥ tathā apaḥ pītvā payaḥ miśrāḥ yogī balam avāpnuyāt akhaṇḍam api vā māsam satatam manuja īśvara upoṣya samyak śuddha ātmā yogī balam avāpnuyāt kāmam jitvā tathā krodham śīta uṣṇe varṣam eva ca bhayam nidrām tathā śvāsam pauruṣam viṣayān tathā aratim durjayām ca eva ghorām tṛṣṇām ca pārthiva sparśān sarvān tathā tandrām durjayām nṛpa sattama dīpayanti mahātmānaḥ sūkṣmam ātmānam ātmanā vīta rāgāḥ mahā prājñāḥ dhyāna adhyayana saṃpadā durgaḥ tu eṣa mataḥ pathī brāhmaṇānām vipaścitām abhaktam aṭavī prāyam dāva dagdha mahīruham panthānam taskara ākīrṇam kṣemeṇa abhipatet yuvā yoga mārgam tathā āsādya yaḥ kaḥ cit bhajate dvijaḥ kṣemeṇa uparamet mārgāt bahu doṣaḥ hi sa smṛtaḥ sustheyam kṣura dhārāsu niśitāsu mahīpate dhāraṇāsu tu yogasya duḥstheyam akṛtātmabhiḥ vipannāḥ dhāraṇāḥ tāta nayanti naśubhām gatim netṛ hīnāḥ yathā nāvaḥ puruṣān arṇave nṛpa nānā śāstreṣu niṣpannam yogeṣu idam udāhṛtam param yogam tu yat kṛtsnam niścitam tat dvijātiṣu param hi tat brahma mahat mahātman brahmāṇam īśam vara dam ca viṣṇum bhavam ca dharmam ca ṣaḍānanam ca ṣaṭ brahma putrān ca mahā anubhāvān tamaḥ ca kaṣṭam su mahat rajaḥ ca sattvam ca śuddham prakṛtim parām ca tārādhipam vai vimalam sa tāram viśvān ca devān uragān pitṝn ca śailān ca kṛtsnān udadhīn ca ghorān nadīḥ ca sarvāḥ sa vanān ghanān ca nāgān nagān yakṣa gaṇān diśaḥ ca gandharva saṃghān puruṣān striyaḥ ca parasparam prāpya mahān mahātmā viśeta yogī nacirāt vimuktaḥ yogān sa sarvān abhibhūya martyān nārāyaṇa ātmā kurute mahātmā uvāca samyak tvayā idam nṛpate varṇitaḥ śiṣṭa saṃmataḥ yoga mārgaḥ yathānyāyam śiṣyāya iha hita eṣiṇā sāṃkhye tu idānīm kārtsnyena vidhim prabrūhi pṛcchate triṣu lokeṣu yat jñānam sarvam tat viditam hi te uvāca śṛṇu me tvam idam śuddham sāṃkhyānām vidita ātmanām guṇāḥ ca yasmin bahavaḥ doṣa hāniḥ ca kevalā jñānena parisaṃkhyāya sa doṣān viṣayān nṛpa mānuṣān durjayān kṛtsnān paiśācān viṣayān tathā rākṣasān viṣayān jñātvā yakṣāṇām viṣayān tathā viṣayān auragān jñātvā gāndharva viṣayān tathā pitṝṇām viṣayān jñātvā tiryakṣu caratām nṛpa suparṇa viṣayān jñātvā marutām viṣayān tathā rājarṣi viṣayān jñātvā brahmarṣi viṣayān tathā āsurān viṣayān jñātvā vaiśvadevān tathā eva ca devarṣi viṣayān jñātvā yogānām api ca īśvarān viṣayān ca prajā īśānām brahmaṇaḥ viṣayān tathā āyuṣaḥ ca param kālam loke vijñāya tattvataḥ prāpte kāle ca yat duḥkham patatām viṣaya eṣiṇām svargasya ca guṇān kṛtsnān doṣān sarvān ca bhārata veda vāde ca ye doṣāḥ guṇāḥ ye ca api vaidikāḥ jñāna yoge ca ye doṣāḥ guṇāḥ yoge ca ye nṛpa sāṃkhya jñāne ca ye doṣāḥ tathā eva ca guṇāḥ nṛpa itareṣu ca ye doṣāḥ guṇāḥ teṣu ca bhārata parisaṃkhyāya saṃkhyānam matvā sāṃkhyam guṇa adhikam sattvam daśaguṇam jñātvā rajaḥ navaguṇam tathā tamaḥ ca aṣṭaguṇam jñātvā buddhim saptaguṇām tathā ṣaḍguṇam ca nabhaḥ jñātvā manaḥ pañcaguṇam tathā buddhim caturguṇām jñātvā tamaḥ ca triguṇam mahat dviguṇam ca rajaḥ jñātvā sattvam ekaguṇam punar mārgam vijñāya tattvena pralaye prekṣaṇam tathā jñāna vijñāna saṃpannāḥ kāraṇaiḥ bhāvitāḥ śubhaiḥ prāpnuvanti śubham mokṣam sūkṣmāḥ iha nabhaḥ param rūpeṇa dṛṣṭim saṃyuktām ghrāṇam gandha guṇena ca śabde saktam tathā śrotram jihvām rasa guṇeṣu ca tanum sparśe tathā saktām vāyum nabhasi ca āśritam viṣṇum krānte bale śakram koṣṭhe saktam tathā analam apsu devīm tathā saktām apaḥ tejasi ca āśritāḥ tejaḥ vāyau
