tu saṃsaktam vāyum nabhasi ca āśritam saktam ātmānam īśe ca deve nārāyaṇe tathā devam mokṣe ca saṃsaktam mokṣam saktam tu na kva cit jñātvā sattva yutam deham vṛtam ṣoḍaśabhiḥ guṇaiḥ svabhāvam cetanām ca eva jñātvā vai deham āśrite dvitīyam karma vijñāya nṛpate viṣaya eṣiṇām indriyāṇi indriya arthān ca sarvān ātmani saṃśritān prāṇa apānau samānam ca vyāna udānau ca tattvāt avāk ca eva anilam jñātvā pravaham ca anilam punar sapta vātān tathā śeṣān saptadhā vidhivat punar prajāpatīn ṛṣīn ca eva mārgān ca su bahūn varān saptarṣīn ca bahūn jñātvā rājarṣīn ca paraṃtapa sura ṛṣīn mahataḥ ca anyān mahā ṛṣīn sūrya saṃnibhān aiśvaryāt cyāvitān jñātvā kālena mahatā nṛpa mahatām bhūta saṃghānām śrutvā nāśam ca pārthiva gatim ca api aśubhām jñātvā nṛpate pāpa karmaṇām vaitaraṇyām ca yat duḥkham patitānām yama kṣaye ca vicitrāsu saṃsārān aśubhān tathā jaṭhare ca aśubhe vāsam śoṇita udaka bhājane śleṣma mūtra purīṣe ca tīvra gandha samanvite śukra śoṇita saṃghāte majjā snāyu parigrahe sirā śata samākīrṇe nava dvāre pure aśucau vijñāya āhitam ātmānam yogān ca vividhān nṛpa tāmasānām ca jantūnām ramaṇīya āvṛta ātmanām sāttvikānām ca jantūnām kutsitam bharata ṛṣabha garhitam mahatām arthe sāṃkhyānām vidita ātmanām upaplavān tathā ghorān śaśinaḥ tejasaḥ tathā tārāṇām patanam dṛṣṭvā nakṣatrāṇām ca paryayam dvaṃdvānām viprayogam ca vijñāya kṛpaṇam nṛpa anyonya bhakṣaṇam dṛṣṭvā bhūtānām api ca aśubham bālye moham ca vijñāya kṣayam dehasya ca aśubham sahasreṣu naraḥ kaḥ cit mokṣa buddhim samāśritaḥ viṣayāṇām ca daurātmyam vijñāya nṛpate punar gatāsūnām ca kaunteya dehān dṛṣṭvā tathā aśubhān vāsam kuleṣu jantūnām duḥkham vijñāya bhārata brahma ghnānām gatim jñātvā patitānām su dāruṇām surā pāne ca saktānām brāhmaṇānām durātmanām guru dāra prasaktānām gatim vijñāya ca aśubhām tena jñānena vijñāya gatim ca aśubha karmaṇām tiryagyoni gatānām ca vijñāya gatīḥ pṛthak veda vādān tathā citrān ṛtūnām paryayān tathā kṣayam saṃvatsarāṇām ca māsānām prakṣayam tathā pakṣa kṣayam tathā dṛṣṭvā divasānām ca saṃkṣayam kṣayam vṛddhim ca candrasya dṛṣṭvā pratyakṣatas tathā vṛddhim dṛś samudrāṇām kṣayam teṣām tathā punar kṣayam dhanānām ca tathā punar vṛddhim tathā eva ca saṃyogānām kṣayam dṛṣṭvā yugānām ca viśeṣataḥ kṣayam ca dṛṣṭvā śailānām kṣayam ca saritām tathā varṇānām ca kṣayam dṛṣṭvā kṣaya antam ca punar punar jarā mṛtyum tathā janma dṛṣṭvā duḥkhāni ca eva ha deha doṣān tathā jñātvā teṣām duḥkham ca tattva ātma doṣān ca vijñāya sarvān ātmani saṃśritān sva dehāt utthitān gandhān tathā vijñāya ca aśubhān mūtra śleṣma purīṣa ādīn sveda jān ca su kutsitān uvāca uvāca pañca doṣān prabho dehe pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ mārga jñāḥ kāpilāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ śṛṇu tān ari sūdana kāma krodhau bhayam nidrā pañcamaḥ śvāsaḥ ucyate ete doṣāḥ śarīreṣu dṛśyante sarva dehinām chindanti kṣamayā krodham kāmam saṃkalpa varjanāt sattva saṃśīlanāt nidrām apramādāt bhayam tathā chindanti pañcama śvāsam laghu āhāra tayā nṛpa guṇān guṇa śataiḥ jñātvā doṣān doṣa śataiḥ api hetūn hetu śataiḥ citraiḥ citrān vijñāya tattvāt apām phena upamam lokam viṣṇoḥ māyā śataiḥ vṛtam tamaḥ śvabhra nibham dṛṣṭvā varṣa budbuda saṃnibham nāśa prāyam sukhāt hīnam nāśa uttaram abhāva gam sāṃkhyāḥ rājan mahā prājñāḥ tyaktvā deham prajā kṛtam jñāna jñeyena sāṃkhyena vyāpinā mahatā nṛpa rājasān aśubhān gandhān tāmasān ca tathāvidhān puṇyān ca sāttvikān gandhān sparśa jān deha saṃśritān chittvā āśu jñāna śastreṇa tapas daṇḍena bhārata vyādhi mṛtyu mahā grāham mahā bhaya mahā uragam tamaḥ kūrmam rajaḥ mīnam prajñayā saṃtaranti uta sneha paṅkam jarā durgam sparśa dvīpam ariṃdama karma agādham satya tīram sthita vratam idam nṛpa hiṃsā śīghra mahā vegam nānā rasa mahā ākaram nānā prīti mahā ratnam duḥkha jvara samīraṇam śoka tṛṣṇā mahā āvartam tīkṣṇa vyādhi mahā gajam asthi saṃghāta saṃghāṭam śleṣma phenam ariṃdama dāna muktā ākaram bhīmam śoṇita hrada vidrumam hasita utkruṣṭa nirghoṣam nānā jñāna su dustaram rodana aśru mala kṣāram saṅga tyāga parāyaṇam ahiṃsā satya maryādam prāṇatyāga mahā ūrmiṇam mokṣa duṣprāpa viṣayam vaḍavāmukha sāgaram tatas tān sukṛtīn sāṃkhyān sūryaḥ vahati raśmibhiḥ tatra tān pravahaḥ vāyuḥ pratigṛhṇāti bhārata vīta rāgān yatīn siddhān vīrya yuktān tapodhanān sūkṣmaḥ śītaḥ sugandhī ca sukha sparśaḥ ca bhārata saptānām marutām śreṣṭhaḥ lokān gacchati yaḥ śubhān sattvam vahati śuddha ātman param nārāyaṇam prabhum prabhuḥ vahati śuddha ātmā paramātmānam ātmanā paramātmānam āsādya tad bhūta āyatana amalāḥ paramā sā gatiḥ pārtha nirdvaṃdvānām mahātmanām satya ārjava ratānām vai sarva bhūta dayāvatām uvāca tvat ṛte mānavam na anyam praṣṭum arhāmi kaurava mokṣa doṣaḥ mahān eṣa prāpya siddhim gatān ṛṣīn pravṛtti lakṣaṇam dharmam paśyāmi paramam nṛpa uvāca yathānyāyam tvayā tāta praśnaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ su saṃkaṭaḥ atra api tattvam parama śṛṇu samyak mayā īritam buddhiḥ ca paramā yatra kāpilānām mahātmanām kāraṇāni ātmanaḥ tāni sūkṣmaḥ paśyati taiḥ tu saḥ ātmanā viprahīṇāni kāṣṭha kuḍya samāni tu vinaśyanti na saṃdehaḥ phenāḥ iva mahā arṇave sūkṣmaḥ carati sarvatra nabhasi iva samīraṇaḥ sa paśyati yathānyāyam sparśān spṛśati ca abhibho indriyāṇi iha sarvāṇi sve sve sthāne yathāvidhi anīśa tvāt pralīyante sarpāḥ hata viṣāḥ iva indriyāṇām tu sarveṣām sva sthāneṣu eva sarvaśas ākramya gatīḥ sūkṣmāḥ carati ātmā na saṃśayaḥ sattvasya ca guṇān kṛtsnān rajasaḥ ca guṇān punar guṇān ca tamasaḥ sarvān guṇān buddheḥ ca bhārata guṇān ca manasaḥ tadvat nabhasaḥ ca guṇān tathā guṇān vāyoḥ ca dharma ātman tejasaḥ ca guṇān punar apām guṇān tathā pārtha pārthivān ca guṇān api sarva ātmanā guṇaiḥ vyāpya kṣetrajñaḥ sa yudhiṣṭhira ātmā ca yāti kṣetrajñam karmaṇī ca śubha aśubhe śiṣyāḥ iva mahātmānam indriyāṇi ca tam vibho param nārāyaṇa ātmānam nirdvaṃdvam prakṛtyāḥ param vimuktaḥ puṇya pāpebhyaḥ praviṣṭaḥ tam anāmayam śiṣṭam tu atra manaḥ tāta indriyāṇi ca bhārata āgacchanti yathākālam guroḥ saṃdeśa kāriṇaḥ śakyam ca alpena kālena śāntim prāptum guṇa arthinā evam yuktena kaunteya yukta jñānena mokṣiṇā sāṃkhyāḥ rājan mahā prājñāḥ gacchanti paramām gatim jñānena anena kaunteya tulyam jñānam na vidyate atra te saṃśayaḥ mā bhūt jñānam sāṃkhyam param matam an ādi madhya nidhanam nirdvaṃdvam kartṛ śāśvatam kūṭastham ca eva nityam ca yat vadanti śama ātmakāḥ yat ca śaṃsanti śāstreṣu vadanti parama ṛṣayaḥ sarve viprāḥ ca devāḥ ca tathā āgama vidaḥ janāḥ samyak yuktāḥ tathā yogāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ ca amita darśanāḥ amūrteḥ tasya kaunteya sāṃkhyam mūrtiḥ iti śrutiḥ abhijñānāni tasya āhuḥ matam hi bharata ṛṣabha dvividhāni iha bhūtāni pṛthivyām pṛthivīpate jaṅgama agama saṃjñāni jaṅgamam tu viśiṣyate yat ca api dṛṣṭam vividham purāṇam sāṃkhya āgatam tat nikhilam narendra yat ca itihāseṣu mahatsu dṛṣṭam yat ca artha śāstre nṛpa śiṣṭa juṣ jñānam ca loke yat iha asti kim cit sāṃkhya āgatam tat ca mahat mahātman śamaḥ ca dṛṣṭaḥ paramam balam ca jñānam ca sūkṣmam ca yathāvat vaktam tapāṃsi sūkṣmāṇi sukhāni ca eva sāṃkhye yathāvat vihitāni rājan tad ca anusaṃcāray tatas kṛtārtha pat vipra yam bhūyas hitvā ca deham praviśanti mokṣam divaukasaḥ divam iva pārtha sāṃkhyāḥ tatas adhikam te abhiratāḥ mahārhe sāṃkhye dvijāḥ pārthiva śiṣṭa juṣṭe teṣām na tiryak gamanam hi dṛṣṭam na avāk gatiḥ pāpa kṛtām nivāsaḥ na ca abudhānām api te dvijātayaḥ ye jñānam etat nṛpate anuraktāḥ sāṃkyam viśālam paramam purāṇam mahā arṇavam vimalam udāra kāntam kṛtsnam ca sāṃkhyam nṛpate mahātmā nārāyaṇaḥ dhārayate aprameyam etat mayā uktam naradeva tattvam nārāyaṇaḥ viśvam idam purāṇam saṃhṛtya sarvam nija deha saṃstham kṛtvā apsu śete jagat antarātmā uvāca ṛṣibhiḥ ca mahābhāgaiḥ yatibhiḥ ca mahātmabhiḥ śeṣam alpam dinānām te dakṣiṇāyana bhāskare kuru vaṃśa pradīpaḥ tvam jñāna dravyeṇa dīpyase na tṛpyāmi iha rāja indra śṛṇvan amṛtam īdṛśam uvāca vasiṣṭhasya ca saṃvādam karālajanakasya ca vasiṣṭham śreṣṭham āsīnam ṛṣīṇām bhāskara dyutim papraccha janakaḥ rājā jñānam naiḥśreyasam param maitrāvaruṇim āsīnam abhivādya kṛtāñjaliḥ su akṣaram praśritam vākyam madhuram ca api anulbaṇam papraccha ṛṣi varam rājā karālajanakaḥ purā yasmāt na punarāvṛttim āpnuvanti manīṣiṇaḥ yat ca akṣaram iti proktam śivam kṣemyam anāmayam uvāca śrūyatām pṛthivīpāla kṣarati idam yathā jagat yat na kṣarati pūrveṇa yāvat kālena ca api atha yugam dvādaśa sāhasram kalpam viddhi caturguṇam daśa kalpa śata āvṛttam tat ahar brāhmam ucyate sṛj ananta karman mahantam bhūtam agraja mūrtimantam amūrta ātmā viśvam śambhuḥ svayambhoḥ aṇimā laghimā prāptiḥ īśānam jyotiḥ avyayam sarvatas pāṇi pāda antam sarvatas akṣi śiraḥ mukham sāṃkhye ca paṭhyate śāstre nāmabhiḥ bahudhā ātmakaḥ vicitra rūpaḥ viśvātmā eka akṣaraḥ iti smṛtaḥ vṛtam na eka ātmakam yena kṛtsnam trailokyam ātmanā tathā eva bahu rūpa tvāt viśvarūpaḥ iti smṛtaḥ eṣa vai vikriyā āpannaḥ sṛjati ātmānam ātmanā ahaṃkāram mahā tejāḥ prajāpatim ahaṃkṛtam mahantam ca api ahaṃkāram avidyā sargam eva ca vidyā avidyā iti vikhyāte śruti śāstra artha cintakaiḥ bhūta sargam ahaṃkārāt tṛtīyam viddhi pārthiva ahaṃkāreṣu bhūteṣu caturtham viddhi vaikṛtam vāyuḥ jyotiḥ atha ākāśam apaḥ atha pṛthivī tathā śrotram tvac cakṣuṣī jihvā ghrāṇam eva ca pañcamam buddhīndriyāṇi ca etāni tathā karmendriyāṇi ca saṃbhūtāni iha yugapad manasā saha pārthiva eṣā tattva caturviṃśā sarva ākṛtiṣu vartate yām jñātvā na abhiśocanti brāhmaṇāḥ tattva darśiṇaḥ sa cāraṇa piśāce vai sa deva ṛṣi niśācare sa daṃśa kīṭa maśake sa pūti kṛmi mūṣake śuni śvapāke vaiṇeye sa caṇḍāle sa pulkase hasti aśva khara śārdūle sa vṛkṣe gavi ca eva ha sa hasti aśve sa śārdūle sa ṛkṣa gavi ca eva hi jale bhuvi tathā ākāśe na anyatra iti viniścayaḥ ahani ahani bhūtātmā tatas kṣaraḥ iti smṛtaḥ etat akṣaram iti uktam kṣarati idam yathā jagat kathitam te mahā rāja yasmāt na āvartate punar pañcaviṃśatimaḥ viṣṇuḥ nistattvaḥ tattva saṃjñakaḥ tattva saṃśrayaṇāt etat tattvam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ caturviṃśatimaḥ vyaktaḥ hi amūrtaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ saḥ eva hṛdi sarvāsu mūrtiṣu ātiṣṭhate ātmavān gocare vartate nityam nirguṇaḥ guṇa saṃjñakaḥ tamasā tāmasān bhāvān vividhān pratipadyate rajasā rājasān ca eva sāttvikān sattva saṃśrayāt śukla lohita kṛṣṇāni rūpāṇi etāni trīṇi tu sarvāṇi etāni rūpāṇi jānīhi prākṛtāni vai tāmasāḥ nirayam yānti rājasāḥ mānuṣān tathā puṇya pāpena mānuṣyam puṇyena ekena devatāḥ evam avyakta viṣayam kṣaram āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ pañcaviṃśatimaḥ yaḥ ayam jñānāt eva pravartate uvāca upapadyati saṃyogāt guṇaiḥ saha guṇa kṣayāt mānuṣa tvāt divam yāti divaḥ mānuṣyam eva ca kośakāraḥ yathā ātmānam kīṭaḥ samanurundhati sūtra tantu guṇaiḥ nityam tathā ayam aguṇaḥ guṇaiḥ śīrṣa roge akṣi roge ca danta śūle galagrahe jalodare arśasām roge jvara gaṇḍa viṣūcike yāni ca anyāni dvaṃdvāni prākṛtāni śarīriṣu eka vāsāḥ ca durvāsāḥ śāyī nityam adhas tathā maṇḍūkaśāyī ca tathā vīrāsana gataḥ tathā cīra dhāraṇam ākāśe śayanam sthānam eva ca iṣṭakā prastare ca eva kaṇṭaka prastare tathā bhasma prastara śāyī ca bhūmi śayyā anulepanaḥ vīrasthāna ambu paṅke ca śayanam phalakeṣu ca muñja mekhala nagna tvam kṣauma kṛṣṇa ajināni ca śāṇī vāla parīdhānaḥ vyāghra carma paricchadaḥ siṃha carma parīdhānaḥ paṭṭa vāsāḥ tathā eva ca phalakam paridhānaḥ ca tathā ca eva cīra vāsāḥ tathā eva ca caturtha aṣṭama kālaḥ ca ṣaṣṭhakālikaḥ eva ca ṣaṣ rātra bhojanaḥ ca eva tathā eva aṣṭa aha bhojanaḥ sapta rātra daśa āhāraḥ dvādaśa āhāraḥ eva ca māsa upavāsī mūla āśī phala āhāraḥ tathā eva ca go mūtra bhojanaḥ ca eva śāka puṣpa ādaḥ eva ca vartayan śīrṇa parṇaiḥ ca prakīrṇa phala bhojanaḥ vividhāni ca kṛcchrāṇi sevate sukha kāṅkṣayā cāndrāyaṇāni vidhivat liṅgāni vividhāni ca cāturāśramya panthānam āśrayati āśramān api upāsīnaḥ ca pāṣaṇḍān guhāḥ śailān tathā eva ca viviktāḥ ca śilā chāyāḥ tathā prasravaṇāni ca deva sthānāni puṇyāni viviktāni sarāṃsi ca viviktāḥ ca api śailānām guhāḥ gṛha nibha upamāḥ niyamān su vicitrān ca vividhāni tapāṃsi ca yajñān ca vividha ākārān vidhīn ca vividhān tathā vaṇikpatham dvijakṣatram vaiśya śūdram tathā eva ca dānam ca vividha ākāram dīna andha kṛpaṇeṣu api prakṛtyā ātmānam eva ātmā evam pravibhajati uta svadhākāra vaṣaṭkārau svāhākāra namaskriyāḥ yājana adhyāpanam dānam tathā eva āhuḥ pratigraham śubha aśubha mayam sarvam etat āhuḥ kriyā patham divasa ante guṇān etān abhyetya ekaḥ avatiṣṭhati evam eṣaḥ asakṛt sarvam krīḍā artham abhimanyate ātma rūpa guṇān etān vividhān hṛdaya priyān yāvadantam ca me saukhyam jātyām jātyām bhaviṣyati nirayāt ca api mānuṣyam kālena eṣyāmi aham punar manuṣya tvāt ca deva tvam deva tvāt pauruṣam punar evam paryāyaśaḥ duḥkham punar eṣyāmi aham sukham yaḥ evam vetti vai nityam nirātma ātma guṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ sarga koṭi sahasrāṇi maraṇa antāsu mūrtiṣu saḥ eva phalam aśnāti triṣu lokeṣu mūrtimān prakṛtiḥ ca tat aśnāti triṣu lokeṣu kāmagā trīṇi sthānāni ca etāni jānīyāt prākṛtāni ha aliṅgām prakṛtim tu āhuḥ liṅgaiḥ anumimīmahe sa liṅga antaram āsādya prākṛtam liṅgam avraṇam vraṇa dvārāṇi adhiṣṭhāya karmāṇi ātmani manyate śrotra ādīni tu sarvāṇi pañca karmendriyāṇi ca vāc ādīni pravartante guṇeṣu eva guṇaiḥ saha aliṅgaḥ liṅgam ātmānam akālaḥ kālam ātmanaḥ amṛtyuḥ mṛtyum ātmānam acaraḥ caram ātmanaḥ akṣetraḥ kṣetram ātmānam asargaḥ sargam ātmanaḥ akartā kartṛ ca ātmānam abījaḥ bījam ātmanaḥ uvāca dhāmnā dhāma sahasrāṇi maraṇa antāni gacchati candramāḥ iva kośānām punar tatra sahasraśas kalāḥ pañcadaśā yoniḥ tat dhāma iti paṭhyate nityam etat vijānīhi somaḥ ṣoḍaśamī kalā kalāyām jan ajasram punar punar abuddhimat ṣoḍaśī tu kalā sūkṣmā sa somaḥ upadhāryatām evam tām kṣapayitvā hi jāyate nṛpa sattama sā hi asya prakṛtiḥ dṛṣṭā tad kṣayāt mokṣaḥ ucyate tat evam ṣoḍaśa kalam deham avyakta saṃjñakam pañcaviṃśaḥ tathā eva ātmā tasya eva pratibodhanāt vimalasya viśuddhasya śuddha anila niṣevaṇāt aśuddhaḥ eva śuddha ātmā tādṛś bhavati pārthiva prakṛteḥ triguṇāyāḥ tu sevanāt prākṛtaḥ bhavet akṣara kṣarayoḥ eṣa dvayoḥ saṃbandhaḥ iṣyate ṛte na puruṣeṇa iha strī garbham dhārayati uta ṛte striyam na puruṣaḥ rūpam nirvartayet tathā anyonyasya abhisaṃbandhāt anyonya guṇa saṃśrayāt ye guṇāḥ puruṣasya iha ye ca mātṛ guṇāḥ tathā asthi snāyu ca majjā ca jānīmaḥ pitṛtaḥ dvija tvac māṃsam śoṇitam ca eva mātṛ jāni api śuśruma evam etat dvijaśreṣṭha veda śāstreṣu paṭhyate pramāṇam yat ca veda uktam śāstra uktam yat ca paṭhyate veda śāstra pramāṇam ca pramāṇam tat sanātanam mokṣa kāmāḥ vayam ca api kāṅkṣāmaḥ yat anāmayam uvāca evam etat yathā ca etat na gṛhṇāti tathā bhavān granthasya artham ca pṛṣṭaḥ san tādṛśaḥ vaktum arhati sa katham manda vijñānaḥ grantham vakṣyati nirṇayāt nirṇayam ca api chidra ātmā na tam vakṣyati tattvataḥ sa upahāsa ātma tām eti yasmāt ca eva ātmavān api tasmāt tvam śṛṇu rāja indra yathā etat anudṛśyate yāthātathyena sāṃkhyeṣu yogeṣu ca mahātmasu ekam sāṃkhyam ca yogam ca yaḥ paśyati sa buddhimān tvac māṃsam rudhiram medaḥ pittam majja asthi snāyu ca dehāt deham avāpnoti bījāt bījam tathā eva ca sūkṣma deha gatāḥ mātrāḥ bīja āpyāyita vṛddhikāḥ katham guṇāḥ bhaviṣyanti nirguṇa tvāt mahātmanaḥ guṇāḥ guṇeṣu jan tatra eva niviśanti ca evam guṇāḥ prakṛtitaḥ jāyante ca na santi ca tvac māṃsam rudhiram medaḥ pittam majja asthi snāyu ca aṣṭau tāni atha śukreṇa jānīhi prākṛtāni vai trailiṅgyam prākṛtam smṛtam na eva pumān pumān ca eva sa liṅgī iti abhidhīyate pañcaviṃśatimaḥ tāta liṅgeṣu aniyata ātmakaḥ an ādi nidhanaḥ anantaḥ sarva darśī nirāmayaḥ kevalam tu abhimāni tvāt guṇeṣu aguṇaḥ ucyate guṇāḥ guṇavataḥ santi nirguṇasya kutas guṇāḥ tasmāt evam vijānanti ye janāḥ guṇa darśiṇaḥ yadā tu eṣa guṇān sarvān prākṛtān abhimanyate tadā sa guṇavān eva parameṇa anupaśyati yat tat buddheḥ param prāhuḥ sāṃkhyāḥ yogāḥ ca sarvaśas aprabuddham atha avyaktam sa guṇam prāhuḥ īśvaram nirguṇam ca īśvaram nityam adhiṣṭhātāram eva ca prakṛteḥ ca guṇānām ca pañcaviṃśatikam budhāḥ sāṃkhya yoge ca kuśalāḥ budhyante parama eṣiṇaḥ budhyamāna aprabuddhābhyām pṛthak pṛthak ariṃdama ekatvam akṣaram prāhuḥ nānātvam kṣaram ucyate pañcaviṃśati niṣṭhaḥ ayam yadā samyak pravṛt ekatvam darśanam ca asya nānātvam ca api adarśanam pañcaviṃśati sargam tu tattvam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ sthūla buddhyā na paśyāmi tattvam etat na saṃśayaḥ akṣara kṣarayoḥ uktam tvayā yat api kāraṇam sāṃkhyam yogam ca kārtsnyena pṛthak ca eva apṛthak ca ha uvāca yoga kṛtyam mahā rāja pṛthak eva śṛṇuṣva mama yoga kṛtyam tu yogānām dhyānam eva param balam ekāgra tā ca manasaḥ prāṇāyāmaḥ tathā eva ca prāṇāyāmaḥ tu sa guṇaḥ nirguṇaḥ manasaḥ tathā tri kālam na abhiyuñjīta śeṣam yuñjīta tatparaḥ daśa dvādaśabhiḥ vā api caturviṃśāt param tatas tam codanābhiḥ matimān ātmānam codayet atha tiṣṭhantam ajaram tam tu yat tat uktam manīṣibhiḥ taiḥ ca ātmā satatam jñeyaḥ iti evam anuśuśruma manaḥ buddhyā sthiram kṛtvā pāṣāṇaḥ iva niścalaḥ sthāṇu vat ca api akampaḥ syāt giri vat ca api niścalaḥ budhāḥ vidhi vidhāna jñāḥ tadā yuktam pracakṣate na śṛṇoti na ca āghrāti na rasyati na paśyati na ca sparśam vijānāti na saṃkalpayate manaḥ tadā prakṛtim āpannam yuktam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ nivāte ca yathā dīpyan dīpaḥ tadvat sa dṛśyate niriṅgaḥ ca acalaḥ ca ūrdhvam na tiryaggatim āpnuyāt vaidyutaḥ agniḥ iva ākāśe dṛśyate ātmā tathā ātmani yam paśyanti mahātmānaḥ dhṛtimantaḥ manīṣiṇaḥ brāhmaṇāḥ hi ayonim amṛta ātmakam tat antar sarva bhūteṣu dhruvam tiṣṭhat na dṛśyate mahataḥ tamasaḥ tāta pāre tiṣṭhan atāmasaḥ evam ātmānam ajaram param sāṃkhya jñānam pravakṣyāmi parisaṃkhyā nidarśanam avyaktam āhuḥ prakṛtim parām prakṛti vādinaḥ ahaṃkāraḥ tu mahataḥ tṛtīyam iti naḥ śrutam pañca bhūtāni ahaṃkārāt āhuḥ sāṃkhya anudarśiṇaḥ etāḥ prakṛtayaḥ tu aṣṭau vikārāḥ ca api ṣoḍaśa pañca ca eva viśeṣāḥ vai tathā pañca indriyāṇi ca etāvat eva tattvānām sāṃkhyam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ sāṃkhye vidhi vidhāna jñāḥ nityam sāṃkhya pathe ratāḥ līyante pratilomāni sṛjyante ca antarātmanā guṇāḥ guṇeṣu satatam sāgarasya ūrmayaḥ yathā bahudhā ātmā prakurvīta prakṛtim prasava ātmakām tat ca kṣetram mahān ātmā pañcaviṃśaḥ adhitiṣṭhati adhiṣṭhānāt adhiṣṭhātā kṣetrāṇām iti naḥ śrutam kṣetram jānāti ca avyaktam kṣetrajñaḥ iti ca ucyate kṣetram avyaktam iti uktam jñātā vai pañcaviṃśakaḥ jñānam avyaktam iti uktam jñeyaḥ vai pañcaviṃśakaḥ anīśvaram atattvam ca tattvam tat pañcaviṃśakam sāṃkhya darśanam etāvat parisaṃkhyāna darśanam sāṃkhyāḥ saha prakṛtyā tu nistattvaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ pañcaviṃśaḥ aprabuddha ātmā budhyamānaḥ iti smṛtaḥ evam etat vijānantaḥ sāmyatām pratiyānti uta samyak nidarśanam nāma pratyakṣam prakṛteḥ tathā na tu evam vartamāna āvṛttiḥ vid punar uvāca sāṃkhya darśanam etāvat uktam te nṛpa sattama vidyā avidye tu idānīm me tvam nibodha anupūrvaśas yathoktam ṛṣibhiḥ tāta sāṃkhyasya asya nidarśanam karmendriyāṇām sarveṣām vidyā buddhīndriyam smṛtam buddhīndriyāṇām ca tathā viśeṣāḥ iti naḥ śrutam viśeṣāṇām manaḥ teṣām vidyām āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ manasaḥ pañcabhūtāni vidyāḥ iti abhicakṣate ahaṃkāraḥ tu bhūtānām pañcānām na atra saṃśayaḥ buddheḥ prakṛtiḥ avyaktam tattvānām parama īśvaram vidyā jñeyā nara śreṣṭha vidhiḥ ca paramaḥ smṛtaḥ avyaktasya param prāhuḥ vidyām vai pañcaviṃśakam jñānam avyaktam iti uktam jñeyam vai pañcaviṃśakam tathā eva jñānam avyaktam vijñātā pañcaviṃśakaḥ ubhau etau kṣarau uktau ubhau etau ca nakṣarau kāraṇam tu pravakṣyāmi yathā khyātau tu tattvataḥ tattva saṃjñau ubhau etau procyete jñāna cintakaiḥ tat etat guṇa sargāya vikurvāṇam punar punar guṇānām mahat ādīnām utpadyati parasparam adhiṣṭhānāt kṣetram āhuḥ etat tat pañcaviṃśakam yadā tu guṇa jālam tat avyakta ātmani saṃkṣipet tadā saha guṇaiḥ taiḥ tu pañcaviṃśaḥ vilīyate guṇāḥ guṇeṣu līyante tadā ekā prakṛtiḥ bhavet kṣetrajñaḥ api yadā tāta tad kṣetre saṃpralīyate tadā akṣara tvam prakṛtiḥ gacchate guṇa saṃjñitā evam eva ca kṣetrajñaḥ kṣetra jñāna parikṣaye prakṛtyāḥ nirguṇaḥ tu eṣaḥ iti evam anuśuśruma kṣaraḥ bhavati eṣa yadā tadā guṇavatīm atha prakṛtim tu abhijānāti nirguṇa tvam tathā ātmanaḥ prakṛtyā ca eva rāja indra namiśraḥ anyaḥ ca dṛśyate yadā tu guṇa jālam tat prākṛtam vijugupsate paśyate ca aparam paśyam tadā paśyan na saṃjvaret kim mayā kṛtam etāvat yaḥ aham kālam imam janam matsyaḥ jālam hi avijñānāt anuvartitavān tathā matsyaḥ anya tvam yathā ajñānāt udakāt na abhimanyate ātmānam tadvat ajñānāt anya tvam ca eva vedmi aham sāmyam eka tvam āyātaḥ yādṛśaḥ tādṛśaḥ tu aham yaḥ aham ajñāna saṃmohāt ajñayā saṃpravṛttavān sa saṅgayā aham niḥsaṅgaḥ sthitaḥ kālam imam tu aham anayā aham vaśībhūtaḥ kālam etam na buddhavān ucca madhyama nīcānām tām aham katham āvase gacchāmi a buddha bhāva tvāt eṣa idānīm sthiraḥ bhave sahavāsam na yāsyāmi kālam etat hi vañcanāt tatas asmi bahu rūpāsu sthitaḥ mūrtiṣu a mūrtimān amūrtaḥ ca api mūrta ātmā mamatvena pradharṣitaḥ vartamāna naṣṭa saṃjñena cetas na mama atra anayā kāryam ahaṃkāra kṛtātmayā ātmānam bahudhā kṛtvā yā iyam bhūyas yunakti mām idānīm eṣa buddhaḥ asmi nirmamaḥ nirahaṃkṛtaḥ apetya aham imām hitvā saṃśrayiṣye nirāmayam anena sāmyam yāsyāmi na anayā aham acetasā evam parama saṃbodhāt pañcaviṃśaḥ anubuddhavān avyaktam vyakta dharmāṇam sa guṇam nirguṇam tathā nirguṇam prathamam dṛṣṭvā tādṛś bhavati maithila mayā iha jñāna saṃpannam yathāśruti nidarśanāt niḥsaṃdigdham ca sūkṣmam ca vibuddham vimalam tathā sāṃkhya yogau mayā proktau śāstra dvaya nidarśanāt yat eva śāstram sāṃkhya uktam yoga darśanam eva tat prabodhana karam jñānam sāṃkhyānām avanīpate vispaṣṭam procyate tatra śiṣyāṇām hita kāmyayā bṛhat ca eva hi tat śāstram iti āhuḥ kuśalāḥ janāḥ asmin ca śāstre yogānām punar dadhi punar śaraḥ pañcaviṃśāt param tattvam na paśyati narādhipa sāṃkhyānām tu param tatra yathāvat anuvarṇitam uvāca aprabuddham atha avyaktam imam guṇa vidhim śṛṇu guṇān dhārayate hi eṣā sṛjati ākṣipate tathā ajasram tu iha krīḍā artham vikurvantī narādhipa ātmānam bahudhā kṛtvā tāni eva ca vicakṣate etat evam vikurvāṇām budhyamānaḥ na budhyate budhyamānaḥ bhavati eṣa saṅga ātmakaḥ iti śrutiḥ pañcaviṃśam mahātmānam na ca asau api budhyate ṣaḍviṃśam vimalam buddham aprameyam sanātanam satatam pañcaviṃśam ca caturviṃśam ca budhyate dṛśya adṛśye hi anugatam ubhau eva mahā dyutī kevalam pañcaviṃśam ca caturviṃśam na paśyati budhyate ca parām buddhim viśuddhām amalām yadā ṣaḍviṃśaḥ rāja śārdūla tadā buddha tvam āvrajet nirguṇaḥ prakṛtim veda guṇa yuktām acetanām pañcaviṃśati tattvāni pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ eṣa muñcati tattvam hi kṣipram buddhasya lakṣaṇam ṣaḍviṃśaḥ aham iti prājñaḥ gṛhyamāṇaḥ ajara amaraḥ etat nānātvam iti uktam sāṃkhya śruti nidarśanāt saṅga dharmā bhavati eṣa niḥsaṅga ātmā narādhipa niḥsaṅga ātmānam āsādya ṣaḍviṃśakam ajam viduḥ caturviṃśam agādham ca ṣaḍviṃśasya prabodhanāt nānātva ekatvam etāvat draṣṭavyam śāstra dṛṣṭibhiḥ pañcaviṃśatikasya asya yaḥ ayam deheṣu vartate vimokṣiṇā vimokṣaḥ ca sametya iha tathā bhavet śuci karmā śuciḥ ca eva bhavati amita dīptimān na paṇḍita jñāna para upatāpine deyam tvayā idam vinibodha yādṛśe śraddhā anvitāya atha guṇa anvitāya para apavādāt viratāya nityam vivikta śīlāya vidhi priyāya vivāda hīnāya bahu śrutāya na śreyasā yokṣyati tādṛśe kṛtam dharma pravaktāram apātra dānāt pṛthvīm imām yadi api ratna pūrṇām dadyāt nadeyam tu idam avratāya agādha janma amaraṇam ca rājan nirāmayam vīta bhayam śivam ca samīkṣya moham tyaja ca adya sarvam jñānasya tattva artham idam viditvā tathā avāptam brahmaṇaḥ me narendra mahat jñānam mokṣa vidām purāṇam uvāca pañcaviṃśaḥ mahā rāja parama ṛṣi nidarśanāt punarāvṛttim āpnoti param jñānam avāpya ca etat niḥśreyasa karam jñānānām te param mayā hiraṇyagarbhāt ṛṣiṇā vasiṣṭhena mahātmanā vasiṣṭhāt ṛṣi śārdūlāt nāradaḥ avāptavān idam avijñānāt ca mūḍha ātmā punar punar upadravan pretya jāti sahasrāṇi maraṇa antāni upāśnute deva lokam tathā tiryak mānuṣyam api ca aśnute yadi śudhyati kālena tasmāt ajñāna sāgarāt uttīrṇaḥ asmāt agādhāt sa param āpnoti śobhanam yasmāt agādhāt avyaktāt uttīrṇaḥ tvam sanātanāt uvāca mṛgayām vicaran kaḥ cit vijane janaka ātmajaḥ vane dadarśa vipra indram ṛṣim vaṃśa dharam bhṛgoḥ tam āsīnam upāsīnaḥ praṇamya śirasā munim satkṛtya paripṛṣṭaḥ san su mahātmā mahā tapāḥ dharmaḥ satām hitaḥ puṃsām dharmaḥ ca eva āśrayaḥ satām dharmāt lokāḥ trayaḥ tāta pravṛttāḥ sa carācarāḥ svādu kāmuka kāmānām vaitṛṣṇyam kim na gacchasi nivṛttau vā pravṛttau vā saṃpradhārya guṇa aguṇān nityam ca bahu dātavyam sādhubhyaḥ ca anasūyatā prārthitam vrata śaucābhyām satkṛtam deśa kālayoḥ anṛśaṃsaḥ śuciḥ dāntaḥ satya vāc ārjave sthitaḥ satkṛtā ca ekapatnī ca jātyā yoniḥ iha iṣyate ṛk yajuḥ sāma gaḥ vidvān ṣaṭkarmā pātram ucyate pātra karma viśeṣeṇa deśa kālau avekṣya ca līlayā alpam yathā gātrāt pramṛjyāt rajasaḥ pumān mānasam sarva bhūteṣu vartate vai śubha aśubhe aśubhebhyaḥ samākṣipya śubheṣu eva avatārayet mānasam vṛddha sevābhiḥ duḥkham śārīram auṣadhaiḥ vācikam mantra jāpyena vidvāḥ yatnāt vināśayet sarvam sarveṇa sarvatra kriyamāṇam ca pūjaya apraśānta praśāmya tvam aprājña prājña vat cara tejasā śakyate prāptum upāya sahacāriṇā iha ca pretya ca śreyaḥ tasya mūlam dhṛtiḥ parā rājarṣiḥ adhṛtiḥ svargāt patitaḥ hi mahābhiṣaḥ yayātiḥ kṣīṇa puṇyaḥ ca dhṛtyā lokān avāptavān tapasvinām dharmavatām viduṣām ca upasevanāt sa tu vipraḥ tathā pṛṣṭaḥ rājñā jānakinā vane uvāca uvāca yājñavalkyam ṛṣi śreṣṭham daivarātiḥ mahā yaśāḥ papraccha janakaḥ rājā praśnam praśna vidām varaḥ kati indriyāṇi viprarṣe kati prakṛtayaḥ smṛtāḥ prabhavam ca apyayam ca eva kāla saṃkhyām tathā eva ca ajñānāt paripṛcchāmi tvam hi jñāna mayaḥ nidhiḥ uvāca śrūyatām avanīpāla yat etat anupṛcchasi yogānām paramam jñānam sāṃkhyānām ca viśeṣataḥ na tava avidita kim cit mām tu jijñāsate bhavān pṛṣṭena ca api vaktavyam eṣa dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ aṣṭau prakṛtayaḥ proktāḥ vikārāḥ ca api ṣoḍaśa avyaktam ca mahant ca eva tathā ahaṃkāraḥ eva ca pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśam apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamam etāḥ prakṛtayaḥ tu aṣṭau vikārān api me śṛṇu śrotram tvac ca eva cakṣuḥ ca jihvā ghrāṇam ca pañcamam ete viśeṣāḥ rāja indra mahābhūteṣu pañcasu buddhīndriyāṇi atha etāni sa viśeṣāṇi maithila manaḥ ṣoḍaśakam prāhuḥ adhyātma gati cintakāḥ tvam ca eva anye ca vidvāṃsaḥ tattva buddhi viśāradāḥ prathamam sargam iti etat āhuḥ prādhānikam budhāḥ ahaṃkārāt ca saṃbhūtam manaḥ bhūta guṇa ātmakam tṛtīyaḥ sargaḥ iti eṣaḥ āhaṃkārikaḥ ucyate manasaḥ tu samudbhūtāḥ mahā bhūtāḥ narādhipa samudbhūtāni manasaḥ mahābhūtāni pārthiva pañcamam sargam iti āhuḥ bhautikam bhūta cintakāḥ śrotram tvac ca eva cakṣuḥ ca jihvā ghrāṇam ca pañcamam sargam tu ṣaṣṭham iti āhuḥ bahu cintā ātmakam smṛtam aṣṭamam sargam iti āhuḥ etat ārjavakam budhāḥ navamam sargam iti āhuḥ etat ārjavakam budhāḥ caturviṃśatiḥ uktāni yathāśruti nidarśanāt mahātmabhiḥ anuproktām kāla saṃkhyām nibodha mama uvāca avyaktasya nara śreṣṭha kāla saṃkhyām nibodha me sṛjati oṣadhim eva agre jīvanam sarva dehinām tatas brahmāṇam asṛjat hairaṇya aṇḍa samudbhavam sā mūrtiḥ sarva bhūtānām iti evam anuśuśruma saṃvatsaram uṣitvā aṇḍe niṣkramya ca mahā muniḥ saṃdadhe ardham mahīm kṛtsnām divam ardham prajāpatiḥ dyāvāpṛthivyoḥ iti eṣa rājan vedeṣu paṭhyate etasya api ca saṃkhyānam veda vedāṅga pāragaiḥ rātrim etāvatīm ca asya prāhuḥ adhyātma cintakāḥ sṛjati ahaṃkāram ṛṣiḥ bhūtam divya ātmakam tathā caturaḥ ca aparān putrān dehāt pūrvam mahān ṛṣiḥ devāḥ pitṝṇām ca sutāḥ devaiḥ lokāḥ samāvṛtāḥ cara acarāḥ nara śreṣṭhaḥ iti evam anuśuśruma parameṣṭhī tu ahaṃkāraḥ asṛjat bhūtāni pañcadhā pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśam apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamam etasya api niśām āhuḥ tṛtīyam iha kurvataḥ śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca rūpam ca rasaḥ gandhaḥ ca pañcamaḥ ete viśeṣāḥ rāja indra mahābhūteṣu pañcasu yaiḥ āviṣṭāni bhūtāni ahani ahani pārthiva te vadhyamānāḥ anyonyam guṇaiḥ hāribhiḥ avyayāḥ trīṇi kalpa sahasrāṇi eteṣām ahar ucyate cakṣuḥ paśyati rūpāṇi manasā tu na cakṣuṣā tathā indriyāṇi sarvāṇi paśyanti iti abhicakṣate evam manaḥ pradhānāni indriyāṇi vibhāvayet indriyāṇām hi sarveṣām īśvaram manaḥ ucyate etat viśanti bhūtāni sarvāṇi iha mahā yaśāḥ uvāca tattvānām sarga saṃkhyā ca kāla saṃkhyā tathā eva ca mayā proktā ānupūrvyeṇa saṃhāram api me śṛṇu codayām āsa bhagavant avyaktaḥ ahaṃkṛtam naram tatas śata sahasra aṃśuḥ avyaktena abhicoditaḥ kṛtvā dvādaśadhā ātmānam ādityaḥ jvalat agni vat caturvidham prajā jālam nirdahati āśu tejasā etat unmeṣa mātreṇa sthāṇu jaṅgamam kūrma pṛṣṭha samā bhūmiḥ bhavati atha samantataḥ ambhasā balinā kṣipram āpūryata samantataḥ tatas kālāgnim āsādya tat ambhaḥ yāti saṃkṣayam ūṣmāṇam sarva bhūtānām atha añjasā bhakṣayām āsa balavān vāyuḥ aṣṭa ātmakaḥ balī tam apratibalam bhīmam ākāśam grasate manaḥ grasati sarvātmā saḥ ahaṃkāraḥ prajāpatiḥ ahaṃkāram mahant ātmā bhūta bhavya bhaviṣya vid tam api anupama ātmānam viśvam śaṃbhuḥ prajāpatiḥ aṇimā laghimā prāptiḥ īśānaḥ jyotiḥ avyayaḥ sarvatas pāṇi pāda antaḥ sarvatas akṣi śiraḥ mukhaḥ sarvatas śrutimān loke sarvam āvṛtya tiṣṭhati hṛdayam sarva bhūtānām parvaṇaḥ aṅguṣṭha mātrakaḥ anugrasati anantam hi mahātmā viśvam īśvaraḥ bhūta bhavya manuṣyāṇām sraṣṭāram anagham tathā eṣaḥ apyayaḥ te rāja indra yathāvat paribhāṣitaḥ adhyātmam adhibhūtam ca adhidaivam ca śrūyatām uvāca pādau adhyātmam iti āhuḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tattva darśinaḥ pāyuḥ adhyātmam iti āhuḥ yathā tattva artha darśiṇaḥ hastau adhyātmam iti āhuḥ yathā sāṃkhya nidarśanam karṇau adhyātmakam jñeyam prāhuḥ sāṃkhya nidarśanāḥ ghrāṇam adhyātmam iti āhuḥ yathā śruti nidarśanam cittam adhyātmam iti āhuḥ yoginaḥ sūkṣma dṛṣṭayaḥ eṣā te vyaktāt rājan vibhūtiḥ anuvarṇitā krīḍā artham tu mahā rāja śataśas atha sahasraśas yathā dīpa sahasrāṇi dīpān martyāḥ prakurvate sattvam ānandaḥ udrekaḥ prītiḥ prākāśyam eva ca sukham śuddhi tvam ārogyam saṃtoṣaḥ śraddadhāna tā akārpaṇyam asaṃrambhaḥ kṣamā dhṛtiḥ ahiṃsa tā sama tā satyam ānṛṇyam mārdavam hrīḥ acāpalam śaucam ārjavam ācāram a laulyam hṛdi asaṃbhramaḥ iṣṭa aniṣṭa viyogānām kṛtānām avikatthanam dānena ca anugrahaṇam aspṛhā arthe parārtha tā sarva bhūta dayā ca eva sattvasya ete guṇāḥ smṛtāḥ rajaḥ guṇānām saṃghātaḥ rūpam aiśvarya vigrahe ati āśi tvam akāruṇyam sukha duḥkha upasevanam para apavādeṣu ratiḥ vivādānām ca sevanam paritāpaḥ apaharaṇam hrī nāśaḥ anārjavam tathā darpaḥ dveṣaḥ ativādaḥ ca ete proktāḥ rajas guṇāḥ tāmasānām tu saṃghātam pravakṣyāmi upadhāryatām maraṇam ca andhatāmisram tāmisram krodhaḥ ucyate tamasaḥ lakṣaṇāni iha bhakṣāṇām abhirocanam bhojanānām aparyāptiḥ tathā peyeṣu atṛpta tā gandha vāsaḥ vihāreṣu śayaneṣu āsaneṣu ca nṛtya vāditra gītānām ajñānāt śraddadhāna tā dveṣaḥ dharma viśeṣāṇām ete vai tāmasāḥ guṇāḥ iti evam saptadaśakaḥ rāśiḥ avyakta saṃjñakaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ iti eṣa vyakta avyakta mayaḥ gaṇaḥ etaiḥ sarvaiḥ samāyuktāḥ pumān iti abhidhīyate uvāca avyakta rūpaḥ bhagavant śatadhā ca sahasraśas koṭiśas ca karoti eṣa pratyagātmānam ātmanā tāmasasya adhamam sthānam prāhuḥ adhyātma cintakāḥ puṇya pāpena mānuṣyam adharmeṇa api adhogatim dvaṃdvam eṣām trayāṇām tu saṃnipātam ca tattvāt sattvasya rajasaḥ ca eva tamasaḥ ca śṛṇuṣva me puṇya pāpa viyuktānām sthānam āhuḥ manīṣiṇām śāsvatam ca avyayam ca eva akṣaram ca abhayam ca yat jñāninām saṃbhavam śreṣṭham sthānam avraṇam acyutam avyakta stham param yat tat pṛṣṭaḥ te aham narādhipa etena adhiṣṭhitaḥ ca eva sṛjate saṃharati api a grāhyau ṛṣi śārdūla katham ekaḥ hi acetanaḥ cetanāvān tathā ca ekaḥ kṣetrajñaḥ iti bhāṣitaḥ daivatāni ca me brūhi deham yāni āśritāni vai sāṃkhya jñānam ca tattvena pṛthak yogam tathā eva ca viditam sarvam etat te pāṇau āmalakam yathā uvāca na śakyaḥ nirguṇaḥ tāta guṇīkartum viśām pate guṇavān ca api aguṇavān yathātattvam nibodha mama guṇaiḥ hi guṇavān eva nirguṇaḥ ca aguṇaḥ tathā upayuṅkte ca tān eva sa ca eva ajñaḥ svabhāvataḥ avyaktaḥ tu na jānīte puruṣaḥ jñaḥ svabhāvataḥ nitya tvāt akṣara tvāt ca kṣarāṇām tattvataḥ anyathā yadā ajñānena kurvīta guṇa sargam punar punar yadā ātmānam na jānīte tadā avyaktam iha ucyate kartṛ tvāt ca api tattvānām tattva dharmī tathā ucyate kartṛ tvāt prakṛtīnām tu tathā prakṛti dharmi tā kartṛ tvāt ca api bījānām bīja dharmī tathā ucyate guṇānām prasava tvāt ca tathā prasava dharmavān kartṛ tvāt pralayānām ca tathā pralaya dharmi tā kartṛ tvāt prasavānām ca tathā prabhava dharmi tā sarva bhūta dayāvantaḥ kevalam jñānam āsthitāḥ yathā muñjaḥ iṣīkāyāḥ tathā eva etat hi jāyate na ca eva muñja saṃyogāt iṣīkā kartṛ budhyate eteṣām saha saṃvāsam vivāsam ca eva nityaśas yathā tathā enam paśyanti na nityam prākṛtāḥ janāḥ evam hi parisaṃkhyāya sāṃkhyāḥ kevala tām gatāḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi yogānām api darśanam uvāca sāṃkhya jñānam mayā proktam yoga jñānam nibodha mad yathāśrutam yathādṛṣṭam tattvena nṛpa sattama na asti sāṃkhya samam jñānam na asti yoga samam balam vayam tu rājan paśyāmaḥ ekam eva tu niścayāt yat eva yogāḥ paśyanti tat sāṃkhyaiḥ api dṛśyate ekam sāṃkhyam ca yogam ca yaḥ paśyati sa tattva vid yāvat hi pralayaḥ tāta sūkṣmeṇa aṣṭaguṇena vai vedeṣu ca aṣṭa guṇitam yogam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ sūkṣmam aṣṭaguṇam prāhuḥ na itaram nṛpa sattama dviguṇam yoga kṛtyam tu yogānām prāhuḥ uttamam sa guṇam nirguṇam ca eva yathā śāstra nidarśanam atas param pravakṣyāmi prāṇāyāmam ca pārthiva dhāraṇā ca eva manasaḥ prāṇāyāmaḥ ca pārthiva ekāgra tā ca manasaḥ prāṇāyāmaḥ tathā eva ca prāṇāyāmaḥ hi sa guṇaḥ nirguṇam dhāraṇam manaḥ niśāyāḥ prathame yāme codanāḥ dvādaśa smṛtāḥ madhye suptvā pare yāme dvādaśā eva tu codanāḥ tat evam upaśāntena dāntena ekānta śīlinā ātma ārāmeṇa buddhena yoktavyaḥ ātmā na saṃśayaḥ pañcānām indriyāṇām tu doṣān ākṣipya pañcadhā śabdam sparśam tathā rūpam rasam gandham tathā eva ca manaḥ tathā eva ahaṃkāre pratiṣṭhāpya narādhipa ahaṃkāram tathā buddhau buddhim ca prakṛtau api śāśvatam ca avyayam ca eva īśānam brahma ca avyayam yuktasya tu mahā rāja lakṣaṇāni upadhārayet lakṣaṇam tu prasādasya yathā tṛptaḥ sukham svapet niścala ūrdhva śikhaḥ tadvat yuktam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ pāṣāṇaḥ iva megha utthaiḥ yathā bindubhiḥ āhataḥ na alam cālayitum śakyaḥ tathā yuktasya lakṣaṇam taila pātram yathā pūrṇam karābhyām grah pūruṣaḥ sopānam āruhet bhītaḥ tarjyamānaḥ asi pāṇibhiḥ saṃyata ātmā bhayāt teṣām na pātrāt bindum utsṛjet sthira tvāt indriyāṇām tu niścala tvāt tathā eva ca kālena mahatā rājan śrutiḥ eṣā sanātanī etat hi yogam yogānām kim anyat yoga lakṣaṇam vijñāya tat hi manyante kṛtakṛtyāḥ manīṣiṇaḥ uvāca tathā eva utkramamāṇam tu śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ nṛpa padbhyām utkramamāṇasya vaiṣṇavam sthānam ucyate jaṅghābhyām tu vasūn devān āpnuyāt iti naḥ śrutam jānubhyām ca mahābhāgān devān sādhyān avāpnuyāt pāyunā utkramamāṇaḥ tu maitram sthānam avāpnuyāt pṛthivīm jaghanena atha ūrubhyām tu prajāpatim pārśvābhyām marutaḥ devān nāsābhyām indum eva ca grīvāyāḥ tam ṛṣi śreṣṭham naram āpnoti anuttamam viśvedevān mukhena atha diśaḥ śrotreṇa ca āpnuyāt ghrāṇena gandha vahanam netrābhyām sūryam eva ca bhrūbhyām ca eva aśvinau devau lalāṭena pitṝn atha brahmāṇam āpnoti vibhum mūrdhnā devāgrajam tathā ariṣṭāni tu vakṣyāmi vihitāni manīṣibhiḥ saṃvatsara viyogasya saṃbhaveyuḥ śarīriṇaḥ yaḥ arundhatīm na paśyeta dṛṣṭa pūrvām kadā cana khaṇḍa ābhāsam dakṣiṇatas te api saṃvatsara āyuṣaḥ para cakṣuṣi ca ātmānam ye na paśyanti pārthiva te api saṃvatsara āyuṣaḥ ati dyutiḥ ati prajñā aprajñā ca adyutiḥ tathā prakṛteḥ vikriyā āpattiḥ ṣaṣ māsāt mṛtyu lakṣaṇam kṛṣṇa śyāva chavi chāyaḥ ṣaṣ māsāt mṛtyu lakṣaṇam śīrṇa nābhi yathā cakram chidram somam prapaśyati tathā eva ca sahasrāṃśum sapta rātreṇa mṛtyu bhāj devatāyatana sthaḥ tu ṣaṣ rātreṇa sa mṛtyu bhāj karṇa nāsā avanamanam danta dṛṣṭi virāgi tā saṃjñā lopaḥ nirūṣma tvam sadyas mṛtyuni darśanam etāvanti tu ariṣṭāni viditvā mānavaḥ niśi ca ahani ca ātmānam yojayet paramātmani pratīkṣamāṇaḥ tat kālam yat kālam prati tat bhavet atha asya na iṣṭam maraṇam sthātum icchet imām kriyām sarva gandhān rasān ca eva dhārayeta samāhitaḥ tathā hi mṛtyum jayati tatpareṇa antarātmanā sa sāṃkhya dhāraṇam ca eva viditvā manuja ṛṣabha jayet ca mṛtyum yogena tatpareṇa antarātmanā śāśvatam sthānam acalam duṣprāpam akṛtātmabhiḥ uvāca avyakta stham param yat tat pṛṣṭaḥ te aham narādhipa param guhyam imam praśnam śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ nṛpa mayā ādityāt avāptāni yajūṃṣi mithilā adhipa mahatā tapasā devaḥ tapiṣṭhaḥ sevitaḥ mayā prītena ca aham vibhunā sūryeṇa uktaḥ tadā anagha varam vṛṇīṣva viprarṣe yat iṣṭam te su durlabham tat te dāsyāmi prīta ātmā mad prasādaḥ hi durlabhaḥ tatas praṇamya śirasā mayā uktaḥ tapatām varaḥ yajūṃṣi na upayuktāni kṣipram icchāmi veditum tatas mām bhagavān āha vitariṣyāmi te dvija sarasvatī iha vāc bhūtā śarīram te pravekṣyati tatas mām āha bhagavant āsyam svam vivṛ kuru vivṛtam ca tatas me praviṣṭā ca sarasvatī avijñānāt amarṣāt ca bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ vaiśaṃpāyana nāmā asau mātulaḥ mama mahā muniḥ tena amarṣeṇa taptaḥ aham mātulasya mahātmanaḥ tatas vidahyamānam mām uvāca bhagavān raviḥ muhūrtam sahyatām dāhaḥ tatas śītībhaviṣyasi śītībhū ca mām dṛṣṭvā bhagavat āha bhāskara kṛtsnam śatapatham ca eva praṇeṣyasi dvijarṣabha prāpsyase ca yat iṣṭam tat sāṃkhya yoga īpsitam padam tatas anuvyāhṛtam śrutvā gate deve vibhāvasau gṛham āgatya saṃhṛṣṭaḥ acintayam vai sarasvatīm tatas pravṛttā ati śubhā svara vyañjana bhūṣitā oṃkāram āditas kṛtvā mama devī sarasvatī tapatām ca variṣṭhāya niṣaṇṇaḥ tad parāyaṇaḥ tatas śatapatham kṛtsnam sa rahasyam sa saṃgraham cakre sa pariśeṣam ca harṣeṇa parameṇa ha kṛtvā ca adhyayanam teṣām śiṣyāṇām śatam uttamam vipriya artham sa śiṣyasya mātulasya mahātmanaḥ tatas sa śiṣyeṇa mayā sūryeṇa iva gabhastibhiḥ vyāptaḥ yajñaḥ mahā rāja pituḥ te mahātmanaḥ daśa pañca ca prāptāni yajūṃṣi arkāt mayā anagha upadhāritam tathā vā api purāṇam romaharṣaṇāt sūryasya ca anubhāvena pravṛttaḥ aham narādhipa kartum śatapatham vedam apūrvam kāritam ca me yathā abhilaṣitam mārgam tathā tat ca upapāditam śiṣyāṇām akhilam kṛtsnam anujñātam sa saṃgraham sarve ca śiṣyāḥ śucayaḥ gatāḥ parama harṣitāḥ śākhāḥ pañcadaśa imāḥ tu vidyāḥ bhāskara darśitāḥ pratiṣṭhāpya yathākāmam vedyam tat anucintayam viśvāvasuḥ tatas rājan vedānta jñāna kovidaḥ caturviṃśatikān praśnān pṛṣṭvā vedasya pārthiva pañcaviṃśatimam praśnam papraccha ānvīkṣikīm tathā mitram varuṇam eva ca puruṣam prakṛtim tathā jñānam jñeyam tathā ajñaḥ jñaḥ kaḥ tapāḥ atapāḥ tathā pṛṣṭavān anupūrveṇa praśnam uttamam arthavat muhūrtam mṛṣyatām tāvat yāvat enam vicintaye bāḍham iti eva kṛtvā sa tūṣṇīm gandharvaḥ āsthitaḥ tatra upaniṣadam ca eva pariśeṣam ca pārthiva mathnāmi manasā tāta dṛṣṭvā ca ānvīkṣikīm parām caturthī rāja śārdūla vidyā eṣā sāṃparāyikī udīritā mayā tubhyam pañcaviṃśe adhi dhiṣṭhitā atha uktaḥ tu mayā rājan rājā viśvāvasuḥ tadā śrūyatām yat bhavān asmān praśnam saṃpṛṣṭavan iha viśva avyaktam param vidyāt bhūta bhavya bhayaṃkaram triguṇam guṇa kartṛ tvāt aviśvaḥ niṣkalaḥ tathā avyaktam prakṛtim prāhuḥ puruṣa iti ca nirguṇam tathā eva mitram puruṣam varuṇam prakṛtim tathā jñānam tu prakṛtim prāhuḥ jñeyam niṣkalam eva ca ajñaḥ ca jñaḥ ca puruṣaḥ tasmāt niṣkalaḥ ucyate tapāḥ prakṛtiḥ iti āhuḥ atapāḥ niṣkalaḥ smṛtaḥ avidyā prakṛtiḥ jñeyā vidyā puruṣaḥ ucyate sūryām ca prakṛtim vidyāt asūryā niṣphalaḥ smṛtaḥ vidyā iti puruṣam vidyāt avidyā prakṛtiḥ parā calācalam iti proktam tvayā tat api mama śṛṇu calām tu prakṛtim prāhuḥ kāraṇam kṣepa sargayoḥ akṣepa sargayoḥ kartā niścalaḥ puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ akṣayam puruṣam prāhuḥ kṣayaḥ hi asya na vidyate guṇa kṣaya tvāt prakṛtiḥ kartṛ tvāt akṣayam budha eṣā te vidyā caturthī sāṃparāyikī vidyā upetam dhanam kṛtvā karmaṇā nityakarmaṇi ekānta darśanāḥ vedāḥ sarve viśvāvaso smṛtāḥ sa aṅga upāṅgān api yadi pañca vedān adhīyate yaḥ ghṛta arthī kharī kṣīram mathet gandharva sattama viṣṭhām tatra anupaśyeta na maṇḍam na api vā ghṛtam sa kevalam mūḍha matiḥ jñāna bhāravahaḥ smṛtaḥ tadā sa kevalībhūtaḥ ṣaḍviṃśam anupaśyati anyaḥ ca śaśvat avyaktaḥ tathā anyaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ janma mṛtyu bhayāt yogāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ ca parama eṣiṇaḥ uvāca pañcaviṃśam yat etat te proktam brāhmaṇa sattama parāśarasya viprarṣeḥ vārṣagaṇyasya dhīmataḥ gautamasya ārṣṭiṣeṇasya gargasya ca mahātmanaḥ bhavān prabarhaḥ śāstrāṇām pragalbhaḥ ca ati buddhimān na tava aviditam kim cit bhavān śruti nidhiḥ smṛtaḥ patiḥ ca tapatām śaśvat ādityaḥ tava bhāṣate sāṃkhya jñānam tvayā brahman avāptam kṛtsnam eva ca tathā eva yoga jñānam ca yājñavalkya viśeṣataḥ śrotum icchāmi tat jñānam ghṛtam maṇḍa mayam yathā uvāca jijñāsasi ca mām rājan tat nibodha yathāśrutam a budh prakṛtim budhyate pañcaviṃśakaḥ sāṃkhya yogāḥ ca tattva jñāḥ yathāśruti nidarśanāt paśyan tathā eva a paśyan ca paśyati anyaḥ tathā anagha ṣaḍviṃśaḥ pañcaviṃśam ca caturviṃśam ca paśyati na caturviṃśakaḥ agrāhyaḥ manujaiḥ jñāna darśibhiḥ sa snehaḥ sahavāsāt ca sa abhimānaḥ ca nityaśas tadā sa kevalībhūtaḥ ṣaḍviṃśam anupaśyati anyaḥ ca rājan avaraḥ tathā anyaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ janma mṛtyu bhayāt bhītāḥ yogāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ ca kāśyapa ṣaḍviṃśam anupaśyanti śucayaḥ tad parāyaṇāḥ yadā sa kevalībhūtaḥ ṣaḍviṃśam anupaśyati buddhaḥ ca uktaḥ yathātattvam mayā śruti nidarśanāt paśya a paśyam yaḥ anupaśyet kṣemam tattvam ca kāśyapa kevala akevalam ca ādyam pañcaviṃśāt param ca yat uvāca tathyam śubham ca etat uktam tvayā bhoḥ samyak kṣemyam devatā ādyam yathāvat uvāca evam uktvā saṃprayātaḥ divam sa vibhrājan vai śrīmatā darśanena tuṣṭaḥ ca tuṣṭyā parayā abhinandya pradakṣiṇam mama kṛtvā mahātmā brahma ādīnām khecarāṇām kṣitau ca sāṃkhyāḥ sarve sāṃkhya dharme ratāḥ ca tadvat yogāḥ yoga dharme ratāḥ ca ye ca api anye mokṣa kāmāḥ manuṣyāḥ teṣām etat darśanam jñāna dṛṣṭam jñānāt mokṣaḥ jāyate pūruṣāṇām na asti ajñānāt evam āhuḥ narendra tasmāt jñānam tattvataḥ anveṣitavyam yena ātmānam mokṣayet janma mṛtyoḥ prāpya jñānam brāhmaṇāt kṣatriyāt vā vaiśyāt śūdrāt api nīcāt abhīkṣṇam śraddhātavyam śraddadhānena nityam na śraddhinam janma mṛtyū viśetām sarve varṇāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ brahma jāḥ ca sarve nityam vyāharante ca brahma brahma āsyataḥ brāhmaṇāḥ saṃprasū bāhubhyām vai kṣatriyāḥ saṃprasū nābhau vaiśyāḥ pādāt ca api śūdrāḥ sarve varṇāḥ na anyathā veditavyāḥ ajñānataḥ karma yonim bhajante tām tām rājan te yathā yānti abhāvam tathā varṇāḥ jñāna hīnāḥ patante ghorāt ajñānāt prākṛtam yoni jālam tasthau brahmā tasthivān ca aparaḥ yaḥ tasmai nityam mokṣam āhuḥ dvijendrāḥ yat te pṛṣṭam tat mayā ca upadiṣṭam yāthātathyam tat viśokaḥ bhavasva uvāca saḥ evam anuśāstaḥ tu yājñavalkyena dhīmatā prītimān abhavat rājā mithilā adhipatiḥ tadā go koṭim sparśayām āsa hiraṇyasya tathā eva ca sāṃkhya jñānam adhīyānaḥ yoga śāstram ca kṛtsnaśas paśyanti yogāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ ca sva śāstra kṛta lakṣaṇāḥ iṣṭa aniṣṭa viyuktam hi tasthau brahma parātparam nityam tam āhuḥ vidvāṃsaḥ śuciḥ tasmāt śuciḥ bhava dadāti ca nara śreṣṭha pratigṛhṇāti yat ca ha yasya avyakta na vid sa guṇam nirguṇam punar tena tīrthāni yajñāḥ ca sevitavyā vipaścitā labhate avyakta saṃsthānam jñātvā avyaktam mahīpate ahaṃkārāt param ca api sthānāni samavāpnuyāt ye tu avyaktāt param nityam jānate śāstra tatparāḥ etad mad āp janakāt purastāt tena api ca āp nṛpa yājñavalkyāt jñānam viśiṣṭam na tathā hi yajñāḥ jñānena durgam tarate na yajñaiḥ kṣetrajña vid pārthiva jñāna yajñam upāsya vai tattvam ṛṣiḥ bhaviṣyasi yat upagaṇita śāśvata avyayam tat śubham amṛta tvam aśokam ṛcchati iti uvāca aiśvaryam vā mahat prāpya dhanam vā bharata ṛṣabha tapasā vā su mahatā karmaṇā vā śrutena vā uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam bhikṣoḥ pañcaśikhasya iha saṃvādam janakasya ca tapasā vā atha buddhyā vā karmaṇā vā śrutena vā na hi ahāni nivartante na māsāḥ na punar kṣapāḥ kālena jātāḥ jātāḥ hi vāyunā iva abhra saṃcayāḥ jarā mṛtyū hi bhūtānām khāditārau vṛkau iva balinām durbalāṇām ca hrasvāṇām mahatām api evaṃbhūteṣu bhūteṣu nitya bhūta adhruveṣu ca katham hṛṣyeta jāteṣu mṛteṣu ca katham jvaret uvāca saṃnyasyate yathā ātmā ayam saṃnyasta ātmā yathā ca yaḥ uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam janakasya ca saṃvādam sulabhāyāḥ ca bhārata saṃnyāsa phalikaḥ kaḥ cit babhūva nṛpatiḥ purā sa vede mokṣa śāstre ca sve ca śāstre kṛta āgamaḥ indriyāṇi samādhāya śaśāsa vasudhām imām tasya veda vidaḥ prājñāḥ śrutvā tām sādhu vṛtta tām lokeṣu spṛhayanti anye puruṣāḥ puruṣa īśvara mahīm anucacāra ekā sulabhā nāma bhikṣukī tayā jagat idam sarvam aṭantyā mithilā īśvaraḥ sā su sūkṣmām kathām śrutvā tathyam na iti sa saṃśayā tatas sā viprahāya atha pūrva rūpam hi yogatas cakṣuḥ nimeṣa mātreṇa laghu astra gati gāminī videhānām purīm subhrūḥ jagāma kamala īkṣaṇā sā prāpya mithilām ramyām samṛddha jana saṃkulām rājā tasyāḥ param dṛṣṭvā saukumāryam vapuḥ tathā tatas asyāḥ svāgatam kṛtvā vyādiśya ca varāsanam pūjitām pāda śaucena vara annena api atarpayat atha bhuktavatī prītā rājānam mantribhiḥ vṛtam sarva bhāṣya vidām madhye āsa bhikṣukī netrābhyām netrayoḥ asya raśmīn saṃyojya raśmibhiḥ janakaḥ api utsmayan rājā bhāvam asyāḥ viśeṣayan pratijagrāha bhāvena bhāvam asyāḥ nṛpa uttamaḥ tat ekasmin adhiṣṭhāne saṃvādaḥ śrūyatām ayam chattra ādiṣu vimuktasya muktāyāḥ ca tridaṇḍake eṣu artheṣu uttaram tasmāt pravedyam sat samāgame chattra ādiṣu viśeṣeṣu muktam mām viddhi sarvaśas sa tvām saṃmantum icchāmi māna arhā asi matā hi me yasmāt ca etat mayā prāptam jñānam vaiśeṣikam purā yasya na anyaḥ pravaktā asti mokṣe tam api mama śṛṇu bhikṣoḥ pañcaśikhasya aham śiṣyaḥ parama saṃmataḥ sāṃkhya jñāne tathā yoge mahīpāla vidhau tathā sa yathā śāstra dṛṣṭena mārgeṇa iha parivrajan vārṣikān caturaḥ māsān purā mayi sukha uṣitaḥ tena aham sāṃkhya mukhyena su dṛṣṭa arthena tattvataḥ śrāvitaḥ trividham mokṣam na ca rājyāt vicālitaḥ saḥ aham tām akhilām vṛttim trividhām mokṣa saṃhitām jñānāt eva ca vairāgyam jāyate yena mucyate sā iyam paramaka buddhiḥ prāptā nirdvaṃdva tā mayā yathā kṣetram mṛdūbhūtam adbhiḥ āplāvitam tathā yathā ca uttāpitam bījam kapāle yatra tatra vā prāpya api aṅkura hetu tvam abīja tvāt na jāyate jñānam kṛtam abījam me viṣayeṣu na jāyate yaḥ ca me dakṣiṇam bāhum candanena samukṣayet sukhī saḥ aham avāpta arthaḥ sama loṣṭa aśma kāñcanaḥ mukta saṅgaḥ sthitaḥ rājye viśiṣṭaḥ anyaiḥ tridaṇḍibhiḥ mokṣe hi trividhā niṣṭhā dṛṣṭā pūrvaiḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ jñānam loka uttaram yat ca sarva tyāgaḥ ca karmaṇām jñāna niṣṭhām vadanti eke mokṣa śāstra vidaḥ janāḥ karma niṣṭhām tathā eva anye yatayaḥ sūkṣma darśiṇaḥ tṛtīyā iyam samākhyātā niṣṭhā tena mahātmanā māne dambhe tathā snehe sadṛśāḥ te kuṭumbibhiḥ tridaṇḍa ādiṣu yadi asti mokṣaḥ jñānena kena cit doṣa darśī tu gārhasthye yaḥ vrajati āśrama antaram utsṛjan parigṛhṇan ca saḥ api saṅgāt na mucyate rājarṣi bhikṣuka ācāryāḥ mucyante kena hetunā kāṣāya dhāraṇam mauṇḍyam tri viṣṭabdhaḥ kamaṇḍaluḥ liṅgāni atyartham etāni na mokṣāya iti mama matiḥ yadi sati api liṅge asmin jñānam eva atra kāraṇam atha vā duḥkha śaithilyam vīkṣya liṅge kṛtā matiḥ kim tat eva artha sāmānyam chattra ādiṣu na lakṣyate rājya aiśvarya mayaḥ pāśaḥ sneha āyatana bandhanaḥ mokṣa aśma niśitena iha chinnaḥ tyāga asinā mayā ayathārthaḥ hi te varṇaḥ vakṣyāmi śṛṇu tat mama saukumāryam tathā rūpam vapuḥ agryam tathā vayaḥ tava etāni samastāni niyamaḥ ca iti saṃśayaḥ yat ca api ananurūpam te liṅgasya asya viceṣṭitam mad pakṣa saṃśrayāt ca ayam śṛṇu yaḥ te vyatikramaḥ praveśaḥ te kṛtaḥ kena mama rāṣṭre pure tathā kasya vā saṃnisargāt tvam praviṣṭā hṛdayam mama na āvayoḥ eka yogaḥ asti mā kṛthāḥ varṇa saṃkaram ayam ca api su kaṣṭaḥ te dvitīyaḥ āśrama saṃkaraḥ sagotrām vā asagotrām vā na veda tvām na vettha mām sagotram āviśatyāḥ te tṛtīyaḥ gotra saṃkaraḥ sā tvam etāni akāryāṇi kārya apekṣā vyavasyasi avijñānena vā yuktāḥ mithyājñānena vā punar idam anyat tṛtīyam te bhāva sparśa vighātakam duṣṭāyāḥ lakṣyate liṅgam pravaktavyam prakāśitam na mayi eva abhisaṃdhiḥ te jaya eṣinyā jaye kṛtaḥ tathā hi evam punar ca tvam dṛṣṭim svām pratimuñcasi bhūyas sṛjasi yoga astram viṣa amṛtam iva ekadhā alābhaḥ ca api araktasya saḥ atra doṣaḥ viṣa upamaḥ mā sprākṣīḥ sadhu jānīṣva sva śāstram anupālaya kṛtā iyam hi vijijñāsā muktaḥ na iti tvayā mama na rājānam mṛṣā gacchet na dvijātim katham cana na striyam strī guṇa upetām hanyuḥ hi ete mṛṣā gatāḥ rājñām hi balam aiśvaryam brahma brahma vidām balam rūpa yauvana saubhāgyam strīṇām balam anuttamam ārjavena abhigantavyāḥ vināśāya hi anārjavam sā tvam jātim śrutam vṛttam bhāvam prakṛtim ātmanaḥ ukta vākye tu nṛpatau sulabhā cāru darśanā tatas cārutaram vākyam pracakrāma atha bhāṣitum navabhiḥ navabhiḥ ca eva doṣaiḥ vāc buddhi dūṣaṇaiḥ apetam upapanna artham aṣṭādaśa guṇa anvitam eṣām ekaikaśas arthānām saukṣmya ādīnām su lakṣaṇam śṛṇu saṃsāryamāṇānām padārthaiḥ pada vākyāt jñānam jñeyeṣu bhinneṣu yathā abhedena vartate doṣāṇām ca guṇānām ca pramāṇam pravibhāgaśaḥ idam pūrvam idam paścāt vaktavyam yat vivakṣitam krama yogam tam api āhuḥ vākyam vākya vidaḥ janāḥ dharma artha kāma mokṣeṣu pratijñāya viśeṣataḥ tāni etāni yathā uktāni saukṣmya ādīni janādhipa eka artha samavetāni vākyam mama niśāmaya upeta artham abhinna artham na apavṛttam na ca adhikam na a ślakṣṇam na ca saṃdigdham vakṣyāmi paramam tava na anṛtam na trivargeṇa viruddham na api asaṃskṛtam na nyūnam kaṣṭa śabdam vā vyutkrama abhihitam na ca na śeṣam na anukalpena niṣkāraṇam ahetukam kāmāt krodhāt bhayāt lobhāt dainyāt ānāryakāt tathā hrītaḥ anukrośataḥ mānāt na vakṣyāmi katham cana vaktā śrotā ca vākyam ca yadā tu avikalam nṛpa samam eti vivakṣāyām tadā saḥ arthaḥ prakāśate sva artham āha para artham vā tadā vākyam na rohati atha yaḥ sva artham utsṛjya para artham prāha mānavaḥ viśaṅkā jāyate tasmin vākyam tat api doṣavat śrotuḥ ca eva ātmanaḥ ca eva sa vaktā na itaraḥ nṛpa tat arthavat idam vākyam upetam vākya saṃpadā avikṣipta manāḥ rājan ekāgraḥ śrotum arhasi tatra uttaram idam vākyam rājan ekamanāḥ śṛṇu yathā jatu ca kāṣṭham ca pāṃsavaḥ ca uda bindubhiḥ su śliṣṭāni tathā rājan prāṇinām iha saṃbhavaḥ śabdaḥ sparśaḥ rasaḥ rūpam gandhaḥ pañca indriyāṇi ca pṛthak ātmā daśa ātmānaḥ saṃśliṣṭāḥ jatu kāṣṭha vat na ca eṣām codanā kā cit asti iti eṣa viniścayaḥ ekaikasya iha vijñānam na asti ātmani tathā parasmin na veda cakṣuḥ cakṣuṣṭvam śrotram na ātmani vartate saṃśliṣṭāḥ na abhijāyante yathā apaḥ iha pāṃsavaḥ bāhyān anyān apekṣante guṇān tān api me śṛṇu rūpam cakṣuḥ prakāśaḥ ca darśane hetavaḥ trayaḥ yathā eva atra tathā anyeṣu jñāna jñeyeṣu hetu jñāna jñeya antare tasmin manaḥ nāma aparaḥ guṇaḥ vicārayati yena ayam niścaye sādhu asādhunī dvādaśaḥ tu aparaḥ tatra buddhiḥ nāma guṇaḥ smṛtaḥ atha dvādaśake tasmin sattvam nāma aparaḥ guṇa atha pañcadaśa rājan guṇaḥ tatra aparaḥ smṛ guṇaḥ tu eva aparaḥ tatra saṃghātaḥ iti ṣoḍaśaḥ sukha duḥkhe jarā mṛtyū lābha alābhau priya apriye iti ca ekonaviṃśaḥ ayam dvaṃdva yogaḥ iti smṛtaḥ ūrdhvam ekonaviṃśatyāḥ kālaḥ nāma aparaḥ guṇaḥ iti imam viddhi viṃśatyā bhūtānām prabhava apyayam viṃśakaḥ ca eṣa saṃghātaḥ mahābhūtāni pañca ca iti evam viṃśatiḥ ca eva guṇāḥ sapta ca ye smṛtāḥ vidhi śukra bala ca iti trayaḥ etad guṇa para ekaviṃśaḥ ca daśan ca kalāḥ saṃkhyāna smṛ avyaktam prakṛtim tu āsām kalānām kaḥ cit icchati vyaktam ca āsām tathā eva anyaḥ sthūla darśī prapaś avyaktam yadi vā vyaktam dvayīm atha catuṣṭayām prakṛtim sarva bhūtānām paśyanti adhyātma cintakāḥ tad idam prakṛtiḥ avyaktā kalābhiḥ vyakta tām gatā mama ca tvam ca rāja indra ye ca api anye śarīriṇaḥ bindunyāsa ādayaḥ avasthāḥ śukra śoṇita sambhavāḥ yāsām eva nipātena kalalam nāma jāyate peśyāḥ tu aṅga abhinirvṛttiḥ nakha romāṇi ca aṅgāt evam hi jantuḥ saṃpūrṇaḥ navame māsi maithila jāyate nāma rūpa tvam strī pumān vā iti liṅgataḥ jāta mātram tu tat rūpam dṛṣṭvā tāmra nakha aṅguli kaumārāt yauvanam ca api sthāviryam ca api yauvanāt kalānām pṛthak arthānām pratibhedaḥ kṣaṇe kṣaṇe avasthāyām avasthāyām dīpasya iva arciṣaḥ gatiḥ ka idam ka vā na idam kutas vā idam na vā kutas yathā ādityāt maṇeḥ ca eva vīrudbhyaḥ ca eva pāvakaḥ ātmani eva ātmanā ātmānam yathā tvam anupaśyasi kṛtavān yaḥ mahīpāla kim tasmin mukta lakṣaṇam yasya na asti samam cakṣuḥ kim tasmin mukta lakṣaṇam tāni tāni anusaṃdṛśya saṅga sthānāni ariṃdama ātmanā ātmani saṃpaśyet kim tasmin mukta lakṣaṇam imāni anyāni sūkṣmāṇi mokṣam āśritya kāni cit catur aṅga pravṛttāni saṅga sthānāni me śṛṇu yaḥ imām pṛthivīm kṛtsnām eka chatrām praśāsti ha gṛhe śayanam api ekam niśāyām yatra līyate śayyā ardham tasya ca api atra strī pūrvam adhitiṣṭhati strīṣu krīḍā vihāreṣu nityam asya asvatantra tā yadā tu ājñāpayati anyān tadā asya uktā svatantra tā śayane ca api anujñātaḥ suptaḥ utthāpyate avaśaḥ vadasva śṛṇu ca api iti vivaśaḥ kāryate paraiḥ na ca api utsahate dātum vitta rakṣī mahājanāt kṣaṇena asya upavartante doṣāḥ vairāgya kārakāḥ prājñān śūrān tathā eva āḍhyān eka sthāne api śaṅkate yadā ca ete praduṣyanti rājan ye kīrtitāḥ mayā tadā eva asya bhayam tebhyaḥ jāyate paśya yādṛśam sarvaḥ sve sve gṛhe rājā sarvaḥ sve sve gṛhe gṛhī putrāḥ dārāḥ tathā eva ātmā kośaḥ mitrāṇi saṃcayaḥ paraiḥ sādhāraṇāḥ hi ete taiḥ taiḥ eva asya hetubhiḥ han deśa pura dah pradhāna kuñjara mṛ loka sādhāraṇeṣu eṣu mithyājñānena tapyate bahu pratyarthikam rājyam upāste gaṇayan niśāḥ mama idam iti yat ca idam puram rāṣṭram ca manyase balam kośam amātyān ca kasya etāni na vā nṛpa mitra amātyam puram rāṣṭram daṇḍaḥ kośaḥ mahīpatiḥ sapta aṅgaḥ cakrasaṃghātaḥ rājyam iti ucyate nṛpa sapta aṅgasya asya rājyasya tridaṇḍasya iva tiṣṭhataḥ teṣu teṣu hi kāleṣu tat tat aṅgam viśiṣyate sapta aṅgaḥ ca api saṃghātaḥ trayaḥ ca anye nṛpa uttama saṃbhūya daśa vargaḥ ayam bhuṅkte rājyam hi rāja vat na asti asādhāraṇaḥ rājā na asti rājyam arājakam pṛthivī dakṣiṇā yasya saḥ aśvamedhaḥ na vidyate tad aham etad karman rājya duḥkhāni maithila samarthā śataśas vaktum atha vā api sahasraśas na mām evaṃvidhām muktām īdṛśam vaktum arhasi nanu nāma tvad mokṣa kṛtsna pañcaśikha śru sa upāyaḥ sa upaniṣadaḥ sa upāsaṅgaḥ sa niścayaḥ tasya te mukta saṅgasya pāśān ākramya tiṣṭhataḥ chattra ādiṣu viśeṣeṣu katham saṅga punar nṛpa śrutam te na śrutam manye mithyā vā api śrutam śrutam atha vā śruta saṃkāśam śrutam anyat śrutam tvayā atha api imāsu saṃjñāsu laukikīṣu pratiṣṭhasi abhiṣaṅga avarodhābhyām baddhaḥ tvam prākṛtaḥ mayā niyamaḥ hi eṣa dharmeṣu yatīnām śūnyavāsi tā śūnyam āvāsayantyā ca mayā kim kasya dūṣitam na pāṇibhyām na bāhubhyām pāda ūrubhyām na ca anagha na gātra avayavaiḥ anyaiḥ spṛśāmi tvā narādhipa kule mahati jātena hrīmatā dīrghadarśinā brāhmaṇāḥ guravaḥ ca ime tathā amātyāḥ guru uttamāḥ tat evam anusaṃdṛśya vācya avācyam parīkṣatā strī puṃsoḥ samavāyaḥ ayam tvayā vācyaḥ na saṃsadi yathā puṣkara parṇa stham jalam tad parṇa saṃsthitam yadi vā api a spṛśantyāḥ me sparśam jānāsi kam cana jñānam kṛtam abījam te katham tena iha bhikṣuṇā sa gārhasthyāt cyutaḥ ca tvam mokṣam na avāpya durvidam bhāva abhāva samāyoge jāyate varṇa saṃkaraḥ varṇa āśrama pṛthaktve ca dṛś artha apṛthaktvin pāṇau kuṇḍam tathā kuṇḍe payaḥ payasi makṣikāḥ āśrita āśraya yogena pṛthaktvena āśrayāḥ vayam na tu kuṇḍe payaḥ bhāvaḥ payaḥ ca api na makṣikāḥ svayam eva āśrayanti ete bhāvāḥ na tu para āśrayam pṛthaktvāt āśramāṇām ca varṇa anyatve tathā eva ca na asmi varṇa uttamā jātyā na vaiśyā na avarā tathā pradhānaḥ nāma rājarṣiḥ vyaktam te śrotram āgataḥ droṇaḥ ca śataśṛṅgaḥ ca vakradvāraḥ ca parvataḥ mama satreṣu pūrva cit maghavan saha vinītā mokṣa dharmeṣu carāmi ekā muni vratam na asthirā sva pratijñāyām na asamīkṣyapravādinī na a samīkṣya āgatā ca aham tvad sakāśam janādhipa mokṣe te bhāvitām buddhim śrutvā mama kuśala eṣiṇī tava mokṣasya ca api asya jijñāsā artham iha āgatā muktaḥ na mucyate yaḥ ca śāntaḥ yaḥ ca na śāmyati yathā śūnye pura āgāre bhikṣuḥ ekām niśām vaset tathā hi tvad śarīre asmin imām vatsyāmi śarvarīm tad mad āsana dānena vāc ātithyena ca arcitā suptā su śaraṇā prītā śvas gamiṣyāmi maithila śrutvā na adhijagau rājā kim cit anyat atas param uvāca uvāca atra api udāharanti imam saṃvādam guru śiṣyayoḥ uvāca kim nu svarga apyayam kati sargāḥ kim bhūtam kim bhaviṣyam kim bhavyam kim jñānam kim jñeyam kaḥ jñātā kim buddham kim apratibuddham kim nānātvam kim sahavāsa vivāsa kim vidyā avidya iti sa tad ākṛtiḥ avyaktam bīja dharmāṇām mahā grāham acetanam tasmāt eka guṇaḥ jajñe tat vyaktam tattvam īśvaraḥ ādāne ādāna guṇānām prakṛtiḥ sadā para apramattam tat ekasmin kārya kāraṇe mahataḥ siddhiḥ āyattā saṃśayaḥ ca mahān yatas nāma nāma tṛtīyam puruṣa saṃjñakam aham kartā iti ahaṃkartā sasṛje viśvam īśvaraḥ tṛtīyam etam puruṣam abhimāna guṇam viduḥ ahaṃkārāt ahaṃkāra yugapad utpādayām āsa pañca mahābhūtāni śabda sparśa rūpa rasa gandha lakṣaṇāni bhūteṣu ca api ahaṃkāraḥ asarūpaḥ tathā ucyate punar viṣaya hetu arthe sa manaḥ saṃjñakaḥ smṛtaḥ iti pañca pañcan buddhīndriyāṇi vadanti evam āhuḥ ah ācāryāḥ pādapāyuḥ ānandaḥ ca iti pañca karmendriyāṇi viśeṣāḥ nakṣatrāṇi iti etāni indriyāṇām paryāya nāmāni vadanti evam āha ahaṃkārāt tathā bhūtāni utpādya mahat ātmanoḥ vaikhara tvam tatas jñātvā vaikharaḥ viṣaya ātmakaḥ uktāni evam āha yat api uktam kim ādyam madhyamam ca tattvānām iti atra brūmaḥ ādya madhyamam ca uktam buddhi ādīni trayoviṃśati tattvāni viśeṣa paryavasānāni devadatta yajñadatta brāhmaṇa kṣatriya vaiśya śūdra caṇḍāla pulkasa ādiḥ etāni jñātavyāni buddhi ādīni viśeṣa paryavasānāni mantavyāni pratyetavyāni śarīra śarīra saṃghātam triṣu lokeṣu vyaktam saṃjñakam dehinām yoga darśanam pañcaviṃśati tattvānām buddhi amāna apratibuddhayoḥ vyatiriktam upekṣakam śuci vyabhram iti āhuḥ ācāryāḥ evam ca āha adhibhūtam adhidaivatam ca āsure vakṣyāmaḥ pādau pāda adhyātmam gantavyam ākāśa adhidaivatam cakṣus adhyātma draṣṭavyam dṛś adhibhūtam sūryaḥ adhidaivatam āha brāhmaṇe brāhmaṇa nṛpatau kīṭe śvapāke śvani hastini puttikā daṃśa maśake vihaṃge ca samam bhavet niraṅkuram abījam ca śāśvatam tat avāpnuyāt yat api uktam kim nu sarga apyayam iti atra brūmaḥ tat yathā jarāyu ja aṇḍa ja sveda ja udbhid jāḥ catvāraḥ bhūta grāmāḥ kālāgninā ahaṃkṛtena aneka śata sahasra aṃśunā dahyamānāḥ pṛthivīm anupralīyante tad ātta ādā gandhā kūrma pṛṣṭha pṛṣṭha nibhā pṛthivī apsu pralīyate tat tat udakam sarvam tat tat ākāśam manasi pralīyate manaḥ manas ahaṃkāre ahaṃkāra mahanti uttīrya saḥ aśivāt asmāt śivam ānantyam āpnuyāt atra atra brūmaḥ nava navan sargāṇi prākṛta vaikṛtāni bhavanti avyakta ahaṃkārāt pañcabhūta sargaḥ vikāraḥ yasmāt kṛtsnasya jagataḥ utpattim nidhanam madhyam bhūtānām ātmanaḥ ca yaḥ yat api vac kim bhū kim bhavyam kim bhaviṣyat ca iti atra brūmaḥ bhū bhaviṣya ca āsura trailokya kāla sa tad mahātmā samprati atīta anāgatānām utpādakānām utpādakaḥ ca anugrāhakaḥ ca tirobhāvakaḥ ca iti bhūta bhavya bhaviṣyāṇām sraṣṭāram kālam īśvaram duḥkhāt yat yad api uktam kim jñānam iti atra brūmaḥ jñāna nāma asura prajñā boddhavyam nāma dvividham iṣṭa aniṣṭa kṛtam yathā idam śrāvyam śru idam a śrāvay idam dṛśyam dṛś idam a dṛśyam idam idam bhakṣyam idam abhakṣyam kena khalu idānīm kāraṇena iṣṭa aniṣṭa kṛtaiḥ dvaṃdvaiḥ avabudhyate kṣetrajñaḥ kasmāt abhimanyate abhimanyate mama etāni dvaṃdvāni aham mad etad mattaḥ ca etāni pravartamānān prakṛteḥ imān guṇān tamaḥ vṛtaḥ ayam viparīta darśanaḥ tṛṇasya kubjīkaraṇe api anīśvaraḥ vijñāna vijñāna abhisaṃbandhāt vivāsaḥ bhavati āha evam svabhāva yogāt sṛjati guṇān prakṛtiḥ iti abhimatam na saḥ ajñeṣu yat api uktam kim jñā iti brūmaḥ jñeyam jñā nāma asura puruṣa avyaktam buddhi ahaṃkārau mahābhūtāni pañca ca viśeṣān pañca ca eva āhuḥ daśa ekam ca prakāśakān ekādaśa indriyāṇi eva etāvat jñeya saṃjñitam pañca pañca hi vargāṇi vijñeyāni eva tattvataḥ viśuddhaḥ puruṣaḥ ca asmāt varga hīnaḥ na śocati pañcaviṃśati tattva jñaḥ yatra tatra āśrame rataḥ trayaḥ trivargān vijñāya yāthātathyena mānavaḥ karmaṇā manasā vācā pravimuktaḥ na śocati kāryam kāraṇam kartṛ tvam iti trivarga guṇāḥ ka guṇa mātrā guṇa lakṣaṇam guṇa avayavam sattva rajaḥ tamaḥ iti guṇāḥ tatra iti sattva mātrāḥ rāgin tā tā matsari tā sāhasika tā paritāpita paritāpay pariṣṭa pratibodhana tā iti rajas mātrāḥ muh tā tā nidrā āveśin tā dharma dveṣi tā akāryeṣu atipramodi tā smṛti nāśaḥ ca iti yat api uktam kaḥ jñātā iti atra brūmaḥ jñātā nāma asure kṣetrajñaḥ draṣṭā śuciḥ upekṣakaḥ jñāna trikaḥ budhyamāna apratibuddhayoḥ aha pañcaviṃśati tattvāt hi niṣkalam śucim avraṇam na śocati naraḥ jñātvā sāṃkhya śruti nidarśanāt pārāvaryam viditvā tu jñāna sāphalyam āpnuyāt ye yad tu evam nāma budhyeran yathā śāstra nidarśanāt tritayam teṣu asāphalyam śāstrasya bhavat āsure kāmam eva adhikurute adhikṛ kasmāt andhatāmisraḥ andhatāmisra iti viṣādam eva adhikurute viṣādaḥ ca mṛtyuḥ andhatāmisram viṣādam eva archati aham mad mṛ para para śarīra saṃjñite ca abhiṣvajate mad tvad tvad mad mātṛ mama mad duḥkham iti evamādibhiḥ sarva dvaṃdvaiḥ abhyāhataḥ ahaṃkāra spṛṣṭaḥ mātsarya kāma krodha lobha lobha moha māna darpa mada āviṣṭaḥ tṛṣṇā ārtaḥ ca indriya indriya anukūlataḥ evam evam hi āha parvāṇi parvāṇi ghorāṇi yaḥ a vidvān na avabudhyate bhavanti dhṛtiḥ śraddhā sukhā vividiṣā a vividiṣā ca iti karmaṇā vāc manaḥ kāya samutthena iti evam evam aha vāci karmaṇi saṃkalpe pratijñām yaḥ anurakṣati śraddhā nāma karma yoniḥ śraddhā yaḥ tu anutiṣṭhate saḥ anasūyā dama ādi nakṣatra niyamaiḥ śreyaḥ prāpsyāmi iti evam anuṣṭhānam anuṣṭhāna kurute kṛ iti evam evam aha yajanam yājanam ca eva śraddhāyāḥ lakṣaṇam smṛtam anulomānām api proktā sāvitrī iti anyāḥ ca vidyā prāyaścittam tapaḥ ca eva tat sukhāyāḥ tu lakṣaṇam vividiṣā vividiṣā nāma karma yoniḥ sarva jñātu kāma tā ca kurute śruti viśeṣa ākāṅkṣī kva saṃjñā kva vā asaṃjñā iti āha sā eṣā vividiṣā nāma karma yoniḥ anuṣṭhitā avividiṣā nāma karma yoniḥ sarvam sarva eva a jñātu kāma tā sā eṣā avividiṣā nāma karma yoniḥ anuṣṭhitā nāma nāma asure yat ayam sattvam abhiṣvajate kṣetrajñaḥ vyaktam ca avyaktam evam iṣām bhautika āhaṃkārika māhātmika avyaktīnām caturṇām puruṣāṇām puruṣāṇām sattvena ekatvam bhavati nānātvam ca iti evam evam aha yat api uktam kim sahavāsa vivāsam iti brūmaḥ sahavāsam evam apratibuddhānām apratibuddha viṣaya abhiṣaṅgiṇām eṣām bhautika āhaṃkārika māhātmika avyaktikānām caturṇām puruṣāṇām sattva sahavāsa vivāsam anya tva evam ca ca āha vivāsam sahavāsam ca yaḥ vidvān na avabudhyate sa baddhaḥ sattva saṃvāsaiḥ saṃsārāt na pramucyate yat api uktam kim vidyā avidyā iti brūmaḥ avidyā nāma asure asura bhavati eṣā iṣṭa aniṣṭa avyatiriktā trayī punar bhāvikī vidyā vidyā nāma āsure bhavati iṣ aniṣṭa vyatirikta ānvīkṣikī apunarbhāvikī sarva sarva bhūta abhayaṃkarā sarva lokeṣu ālokanāya sarva jñāna avabodhana abhyudyatā sarva sarva duḥkha nirmokṣāya upadiṣṭā iti ācāryam abhigamya yāthātathya darśanāt na na hi jñānena ca ajñāne śarma vindati mānuṣaḥ mānuṣa tvāt tva ca deva tvam deva tvāt ca manuṣya tām sa tu saṃdhāvate ajasram avidyā vaśam āgataḥ pārāvarye sukham jñātvā viditvā ca param budhaḥ mucyate deha saṃtānāt dehāt ca amṛtam āpnuyāt uvāca bhagavan kim kuśala akuśalam varga avarga kim kṛtsna kṣayam kim śuddha aśuddha kim nitya anityam kim kevala akevalam kim parāt param kim paśya apaśya kim śāśvata aśāśvatam kim vyatirikta avyatiriktam kim yoga ayogam iti atra yat yat vac āsure kim kuśala akuśala iti brūmaḥ kuśalam nāma sarveṣu sarva vedeṣu sarva śāstreṣu sarvāsu vidyāsu adhigata yāthātathya tvam ca eva aviśeṣaḥ tyajati tad mūlam ca etat kuśala akuśalam aśeṣatas sattvam manasā trividham ca eva kuśala akuśalam smṛtam puruṣaḥ pañcaviṃśati tattvāni bhavanti avyakta mahant mahant ahaṃkāraḥ pañca mahābhūtāni pañca viśeṣāḥ ekādaśa indriyāṇi vargam vargāt apavargaḥ upavṛttaḥ kṣetrajñaḥ śuciḥ upekṣakaḥ budhyamāna apratibuddhayoḥ pañcaviṃśāt param vyaktam ahaṃkāraḥ tatas paraḥ ahaṃkārāt parā buddhiḥ buddheḥ ātmā mahant paraḥ yat yad api uktam kim kṛtsnakṣayam iti atra atra brūmaḥ kṛtsnakṣayam nāma āsure puruṣaḥ pañcaviṃśati tattvāni bhavanti avyakta mahān buddhiḥ ahaṃkāraḥ pañca pañcan mahābhūtāni pañcan viśeṣāḥ ekādaśa indriyāṇi puruṣeṇa jñā sarvatas sarvāṇi iti evam evam ah samyak samyak darśana saṃpannaḥ kṛtsna kṣayam avāpnuyāt yat api uktam kim śuddha aśuddha iti brūmaḥ śuddham nāma āsure kṣetrajñaḥ draṣṭā sākṣi mātrakaḥ budhyamāna apratibuddhayoḥ paraḥ yaḥ pañcaviṃśati tattva jñaḥ yathā man tathā manyate yathā tathā tathā karoti ahaṃkāra apratibuddha tvāt budha kṣetrajña sarva dṛś sarva sarva āgamāḥ sarva dvaṃdvāni sarva jñānāni tapaḥ ca a tapaḥ ca śuddhaḥ ca a śuddhaḥ ca anena mārgeṇa kṣetrajñasya aśuddha dharmiṇaḥ śuddhim ṛcchati amārgeṇa jñāna jñāna dṛṣṭānta āgama prāmāṇyāt su su vipula api taptvā su śuddham śudh puruṣam dṛṣṭvā api aśuddham iti manyate sarga pralaya pralaya dharmi tvāt vikārāṇām tathā eva eva adhiṣṭhātāram anityam pravadanti adhiṣṭhāna kartṛ tva vikāra idam eva hetu evam etad ubhaya param kṣetrajña a prakṛti avikāra prakṛti prakṛti vikāra guṇa adhiṣṭhita tvāt akevalam buddhi stham stha budhyamānam puruṣam ācāryāḥ yadi hi etad na mad etad prakṛti prakṛti vikārāṇām iti kevalaḥ ca syāt anyaḥ ca syāt yadā tu eṣa prakṛti vikārān adhitiṣṭhamānaḥ abhimanyate mama ete prakṛti prakṛti vikārāḥ aham eteṣām iti tadā tadā eṣa prakṛti vikārāṇām adhiṣṭhita tvāt budhyamānaḥ yadā buddhyā vikārān adhitiṣṭhati yadā tu eṣa vikārāṇām anyaḥ aham iti manyate yat yad api vac kim parāt param iti atra brūmaḥ parāt param nāma asure viśeṣāḥ viśeṣa mahābhūtāni mahābhūtebhyaḥ ahaṃkāraḥ ahaṃkārāt evam etābhyām budhyamāna apratibuddhābhyām anyam buddham budh kā na śucati iti yat yad api vac kim paśyāpaśyam iti atra atra brūmaḥ an ādi ādi nidhanāt grah tvāt tva āsure śāśvatam avyaktam prasava prasava dhāraṇā ādāna guṇa svabhāva tva aśāśvatam anya ca ca ācāryāḥ tathā eva adhiṣṭhātāram anena eva hetunā śāśvatam ca varṇayanti śāśvataḥ tu bhagavān kṣetrajñaḥ bīja dharmā paśyaḥ paśyati paśyantam a paśyantam ca paśyati apaśyaḥ tau apaśya tvāt paśya apaśyau na paśyati puruṣaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ kṣetrajñaḥ yathā puṣkaraparṇa stha bindu na upagacchanti anya tvāt tathā kṣetram kṣetrajñaḥ muñjāt iṣīkā iṣīkā nikṛṣṭā na punar āviśati anya tvāt tathā kṣetram kṣetrajñaḥ kṣetrajñaḥ yathā kūlāt vṛkṣaḥ patan tat kūlam muñcati anya tvāt tathā kṣetrajñaḥ yathā vṛkṣāt vṛkṣāt vā śakuni utpatan utpatan sa tam vṛkṣam utsṛjati utsṛjati anya tvāt tathā kṣetram kṣetrajñaḥ kasmāt anya tva sarva evam puṣkaraparṇam tathā anya kṣetram kṣetrajña kṣetrajña anyaḥ puruṣaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ anyaḥ ca asmāt kṣetrajñaḥ iti viyogaḥ nāma āsure puruṣaḥ pañcaviṃśatīnām tattvānām asaṃsaktaḥ na aham pañcaviṃśati tattva jñaḥ parātmā bhavate amṛtaḥ nānābhāvāt kṣetra dharma avyaktam akṣetra dharmā kṣetrajñaḥ bīja dharma avyaktam abīja dharmā a prakṛti dharmā kṣetrajñaḥ buddhi buddhi dharmā kṣetrajñaḥ aśuci dharma avyakta dharmā kṣetrajñaḥ akuśala dharma avyakta kuśala dharman kṣetrajñaḥ apaśya dharma avyakta kṣetrajñaḥ a viyoga dharma avyakta viyoga viyoga dharman kṣetrajñaḥ a vimokṣa avyakta vimokṣa dharmā kṣetrajñaḥ draṣṭavyam dṛś avyaktam śrotā śrotṛ kṣetrajñaḥ śrotavyam avyaktam mantṛ anahaṃkāram kṣetrajñam śuddham nirdvaṃdvena nirdvitīyena śuddhena alubdhakena ahiṃsakena sarva sarva bhūta darśanena samyak dṛṣṭinā yata ātmanā śāntena śam dam śūnya āgāra nadī pulina vṛkṣa mūla vṛkṣa koṭara busa āgāra āvasatha gṛha anityena śāyinā śāyin bhikṣuṇā sva kāryam anuṣṭhātavyam pratibhāvyam upasargam jitvā yogena yoga kāryam anuṣṭheyam tat tad dvividham dhyānam tat tad yathā prāṇāyāma ātmaka sa guṇa prāṇāyāma prāṇāyāma ātmakam ca mānasa aguṇa tat yathā śrotram śrāvyebhyaḥ pratisamāvartayati ghrāṇam ghreyebhyaḥ bhūta bhūta viśeṣāḥ ca mahati ātmani mahāntam ātmānam kratūn ca vivecayitvā vyakta anuyuṅkte tatra atī kṣemī kṣemin bhavati tasmāt idam vivṛ yad ca niṣṭhāḥ niṣṭhā etat naiṣkarmyam yathā yathā asya jāgrataḥ svapnaḥ yathā syāt tamasā vṛtaḥ etat ācāryāḥ śuddham icchanti anavabodhāt na na anyam aguṇam puruṣam ka tu etad adhiṣṭhātṛ saṃjñakaḥ saṃjñaka prakṛti vikārāṇām anyaḥ tu apratīkāra tat tat prakṛti vikāra saṃjñakāt anyat avyaktāt puruṣam śuddham niṣkaivalyam yena iyam sa sutā bahu prasavinī loka āśraya ālambinā yoni sthāḥ puruṣāḥ ca yena viditāḥ buddhyā sadā buddha vat draṣṭā ca eva paraḥ guṇaiḥ virahitaḥ jñānāt turīyaḥ akṣayaḥ sa aṅga aṅga sa itihāsa itihāsa pañcameṣu āsure vedeṣu aṣṭāsu vidyā sthāneṣu amṛtam uddhṛtya mayā anuvarṇitam sāṃkhya jñānam etāvat etat jñātavyam tattvāni tat tat etat na a putrāya na a śiṣyāya na a sarvasva sva pradāyine anyathā eva pravṛttāḥ svāhākāra svadhākāra uṃkāra vaṣaṭkāraiḥ ṛṣi koṭi sahasra ananta iṣ aniṣṭa aniṣṭa kṛ karmaṇā karmaṇā tathā eva deva dānava asura piśāca bhūta rākṣasa vidyādhara gandharva yakṣa nāga kiṃnara ādi anya bhūta bhūta grāmāḥ ajñāna patham āśritāḥ ajñānam eva avalīyante jāyante ca ca asakṛt asakṛt jñānāt sthāvara naraka tiryagyoniṣu eva upapadyante varṣa koṭi śata sahasrāṇi bhāva bhāva utpādakam trailokyāt anyat a paśyantaḥ niḥsaraṇam trailokyam eva agādham veda veda artham yajñaḥ yajña artham svargaḥ svarga artham sukham ca moha āyatanam iṣṭam śītībhū amṛta prāptāḥ evam ah śāntiḥ śāntiḥ iha antāya duḥkhasya tat mad utpanna utpad mātreṇa eva avabuddham uvāca tat tat parama jñānam āsureḥ ācāryeṇa anuśastam parama ṛṣiṇā bhagavatā kapila para bahu māna bhagavat ca āsurin śāstram śāstra bhagavate pañcaśikhāya pañcaśikha kātyāyanāya kātyāyana gautamāya gautama gārgyāya gārgyeṇa āvaṭyāyanāya āvaṭyāyanena ṛṣibhya ṛṣi tad ā idam parama tad para bhagavat vyāsa vyāsān mad avāptam avāp parama jñānam tathā mattaḥ bhavatā prāptam iti tat tat brāhmaṇān tāta śrāvayet saṃśita vratān kṣatriyān yājñikān ca eva prajā pālana tatparān vaiśyān ca nṛpa śārdūla sarva ātithya kṛta vratān śūdrān ca śuśrūṣa parān sarva sattva hite ratān mantra varjam tu śūdrāṇām kriyā dṛṣṭā iti śrutiḥ śāstra kārāḥ tathā ca etat pravadanti iti naḥ śrutam uvāca kliśyamāneṣu bhūteṣu jātī maraṇa sāgare uvāca atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam sanatkumārasya sataḥ saṃvādam nāradasya ca sanakaḥ sanandanaḥ ca eva tṛtīyaḥ ca sanātanaḥ jāta mātrāḥ ca te sarve pratibuddhāḥ iti śrutiḥ hairaṇyagarbhaḥ ca muniḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ pañcamaḥ smṛtaḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ sthāṇuḥ ca bhagavān ameya ātmā triśūladhṛk mānasāḥ svayambhuvaḥ hi marīci pramukhāḥ tathā mūrtimantaḥ amṛtībhūtāḥ tejasā ati tapaḥ nvitāḥ rudraḥ ca api aṣṭa guṇitam yogam prāptaḥ mahā yaśāḥ sūkṣmam aṣṭaguṇam rājan na itare nṛpa sattama niyuktāḥ rāja śārdūla teṣām sṛṣṭim śṛṇuṣva mama sapta brahmāṇaḥ iti eṣa purāṇe niścayaḥ gataḥ sarva vedeṣu ca eva uktāḥ khileṣu ca na saṃśayaḥ itihāse purāṇe ca śrutiḥ eṣā purātanā eteṣām pitaraḥ tāta putrāḥ iti anucakṣate gaṇāḥ sapta mahā rāja mūrtayaḥ amūrtayaḥ tathā pitṝṇām ca eva rāja indra putrāḥ devāḥ iti śrutiḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanāt ca eva devasthānāt tathā eva ca devalāt ca nara śreṣṭha kāśyapāt ca mayā śrutaḥ gautamāt atha kauṇḍinyāt bhāradvājāt tathā eva ca mārkaṇḍeyāt tathā eva etat ṛṣeḥ devatamāt tathā pitrā ca mama rāja indra śrāddha kāle prabhāṣitam param param rahasyam rāja indra brahmaṇaḥ paramātmanaḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi yat mā pṛcchasi bhārata tat iha ekamanāḥ śraddhī śṛṇuṣva avahitaḥ mama svāyaṃbhuvasya saṃvādam nāradasya ca dhīmataḥ sanatkumāraḥ bhagavān dīpam jajvālya tejasā aṅguṣṭha mātraḥ bhūtvā vai vicacāra mahā muniḥ sa kadā cit mahā rāja meru pṛṣṭhe sameyivān nāradena nara śreṣṭha muninā brahma vādinā jijñāsamānau anyonyam sakāśāt brahmaṇaḥ tadā śrutimān śrutimat śreṣṭham smṛtimān smṛtimattaram kṣetra vid kṣetra vid śreṣṭham jñāna vid jñāna vittamam sarva veda artha kuśalaḥ sarva śāstra viśāradaḥ sāṃkhya yogam ca yaḥ veda pāṇau āmalakam yathā kāla kāla saṃkhyāḥ ca sargān ca tat bhavān vaktum arhati śrūyatām ānupūrvyeṇa nava sargāḥ prayatnataḥ tathā kāla parīmāṇam tattvānām ṛṣi sattama paryāya nāmāni etasya kathayanti manīṣiṇaḥ tāni te saṃpravakṣyāmi tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu mahā arṇavaḥ arṇavaḥ ca eva salilam ca guṇāḥ tathā vedāḥ tapaḥ ca yajñāḥ ca dharmaḥ ca bhagavān vibhuḥ nāmāni etāni brahmarṣe śarīrasya īśvarasya vai kīrtitāni dvijaśreṣṭha mayā śāstra anumānataḥ prāhuḥ kalpa sahasram vai brāhmaṇāḥ tattva darśiṇaḥ daśa daśan kalpa sahasrāṇi avyaktasya mahāniśā tathā eva divasam prāhuḥ yogāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ ca tattvāt niśām suptvā atha bhagavān kṣapā ante pratyabudhyata ahar kṛtvā sukham tāta sasarja prabhuḥ īśvaraḥ hiraṇyagarbham viśvātmā hi aṇḍa jam jala jam munim mūrtimantam mahātmānam viśvam śaṃbhum svayambhum aṇima aṇiman alaghiman prāptim īśānam jyotiṣām param tasya ca api niśām āhuḥ veda vedāṅga pāragāḥ na sargam kurute brahmā tāmasasya anupūrvaśas ahaṃkāreṇa vai lokāḥ vyāptāḥ tu āhaṃkṛtena ca yena āviṣṭāni bhūtāni majjanti avyakta sāgare deva ṛṣi dānava narāḥ yakṣa gandharva kiṃnarāḥ etasya api niśām āhuḥ tṛtīyam atha kurvataḥ ahaṃkāraḥ ca sṛjati mahābhūtāni pañca vai pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśam apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamam eteṣām guṇa tattvāni pañca prāhuḥ dvijātayaḥ guṇeṣu eteṣu abhiratāḥ paṅka lagnāḥ iva dvipāḥ na uttiṣṭhanti a vaśībhūtāḥ saktāḥ avyakta sāgare indriyāṇi daśa ekam ca yathāśruti nidarśanāt na tathā anyāni bhūtāni balavanti yathā manaḥ etasya api tu vai sargam ṣaṣṭham āhuḥ dvijātayaḥ ahar kalpa sahasram vai rātriḥ etāvatī tathā aṣṭamaḥ ca api adhas srotaḥ tiryak tu navamaḥ smṛtaḥ caturviṃśatiḥ uktāni kāla saṃkhyāḥ ca te anagha yathāśrutam yathādṛṣṭam tat tathā vai nibodha me etābhyām īśvaram vidyāt ūrdhvasrotaḥ tathā eva ca karmendriyāṇām pañcānām īśvaraḥ buddhi gocaraḥ buddhīndriyāṇām atha tu manaḥ īśvaram ucyate manasaḥ pañca bhūtāni sa guṇāni āhuḥ īśvaram bhūtānām īśvaram vidyāt brahmāṇam parameṣṭhinam kālāgniḥ api ahar svam te jagant dahati ca aṃśubhiḥ tatas sarvāṇi bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca hāhā bhūtāni dagdhāni sva yonim gamitāni vai kūrma pṛṣṭha pṛṣṭha nibhā bhūmiḥ nirdagdha kuśa kaṇṭakā nirvṛkṣā nistṛṇā ca eva dagdhā kālāgninā tadā naṣṭa gandhā tadā sūkṣmā jalam eva abhavat tadā vāyoḥ api guṇam sparśam ākāśam grasate yadā praṇaśyati tadā vāyuḥ kham tu tiṣṭhati nānadat sa śabda guṇa hīna ātmā tiṣṭhate amūrtimān tu vai vinaṣṭe ca tadā citte ahaṃkāraḥ bhavet mahān ahaṃkāram tadā ādatte mahān brahmā prajāpatiḥ abhimāne vinaṣṭe tu mahān brahmā virājate tam tadā triṣu lokeṣu mūrtiṣu eva agra mūrti jam yena viśvam idam kṛtsnam nirmitam vai guṇa arthinā mūrtim jaleśvaram api vyavasāya guṇa ātmakam eṣaḥ apyayaḥ ca pralayaḥ mayā te paribhāṣitaḥ adhyātmam adhibhūtam ca adhidaivam ca śrūyatām ākāśam prathamam bhūtam śrotram adhyātmam śabdaḥ adhibhūtam diśaḥ adhidaivatam vāyuḥ dvitīyam bhūtam tvac adhyātmam sparśaḥ adhibhūtam vidyut adhidaivatam syāt jyotiḥ tṛtīyam bhūtam cakṣuḥ adhyātmam rūpam adhibhūtam sūryaḥ adhidaivatam syāt āpaḥ caturtham bhūtam jihvā adhyātmam rasaḥ adhibhūtam somaḥ adhidaivatam syāt pṛthivī pañcamam bhūtam ghrāṇam adhyātmam atas ūrdhvam trividham indriya vidhim anuvarṇayiṣyāmaḥ adhyātmam gantavyam adhibhūtam viṣṇuḥ adhidaivatam syāt adhyātmam syāt ahaṃkāraḥ adhyātmam abhimānaḥ adhibhūtam viriñcaḥ adhidaivatam kasmāt krīḍā artham yathā ādityaḥ aṃśu jālam kṣipati saṃharate ca yathā ca ca antarikṣāt abhra kośaḥ uttiṣṭhati evam evam avyaktaḥ guṇān sṛjati saṃharate ca yathā yathā ca arṇavāt ūrmi jālam ca yathā ca kūrmaḥ aṅgāni kāmāt prasārayate punar ca praveśayati śuciḥ tena adhiṣṭhitā prakṛtiḥ cetayati nityam uvāca aṇuḥ kṣetrajñaḥ kṣemyaḥ iti yadi acetanā prakṛtiḥ cetanā adhiṣṭhitā cetayati kasmāt na mokṣaḥ asti bhavadvidhānām cetaskāṅkṣiṇām cetaḥ hi pañcaviṃśakam upadiśanti yogāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ ca tat ca ayuktam upadiśanti tat vañcanāt ca ayuta prakṛti saha dharmā ca manyāmahe adhiṣṭhātṛ tvāt aṇu tvāt cetaḥ iti atas ca bhavati eva saṅgaḥ asti nirguṇasya guṇinā tatra tatra ślokān udāharanti budhāḥ tān upadhārayasva upadhāray eka arthe paryāya vacanam kṛtvā adhiṣṭhā puruṣaḥ puruṣa nityam prakṛtyā na ca ātman cetanā puruṣaḥ nityam kālasya na ca ātmanaḥ draṣṭā hi puruṣaḥ nityam manasaḥ na ca ātmanaḥ jñātā jñātṛ hi puruṣaḥ nityam kṣetrasya na ca ātmanaḥ kṣetrajñaḥ aśucinīm prakṛtim udāharanti saṅgī saṅgin hi saṅgavān saṅgī ca ca asaṅgaḥ iti yaḥ asaṅgaḥ hi ātmānam saṅginam anupaśyati sa kṛta prāyaścittasya artha tarṣiṇaḥ vaṇij saṃghasya yānapātra arṇava udara gataḥ caṇḍa vāyunā bhidyamānaḥ itas tatas ca vimalābhiḥ ūrmibhiḥ bhidyamānaḥ hāhā bhūtaḥ janaḥ vyāpadyet śataśas ca a prāpta manorathāḥ mukhāt uvāca yadā deva ṛṣe ṛṣi samyak abhidhā bhavatā prakṛtiḥ hi puruṣaḥ ca kartṛ tvāt tva guṇānām anityām prakṛtim udāharanti akartṛ tvāt nityaḥ puruṣaḥ prakṛtiḥ guṇān kuryāt veda ca ātmānam puruṣaḥ ca nitya nitya anitya bhāve vīta rāga tve ubhau amūrtī hi ajarau ubhau eva mahātmabhiḥ puruṣaḥ viṣayī nityam prakṛtiḥ viṣayaḥ smṛtaḥ puruṣaḥ ca api jānāti bhuṅkte yaḥ ca sa bhujyate manyanti evam vibhāga jñāḥ bhoktāram tasya ca īśvaram aiśvaryam bhavati īśa tvāt prakṛtyāḥ dvijasattama anīśa tvāt anaiśvaryam puruṣasya anucakṣate dvaṃdva bhāvāt anityam hi triguṇā prakṛtiḥ tathā kṣetram param guhā kṣaya karam cala vraṇa karam niśicaram nidhiḥ matiḥ smṛtiḥ dhṛtiḥ iti ca etāni prakṛti paryāya nāmāni atha aparāṇi bhūtam bhavyam bhaviṣyam bhavantaḥ kṣetrajñam vimokṣam viśokam vimoham vidambhāt vilobhāt vikārāt viruddhāt ānṛśaṃsyāt a laulyam aśaraṇam abhayam an avayavam paśyante jñāna jñāna ajñānayoḥ vivāsa sahavāsaḥ anyat eva jñānam ajñānam kṣetrajñaḥ tyakṣyati prakṛtim na ca prakṛtiḥ kṣetrajñam tyaj man prakṛtim kṣetrajñaḥ na ca prakṛtiḥ kṣetrajñam manyate budh kṣetrajñaḥ na ca prakṛtiḥ kṣetrajñam budhyate paśyati prakṛtim kṣetrajña na ca prakṛtiḥ kṣetrajñam paśyati etat vivāsa sahavāsam iti etat nānātva darśanam paśyanti deva ṛṣe jñātāram tat asaṅgam anupaśyatu yogāḥ ca sāṃkhyāḥ ca vadanti samyak na pañcaviṃśāt param asti kim cit paśyaḥ paśyati paśyantam a paśyantam ca paśyati apaśyaḥ tau apaśya tvāt paśya apaśyau na paśyati prakṛtiḥ kṣetram kṣetrajñaḥ ca aparaḥ kṣetrajñaḥ ṣaḍviṃśakaḥ anupaśyati na tat pañcaviṃśaḥ kṣetrajñaḥ prakṛtiḥ vā param kṣetrajñam paśyati śivam hi teṣām iha eva ca amutra saṃśayaḥ na asti sukham param janma ca aham munibhiḥ ṛṣibhiḥ īritam param parama śucim tam upāsya te gatāḥ etat mayā upasanneṣu upadiṣṭam deva ṛṣe hiraṇyanābhasya mahā asurasya baleḥ bali marīceḥ pulastya pulahayoḥ tathā bhṛgu aṅgirasoḥ atri vasiṣṭha kāśyapānām samam draṣṭavyam brahmaṇi brahman ca indre śuni kīṭe pataṃga daṃśa maśakeṣu samyak uvāca etat śrutvā muni śreṣṭhaḥ nāradaḥ sa mahā muniḥ parayā ca mudā yuktaḥ praṇamya śirasā gurum pradakṣiṇam ca tam kṛtvā jagāma bhavanam svakam uvāca saṃyamanaḥ kāśi patiḥ avimukta gatam munim papraccha jñāna vijñānam kapilāt āgata āgama kaḥ viśvam sṛjate sarvam idam saṃharate ca kaḥ kaḥ ca viśvam adhiṣṭhāya sthā agni vat dāruṣu kaḥ ca viśvam aviśvam ca nityam eva anupaśyati kim ca havyam ca kavyam ca paṭhyate śāstra darśanāt bhūtādiḥ ca muni śreṣṭha vikārādiḥ tathā eva ca sa vijñānam sa daśakam tathā upaniṣadam mune purāṇam ca muni śreṣṭha yathābuddhi sanātanam sa aṅga upāṅgāḥ ca catvāraḥ vedāḥ tiṣṭhanti veda vid viditam veditavyam hi pāṇau āmalakam yathā śāśvatena aprameyena acalena amṛtena ca uvāca pāpa ghnam amṛtam śreṣṭham pavitrāṇām parāyaṇam śrūyatām nṛpa śārdūla sarvam etat asaṃśayam sarvasya ca asya jñānasya kṛtsna kārī bhavān api viśanāt viśvam iti āhuḥ lokānām kāśi sattama lokānām api aviśanāt aviśvam iti tam viduḥ eva āhuḥ aparam śāstra darśanāt nara śreṣṭha tattva buddhi parāyaṇāḥ narāṇām nara śārdūla tattvam etat asaṃśayam vibhāginaḥ ca vai nityam vimalāḥ ca iti naḥ śrutiḥ ajāḥ ca amūrtayaḥ ca eva aprakampya avyayāḥ ca ha agrāhyāḥ ca apratarkyāḥ ca tathā amartyāḥ ca pārthiva an ādi nidhanāḥ ca eva tathā amūrtyāḥ ca te anagha acchedyāḥ cāmarāḥ ca eva apradahyatamāḥ ca vai nirguṇāḥ cetanāḥ ca eva paśyāḥ ca iti narādhipa santi sarve guṇāḥ hi eṣām trayāṇām nṛpa sattama aham tattvam pravakṣyāmi yathā ca ācārya darśanam ekaḥ atra guṇavān ca eva tathā eva acetanaḥ ca ha apaśyaḥ ca mahā rāja pradhānaḥ iti paṭhyate saṃdhāvati iti rāja indraḥ iti evam anuśuśruma prākṛtāni asya catvāri vaikṛtāni tu pañca vai prāṇānām ādim eva etam āhuḥ adhyātma cintakāḥ mahān iti ca nāma asya prāhuḥ veda vipaścitaḥ viriñcāt rāja śārdūla vairiñcaḥ sargaḥ ucyate ekaikaśas viriñcaḥ vai vairiñcāt utpattitaḥ smṛtaḥ ete sargāḥ mahā rāja vidyā avidyā iti naḥ śrutiḥ vairiñcāt pañca bhūtāni vairiñcāni narādhipa utpadyante mahā rāja ahaṃkārāt asaṃśayam pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśam apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamam pañca bhūta viśeṣāḥ ca yugapad kāśi nandana vairiñcaḥ viṣaya arthī tu jajñe bhūteṣu pañcasu buddhīndriyāṇi rāja indra tathā karmendriyāṇi api caturaḥ prākṛtān sargān yugapad tāta buddhimān vaikṛtān pañca ca eva āhuḥ adhyātma kṛta niścayāḥ tvam ca eva anye ca rāja indra tattva buddhi viśāradāḥ vikāra ādi manaḥ prāhuḥ trayāṇām pañcakāni vai bhūta ādīnām tu pañcānām āhuḥ vikharam eva tu prāṇa apāna samānānām udāna vyānayoḥ ca ha viriñcam āhuḥ prāṇa ādim brāhmaṇāḥ tattva darśinaḥ trayoviṃśati tattvānām vyaktānām nṛpa sattama uvāca āvyaktikasya sādṛśyam viriñcasya prajāpateḥ vyaktasya avyaktam iti āhuḥ viśva rūpasya naḥ śrutiḥ veditavyaḥ mahā rāja viśva rūpaḥ sanātanaḥ śrotram adhyātmam śabdaḥ adhibhūtam ākāśam adhidaivatam adhyātmam pādau adhyātmam gantavyam adhibhūtam viṣṇuḥ adhidaivatam hastau an abhidroheṇa brāhmaṇa indre śvani kīṭe pataṃga puttikā daṃśa maśakeṣu ca kāla jñānam puruṣebhyaḥ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ tat etat paryāya śata sahasraśas pañcaśatam pañca ahorātram apadiśyate puruṣāṇām tatra ekasya pratiṣiddham avyaktasya caturṇām ācāryāḥ apadiśyate prādhānikasya mahataḥ catvāriṃśat paryāya śata sahasrāṇi ahar rātram ibhyaḥ paśyet nityam kāla jñānam kāla jñāne asya avyaktasya acetanasya jñāna vijñānam iti paśyantyāḥ bīja dharmiṇam bīja dharmiṇām a prasava dharmiṇām a prakṛti dharmiṇām a pralaya dharmiṇām pralaya dharmiṇām nityam sahadharmā syāt evam khalu ayam kṣetra sahasra koṭiṣu avatiṣṭhamānaḥ nityam sahadharmaḥ syāt yadi khalu asya aniṣṭam kṣetram sahadharmitvam syāt na ayam iṣṭa aniṣṭe pravartamānaḥ prakṛtim anuvarteta asya iṣṭā prakṛtiḥ guṇān ca tān anuvartate ca tat abhiṣvajanāt anugamanāt ca vakṣyāmaḥ kaḥ cit guṇya guṇinā sārdham samīyāya sametya ca kārya kāraṇam kurvīta tam ca tathā iṣṭa aniṣṭe
