co co co co co co co co co co co co co co co co co co chid saṃśaya sarvatas nivṛt brāhmaṇarūpa brāhmaṇapriya viśvamūrti mūrti bāndhava bhaktavatsala brahmaṇyadeva bhakta aham tvad didṛkṣu ekānta darśana namas namas uvāca tam munim darśayām āsa nāradam viśva rūpa dhṛk kim cit candra viśuddha ātmā kim cit candrāt viśeṣavān kṛśānu varṇaḥ kim cit ca kim cit dhiṣṇya ākṛtiḥ prabhuḥ pravāla aṅkura varṇaḥ ca śveta varṇaḥ kva cit babhau kva cit suvarṇa varṇa ābhaḥ vaiḍūrya sadṛśaḥ kva cit nīla vaiḍūrya sadṛśaḥ indranīla nibhaḥ kva cit mayūragrīva varṇa ābhaḥ muktā hāra nibhaḥ kva cit etān varṇān bahuvidhān rūpe bibhrat sanātanaḥ sahasranayanaḥ śrīmān śataśīrṣaḥ sahasrapād oṃkāram udgiran vaktrāt sāvitrīm ca tad anvayām udgiran caturaḥ vedān sa śeṣān vasudhādhipa āraṇyakam jagau devaḥ hariḥ nārāyaṇaḥ vaśī vedīm kamaṇḍalum darbhān maṇi rūpān atha upalān ajinam daṇḍa kāṣṭham ca jvalitam ca hutāśanam dhārayām āsa deveśaḥ hastaiḥ yajñapatiḥ tadā tam uvāca natam mūrdhnā devānām ādiḥ avyayaḥ imam deśam anuprāptāḥ mama darśana lālasāḥ na ca mām te dadṛśire na ca drakṣyati kaḥ cana ṛte hi ekāntika śreṣṭhāt tvam ca eva ekāntikaḥ mataḥ mama etāḥ tanavaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ jātāḥ dharma gṛhe dvija uvāca sadyas phalam avāptam vai dṛṣṭaḥ yat bhagavān mayā varaḥ eṣa mama atyantam dṛṣṭaḥ tvam yat sanātanaḥ bhagavant viśva dṛś siṃhaḥ sarva mūrtiḥ mahā prabhuḥ uvāca evam saṃdarśayitvā tu nāradam parameṣṭhi jam ekāgrāḥ cintayeyuḥ mām na eṣām vighnaḥ bhavet iti siddhāḥ ca ete mahābhāgāḥ purā hi ekāntinaḥ abhavan na dṛśyaḥ cakṣuṣā yaḥ asau na spṛśyaḥ sparśanena ca bhūta grāma śarīreṣu naśyatsu na vinaśyati ajaḥ nityaḥ śāśvataḥ ca nirguṇaḥ niṣkalaḥ tathā dvis dvādaśebhyaḥ tattvebhyaḥ khyātaḥ yaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ puruṣaḥ niṣkriyaḥ ca eva jñāna dṛśyaḥ ca kathyate sa vāsudevaḥ vijñeyaḥ parama ātmā sanātanaḥ paśya devasya māhātmyam mahimānam ca nārada etān guṇān tu kṣetrajñaḥ bhuṅkte na ebhiḥ sa bhujyate paśya jīvasya māhātmyam yaḥ evam guṇa bhojakaḥ īṣat laghu parikrāntaḥ na guṇāḥ tasya bhojakāḥ bhūta grāmam imam kṛtsnam pṛthak karma pṛthak mukham prakṛti sthaḥ avatiṣṭhāmi na ca tiṣṭhāmi mūrtimān prāṇa apāna pravāreṇa śarīram prāpya dhiṣṭhitaḥ mama eva hi jantūnām nimeṣa unmeṣa kṛt dvija mām tu jānīhi viprarṣe puruṣam sarvagam prabhum nirguṇaḥ guṇabhuj ca eva guṇasraṣṭā guṇa adhikaḥ khe vāyuḥ pralayam yāti manasi ākāśam eva ca kālaḥ hi paramam bhūtam manasi eṣa pralīyate na asti tasmāt parataram puruṣāt vai sanātanāt mām tu jānīhi brahmarṣe puruṣam sarvagam prabhum ṛte tam ekam puruṣam vāsudevam sanātanam sarva bhūta ātma bhūtaḥ hi vāsudevaḥ mahā balaḥ pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśam apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamam te sametāḥ mahātmānaḥ śarīram iti saṃjñitam utpannaḥ eva bhavati śarīram ceṣṭayan prabhuḥ na vinā dhātu saṃghātam śarīram bhavati kva cit na ca jīvam vinā brahman dhātavaḥ ceṣṭayanti uta pṛthak bhūtāḥ ca te nityam kṣetrajñaḥ pṛthak eva ca ete pañcasu bhūteṣu śarīra stheṣu kalpitāḥ sa jīvaḥ parisaṃkhyā śeṣaḥ saṃkarṣaṇaḥ prabhuḥ yasmin ca sarva bhūtāni pralayam yānti saṃkṣaye sa manaḥ sarva bhūtānām pradyumnaḥ paripaṭhyate tasmāt prasūtaḥ yaḥ kartā kāryam kāraṇam eva ca saḥ aniruddhaḥ saḥ īśānaḥ vyaktiḥ sā sarva karmasu yaḥ vāsudevaḥ bhagavant kṣetrajñaḥ nirguṇa ātmakaḥ jñeyaḥ saḥ eva bhagavant jīvaḥ saṃkarṣaṇaḥ prabhuḥ akṣaram ca kṣaram ca eva sat ca asat ca eva nārada aham hi puruṣaḥ jñeyaḥ niṣkriyaḥ pañcaviṃśakaḥ etat tvayā na vijñeyam rūpavān iti dṛśyate icchat muhūrtāt naśyeyam īśaḥ aham jagataḥ guruḥ māyā hi eṣā mayā sṛṣṭā yat mām paśyasi nārada sarva bhūta guṇaiḥ yuktam na evam tvam jñātum arhasi tamaḥ rajobhyām nirmuktāḥ pravekṣyanti ca mām mune aham kartā ca kāryam ca kāraṇam ca api nārada aham hi jīva saṃjñaḥ vai mayi jīvaḥ samāhitaḥ mā evam te buddhiḥ atra abhūt dṛṣṭaḥ jīvaḥ mayā iti ca bhūta grāma śarīreṣu naśyatsu na naśāmi aham lalāṭāt ca eva mama rudraḥ devaḥ krodhāt viniḥsṛtaḥ paśya ekādaśa me rudrān dakṣiṇam pārśvam āsthitān dvādaśa eva tathā ādityān vāmam pārśvam samāsthitān agratas ca eva me paśya vasūn aṣṭau sura uttamān nāsatyam ca eva dasram ca bhiṣajau paśya pṛṣṭhatas sarvān prajāpatīn paśya paśya sapta ṛṣīn api vedān yajñān ca śataśas paśya amṛtam atha auṣadhīḥ tapāṃsi niyamān ca eva yamān api pṛthagvidhān tathā aṣṭaguṇam aiśvaryam ekastham paśya mūrtimat śriyam lakṣmīm ca kīrtim ca pṛthivīm ca kakudminīm vedānām mātaram paśya mad sthām devīm sarasvatīm dhruvam ca jyotiṣām śreṣṭham paśya nārada khecaram ambhodharān samudrān ca sarāṃsi saritaḥ tathā mūrtimantaḥ pitṛ gaṇān caturaḥ paśya sattama trīn ca eva imān guṇān paśya mad sthān mūrti vivarjitān deva kāryāt api mune pitṛ kāryam viśiṣyate devānām ca pitṝṇām ca pitā hi ekaḥ aham āditas mayā sṛṣṭaḥ purā brahmā mad yajñam ayajat svayam ahaṃkāra kṛtam ca eva nāma paryāya vācakam tvayā kṛtām ca maryādām na atikrāmyati kaḥ cana sura asura gaṇānām ca ṛṣīṇām ca tapodhana pitṝṇām ca mahābhāga satatam saṃśita vrata vividhānām ca bhūtānām tvam upāsyaḥ bhaviṣyasi prādurbhāva gataḥ ca aham sura kāryeṣu nityadā etān ca anyān ca rucirān brahmaṇe amita tejase nirvāṇam sarva dharmāṇām nivṛttiḥ parama smṛ tasmāt nivṛttim āpannaḥ caret sarva aṅga nirvṛtaḥ vidyā sahāyavantam mām āditya stham sanātanam kapilam prāhuḥ ācāryāḥ sāṃkhya niścita niścayāḥ eṣaḥ aham vyaktim āgamya tiṣṭhāmi divi śāśvataḥ kṛtvā ātma sthāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca ekākī vidyayā sārdham vihariṣye dvijottama tatas bhūyas jagat sarvam kariṣyāmi iha vidyayā mad mūrtiḥ caturthī yā sā asṛjat śeṣam avyayam sa hi saṃkarṣaṇaḥ proktaḥ pradyumnam saḥ api ajījanat brahmaṇaḥ sarva bhūtāni carāṇi sthāvarāṇi ca etām sṛṣṭim vijānīhi kalpa ādiṣu punar punar naṣṭau punar balāt kālaḥ ānayati amita dyutiḥ tathā balāt aham pṛthvīm sarva bhūta hitāya vai bhīṣmaḥ śrī bhagavant uvāca keṣu keṣu ca bhāveṣu draṣṭavyaḥ asi mayā prabho śṛṇu nārada tattvena prādurbhāvāt mahā mune matsyaḥ kūrmaḥ varāhaḥ ca nārasiṃhaḥ atha vāmanaḥ rāmaḥ rāmaḥ ca rāmaḥ ca kṛṣṇaḥ kalkī ca te daśa pūrvam mīnaḥ bhaviṣyāmi sthāpayiṣyāmi aham prajāḥ lokān vedān dhariṣyāmi majjamānān mahā arṇave dvitīyam kūrma rūpam me hemakūṭa nibham smṛtam mandaram dhārayiṣyāmi amṛta artham dvijottama magnām mahā arṇave ghore bhāra ākrāntām imām punar sattvaiḥ ākrānta sarva aṅgām naṣṭām sāgaramekhalām ānayiṣyāmi svam sthānam vārāham rūpam āsthitaḥ hiraṇyākṣam haniṣyāmi daiteyam bala garvitam nārasiṃham vapuḥ kṛtvā hiraṇyakaśipum punar avadhyaḥ sarva lokānām sa deva asura rakṣasām bhaviṣyati sa śakram ca sva rājyāt cyāvayiṣyati aditau dvādaśaḥ putraḥ saṃbhaviṣyāmi kaśyapāt jaṭī gatvā yajña sadaḥ stūyamānaḥ dvijottamaiḥ yajña stavam kariṣyāmi śrutvā prītaḥ bhavet baliḥ dīyatām tripadī mātram iti yāce mahā asuram sa dadyāt mayi saṃprītaḥ pratiṣiddhaḥ ca mantribhiḥ tatas rājyam pradāsyāmi śakrāya amita tejase devatāḥ sthāpayiṣyāmi sveṣu sthāneṣu nārada balim ca eva kariṣyāmi pātāla tala vāsinam dānavam balinām śreṣṭham avadhyam sarva daivataiḥ tretā yuge bhaviṣyāmi rāmaḥ bhṛgukulodvahaḥ bāhu vīrya yutaḥ kṣatram ca utsādayiṣyāmi samṛddha bala vāhanam rāmaḥ dāśarathiḥ bhū bhaviṣyāmi jagatpatiḥ prāpsyataḥ vānara tvam hi prajāpati sutau ṛṣī mahā balāḥ mahā vīryāḥ śakra tulya parākramāḥ haniṣye rāvaṇam saṃkhye sa gaṇam lokakaṇṭakam tad rājye sthāpayiṣyāmi vibhīṣaṇam akalmaṣam vibhīṣaṇāya dāsyāmi rājyam tasya yathākramam prādurbhāvaḥ kaṃsa hetoḥ mathurāyām bhaviṣyati kali dvāparayoḥ saṃdhau aṣṭāviṃśe caturyuge prādurbhāvam kariṣyāmi bhūyas vṛṣṇi kula udvahaḥ madhurāyām kaṃsa hetoḥ vāsudeva iti nāmataḥ tatra aham dānavān hatvā su bahūn deva kaṇṭakān kuśasthalīm kariṣyāmi nivāsam dvārakām purīm haniṣye narakam bhaumam muram pīṭham ca dānavam kuśasthalīm nayiṣyāmi hatvā vai dānava uttamān kṛkalāsa bhūtam ca nṛgam mocayiṣye ca vai punar bāṇasya ca puram gatvā kariṣye kadanam mahat śaṃkaram ca mahāsenam bāṇa priya hita eṣiṇam tatas sutam baleḥ jitvā bāṇam bāhu sahasriṇam vināśayiṣyāmi tatas sarvān saubha nivāsinaḥ kaṃsam keśim tathā krūram ariṣṭam ca mahā asuram cāṇūram ca mahā vīryam muṣṭikam ca mahā balam pralambam dhenukam ca eva ariṣṭam vṛṣa rūpiṇam kālīyam ca vaśe kṛtvā yamunāyāḥ mahā hrade go kuleṣu tatas paścāt go arthe tu mahā girim sapta rātram dhariṣyāmi varṣamāṇe tu vāsave indreṇa saha saṃvādam kariṣyāmi tadā dvija yaḥ kālayavanaḥ khyātaḥ garga tejobhiḥ saṃvṛ jarāsaṃdhaḥ ca balavān sarva rāja virodhakaḥ śiśupālam vadhiṣyāmi yajñe dharmasutasya vai samāgateṣu baliṣu pṛthivyām sarva rājasu yudhiṣṭhiram sthāpayiṣye sva rājye bhrātṛbhiḥ saha evam lokāḥ vadiṣyanti nara nārāyaṇau ṛṣī udyuktau dahataḥ kṣatram loka kārya artham īśvarau kṛtvā bhāra avataraṇam vasudhāyāḥ yathā īpsitam rājyam praśāsati punar kuntī putre yudhiṣṭhire sarva sātvata mukhyānām dvārakāyāḥ ca sattama kariṣye pralayam ghoram ātma jñāti vināśanam kṛtvā lokān gamiṣyāmi svān aham brahma satkṛtān tatas kali yugasya ādau bhūtvā rājatarum śritaḥ bhāṣayā māgadhena eva dharmarāja gṛhe vadan kāṣāya vastra saṃvītaḥ muṇḍitaḥ śukla dantavān śūdrāḥ śrāddheṣu bhojyante mayi buddha tvam āgate bhaviṣyanti narāḥ sarve muṇḍāḥ kāṣāya saṃvṛtāḥ anadhyāyāḥ bhaviṣyanti viprāḥ ca agni vivarjitāḥ agnihotrāṇi sīdanti guru pūjā ca naśyati na śṛṇvanti pituḥ putrāḥ na snuṣāḥ na eva mātaraḥ teṣām sakāśāt dharma jñāḥ deva brahma dviṣaḥ narāḥ bhaviṣyanti hi aśuddhāḥ ca nyāya chala vibhāṣiṇaḥ ye nagna dharma śrotāraḥ te samāḥ pāpa niścayaiḥ tasmāt ete na saṃbhāṣyāḥ na spraṣṭavyāḥ hita arthibhiḥ tatas kali yugasya ante brāhmaṇaḥ hari piṅgalaḥ kalkiḥ viṣṇuyaśaḥ putraḥ yājñavalkya purohitaḥ sahāyāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ sarve taiḥ aham sahitaḥ punar mlecchān utsādayiṣyāmi pāṣaṇḍān ca eva sarvaśas pāṣaṇḍi ṣaṭkān hatvā vai tatra antar pralaye tatas aham paścāt bhaviṣyāmi yajñeṣu nirataḥ sadā haṃsaḥ hayaśirāḥ ca eva prādurbhāvāḥ dvijottama vārāhaḥ nārasiṃhaḥ ca vāmanaḥ rāmaḥ eva ca rāmaḥ dāśarathiḥ ca eva sātvataḥ kalkiḥ eva ca yadā veda śrutiḥ naṣṭā mayā pratyāhṛtā tadā sa vedāḥ sa śrutīkāḥ ca kṛtāḥ pūrvam kṛte yuge atikrāntāḥ purāṇeṣu śrutāḥ te yadi vā kva cit atikrāntāḥ ca bahavaḥ prādurbhāvāḥ mama uttamāḥ puruṣaḥ sarvam eva idam akṣayaḥ ca avyayaḥ ca ha loka kāryāṇi kṛtvā ca punar svām prakṛtim gatāḥ na hi etat brahmaṇā prāptam īdṛśam mama darśanam purāṇam ca bhaviṣyam ca sa rahasyam ca sattama nāradaḥ api mahā tejāḥ prāpya anugraham īpsitam nara nārāyaṇau draṣṭum prādravat badara āśramam sāṃkhya yoga kṛtam tena pañcarātra anuśabditam nārāyaṇa mukha udgā nārada aśrāvayat punar brahman sadane tāta yathā dṛś yathā śru evam paraṃparā khyātam idam śaṃtanunā śrutam uvāca etat āścarya bhūtam hi māhātmyam tasya dhīmataḥ kim brahmā na vijānīte yatas śuśrāva nāradāt pitāmaha hi bhagavat tasmāt devāt anantaraḥ katham sa na vijānīyāt prabhāvam amita ojasaḥ uvāca mahākalpa sahasrāṇi mahākalpa śatāni ca samatītāni rāja indra sargāḥ ca pralayāḥ ca ha jānāti deva pravaram bhūyas ca atas adhikam nṛpa parama ātmānam īśānam ātmanaḥ prabhavam tathā tebhyaḥ tat śrāvayām āsa purāṇam veda saṃmitam teṣām sakāśāt sūryaḥ ca śrutvā vai bhāvitātmanām ātma anugāminām brahma śrāvayām āsa bhārata ṣaṭṣaṣṭiḥ hi sahasrāṇi ṛṣīṇām bhāvitātmanām sūryasya tapataḥ lokān nirmitāḥ ye puraḥsarāḥ teṣām akathayat sūryaḥ sarveṣām bhāvitātmanām sūrya anugāmibhiḥ tāta ṛṣibhiḥ taiḥ mahātmabhiḥ merau samāgatāḥ devāḥ śrāvitāḥ ca idam uttamam devānām tu sakāśāt vai tatas śrutvā asitaḥ dvijaḥ śrāvayām āsa rāja indra pitṝṇām muni sattamaḥ mama ca api pitā tāta kathayām āsa śaṃtanuḥ nāradāt ca eva deva ṛṣeḥ purāṇam aham āptavān suraiḥ vā munibhiḥ vā api purāṇam yaiḥ idam śru sarva tad paramātmānam pūjay punar punar idam ākhyānam ārṣeyam pāramparya āgatam nṛpa na a vāsudeva bhaktāya tvayā deyam katham cana ākhyānam uttamam ca idam śrāvayet yaḥ sadā nṛpa prāpnuyāt acirāt rājan viṣṇu lokam sanātanam mattaḥ anyāni ca te rājan upākhyāna śatāni vai yāni śrutāni dharmyāṇi teṣām sāraḥ ayam uddhṛtaḥ yaḥ ca idam paṭhate nityam yaḥ ca idam śṛṇuyāt naraḥ prāpya śvetam mahā dvīpam bhūtvā candra prabhaḥ naraḥ sa sahasra arciṣam devam praviś na atra saṃśayaḥ mucyet ārtaḥ tathā rogāt śrutvā imām āditas kathām vāsudevam mahātmānam śrotavyam vidhi pūrvakam brahmaṇyadeva bhagavant prī tvad sanātana yudhiṣṭhira mahā bāho mahā bāhuḥ janārdanaḥ uvāca bhrātaraḥ ca asya te sarve nārāyaṇa pare abhavan nityam japya pare bhūtvā sarasvatīm udīrayan yaḥ hi mama guruḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ muniḥ tad jagau parama japyam nārāyaṇam udīrayan gatvā antarikṣāt satatam kṣīrodam amṛta āśayam pūjayitvā ca deveśam punar āyāt sva āśrama uvāca pāramparya āgatam hi etat pitrā mama kathitam purā uvāca etat te sarvam ākhyātam vaiśampāyana kīrtitam sarve veda vidaḥ mukhyāḥ naimiṣa araṇya vāsinaḥ śaunakasya mahā satram prāptāḥ sarve dvijottamāḥ yajña dhārī ca satatam veda vedāṅga vid tathā nivṛttam ca āsthitaḥ dharmam kṣemī bhāgavata priyaḥ katham pravṛtti dharmeṣu bhāga arhāḥ devatāḥ kṛtāḥ katham nivṛtti dharmāḥ ca kṛtāḥ vyāvṛtta buddhayaḥ etam naḥ saṃśayam vipra chinddhi guhyam sanātanam tvayā nārāyaṇa kathā śrutā vai dharma saṃhitā uvāca janamejayena yat pṛṣṭaḥ śiṣyaḥ vyāsasya dhīmataḥ tat te aham kīrtayiṣyāmi paurāṇam śaunaka uttama śrutvā māhātmyam etasya dehinām parama ātmanaḥ janamejayaḥ mahā prājñaḥ vaiśaṃpāyanam abravīt ime sa brahmakāḥ lokāḥ sa sura asura mānavāḥ kriyāsu abhyudaya uktāsu saktāḥ dṛśyanti sarvaśas mokṣaḥ ca uktaḥ tvayā brahman nirvāṇam paramam sukham ye ca muktāḥ bhavanti iha puṇya pāpa vivarjitāḥ te sahasra arciṣam devam praviśanti iti śuśrumaḥ aho hi duranuṣṭheyaḥ mokṣa dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ ākāśam jagatī ca eva ye ca śeṣāḥ divaukasaḥ smṛtvā kāla parīmāṇam pravṛttim ye samāsthitāḥ doṣaḥ kāla parīmāṇe mahān eṣa kriyāvatām etat me saṃśayam vipra hṛdi śalyam iva arpitam katham bhāga harāḥ proktāḥ devatāḥ kratuṣu dvija uvāca aho gūḍhatamaḥ praśnaḥ tvayā pṛṣṭaḥ janeśvara na a tapta tapasā hi eṣa na a veda viduṣā tathā na a purāṇa vidā ca api śakyaḥ vyāhartum añjasā hanta tvad kathayiṣyāmi yad me pṛṣṭaḥ purā guruḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ vyāsaḥ vedavyāsaḥ mahān ṛṣiḥ aham caturthaḥ śiṣyaḥ vai pañcamaḥ ca śukaḥ smṛtaḥ etān samāgatān sarvān pañca śiṣyān dama anvitān śauca ācāra samāyuktān jita krodhān jita indriyān vedān adhyāpayām āsa mahābhārata pañcamān teṣām abhyasyatām vedān kadā cit saṃśayaḥ abhavat kim tu brahmā atha rudraḥ vā devatāḥ ṛṣayaḥ tathā prāyas pravṛtti mārga sthāḥ kasya devasya śāsanāt ke vai nivṛtti mārga sthāḥ kasya devasya śāsanāt ke vai yajante sarve api kaḥ eṣām īśvaraḥ paraḥ eṣa vai yaḥ tvayā pṛṣṭaḥ tena teṣām prakīrtitaḥ tatas śrutaḥ mayā ca api te ākhyeyaḥ adya bhārata śiṣyāṇām vacanam śrutvā sarva ajñāna tamonudaḥ parāśara sutaḥ śrīmān vyāsaḥ vākyam uvāca ha bhūtam bhavyam bhaviṣyat ca jānīyām iti sattamāḥ nārāyaṇa prasādena kṣīrodasya anukūlataḥ traikālikam idam jñānam prādurbhūtam yathā īpsitam tat śṛṇudhvam yathājñānam vakṣye saṃśayam uttamam yathā vṛttam hi kalpa ādau dṛṣṭam me jñānacakṣuṣā parama ātmā iti yam prāhuḥ sāṃkhya yoga vidaḥ janāḥ mahāpuruṣa saṃjñām sa labhate svena karmaṇā tasmāt prasūtam avyaktam pradhānam tat viduḥ budhāḥ avyaktāt vyaktam utpannam loka sṛṣṭi artham īśvarāt pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśam apaḥ jyotiḥ ca pañcamam ahaṃkāra prasūtāni mahābhūtāni bhārata mahābhūtāni sṛṣṭvā atha tad guṇān nirmame punar bhūtebhyaḥ ca eva niṣpannāḥ mūrtimantaḥ aṣṭa tān śṛṇu marīciḥ aṅgirāḥ ca atriḥ pulastyaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca mahātmā vai manuḥ svāyambhuvaḥ tathā jñeyāḥ prakṛtayaḥ aṣṭan tāḥ yāsu lokāḥ pratiṣṭhā vedān vedāṅga saṃyuktān yajñān yajña aṅga saṃyutān etān vai su mahābhāgān ṛṣīn lokapitāmahān aṣṭābhyaḥ prakṛtibhyaḥ ca jātam viśvam idam jagat rudraḥ roṣa ātmakaḥ jātaḥ daśa anyān saḥ asṛjat svayam ekādaśā ete rudrāḥ tu vikārāḥ puruṣāḥ smṛtāḥ utpannāḥ loka siddhi artham brahmāṇam samupasthitāḥ vayam hi sṛṣṭāḥ bhagavan tvayā vai prabhaviṣṇunā paripālyaḥ katham tena saḥ adhikāraḥ adhikāriṇā sādhu aham jñāpitaḥ devāḥ yuṣmābhiḥ bhadram astu vaḥ mama api eṣā samutpannā cintā yā bhavatām matā katham bala kṣayaḥ na syāt vaḥ hi ātmanaḥ ca me itas sarva api gacchāmaḥ śaraṇam lokasākṣiṇam tatas te brahmaṇā sārdham ṛṣayaḥ vibudhāḥ tathā kṣīrodasya uttaram kūlam jagmuḥ loka hita arthinaḥ sa mahāniyamaḥ nāma tapaḥ caryā su dāruṇā ūrdhvam dṛṣṭiḥ bāhavaḥ ca ekāgram ca manaḥ abhavat eka pāda sthitāḥ samyak kāṣṭha bhūtāḥ samāhitāḥ śuśruvuḥ madhurām vāṇīm veda vedāṅga bhūṣitām bho bhoḥ sa brahmakāḥ devāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ svāgatena arcya vaḥ sarvān śrāvaye vākyam uttamam vijñātam vaḥ mayā kāryam tat ca loka hitam mahat pravṛtti yuktam kartavyam tvad prāṇa upabṛṃhaṇam su taptam vaḥ tapaḥ devāḥ mama ārādhana kāmyayā yūyam ca vibudha śreṣṭhāḥ mām yajadhvam samāhitāḥ sarve bhāgān kalpayadhvam yajñeṣu mama nityaśas tathā śreyaḥ vidhāsyāmi yathā adhīkāram īśvarāḥ śrutvā etat devadevasya vākyam hṛṣṭa tanūruhāḥ veda dṛṣṭena vidhinā vaiṣṇavam kratum āharan te kārtayuga dharmāṇaḥ bhāgāḥ parama satkṛ prāpuḥ āditya varṇam tam puruṣam tamasaḥ param bṛhantam sarva gam devam īśānam vara dam prabhum aśarīraḥ babhāṣa idam vākyam kha sthaḥ maheśvaraḥ yena yaḥ kalpitaḥ bhāgaḥ sa tathā samupāgataḥ prītaḥ aham pradiśāmi adya phalam āvṛtti lakṣaṇam yūyam yajñaiḥ ijyamānāḥ samāpta vara dakṣiṇaiḥ sa tathā yajña bhāga arhaḥ veda sūtre mayā kṛtaḥ yūyam lokān dhārayadhvam yajña bhāga phala uditāḥ sarva artha cintakāḥ loke yathā adhīkāra nirmitāḥ yāḥ kriyāḥ pracariṣyanti pravṛtti phala satkṛtāḥ tābhiḥ āpyāyita balāḥ lokān vai dhārayiṣyatha yūyam hi bhāvitāḥ loke sarva yajñeṣu mānavaiḥ mām tatas bhāvayiṣyadhvam eṣā vaḥ bhāvanā mama iti artham nirmitāḥ vedāḥ yajñāḥ ca oṣadhibhiḥ saha nirmāṇam etat tvad pravṛtti guṇa kalpitam mayā kṛtam sura śreṣṭhāḥ yāvat kalpa kṣayāt iti cintayadhvam loka hitam yathā adhīkāram īśvarāḥ marīciḥ aṅgirāḥ ca atriḥ pulastyaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ ete veda vidaḥ mukhyāḥ veda ācāryāḥ ca kalpitāḥ pravṛtti dharmiṇaḥ ca eva prājāpatyena kalpitāḥ ayam kriyāvatām pathī vyaktībhūtaḥ sanātanaḥ sanatkumāraḥ kapilaḥ saptamaḥ ca sanātanaḥ saptan ete mānasāḥ proktāḥ ṛṣayaḥ brahmanaḥ sutāḥ svayam āgata vijñānāḥ nivṛttam dharmam āsthitāḥ ācāryāḥ mokṣa śāstre ca mokṣa dharma pravartakāḥ yatas aham prasṛtaḥ pūrvam avyaktāt triguṇaḥ mahān saḥ aham kriyāvat pathī punarāvṛtti durlabhaḥ pravṛttau vā nivṛttau vā tad phalam saḥ aśnute avaśaḥ eṣa mātā pitā ca eva tvaṣmākam ca pitāmahaḥ mayā anuśiṣṭaḥ bhavitā sarva bhūta vara pradaḥ asya ca eva anujaḥ rudraḥ lalāṭāt yaḥ samutthitaḥ gacchadhvam svān adhīkārān cintayadhvam yathāvidhi pravartantām kriyāḥ sarvāḥ sarva lokeṣu māciram pradṛś ca karmāṇi prāṇinām gatayaḥ tathā parinirmita kālāni āyūṃṣi ca sura uttamāḥ idam kṛta yugam nāma kālaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ pravartate tatas vai dvāparam nāma miśraḥ kālaḥ bhaviṣyati devāḥ devarṣayaḥ ca ūcuḥ tam evaṃvādinam gurum ūcuḥ śrī bhagavān uvāca guravaḥ yatra pūjyante sādhu vṛttāḥ śama anvitāḥ yatra vedāḥ ca yajñāḥ ca tapaḥ satyam damaḥ tathā ahiṃsā dharma saṃyuktāḥ pracareyuḥ sura uttamāḥ sa vai deśaḥ sevitavyaḥ mā vaḥ adharmaḥ padā spṛśet uvāca te anuśiṣṭāḥ bhagavatā devāḥ sa ṛṣi gaṇāḥ tathā tam devaḥ darśayām āsa kṛtvā haya śiraḥ mahat sa aṅgān āvartayan vedān tatas aśvaśirasam dṛṣṭvā tam devam amita ojasam lokakartā prabhuḥ brahmā lokānām hita kāmyayā mūrdhnā praṇamya vara dam tasthau prāñjaliḥ agratas dhātā tvam sarva bhūtānām tvam prabhuḥ jagataḥ guruḥ tvayi āveśita bhāraḥ aham dhṛtim prāpsyāmi atha añjasā yadā ca sura kāryam te aviṣahyam bhaviṣyati prādurbhāvam gamiṣyāmi tadā ātma jñāna deśikaḥ tena anuśiṣṭaḥ brahmā api svam lokam acirāt gataḥ evam eṣa mahābhāgaḥ padmanābhaḥ sanātanaḥ yajñeṣu agra haraḥ proktaḥ yajña dhārī ca nityadā nivṛttim ca āsthitaḥ dharmam gatim akṣaya dharmiṇām saḥ ādiḥ sa madhyaḥ sa ca antaḥ prajānām tasmai namadhvam devāya nirguṇāya guṇa ātmane ajāya viśvarūpāya dhāmne sarva divaukasām mahābhūta adhipataye rudrāṇām pataye tathā aśvibhyām pataye ca eva marutām pataye tathā śāntaye sarva bhūtānām mokṣa dharma anubhāṣiṇe vācaḥ ca pataye nityam saritām pataye tathā kapardine varāhāya ekaśṛṅgāya dhīmate guhyāya jñāna dṛśyāya akṣarāya kṣarāya ca evam etat purā dṛṣṭam mayā vai jñānacakṣuṣā kathitam tat ca vaḥ sarvam mayā pṛṣṭena tattvāt kriyatām mad vacaḥ śiṣyāḥ sevyatām hariḥ īśvaraḥ gīyatām veda śabdaiḥ ca pūjyatām ca yathāvidhi uvāca sarve śiṣyāḥ sutaḥ ca asya śukaḥ parama dharma vid sa ca mama upādhyāyaḥ saha asmābhiḥ viśām pate etat te sarvam ākhyātam yat mām tvam paripṛcchasi yaḥ ca idam śṛṇuyāt nityam yaḥ ca idam parikīrtayet kāma kāmī labhet kāmam dīrgham āyuḥ avāpnuyāt brāhmaṇaḥ sarva vedī syāt kṣatriyaḥ vijayī bhavet vaiśya vipula lābhaḥ syāt śūdraḥ sukham avāpnuyāt iti aha bhagavān vyāsaḥ parāśara sutaḥ prabhuḥ samāgamam ca ṛṣi divaukasām imam niśamya bhaktāḥ su sukham labhante astauṣīt yaiḥ imam vyāsaḥ sa śiṣyaḥ madhusūdanam vaktum arhasi śuśrūṣoḥ prajāpati pateḥ hareḥ śrutvā bhaveyam yat pūtaḥ śarad candraḥ iva amalaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājan yathā ācaṣṭa phalgunasya hariḥ vibhuḥ prasanna ātmā ātmanaḥ nāmnām niruktam guṇa karma jam pṛṣṭavan keśavam rājñ phalgunaḥ para vīra hā yāni nāmāni te deva kīrtitāni mahā ṛṣibhiḥ vedeṣu sa purāṇeṣu yāni guhyāni karmabhiḥ teṣām niruktam tvattaḥ aham śrotum icchāmi keśava śrī bhagavān uvāca bahūni mama nāmāni kīrtitāni mahā ṛṣibhiḥ gauṇāni tatra nāmāni karma jāni ca kāni cit niruktam karma jānām ca śṛṇuṣva prayataḥ anagha kathyamānam mayā tāta tvam hi me ardham smṛtaḥ purā nārāyaṇāya viśvāya nirguṇāya guṇa ātmane aṣṭādaśaguṇam yat tat sattvam sattvavatām vara prakṛtiḥ sā parā mahyam rodasī yoga dhāriṇī ṛtā satyā amarā ajayyā lokānām ātma saṃjñitā tatas yajñaḥ ca yaṣṭā ca purāṇaḥ puruṣaḥ virāj ahnaḥ kṣaye lalāṭāt ca sutaḥ devasya vai tathā krodha āviṣṭasya saṃjajñe rudraḥ saṃhāra kārakaḥ tad ādeśita panthānau sṛṣṭi saṃhāra kārakau kapardī jaṭilaḥ muṇḍaḥ śmaśāna gṛha sevakaḥ nārāyaṇa ātmakaḥ jñeyaḥ pāṇḍaveya yuge yuge saṃpūjitaḥ bhavet pārtha devaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ aham ātmā hi lokānām viśvānām pāṇḍu nandana tasmāt ātmānam eva agre rudram saṃpūjayāmi aham yadi aham na arcayeyam vai īśānam vara dam śivam ātmānam na arcayet kaḥ cit iti mama bhāvitam manaḥ mayā pramāṇam hi kṛtam lokaḥ samanuvartate pramāṇāni hi pūjyāni tatas tam pūjayāmi aham rudraḥ nārāyaṇaḥ ca eva sattvam ekam dvidhā kṛtam iti saṃcintya manasā purāṇam viśvam īśvaram putra artham ārādhitavan ātmānam aham ātmanā sa brahmakāḥ sa rudrāḥ ca sa indrāḥ devāḥ saha ṛṣibhiḥ arcayanti suraśreṣṭham devam nārāyaṇam harim bhaviṣyatām vṛtatām ca bhūtānām ca eva bhārata sarveṣām agraṇī viṣṇuḥ sevyaḥ pūjyaḥ ca nityaśas namasva havya dam viṣṇum tathā śaraṇa dam nama teṣām ekāntinaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ te ca eva an anya devatāḥ mama eva gatiḥ teṣām nirāśīḥ karma kāriṇām ye ca śiṣṭāḥ trayaḥ bhaktāḥ phala kāmāḥ hi te matāḥ brahmāṇam śitikaṇṭham ca yāḥ ca anyāḥ devatāḥ smṛtāḥ bhaktam prati viśeṣaḥ te eṣa pārtha anukīrtitaḥ tvam ca eva aham ca kaunteya nara nārāyaṇau smṛtau bhāra avataraṇa artham hi praviṣṭau mānuṣīm tanum jānāmi adhyātma yogān ca yaḥ aham yasmāt ca bhārata narāṇām ayanam khyā aham eka sanātanaḥ apaḥ nārāḥ iti proktāḥ āpaḥ vai nara sūnavaḥ chādayāmi jagat viśvam bhūtvā sūryaḥ iva aṃśubhiḥ gatiḥ ca sarva bhūtānām prajānām ca api bhārata vyāptā me rodasī pārtha kāntiḥ ca abhyadhikā mama adhibhūtāni ca ante aham tat icchan ca asmi bhārata kramaṇāt ca api aham pārtha viṣṇuḥ iti abhisaṃjñitaḥ damāt siddhim parīpsantaḥ mām janāḥ kāmayanti hi pṛśniḥ iti ucyate ca annam vedāḥ apaḥ amṛtam tathā ṛṣayaḥ prāhuḥ evam mām tritakūpa abhipātitam tatas sa brahmaṇaḥ putraḥ ādyaḥ ṛṣi varaḥ tritaḥ uttatāra udapānāt vai pṛśnigarbha anukīrtanāt aṃśavaḥ ye prakāśante mama te keśa saṃjñitāḥ sarva jñāḥ keśavam tasmāt mām āhuḥ dvijasattamāḥ bṛhaspatiḥ atha avindat tām patnīm tasya bhārata tatas vai tam ṛṣi śreṣṭham maithuna upagatam tathā pūrva āgataḥ aham vara da na arhasi ambām prabādhitum etat bṛhaspatiḥ śrutvā cukrodha ca śaśāpa ca tasmāt andhaḥ jāsyasi tvam mad śāpāt na atra saṃśayaḥ sa śāpāt ṛṣi mukhyasya dīrgham tamaḥ upeyivān sa hi dīrghatamāḥ nāma nāmnā hi āsīt ṛṣiḥ purā vedān avāpya caturaḥ sa aṅga upāṅgān sanātanān ānupūrvyeṇa vidhinā keśava iti punar punar devānām atha sarveṣām ṛṣīṇām ca mahātmanām agnīṣoma ātmakam tasmāt jagat kṛtsnam carācaram eka yoni ātmakau agnīṣomau devāḥ ca agni mukhāḥ iti eṣa mama saṃśayaḥ jātaḥ tam chinddhi madhusūdana śrī bhagavān uvāca hanta te vartayiṣyāmi purāṇam pāṇḍu nandana ātma teja udbhavam pārtha śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ mama tamaḥ iti eva abhibhūte asaṃjñake advitīye pratiṣṭhite etasyām avasthāyām nārāyaṇa guṇa āśraya akṣayāt ajarāt anindriyāt agrāhyāt asaṃbhavāt satyāt ahiṃsra lalāmāt vividha pravṛtti viśeṣāt akṣaya ajara amara amūrti sarva vyāpin sarva kartṛ śāśvata tamas puruṣaḥ prādurbhū hari avyaya na āsīt ahaḥ na rātriḥ āsīt na sat āsīt na asat āsīt tad idānīm tamaḥ sambhava puruṣasya padmayoneḥ brahman prādurbhāva tad puruṣa prajāḥ sisṛkṣ netrābhyām agnīṣoma sarj brāhmaṇa para bhūta na utpad pūrva dīp agnau hu iti kṛ bravīmi bhūta sargaḥ kṛ brahman bhūtāni ca pratiṣṭhāpya trailokyam dhāryate iti tvam agne yajñānām hotṛ viśva viśveṣām agne yajñānām hotā iti agniḥ hi yajñānām hotā kartā na vinā puruṣam tapaḥ saṃbhavati havis mantra saṃpūjā vid deva manuṣya anena tvad hotṛ iti niyuj ye ca mānuṣāḥ hotrā adhikārāḥ te ca brāhmaṇasya hi yājanam vidhīyate na kṣatra vaiśyayoḥ dvijātyoḥ tasmāt brāhmaṇāḥ hi agni bhū yajñān udvahanti yajña deva tarpay deva pṛthivī bhāvay evam api agni bhūtāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ vidvāṃsaḥ agnim bhāvayanti agniḥ viṣṇuḥ sarva bhūtāni anupraviśya prāṇān dhārayati api ca atra sanatkumāra gītāḥ ślokāḥ bhavanti viśvam brahmā asṛjat pūrvam sarva ādiḥ niravaskaram brāhmaṇānām matiḥ vākyam karma śraddhā tapāṃsi ca dhārayanti mahīm dyām ca śaityāt vāri amṛtam yathā na asti satyāt paraḥ dharmaḥ na asti mātṛ samaḥ guruḥ apadhvastāḥ dasyu bhūtāḥ bhavanti yeṣām rāṣṭre brāhmaṇāḥ vṛtti hīnāḥ veda purāṇa itihāsa prāmāṇya nārāyaṇa mukha udgam sarva ātman sarva kartṛ sarva bhāvana ca brāhmaṇa vāc sama kāla hi tad deva vara prada brāhmaṇa prathamam prādurbhū brāhmaṇa ca śeṣa varṇa prādurbhū ittham ca sura asura viśiṣṭāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ yadā mayā brahma bhūtena purā svayam eva utpāditāḥ sura asura mahā ṛṣayaḥ bhūta viśeṣāḥ sthāpitāḥ nigṛhītāḥ ca ahalyā dharṣaṇa nimitta hi gautama hari śmaśru tā indra prāp kauśika nimittam ca indraḥ muṣka viyoga meṣa vṛṣaṇa tva ca avāp kratu vadha prāp manyu ca dakṣeṇa bhūyas tapas ca ātman saṃyojay netra ākṛtiḥ anya lalāṭa rudrasya utpāday tripura vadha artha dīkṣām abhyupagata rudra uśanas śirasaḥ jaṭāḥ utkṛt prayuj tatas prādurbhūtāḥ bhujagāḥ tad asya bhujagaiḥ pīḍyamānaḥ kaṇṭhaḥ nīla tām upanītaḥ pūrva ca manvantara svāyambhuva nārāyaṇa hasta bandha grahaṇa nīlakaṇṭha tva eva vā amṛta utpādane puraścaraṇa tām upagam aṅgirasaḥ bṛhaspati upaspṛś na prasādam gam kila ap yasmāt mama upaspṛśataḥ kaluṣībhūtāḥ na prasādam upagatāḥ tasmāt adya prabhṛti jhaṣa makara matsya kacchapa jantu saṃkīrṇāḥ kaluṣībhavata iti tadā prabhṛti ap yādas saṃkṛ saṃvṛt viśvarūpaḥ vai tvāṣṭraḥ purohitaḥ devānām as svasrīyaḥ asurāṇām atha hiraṇyakaśipum puraskṛtya viśvarūpa mātaram svasāram asura vara yācanta he svasṛ idam tvad putra tvāṣṭra viśvarūpa triśiras deva purohita pratyakṣa deva bhāga adadat parokṣa mad tatas deva vṛdh vayam kṣi putra kim para pakṣa vardhanaḥ tvam mātula pakṣam nāśayasi sa viśvarūpaḥ mātuḥ vākyam an atikram iti matvā saṃpūjya hiraṇyakaśipum agāt hairaṇyagarbha ca vasiṣṭha hiraṇyakaśipu śāpa prāp yasmāt tvad anya vṛ hotṛ tasmāt a samāp yajña tvad apūrva sattva jāta vadha prāp iti tad śāpa dānāt hiraṇyakaśipuḥ prāptavan vadham tāḥ ca dṛṣṭvā manaḥ kṣubh tasya bhū tad ca apsaraḥsu nacirāt eva saktaḥ abhavat saktam ca enam jñātvā apsarasaḥ ūcuḥ gacchāmahe vayam yathāgatam iti tāḥ tvāṣṭraḥ uvāca kva gam ās tāvat mayā saha śreyaḥ bhū iti vayam deva striyaḥ apsarasaḥ indram vara dam purā prabhaviṣṇum vṛṇīmahe iti tatas mantrān jajāpa taiḥ mantraiḥ prāvardhata triśirāḥ atha indra tad vivṛdh soma pāna āpyāyay sarva gātra dṛś cintā āpad devāḥ ca te saha indra brahmāṇam abhijagmuḥ ūcuḥ ca viśvarūpeṇa sarva yajñeṣu su hu somaḥ pī vayam a bhāgāḥ saṃvṛttāḥ asura pakṣa vṛdh vayam kṣi sa yācyatām vara yathā kalevaram jahyāt tān dadhīcaḥ uvāca svāgatam bhavadbhyaḥ kim kriyatām atha dadhīca tathā eva avimanas sukha duḥkha sama mahat yogin ātman samādhā śarīra parityāga cakṛ evam uktaḥ dadhīcaḥ tān abravīt varṣāṇām tāvat pūrṇe sa indrāḥ devāḥ āgaman kālaḥ ayam deha nyāsāya iti iti tena vajreṇa abhedya apradhṛṣya brahma asthi saṃbhū viṣṇu praviś indraḥ viśvarūpam jaghāna tasmāt anantaram viśvarūpa gātra mathana sambhavam tvaṣṭrā utpāday eva arim vṛtram indraḥ han takṣṇā yajñapaśoḥ śiraḥ te dadāmi iti uktvā tasyām dvaidhībhūtāyām brahma vadhyāyām bhaya indraḥ deva rājyam parityajya apsu śītalām mānasa saraḥ gam nalinī prapad devān rajaḥ tamaḥ ca āviveśa mantrāḥ na prāvartanta mahā ṛṣīṇām prādurabhavan an indra ca abalāḥ lokāḥ su pradhṛṣ babhūvuḥ atha deva ṛṣayaḥ ca āyus putram nahuṣa nāma deva rājan tva abhiṣic nahuṣa pañcan śata jyotis lalāṭa jval sarva tejas hara triviṣṭapa bhū atha lokāḥ prakṛtim āpedire svasthāḥ ca babhūvuḥ atha uvāca nahuṣaḥ sarva mām śakra upabhuj upasthitam ṛte śacī iti saḥ evam uktvā śacī samīpam agamat uvāca ca enām tam śacī pratyuvāca prakṛtyā tvam dharma vatsalaḥ soma vaṃśa udbhavaḥ ca tām atha uvāca nahuṣaḥ tā tam uvāca atha śacī duḥkha śoka ārtā bhartṛ darśana lālasā nahuṣa bhaya gṛhītā bṛhaspatim upāgacchat sa ca tām abhigam dṛṣṭvā eva dhyānam praviś bhartṛ kārya tatpara jñātvā bṛhaspati uvāca tā tava indram darśayiṣyati iti sā atha mahāniyamam āsthitā devīm vara dām upaśrutim mantraiḥ āhvā sā upaśruti śacī samīpa agā ka tvad priya karavāṇi iti tad mūrdhan praṇam uvāca śacī bhagavat arh mad bhartṛ darśay tvad satya man ca iti sā enām mānasa saraḥ anayat tad indra patnīm kṛśa glā ca dṛś babhūva naṣṭam hi mām iyam anviṣya upāgamat duḥkha ārta iti tā tam uvāca nahuṣa mām āhvā kālaḥ ca asya mad kṛ iti nahuṣaḥ tvayā vācyaḥ apūrveṇa mām ṛṣi yuktena yānena tvam adhirūḍhaḥ udvahasva indrasya hi mahanti vāhana manasaḥ priyāṇi adhirūḍhāni mayā tā evam uktā hṛṣṭā jagāma atha indrāṇīm abhyāgatām dṛṣṭvā uvāca nahuṣa pūrṇaḥ sa kālaḥ iti sa mahā ṛṣi yuktam vāhanam adhirūḍhaḥ śacī samīpam upāgacchat atha maitrāvaruṇiḥ kumbhayoniḥ agastyaḥ mahā ṛṣīn vikṛ tān nahuṣa apaśyat padbhyām ca tena aspṛśyata sa mahā ṛṣi vākya sama kālam eva tasmāt yānāt avāpatat tatas devāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca bhagavantam viṣṇum śaraṇam indra arthe abhijagmuḥ tatas sa vara daḥ tān abravīt aśvamedham yajñam vaiṣṇavam śakraḥ abhiyajatu tatas svam sthāna prāp iti tatas devāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca indram na apaśyan yadā tadā śacī ūcuḥ gaccha subhage indram ānayasva iti bṛhaspatiḥ ca aśvamedha mahā kratu śakrāya hṛ tatas kṛṣṇasāraṅga medhya aśva utsṛj vāhana tad eva kṛ indra marutpati bṛhaspati sva sthāna prāpay tatas sa devarāj deva ṛṣi stū triviṣṭapa sthaḥ niṣkalmaṣa bhū evam indraḥ brahma tejaḥ prabhāva upabṛṃhay śatru vadham kṛtvā sva sthānam prāpitaḥ rajaḥ niryāsaḥ śambaḥ ūṣarāḥ te a spṛśyāḥ tasmāt haviḥ a lavaṇam nahuṣasya śāpa mokṣa nimittam devaiḥ ṛṣibhiḥ yācyamānaḥ agastyaḥ prāha yāvat sva kula jaḥ śrīmān dharmarājaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ kathayitvā svakān praśnān svam bhīmam ca vimokṣyate ākāśagaṅgā gam ca purā bharadvāja mahat ṛṣi upāspṛś tri krama kram viṣṇu abhyāsāday sa bharadvāja sa salila pāṇinā uras tāḍay sa lakṣaṇa uraska saṃvṛt bhṛgu mahat ṛṣi śap agni sarva bhakṣa tva upanī aditim ca avocat bhikṣām dehi iti tatra deva pūrvam etad prāś na anya iti aditiḥ bhikṣām na adāt atha bhikṣā pratyākhyāna ruṣ budha brahman bhū vivasvant dvitīya janman aṇḍa saṃjñita aṇḍa māray aditi sa mārtaṇḍa vivasvant abhavat śrāddhadeva dakṣasya vai duhitaraḥ ṣaṣṭiḥ asan tābhyaḥ kaśyapāya trayodaśan pradā daśan dharmāya daśan manave saptaviṃśatim indu tāsu tulyāsu nakṣatra ākhyām gatāsu somaḥ rohiṇyām abhyadhikām prītim akarot tatas tad śeṣa patnī īrṣyāvat pitṛ samīpa gam idam artha śaṃs tad abravīt yakṣmā enad āviś iti dakṣa śāpāt somam rājānam yakṣman āviś sa yakṣman āviś dakṣa agam tatra ṛṣayaḥ somam brū kṣīyase yakṣmaṇā snātvā ca ātmānam pāpmanaḥ mokṣayām āsa tatra ca avabhāsitaḥ tīrthe yadā somaḥ tadā prabhṛti tīrtham tat prabhāsam iti nāman khyā bhū tad śāpa adya api kṣīyate somaḥ amāvāsyā antara stha sa tapasā tāpita śarīraḥ kṛśaḥ vāyunā upavījyamānaḥ hṛdaya paritoṣam agamat nārāyaṇa loka hita artha vaḍavāmukha nāma mahat ṛṣi purā bhū tad amarṣita ātman gātra ūṣmaṇā samudraḥ stimita jalaḥ kṛ etad ca tvad toya vaḍavāmukha saṃjñita pā madhura bhū tad etad adya api vaḍavāmukha saṃjñita anuvartin toyam sāmudra pā bhṛguḥ api ca mahā ṛṣiḥ himavantam āgam abravīt kanyām umām me dehi iti tad abravīt bhṛguḥ yasmāt tvad aham kanyā varaṇa kṛ bhāvaḥ pratyākhyātaḥ tasmāt na ratnānām bhavān bhājanam bhaviṣyati iti tat evaṃvidham māhātmyam brāhmaṇānām kṣatram api śāśvatīm avyaya pṛthivīm patnīm abhigam bubhuje tat etat brahma agnīṣomīyam śrī bhagavān uvāca sūryācandramasau śaśvat keśaiḥ me aṃśu saṃjñitaiḥ nāmnām niruktam vakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣva ekāgra mānasaḥ bodhayan tāpayan ca eva jagat uttiṣṭhataḥ pṛthak agnīṣoma kṛtaiḥ ebhiḥ karmabhiḥ pāṇḍu nandana hṛṣīkeśaḥ aham īśānaḥ vara daḥ loka bhāvanaḥ varṇaḥ ca mama hari śreṣṭhaḥ tasmāt hariḥ aham smṛtaḥ dhāma sāraḥ hi lokānām ṛtam ca eva vicāritam ṛtadhāmā tatas vipraiḥ satyaḥ ca aham prakīrtitaḥ naṣṭām ca dharaṇīm pūrvam avindam vai guhā gatām govindaḥ iti mām devāḥ vāgbhiḥ samabhituṣṭuvuḥ śipiviṣṭa iti ca ākhyāyām hīna romā ca yaḥ bhavet tena āviṣṭam hi yat kim cit śipiviṣṭam hi tat smṛtam yāskaḥ mām ṛṣiḥ avyagraḥ na eka yajñeṣu gītavān stutvā mām śipiviṣṭa iti yāskaḥ ṛṣiḥ udāra dhīḥ kṣetrajñaḥ sarva bhūtānām tasmāt aham ajaḥ smṛtaḥ na ukta pūrvam mayā kṣudram aślīlam vā kadā cana ṛtā brahma sutā sā me satyā devī sarasvatī pauṣkare brahma sadane satyam mām ṛṣayaḥ viduḥ nirāśīḥ karma saṃyuktam sātvatam mām prakalpaya sātvata jñāna dṛṣṭaḥ aham sātvataḥ sātvantām patiḥ kṛṣāmi medinīm pārtha bhūtvā kārṣṇāyasaḥ mahān kṛṣṇaḥ varṇaḥ ca mama yasmāt tasmāt kṛṣṇaḥ aham arjuna mayā saṃśleṣitā bhūmiḥ adbhiḥ vyoma ca vāyunā vāyuḥ ca tejasā sārdham vaikuṇṭha tvam tatas mama tayoḥ saṃdhāraṇa artham hi mām adhokṣajam añjasā niruktam veda viduṣaḥ ye ca śabda artha cintakāḥ te mām gāyanti prāc vaṃśe adhokṣajaḥ iti sthitiḥ śabdaḥ eka mataiḥ eṣa vyāhṛtaḥ parama ṛṣibhiḥ na anyaḥ hi adhokṣajaḥ loke ṛte nārāyaṇam prabhum ghṛtam mama arciṣaḥ loke jantūnām prāṇa dhāraṇam trayaḥ hi dhātavaḥ khyātāḥ karma jāḥ iti ca smṛtāḥ pittam śleṣmā ca vāyuḥ ca eṣa saṃghātaḥ ucyate etaiḥ ca dhāryate jantuḥ etaiḥ kṣīṇaiḥ ca kṣīyate āyurveda vidaḥ tasmāt tridhātum mām pracakṣate vṛṣaḥ hi bhagavān dharmaḥ khyā lokeṣu bhārata naighaṇṭuka pada ākhyātam viddhi mām vṛṣam uttamam kapiḥ varāhaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ ca dharmaḥ ca vṛṣaḥ ucyate tasmāt vṛṣākapim prāha kaśyapaḥ mām prajāpatiḥ na ādimantam na ca antam ca kadā cid vidyate surāḥ na ca ādim na madhyam tathā na eva ca antam kadā cid surāḥ ca asurāḥ ca anādyaḥ hi amadhyaḥ tathā ca api anantaḥ pragītaḥ aham īśaḥ vibhuḥ lokasākṣī śucīni śravaṇīyāni śṛṇomi iha dhanaṃjaya na ca pāpāni gṛhṇāmi tatas aham vai śuciśravas eka śṛṅgaḥ purā bhūtvā varāhaḥ divya darśanaḥ imām uddhṛtavān bhūmim ekaśṛṅgaḥ tatas hi aham tathā eva āsam tri kakudaḥ vārāham rūpam āsthitaḥ trikakud tena vikhyātaḥ śarīrasya tu māpanāt vidyā sahāyavantam mām āditya stham sanātanam kapilam prāhuḥ ācāryāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ niścita niścayāḥ yogaiḥ saṃpūjyate nityam saḥ eva aham vibhuḥ smṛ ekaviṃśati śākham ca ṛgvedam mām pracakṣate sahasra śākham yat sāma ye vai veda vidaḥ janāḥ gāyanti āraṇyake viprāḥ mad bhaktāḥ te api durlabhāḥ ṣaṭpañcāśatam aṣṭau ca saptatriṃśatam iti uta yasmin śākhāḥ yajurvede saḥ aham ādhvaryave smṛtaḥ pañca kalpam atharvāṇam kṛtyābhiḥ paribṛṃhitam kalpayanti hi mām viprāḥ atharvāṇa vidaḥ tathā śākhā bhedāḥ ca ye ke cit yāḥ ca śākhāsu gītayaḥ svara varṇa samuccārāḥ sarvān tān viddhi mad kṛtān rāma ādeśita mārgeṇa mad prasādāt mahātmanā pāñcālena kramaḥ prāptaḥ tasmāt bhūtāt sanātanāt nārāyaṇāt varam labdhvā prāpya yogam anuttamam kramam praṇīya śikṣām ca praṇayitvā sa gālavaḥ kaṇḍarīkaḥ atha rājā ca brahmadattaḥ pratāpavān jātī maraṇa jam duḥkham smṛtvā smṛtvā punar punar saptan jātiṣu mukhya tvāt yogānām saṃpadam gam purā aham ātmajaḥ pārtha prathitaḥ kāraṇa antare dharmasya kuru śārdūla tatas aham dharmajaḥ smṛtaḥ tat śūlam bhasmasāt kṛtvā dakṣa yajñam sa vistaram āvayoḥ sahasā agacchat badaryāśramam antikāt tatas sva tejasā āviṣṭāḥ keśāḥ nārāyaṇasya ha babhūvuḥ muñja varṇāḥ tu tatas aham muñja keśavān tat ca śūlam vinirdhūtam huṃkāreṇa mahātmanā jagāma śaṃkara karam nārāyaṇa samāhatam atha rudraḥ upādhāvat tau ṛṣī tapasā anvitau tatas enam samuddhūtam kaṇṭhe jagrāha pāṇinā nārāyaṇaḥ sa viśvātmā tena asya śitikaṇṭha tā atha rudra vighāta artham iṣīkām jagṛhe naraḥ kṣiptaḥ ca sahasā rudre khaṇḍanam prāptavān tadā tatas aham khaṇḍaparaśuḥ smṛtaḥ paraśu khaṇḍanāt rudrasya bhāgam pradaduḥ bhāgam uccheṣaṇam punar gamya rūpeṇa tadā jayam kaḥ prāptavan tatra śaṃsa etat me janārdana śrī bhagavān uvāca tayoḥ saṃlagnayoḥ yuddhe rudra nārāyaṇa ātmanoḥ udvignāḥ sahasā kṛtsnāḥ lokāḥ sarve abhavan tadā na agṛhṇāt pāvakaḥ śubhram makheṣu su hutam haviḥ vedāḥ na pratibhānti smaḥ ṛṣīṇām bhāvitātmanām niṣprabhāṇi ca tejāṃsi brahmā ca eva āsanāt cyutaḥ agāt śoṣam samudraḥ ca himavant ca vyaśīryata brahmā vṛtaḥ deva gaṇaiḥ ṛṣibhiḥ ca mahātmabhiḥ ājagāma āśu tam deśam yatra yuddham avartata uvāca vacanam rudram lokānām astu vai śivam nyasya āyudhāni viśveśa jagantaḥ hita kāmyayā kūṭastham kartṛ nirdvaṃdvam akartā iti ca yam viduḥ vyakti bhāva gatasya asya ekā mūrtiḥ iyam śivā aham prasāda jaḥ tasya kasmin cit kāraṇa antare mayā ca sārdham vara dam vibudhaiḥ ca mahā ṛṣibhiḥ prasādaya āśu lokānām śāntiḥ bhavatu māciram prasādayām āsa tatas devam nārāyaṇam prabhum śaraṇam ca jagāma ādyam vareṇyam vara dam harim ṛṣibhiḥ brahmaṇā ca eva vibudhaiḥ ca su pūjitaḥ uvāca devam īśānam īśaḥ sa jagataḥ hariḥ adya prabhṛti śrīvatsaḥ śūla aṅkaḥ ayam bhavatu ayam mama pāṇi aṅkitaḥ ca api śrīkaṇṭhaḥ tvam bhaviṣyasi evam lakṣaṇam utpādya paraspara kṛtam tadā sakhyam ca eva atulam kṛtvā rudreṇa sahitau ṛṣī eṣa te kathitaḥ pārtha nārāyaṇa jayaḥ mṛdhe ṛṣibhiḥ kathitāni iha yāni saṃkīrtitāni te evam bahuvidhaiḥ rūpaiḥ carāmi iha vasuṃdharām mayā tvam rakṣitaḥ yuddhe mahantam prāptavān jayam nihatān tena vai pūrvam hatavan asi vai ripūn sarva āśrama abhigamanam sarva tīrtha avagāhanam na tathā phala dam saute nārāyaṇa kathā yathā pāvita aṅgāḥ sma saṃvṛttāḥ śrutvā imam āditas kathām nārāyaṇa āśrayām puṇyām sarva pāpa pramocanīm dṛṣṭavān nāradaḥ yatra devam nārāyaṇam harim uvāca nara nārāyaṇau draṣṭum kāraṇam tat bravīhi me tasmin yajñe vartamāne rājñaḥ pārikṣitasya vai kṛṣṇadvaipāyanam vyāsam ṛṣim veda nidhim prabhum śvetadvīpāt nivṛttena nāradena sura ṛṣiṇā dhyāyatā bhagavat vākyam ceṣṭitam kim atas param badaryāśramam āgamya samāgamya ca tau ṛṣī kiyantam kālam avasat kām kathām pṛṣṭavān ca saḥ idam śata sahasrāt hi bhārata ākhyāna vistarāt āraṇyakam ca vedebhyaḥ oṣadhibhyaḥ amṛtam yathā tapaḥ nidhe tvayā uktam hi nārāyaṇa kathā āśrayam sa hi īśaḥ bhagavān devaḥ sarva bhūta ātma bhāvanaḥ aho nārāyaṇam tejaḥ durdarśam dvijasattama yatra āviśanti kalpa ante sarve brahma ādayaḥ surāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca sa gandharvāḥ yat ca kim cit carācaram sarva āśrama abhigamanam sarva tīrtha avagāhanam na tathā phala dam ca api nārāyaṇa kathā yathā sarvathā pāvitāḥ sma iha śrutvā imām āditas kathām hareḥ viśveśvarasya iha sarva pāpa praṇāśanām na citram kṛtavān tatra yat āryaḥ me dhanaṃjayaḥ vāsudeva sahāyaḥ yaḥ prāptavan jayam uttamam trailokya nāthaḥ viṣṇuḥ sa yasya āsīt sāhya kṛt sakhiḥ dhanyāḥ ca sarve eva āsan brahman te mama pūrvakāḥ hitāya śreyase ca eva yeṣām āsīt janārdanaḥ tapasā api na dṛśyaḥ hi bhagavant loka pūjitaḥ yam dṛṣṭavantaḥ te sākṣāt śrīvatsa aṅka vibhūṣaṇam dṛṣṭavan yaḥ harim devam nārāyaṇam ajam vibhum śvetadvīpam samāsādya yena dṛṣṭaḥ svayam hariḥ badarīm āśramam yat tu nāradaḥ prādravat punar nara nārāyaṇau draṣṭum kim nu tad kāraṇam mune śvetadvīpāt nivṛt ca nāradaḥ parameṣṭhi ja badarīm āśramam prāpya samāgamya ca tau ṛṣī kiyantam kālam avasat kāḥ kathāḥ pṛṣṭavan ca saḥ śvetadvīpāt upāvṛtte tasmin vā su mahātmani kim abrūtām mahātmanau nara nārāyaṇau ṛṣī uvāca evam pṛṣṭaḥ tadā rājñā parāśaryaḥ mahā muniḥ samīpa stham tatas śiṣyam vaiśaṃpāyanam abravīt tayoḥ sakāśam gatvā ca yathā sa kṛtavan punar uvāca tasya tat vacanam śrutvā kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ tadā śaśāsa śiṣyam āsīnam vaiśaṃpāyanam antike ācacakṣe tatas sarvam itihāsam purātanam uvāca yasya prasādāt vakṣyāmi nārāyaṇa kathām imām na asti nārāyaṇa samam na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati ṛṣīṇām pāṇḍavānām ca śṛṇvatoḥ kṛṣṇa bhīṣmayoḥ prāpya śvetam mahā dvīpam dṛṣṭvā ca harim avyayam nivṛttaḥ nāradaḥ rājan tarasā merum āgamat hṛdayena udvahan bhāram yat uktam parama ātmanā paścāt asya bhavat rājan ātmanaḥ sādhvasam mahat yat gatvā dūram adhvānam kṣemī punar iha āgataḥ nipapāta ca khāt tūrṇam viśālām badarīm anu tatas sa dadṛśe devau purāṇau ṛṣi sattamau śrīvatsa lakṣaṇau pūjyau jaṭā maṇḍala dhāriṇau jāla pāda bhujau tau tu pādayoḥ cakra lakṣaṇau vyūḍha uraskau dīrgha bhujau tathā muṣka catuṣkiṇaḥ ṣaṣṭi dantau aṣṭa daṃṣṭrau megha ogha sadṛśa svanau ātapatreṇa sadṛśe śirasī devayoḥ tayoḥ evam lakṣaṇa saṃpannau mahāpuruṣa saṃjñitau tau dṛṣṭvā nāradaḥ hṛṣṭaḥ tābhyām ca pratipūjitaḥ svāgatena abhibhāṣya atha pṛṣṭaḥ ca anāmayam tadā śvetadvīpe mayā dṛṣṭāḥ tādṛśau ṛṣi sattamau iti saṃcintya manasā kṛtvā ca abhipradakṣiṇam tatas tau tapasām vāsau yaśasām tejasām api ṛṣī śama dama upetau kṛtvā pūrvāhṇikam vidhim paścāt nāradam avyagrau pādya arghyābhyām prapūjya ca pīṭhayoḥ ca upaviṣṭau tau kṛta atithi āhnikau nṛpa teṣu tatra upaviṣṭeṣu sa deśaḥ abhivyarājata ājya āhuti mahā jvālaiḥ yajña vāṭaḥ agnibhiḥ yathā atha nārāyaṇaḥ tatra nāradam vākyam abravīt sukha upaviṣṭam viśrāntam kṛta ātithyam sukha sthitam api idānīm sa bhagavant parama ātmā sanātanaḥ śvetadvīpe tvad dṛś āvayoḥ prakṛtiḥ para uvāca dṛṣṭaḥ me puruṣaḥ śrīmān viśva rūpa dharaḥ avyayaḥ sarve hi lokāḥ tatrasthāḥ tathā devāḥ saha ṛṣibhiḥ adya api ca enam paśyāmi tvā paśyan sanātanau dṛṣṭau mayā yuvam tatra tasya devasya pārśvatas iha ca eva āgataḥ asmi adya visṛṣṭaḥ parama ātmanā kaḥ hi nāma bhavet tasya tejasā yaśasā śriyā sadṛśaḥ triṣu lokeṣu ṛte dharma ātmajau tvām tena me kathitam pūrvam nāma kṣetrajña saṃjñitam prādurbhāvāḥ ca kathitāḥ bhaviṣyanti hi ye yathā tatra ye puruṣāḥ śveta pañca indriya vivarjay sa kartā kāraṇam ca eva kāryam ca ati bala dyutiḥ hetuḥ ca ājñā vidhānam ca tattvam ca eva mahā yaśāḥ tapasā yojya saḥ ātmānam śvetadvīpāt param hi yat śānti tad triṣu loka siddha bhāvitātman etayā śubhayā buddhyā naiṣṭhikam vratam āsthitaḥ vedīm aṣṭa tala utsedhām bhūmau āsthāya viśvabhuj sa aṅgān āvartayan vedān tapaḥ tepe su duścaram yat brahmā ṛṣayaḥ ca eva svayam paśupatiḥ ca yat śeṣāḥ ca vibudha śreṣṭhāḥ daitya dānava rākṣasāḥ nāgāḥ suparṇāḥ gandharvāḥ siddhāḥ rājarṣayaḥ ca ye yāḥ kriyāḥ saṃprayuktāḥ tu ekānta gata buddhibhiḥ tāḥ sarvāḥ śirasā devaḥ pratigṛhṇāti vai svayam iha ca eva āgataḥ tena visṛṣṭaḥ parama ātmanā evam mad bhagavant devaḥ svayam ākhyātavan hariḥ āsiṣye tad paraḥ bhūtvā yuvābhyām saha nityaśas nara nārāyaṇau ūcatuḥ dhanya as anugrah asi yat tvad dṛś svayam prabhu tatas svayam darśitavān svam ātmānam dvijottama na tat saṃprāpnute kaḥ cit ṛte hi nau dvijottama tasmāt uttiṣṭhate vipra devāt viśvabhuvaḥ pateḥ kṣamā kṣamāvatām śreṣṭha yayā bhūmiḥ tu yujyate tasmāt eva samudbhūtam tejaḥ rūpa guṇa ātmakam tasmāt devāt samudbhūtaḥ sparśaḥ tu puruṣottamāt tasmāt ca uttiṣṭhate śabdaḥ sarva loka īśvarāt prabhoḥ ākāśam yujyate yena tatas tiṣṭhati asaṃvṛtam tasmāt ca uttiṣṭhate devāt sarva bhūta gatam manaḥ candramāḥ yena saṃyuktaḥ prakāśa guṇa dhāraṇaḥ ṣaṣ bhūta utpādakam nāma tat sthānam veda saṃjñitam ye hi niṣkalmaṣāḥ loke puṇya pāpa vivarjitāḥ teṣām vai kṣemam adhvānam gacchatām dvijasattama jvālā mālī mahā tejāḥ yena idam dhāryate jagat āditya dagdha sarva aṅgāḥ adṛśyāḥ kena cit kva cit paramāṇu bhūtāḥ bhūtvā tu tam devam praviśanti uta pradyumnāt ca api nirmuktāḥ jīvam saṃkarṣaṇam tathā viśanti vipra pravarāḥ sāṃkhyāḥ bhāgavataiḥ saha tatas traiguṇya hīnāḥ te parama ātmānam añjasā praviśanti dvijaśreṣṭha kṣetrajñam nirguṇa ātmakam sarva āvāsam vāsudevam kṣetrajñam vid tattva samāhita manaskāḥ ca niyatāḥ saṃyata indriyāḥ ekānta bhāva upagatāḥ vāsudevam viśanti te ramyām viśālām āśritya tapaḥ ugram samāsthitau vidhinā svena yuktābhyām yathāpūrvam dvijottama āvābhyām api dṛṣṭaḥ tvam śvetadvīpe tapodhana samāgataḥ bhagavatā saṃjalpam kṛtavān yathā yat bhaviṣyati vṛttam vā vartate vā śubha aśubham uvāca nāradaḥ prāñjaliḥ bhūtvā nārāyaṇa parāyaṇaḥ jajāpa vidhivat mantrān nārāyaṇa gatān bahūn divyam varṣa sahasram hi nara nārāyaṇa āśrame avasat sa mahā tejāḥ nāradaḥ bhagavān ṛṣiḥ uvāca daivam kṛtvā yathānyāyam pitryam cakre tatas param tatas tam vacanam prāha jyeṣṭhaḥ dharma ātmajaḥ prabhuḥ tvayā matimatām śreṣṭha tat me śaṃsa yathāgamam uvāca daivatam ca paraḥ yajñaḥ parama ātmā sanātanaḥ tasmāt ca prasṛtaḥ pūrvam brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ yajāmi aham pitṝn sādho nārāyaṇa vidhau kṛte evam saḥ eva bhagavān pitā mātā pitāmahaḥ ijyate pitṛ yajñeṣu mayā nityam jagatpatiḥ veda śrutiḥ praṇaṣṭā ca punar adhyāpitā sutaiḥ trīn piṇḍān nyasya vai pṛthvyām pūrvam dattvā kuśān iti katham tu piṇḍa saṃjñām te pitaraḥ lebhire purā nara nārāyaṇau ūcatuḥ imām hi dharaṇīm pūrvam naṣṭām sāgara mekhalām govindaḥ ujjahāra āśu vārāham rūpam āśritaḥ sthāpayitvā tu dharaṇīm sve sthāne puruṣottamaḥ daṃṣṭra vilagnān mṛd piṇḍān vidhūya sahasā prabhuḥ sthāpayām āsa vai pṛthvyām kuśān āstīrya nārada saṃkalpayitvā trīn piṇḍān svena eva vidhinā prabhuḥ prokṣya apavargam deveśaḥ prāc mukhaḥ kṛtavan svayam daṃṣṭrābhyām pravinirdhūtāḥ mama ete dakṣiṇām diśam āśritāḥ dharaṇīm piṇḍāḥ tasmāt pitaraḥ eva te trayaḥ mūrti vihīnāḥ vai piṇḍa mūrti dharāḥ tu ime bhavantu pitaraḥ loke mayā sṛṣṭāḥ sanātanāḥ aham eva atra vijñeyaḥ triṣu piṇḍeṣu saṃsthitaḥ iti evam uktvā vacanam devadevaḥ vṛṣākapiḥ ātmānam pūjayitvā eva tatra eva adarśanam gataḥ etad artham śubha mate pitaraḥ piṇḍa saṃjñitāḥ labhante satatam pūjām vṛṣākapi vacaḥ yathā ye yajanti pitṝn devān gurūn ca eva atithīn tathā gāḥ ca eva dvijamukhyān ca pṛthivīm mātaram tathā karmaṇā manasā vācā viṣṇum eva yajanti te samaḥ sarveṣu bhūteṣu īśvaraḥ sukha duḥkhayoḥ mahān mahātmā sarva ātmā nārāyaṇaḥ iti śrutaḥ uvāca śrutvā etat nāradaḥ vākyam nara nārāyaṇa īritam proṣya varṣa sahasram tu nara nārāyaṇa āśrame śrutvā bhagavat ākhyānam dṛṣṭvā ca harim avyayam himavantam jagāma āśu yatra asya svakaḥ āśramaḥ tau api khyāta tapasau nara nārāyaṇau ṛṣī tvam api amita vikrāntaḥ pāṇḍavānām kula udvahaḥ pāvita ātmā adya saṃvṛttaḥ śrutvā imām āditas kathām karmaṇā manasā vācā yaḥ dviṣyāt viṣṇum avyayam majjanti pitaraḥ tasya narake śāśvatīḥ samāḥ yaḥ dviṣyāt vibudha śreṣṭham devam nārāyaṇam harim ātmā hi puruṣa vyāghra jñeyaḥ viṣṇuḥ iti sthitiḥ yaḥ eṣa guruḥ naḥ ṛṣiḥ gandhavatī sutaḥ tena etat kathitam tāta māhātmyam parama ātmanaḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanam vyāsam viddhi nārāyaṇam prabhum dharmān nānāvidhān ca eva kaḥ brūyāt tam ṛte prabhum vartatām te mahā yajñaḥ yathā saṃkalpitaḥ tvayā etat tu mahat ākhyānam śrutvā pārikṣitaḥ nṛpaḥ tatas yajña samāpti artham kriyāḥ sarvāḥ samārabhat nārāyaṇīyam ākhyānam etat te kathitam mayā pṛṣṭena śaunaka adya iha naimiṣa araṇya vāsiṣu ṛṣi pāṇḍavānām ca śru kṛṣṇa bhīṣma tapasām nidhiḥ su mahat mahat yaśas ca bhājanam ariṣṭaka han triguṇa atigaḥ catuṣpañca dharaḥ pūrta iṣṭayoḥ ca phala bhāga haraḥ vidadhāti nityam ajitaḥ atibalaḥ gatim ātma gām sukṛtinām ṛṣiṇām tam lokasākṣiṇam ajam puruṣam ravi varṇam īśvara gatim bahuśas śrutam bhagavataḥ tasya māhātmyam parama ātmanaḥ mahāvarāha sṛṣṭā ca piṇḍa utpattiḥ purātanī tat ca dṛṣṭam bhagavatā brahmaṇā parameṣṭhinā kim tat utpāditam pūrvam hariṇā loka dhāriṇā rūpam prabhāva mahatām apūrvam dhīmatām vara dṛṣṭvā hi vibudha śreṣṭham apūrvam amita ojasam tat aśvaśirasam puṇyam brahmā kim akarot mune etat naḥ saṃśayam brahman purāṇa jñāna saṃbhavam pāvitāḥ sma tvayā brahman puṇyām kathayatā kathām uvāca kathayiṣyāmi te sarvam purāṇam veda saṃmitam tat te aham saṃpravakṣyāmi sarvam tat śṛṇu śaunaka kṛṣṇadvaipāyanam vyāsam ṛṣim veda nidhim prabhum paripapraccha rāja indraḥ pārīkṣita yudhiṣṭhiraḥ śrutvā aśvaśirasaḥ mūrtim devasya harimedhasaḥ uvāca uvāca sarvam pañcabhiḥ āviṣṭam bhūtaiḥ īśvara buddhi jaiḥ īśvaraḥ hi jagatsraṣṭā prabhuḥ nārāyaṇaḥ virāj bhūta antarātmā vara daḥ sa guṇaḥ nirguṇaḥ api ca bhūta pralayam avyaktam śṛṇuṣva nṛpa sattama dharaṇyām atha līnāyām apsu ca ekārṇave purā vāyau ca ākāśa saṃlīne ākāśe ca manonuge tamaḥ eva abhavat sarvam na prājñāyata kim cana tamasaḥ brahma saṃbhūtam tamaḥ mūlam ṛta ātmakam tat viśva bhāva saṃjñā antam pauruṣīm tanum āsthitam ādikarmā sa bhūtānām aprameyaḥ hariḥ prabhuḥ jagataḥ cintayan sṛṣṭim citrām bahu guṇa udbhavām tasya cintayataḥ sṛṣṭim mahant ātma guṇaḥ smṛtaḥ ahaṃkāraḥ tatas jātaḥ brahmā śubha caturmukhaḥ padme aniruddhāt saṃbhūtaḥ tadā padma nibha īkṣaṇaḥ sahasra patre dyutimān upaviṣṭaḥ sanātanaḥ dadṛśe adbhuta saṃkāśe lokān āpaḥ mayān prabhuḥ sattva sthaḥ parameṣṭhī sa tatas bhūta gaṇān sṛjat nārāyaṇa kṛtau bindū apām āstām guṇa uttarau sa tāmasaḥ madhuḥ jātaḥ tadā nārāyaṇa ājñayā tau abhyadhāvatām śreṣṭhau tamaḥ raja guṇa anvitau sṛjantam prathamam vedān caturaḥ cāru vigrahān sahasā jagṛhatuḥ vedān brahmaṇaḥ paśyataḥ tadā atha tau dānava śreṣṭhau vedān gṛhya sanātanān rasām viviśatuḥ tūrṇam udak pūrve mahā udadhau tatas hṛteṣu vedeṣu brahmā kaśmalam āviśat tatas vacanam īśānam prāha vedaiḥ vinākṛtaḥ mama vedāḥ hṛtāḥ sarve dānavābhyām balāt itas andhakārāḥ hi me lokāḥ jātāḥ vedaiḥ vinākṛtāḥ vedān ṛte hi kim kuryām lokān vai sraṣṭum udyataḥ prāptam dunoti hṛdayam tīvra śokāya randhayan vedān tān ānayet naṣṭān kasya ca aham priyaḥ bhave iti evam bhāṣamāṇasya brahmanaḥ nṛpa sattama cākṣuṣam vai dvitīyam me janma ca āsīt purātanam tvad prasādāt ca me janma tṛtīyam vācikam mahat aṇḍa jam ca api me janma tvattaḥ ṣaṣṭham vinirmitam prathitaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣa pradhāna guṇa kalpitaḥ tvam īśvara svabhāvaḥ ca svayaṃbhūḥ puruṣottamaḥ te me vedāḥ hṛtāḥ cakṣuḥ andhaḥ jātaḥ asmi jāgṛhi aiśvareṇa prayogeṇa dvitīyām tanum āsthitaḥ kṛtvā hayaśiraḥ śubhram vedānām ālayam prabhuḥ keśāḥ ca asya bhavan dīrghāḥ raveḥ aṃśu sama prabhāḥ karṇau ākāśa pātāle lalāṭam bhūta dhāriṇī gaṅgā sarasvatī puṇyā bhruvau āstām mahā nadī cakṣuṣī soma sūryau te nāsā saṃdhyā punar smṛ dantāḥ ca pitaraḥ rājan somapāḥ iti viśrutāḥ golokaḥ brahma lokaḥ ca oṣṭhau āstām mahātmanaḥ grīvā ca asya bhavat rājan kālarātriḥ guṇa uttarā etat hayaśiraḥ kṛtvā nānā mūrtibhiḥ āvṛtam antardadhe sa viśveśaḥ viveśa ca rasām prabhuḥ rasām punar praviṣṭaḥ ca yogam paramam āsthitaḥ śaikṣam svaram samāsthāya om iti prāsṛjat svaram babhūva antar mahī bhūtaḥ sarva bhūta guṇa uditaḥ jagrāha vedān akhilān rasātala gatān hariḥ prādāt ca brahmaṇe bhūyas tatas svām prakṛtim gataḥ vedānām ālayaḥ ca api babhūva aśvaśirāḥ tatas yatra vedāḥ vinikṣiptāḥ tat sthānam śūnyam eva ca punar uttasthatuḥ śīghram rasānām ālayāt tadā dadṛśāte ca puruṣam tam eva ādikaram prabhum śayane nāga bhoga āḍhye jvālā mālā samāvṛte tam dṛṣṭvā dānava indrau tau mahā hāsam amuñcatām ūcatuḥ ca samāviṣṭau rajasā tamasā ca tau ayam sa puruṣaḥ śvetaḥ śete nidrām upāgataḥ anena nūnam vedānām kṛtam āharaṇam rasāt vibuddhaḥ su mahā tejāḥ yodhayām āsa tau ubhau śoka apanayanam cakre brahmaṇaḥ puruṣottamaḥ tatas parivṛtaḥ brahmā hata ariḥ veda satkṛtaḥ nirmame sa tadā lokān kṛtsnān sthāvara jaṅgamān dattvā pitāmahāya agryām buddhim loka visargikīm uvāca evam sa bhagavān vyāsaḥ guruḥ mama viśām pate evam eṣa mahābhāgaḥ babhūva aśvaśirāḥ hariḥ paurāṇam etat ākhyātam rūpam vara dam aiśvaram yaḥ hi etat brāhmaṇaḥ nityam śṛṇuyāt dhārayeta vā pāñcālena kramaḥ prāptaḥ rāmeṇa pathini deśite etat haya śiraḥ rājan ākhyānam te kīrtitam purāṇam veda samitam yat mām tvam paripṛcchasi yām yām icchet tanum devaḥ kartum kārya vidhau kva cit tām tām kuryāt vikurvāṇaḥ svayam ātmānam ātmanā eṣa veda nidhiḥ śrīmān eṣa vai tapasaḥ nidhiḥ eṣa yogaḥ ca sāṃkhyam ca brahma ca agryam hariḥ vibhuḥ nārāyaṇa parāḥ vedāḥ yajñāḥ nārāyaṇa ātmakāḥ tapaḥ nārāyaṇa param nārāyaṇa parā gatiḥ nārāyaṇa param satyam ṛtam nārāyaṇa ātmakam nārāyaṇa paraḥ dharmaḥ punarāvṛtti durlabhaḥ pravṛtti lakṣaṇaḥ ca eva dharmaḥ nārāyaṇa ātmakaḥ nārāyaṇa ātmakaḥ gandhaḥ bhūmau śreṣṭhatamaḥ smṛtaḥ apām ca eva guṇaḥ rājan rasaḥ nārāyaṇa ātmakaḥ jyotiṣām ca guṇaḥ rūpam smṛtam nārāyaṇa ātmakam nārāyaṇa ātmakaḥ ca api sparśaḥ vāyu guṇaḥ smṛ nārāyaṇa ātmakaḥ ca api śabdaḥ ākāśa saṃbhavaḥ manaḥ ca api tatas bhūtam avyakta guṇa lakṣaṇam nārāyaṇa paraḥ kālaḥ jyotiṣām ayanam ca yat nārāyaṇa parā kīrtiḥ śrīḥ ca lakṣmīḥ ca devatāḥ nārāyaṇa param sāṃkhyam yogaḥ nārāyaṇa ātmakaḥ kāraṇam puruṣaḥ yeṣām pradhānam ca api kāraṇam svabhāvaḥ ca eva karmāṇi daivam yeṣām ca kāraṇam adhiṣṭhānam tathā kartā karaṇam ca pṛthagvidham vividhā ca tathā ceṣṭā daivam ca eva atra pañcamam pañcan kāraṇa saṃkhyā niṣṭhā sarvatra vai hariḥ tattvam jijñāsamānānām hetubhiḥ sarvatomukhaiḥ tattvam ekaḥ mahā yogī hariḥ nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ sa brahmakānām lokānām ṛṣīṇām ca mahātmanām sāṃkhyānām yoginām ca api yatīnām ātma vedinām manīṣitam vijānāti keśavaḥ na tu tasya te sarveṣām āśrayaḥ viṣṇuḥ aiśvaram vidhim āsthitaḥ ayam hi nityaḥ paramaḥ mahā ṛṣiḥ mahā vibhūtiḥ guṇavān nirguṇa ākhyaḥ guṇaiḥ ca saṃyogam upaiti śīghram kālaḥ yathā ṛtau ṛtu saṃprayuktaḥ jñāna ātmakāḥ saṃyaminaḥ mahā ṛṣayaḥ paśyanti nityam puruṣam guṇa adhikam aho hi ekāntin sarvān prī bhagavant hari vidhi prayuj pūjām ca gṛhṇāti bhagavant svayam teṣām tvayā abhinirdiṣṭā pāramparya āgatā gatiḥ nūnam ekānta dharmaḥ ayam śreṣṭhaḥ nārāyaṇa priyaḥ saha upaniṣadān vedān ye viprāḥ samyak āsthitāḥ tebhyaḥ viśiṣṭām jānāmi gatim ekāntinām nṛṇām kena eṣa dharmaḥ kathitaḥ devena ṛṣiṇā api vā ekāntinām ca kā caryā kadā ca utpāditā vibho uvāca samupoḍheṣu anīkeṣu kuru pāṇḍavayoḥ mṛdhe āgatiḥ ca gatiḥ ca eva pūrvam te kathitā mayā saṃmitaḥ sāmavedena purā eva ādi yuge kṛtaḥ dhāryate svayam īśena rājan nārāyaṇena ha etam artham mahā rāja pṛṣṭaḥ pārthena nāradaḥ ṛṣi madhye mahābhāgaḥ śṛṇvatoḥ kṛṣṇa bhīṣmayoḥ yathā tu kathitaḥ tatra nāradena tathā śṛṇu yadā āsīt mānasam janma nārāyaṇa mukha udgatam brahmaṇaḥ pṛthivīpāla tadā nārāyaṇaḥ svayam phenapāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca eva tam dharmam pratipedire yadā āsīt cākṣuṣam janma dvitīyam brahmaṇaḥ nṛpa tadā pitāmahāt somāt etam dharmam ajānata nārāyaṇa ātmakam rājan rudrāya pradadau ca saḥ vālakhilyān ṛṣīn sarvān dharmam etam apāṭhayat tṛtīyam brahmaṇaḥ janma yadā āsīt vācikam mahat tatra eṣa dharmaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ svayam nārāyaṇāt nṛpa suparṇaḥ nāma tam ṛṣiḥ prāptavān puruṣottamāt suparṇāt ca api adhigataḥ dharmaḥ eṣa sanātanaḥ vāyunā dvipadām śreṣṭha prathitaḥ jagadāyuṣā vāyoḥ sakāśāt prāptaḥ ca ṛṣibhiḥ vighasa āśibhiḥ tatas saḥ antardadhe bhūyas nārāyaṇa samāhitaḥ yadā bhūyas śravaṇa jā sṛṣṭiḥ āsīt mahātmanaḥ brahmaṇaḥ puruṣa vyāghra tatra kīrtayataḥ śṛṇu jagat sraṣṭu manāḥ devaḥ hariḥ nārāyaṇaḥ svayam atha cintayataḥ tasya karṇābhyām puruṣaḥ sṛtaḥ sṛja prajāḥ putra sarvāḥ mukhataḥ pādataḥ tathā dharmam ca mattaḥ gṛhṇīṣva sātvatam nāma nāmataḥ āraṇyakena sahitam nārāyaṇa mukha udgatam tam kārtayuga dharmāṇam nirāśīḥkarma saṃjñitam asṛjat sa tadā lokān kṛtsnān sthāvara jaṅgamān tatas prāvartata tadā ādau kṛta yugam śubham pūjayām āsa deveśam harim nārāyaṇam prabhum dharma pratiṣṭhā hetoḥ ca manum svārociṣam tatas adhyāpayām āsa tadā lokānām hita kāmyayā tatas svārociṣaḥ putram svayam śaṅkhapada nṛpa diśāpālam sudharmāṇam adhyāpayata bhārata dharmam etam svayam devaḥ hariḥ nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ujjagāra aravinda akṣaḥ brahmaṇaḥ paśyataḥ tadā sanatkumāraḥ bhagavān tatas prādhītavān nṛpa sanatkumārāt api ca vīraṇaḥ vai prajāpatiḥ kṛta ādau kuru śārdūla dharmam etam adhītavān vīraṇaḥ ca api adhītya enam raucyāya manave dadau kukṣi nāmne atha pradadau diśām pālāya dharmiṇe eṣa dharmaḥ samudbhūtaḥ nārāyaṇa mukhāt punar gṛhītaḥ brahmaṇā rājan prayuktaḥ ca yathāvidhi adhyāpitāḥ ca munayaḥ nāmnā barhiṣadaḥ nṛpa barhiṣadbhyaḥ ca saṃkrāntaḥ sāmaveda antagam dvijam jyeṣṭham nāmnā abhivikhyātam jyeṣṭhasāma vrataḥ hariḥ jyeṣṭhāt ca api anusaṃkrāntaḥ rājānam avikampanam tatra eṣa dharmaḥ kathitaḥ svayam nārāyaṇena hi pitāmahāya śuddhāya yuga ādau loka dhāriṇe pitāmahaḥ ca dakṣāya dharmam etam purā dadau āditye savituḥ jyeṣṭhe vivasvān jagṛhe tatas ikṣvākuṇā ca kathitaḥ vyāpya lokān avasthitaḥ gam kṣaya anta ca punar nārāyaṇam nṛpa vratinām ca api yaḥ dharmaḥ sa te pūrvam nṛpa uttama nāradena tu saṃprāptaḥ sa rahasyaḥ sa saṃgrahaḥ eṣa dharmaḥ jagannāthāt sākṣāt nārāyaṇāt nṛpa evam eṣa mahān dharmaḥ ādyaḥ rājan sanātanaḥ ahiṃsā dharma yuktena prīyate hariḥ īśvaraḥ eka vyūha vibhāgaḥ vā kva cit dvi vyūha saṃjñitaḥ tri vyūhaḥ ca api saṃkhyātaḥ catur vyūhaḥ ca dṛśyate jīvaḥ ca sarva bhūteṣu pañca bhūta guṇa atigaḥ akartā ca eva kartā ca kāryam kāraṇam eva ca mayā guru prasādena durvijñeyaḥ akṛtātmabhiḥ bhavet kṛta yuga prāptiḥ āśīḥ karma vivarjitaiḥ evam sa bhagavat vyāsaḥ guruḥ mama viśām pati ṛṣīṇām saṃnidhau rājan śṛṇvatoḥ kṛṣṇa bhīṣmayoḥ tasya api akathayat pūrvam nāradaḥ su mahā tapāḥ yatra ca ekāntinaḥ yānti nārāyaṇa parāyaṇāḥ tat eva kevalam sthānam muktānām paramam bhavet uvāca sāttvikā rājasā ca eva tāmasā ca iti bhārata deha bandheṣu puruṣaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kuru kula udvaha sāttvikaḥ puruṣa vyāghra bhavet mokṣa artha niścitaḥ nārāyaṇa paraḥ mokṣaḥ tatas vai sāttvikaḥ smṛtaḥ ekānta bhaktiḥ satatam nārāyaṇa parāyaṇaḥ manīṣiṇaḥ hi ye ke cit yatayaḥ mokṣa kāṅkṣiṇaḥ teṣām vai chinna tṛṣṇānām yogakṣema vahaḥ hariḥ jāyamānam hi puruṣam yam paś madhusūdanaḥ nārāyaṇa ātmake mokṣe tatas yānti parām gatim nārāyaṇena dṛṣṭaḥ ca pratibuddhaḥ bhavet pumān rājasī tāmasī ca eva vyāmiśre prakṛtī smṛte tad ātmakam hi puruṣam jāyamānam viśām pate pravṛtti lakṣaṇaiḥ yuj na avekṣ hari svayam paśyati enam jāyamānam brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ kāmam devāḥ ca ṛṣayaḥ sattva sthāḥ nṛpa sattama hīnāḥ sattvena sūkṣmeṇa tatas vaikārikāḥ smṛtāḥ vada sarvam yathādṛṣṭam pravṛttim ca yathākramam uvāca su sūkṣma sattva saṃyuktam saṃyuktam tribhiḥ akṣaraiḥ puruṣaḥ puruṣam gacchet niṣkriyaḥ pañcaviṃśakam evam ekam sāṃkhya yogam veda āraṇyakam eva ca paraspara aṅgāni etāni pañcarātram ca kathyate eṣaḥ ekāntinām dharmaḥ nārāyaṇa para ātmakaḥ ime tathā jñāna mahā jala oghāḥ nārāyaṇam vai punar āviśanti kuruṣva enam yathānyāyam yadi śaknoṣi bhārata śvetānām yatinām āha ekānta gatim avyayām vyāsaḥ ca akathayat prītyā dharmaputrāya dhīmate saḥ eva ayam mayā tubhyam ākhyātaḥ prasṛtaḥ guroḥ kṛṣṇaḥ eva hi lokānām bhāvanaḥ mohanaḥ tathā saṃhāra kārakaḥ ca eva kāraṇam ca viśām pate sāṃkhyam yogam pañcarātram veda āraṇyakam eva ca jñānāni etāni brahmarṣe lokeṣu pracaranti ha kim etāni eka niṣṭhāni pṛthak niṣṭhāni vā mune prabrūhi vai mayā pṛṣṭaḥ pravṛttim ca yathākramam uvāca parāśarāt gandhavatī mahā ṛṣim tasmai namaḥ ajñāna tamonudāya pitāmaha ādyam pravadanti ṣaṣṭham mahā ṛṣim ārṣeya vibhūti yuktam nārāyaṇasya aṃśa jam eka putram dvaipāyanam veda mahā nidhānam tam ādi kāleṣu mahā vibhūtiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ brahma mahā nidhānam sasarja putra artham udāra tejāḥ vyāsam mahātmānam ajaḥ purāṇaḥ vasiṣṭhasya sutaḥ śaktiḥ śakteḥ putraḥ parāśaraḥ parāśarasya dāyādaḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ muniḥ bhūyas nārāyaṇa sutam tvam eva enam prabhāṣase kim atas pūrvajam janma vyāsasya amita tejasaḥ uvāca guroḥ me jñāna niṣṭhasya himavatpāde āsataḥ kṛtvā bhāratam ākhyānam tapaḥ śrāntasya dhīmataḥ śuśrūṣām tad pare rājan kṛtavantaḥ vayam tadā aham caturthaḥ śiṣyaḥ vai śukaḥ vyāsa ātmajaḥ tathā ebhiḥ parivṛtaḥ vyāsaḥ śiṣyaiḥ pañcabhiḥ uttamaiḥ vedān āvartayan sa aṅgān bhārata arthān ca sarvaśas kathā antare atha kasmin cit pṛṣṭaḥ asmābhiḥ dvijottamaḥ veda arthān bhārata arthān ca janma nārāyaṇāt tathā sa pūrvam uktvā veda arthān bhārata arthān ca tattva vid nārāyaṇāt idam janma vyāhartum upacakrame śṛṇudhvam ākhyāna varam etat ārṣeyam uttamam ādi kāla udbhavam viprāḥ tapasā adhigatam mayā nārāyaṇaḥ mahā yogī śubha aśubha vivarjitaḥ mama tvam na abhitas jātaḥ prajā sarga karaḥ prabhuḥ sṛja prajāḥ tvam vividhāḥ brahman sa jaḍa paṇḍitāḥ kā śaktiḥ mama deveśa prajāḥ sraṣṭum namaḥ astu te cintayām āsa deveśaḥ buddhim buddhimatām varaḥ sa tām aiśvarya yoga sthām buddhim śaktimatīm satīm brahmāṇam praviśasva iti loka sṛṣṭi artha siddhaye tatas tam īśvara ādiṣṭā buddhiḥ kṣipram viveśa sā atha enam buddhi saṃyuktam punar sa dadṛśe hariḥ bhūyas ca enam vacaḥ prāha sṛja imāḥ vividhāḥ prajāḥ bāḍham iti eva kṛtvā sa yathā ājñām śirasā hareḥ tām ca eva prakṛtim prāpya ekībhāva gataḥ abhavat sṛṣṭāḥ imāḥ prajāḥ sarvāḥ brahmaṇā parameṣṭhinā daitya dānava gandharva rakṣaḥ gaṇa samākulāḥ jātā hi iyam vasumatī bhāra ākrāntā tapasvinī bahavaḥ balinaḥ pṛthvyām daitya dānava rākṣasāḥ bādhitavyāḥ sura gaṇāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ tatra nyāyyam idam kartum bhāra avataraṇam mayā atha nānā samudbhūtaiḥ vasudhāyām yathākramam nigraheṇa ca pāpānām sādhūnām pragraheṇa ca imām tapasvinīm satyām dhārayiṣyāmi medinīm mayā hi eṣā hi dhriyate pātāla sthena bhoginā tasmāt pṛthvyāḥ paritrāṇam kariṣye saṃbhavam gataḥ rūpāṇi anekāni asṛjat prādurbhāva bhavāya saḥ vārāham nārasiṃham ca vāmanam mānuṣam tathā ebhiḥ mayā nihantavyāḥ durvinītāḥ surārayaḥ atha bhūyas jagatsraṣṭā bhoḥ śabdena anunādayan apāntaratamāḥ nāma sutaḥ vāc saṃbhavaḥ vibhoḥ bhūta bhavya bhaviṣya jñaḥ satya vādī dṛḍha vrataḥ tam uvāca natam mūrdhnā devānām ādiḥ avyayaḥ veda ākhyāne śrutiḥ kāryā tvayā matimatām vara śrī bhagavān uvāca punar tiṣye ca saṃprāpte kuravaḥ nāma bhāratāḥ bhaviṣyanti mahātmānaḥ rājānaḥ prathitāḥ bhuvi teṣām tvattaḥ prasū kula bhedaḥ bhaviṣyati paraspara vināśa artham tvām ṛte dvijasattama kṛṣṇe yuge ca saṃprāpte kṛṣṇa varṇaḥ bhaviṣyasi dharmāṇām vividhānām ca kartā jñāna karaḥ tathā vīta rāgaḥ ca putraḥ te paramātmā bhaviṣyati vasiṣṭham agryam tapasaḥ nidhānam yaḥ ca api sūryam vyatiricya bhāti tasya anvaye ca api tatas mahā ṛṣiḥ parāśaraḥ nāma mahā prabhāvaḥ kānīna garbhaḥ pitṛ kanyakāyām tasmāt ṛṣeḥ tvam bhavitā ca putraḥ bhūta bhavya bhaviṣyāṇām chinna sarva artha saṃśayaḥ ye hi atikrāntakāḥ pūrvam sahasra yuga paryayāḥ tān ca sarvān mayā uddiś drakṣyase tapasā anvitaḥ uvāca evam sārasvatam ṛṣim apāntaratamam tadā uktvā vacanam īśānaḥ sādhayasva iti atha abravīt apāntaratamāḥ nāma tatas jātaḥ hareḥ punar ca jātaḥ vikhyā vasiṣṭha kula nandanaḥ nārāyaṇa prasādena tathā nārāyaṇa aṃśa jam purā matimatām śreṣṭhāḥ parameṇa samādhinā etat vaḥ kathitam sarvam yat mām pṛcchatha putrakāḥ pūrva janma bhaviṣyam ca bhaktānām snehataḥ mayā uvāca vyāsasya akliṣṭa manasaḥ yathā pṛṣṭaḥ punar śṛṇu sāṃkhyam yogam pañcarātram vedāḥ pāśupatam tathā jñānāni etāni rājarṣe viddhi nānā matāni vai apāntaratamāḥ ca eva veda ācāryaḥ saḥ ucyate prācīnagarbham tam ṛṣim pravadanti iha ke cana umāpatiḥ bhūtapatiḥ śrīkaṇṭhaḥ brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ uktavan idam avyagraḥ jñānam pāśupatam śivaḥ sarveṣu ca nṛpa śreṣṭha jñāneṣu eteṣu dṛśyate yathāgamam yathājñānam niṣṭhā nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ na ca enam evam jānanti tamaḥ bhūtāḥ viśām pate tad eva śāstra kartāram pravad manīṣin niṣṭhām nārāyaṇam ṛṣim na anyaḥ asti iti ca vādinaḥ niḥsaṃśayeṣu sarveṣu nityam vasati vai hariḥ sa saṃśayān hetu balāt na adhyāvasati mādhavaḥ sarvaiḥ samastaiḥ ṛṣibhiḥ niruktaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ viśvam idam purāṇam kaḥ hi atra puruṣaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kaḥ vā yoniḥ iha ucyate uvāca bahavaḥ puruṣāḥ loke sāṃkhya yoga vicāriṇām bahūnām puruṣāṇām ca yathā ekā yoniḥ ucyate tathā tam puruṣam viśvam vyākhyāsyāmi guṇa adhikam idam puruṣasūktam hi sarva vedeṣu pārthiva ṛtam satyam ca vikhyātam ṛṣi siṃhena cintitam utsargeṇa apavādena ṛṣibhiḥ kapila ādibhiḥ adhyātma cintām āśritya śāstrāṇi uktāni bhārata tat te aham saṃpravakṣyāmi prasādāt amita ojasaḥ atra api udāharanti imam itihāsam purātanam brahmaṇā saha saṃvādam tryambakasya viśām pate lalāṭa prabhavaḥ putraḥ śivaḥ āgāt yadṛcchayā ākāśena eva yogi īśaḥ purā trinayanaḥ prabhuḥ tatas khāt nipapāta āśu dharaṇīdhara mūrdhani agratas ca abhavat prītaḥ vavande ca api pādayoḥ tam pādayoḥ nipatitam dṛṣṭvā savyena pāṇinā utthāpayām āsa tadā prabhuḥ ekaḥ prajāpatiḥ uvāca ca enam bhagavān cirasya āgatam ātmajam svāgatam te mahā bāho diṣṭyā prāptaḥ asi mama antikam cira dṛś hi bhagavat vairāja sadana mad kim nu tat sadanam śreṣṭham kṣudh pipāsā vivarjitam sura asuraiḥ adhyuṣitam ṛṣibhiḥ ca amita prabhaiḥ utsṛjya imam giri varam ekākī prāptavān asi atra ekāgreṇa manasā puruṣaḥ cintyate virāj bahavaḥ puruṣāḥ brahman tvayā sṛṣṭāḥ svayambhuvā etat me saṃśayam brūhi mahat kautūhalam hi me bahavaḥ puruṣāḥ putra ye tvayā samudāhṛtāḥ ādhāram tu pravakṣyāmi ekasya puruṣasya te bahūnām puruṣāṇām sa yathā eka yoniḥ ucyate tathā tam puruṣam viśvam paramam su mahattamam nirguṇam nirguṇāḥ bhūtvā praviśanti sanātanam śṛṇu putra yathā hi eṣa puruṣaḥ śāśvataḥ avyayaḥ na sa śakyaḥ tvayā draṣṭum mayā anyaiḥ vā api sattama sa guṇaḥ nirguṇaḥ viśvaḥ jñāna dṛśyaḥ hi asau smṛtaḥ aśarīraḥ śarīreṣu sarveṣu nivasati asau mama antarātmā tava ca ye ca anye deha saṃjñitāḥ sarveṣām sākṣi bhūtaḥ asau na grāhyaḥ kena cit kva cit viśva mūrdhā viśva bhujaḥ viśva pāda akṣi nāsikaḥ ekaḥ carati kṣetreṣu svaira cārī yathāsukham kṣetrāṇi hi śarīrāṇi bījāni ca śubha aśubhe tāni vetti sa yoga ātmā tatas kṣetrajñaḥ ucyate yathājñānam tu vakṣyāmi puruṣam tam sanātanam tasya eka tvam mahā tvam hi sa ca ekaḥ puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ mahāpuruṣa śabdam sa bibharti ekaḥ sanātanaḥ ekaḥ hutāśaḥ bahudhā samidhyate ekaḥ sūryaḥ tapasām yoniḥ ekā ekaḥ vāyuḥ bahudhā vāti loke mahā udadhiḥ ca ambhasām yoniḥ ekaḥ puruṣaḥ ca ekaḥ nirguṇaḥ viśva rūpaḥ tam nirguṇam puruṣam ca āviśanti hitvā guṇa mayam sarvam karma hitvā śubha aśubham ubhe satya anṛte tyaktvā evam bhavati nirguṇaḥ acintyam ca api tam jñātvā bhāva sūkṣmam catuṣṭayam evam hi parama ātmānam ke cid icchanti paṇḍitāḥ eka ātmānam tathā ātmānam apare adhyātma cintakāḥ tatra yaḥ paramātmā hi sa nityam nirguṇaḥ smṛ sa hi nārāyaṇaḥ jñeyaḥ sarva ātmā puruṣaḥ hi saḥ sa saptadaśakena api rāśinā yujyate hi saḥ mantā mantavyam prāśitā prāśitavyam ghrātā ghreyam sparśitā sparśanīyam draṣṭā draṣṭavyam śrāvitā śrāvaṇīyam jñātā jñeyam sa guṇam nirguṇam ca yat vai proktam guṇa sāmyam pradhānam nityam ca etat śāśvatam ca avyayam ca devāḥ sarve munayaḥ sādhu dāntāḥ tam prāk yajñaiḥ yajñabhāgam yajante aham brahmā ādyaḥ īśaḥ prajānām tasmāt jātaḥ tvam ca mattaḥ prasūtaḥ evam saḥ eva bhagavān jñānena pratibodhitaḥ sāṃkhya jñāne tathā yoge yathāvat anuvarṇitam uvāca dharmāḥ pitāmahena uktāḥ mokṣa dharma āśritāḥ śubhāḥ dharmam āśramiṇām śreṣṭham vaktum arhati me bhavān uvāca purā śakrasya kathitām nāradena sura ṛṣiṇā sa kadā cit mahā iṣvāsa devarāja ālayam gataḥ tam kṛtakṣaṇam āsīnam paryapṛcchat śacīpatiḥ brahmarṣe kim cit āścaryam asti dṛṣṭam tvayā anagha śrutam vā api anubhūtam vā dṛṣṭam vā kathayasva me tasmai rājan sura indrāya nāradaḥ vadatām varaḥ āsīnāya upapannāya proktavan vipulām kathām kathām kathitavan pṛṣṭaḥ tathā tvam api mama śṛṇu uvāca āsīt kila kuruśreṣṭha mahāpadme pura uttame gaṅgāyāḥ dakṣiṇe tīre kaḥ cit vipraḥ samāhitaḥ saumyaḥ soma anvaye vede gatādhvā chinna saṃśayaḥ ahiṃsā nirataḥ nityam satyaḥ sat jana saṃmataḥ nyāya prāptena vittena svena śīlena ca anvitaḥ jñāti sambandhi vipule mitra apāśraya saṃmate kule mahati vikhyāte viśiṣṭām vṛttim āsthitaḥ sa putrān bahulān dṛṣṭvā vipule karmaṇi sthitaḥ śiṣṭa ācīrṇam ca dharmam ca trividham cintya cetasā kim nu me syāt śubham kṛtvā kim kṣamam kim parāyaṇam kadā cit atithiḥ prāptaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ su samāhitaḥ viśrāntam ca enam āsīnam idam vacanam abravīt uvāca mitra tām abhipannaḥ tvām kim cit vakṣyāmi tat śṛṇu kartum kāṅkṣāmi na icchāmi baddhaḥ sādhāraṇaiḥ guṇaiḥ yāvat eva anatītam me vayaḥ putra phala āśritam tāvat icchāmi pātheyam ādātum pāralaukikam asmin hi loka saṃtāne param pāram abhīpsataḥ samuhyamānāni niśamya loke niryātyamānāni ca sāttvikāni dṛṣṭvā ca dharma dhvaja ketu mālām prakīryamāṇām upari prajānām uvāca saḥ atithiḥ vacanam tasya śrutvā dharma abhilāṣiṇaḥ provāca vacanam ślakṣṇam prājñaḥ madhurayā girā na ca saṃniścayam yāmi bahu dvāre triviṣṭape ke cit mokṣam praśaṃsanti ke cit yajña phalam dvijāḥ vānaprastha āśramam ke cit gārhasthyam ke cit āśritāḥ rāja dharma āśrayam ke cit ke cid ātma phala āśrayam guru caryā āśrayam ke cit ke cid vākyam yam āśrayam mātaram pitaram ke cit śuśrūṣantaḥ divam gatāḥ āhave abhimukhāḥ ke cit nihatāḥ svid divam gatāḥ ke cit uñcha vrataiḥ siddhāḥ svarga mārga samāśritāḥ ke cit adhyayane yuktāḥ veda vrata pare śubhāḥ buddhimantaḥ gatāḥ svargam tuṣṭa ātmānaḥ jita indriyāḥ ārjavena apare yuktāḥ nihata anārjavaiḥ janaiḥ ṛjavaḥ nāka pṛṣṭhe vai śuddha ātmānaḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ guruṇā me yathā ākhyātam arthatas tat ca me śṛṇu tathā etām eva guruṇā yathā ākhyātam gatārthāt naimiṣe gomatī tīre tatra nāgāhvayam puram yatra indra atikramam cakre māndhātā rāja sattamaḥ kṛta adhivāsaḥ dharma ātmā tatra cakṣuḥśravāḥ mahān padmanābhaḥ mahābhāgaḥ padmaḥ iti eva viśrutaḥ sa vācā karmaṇā ca eva manasā ca dvijarṣabha viṣama stham janam svam ca cakṣus dhyānena rakṣati sa hi sarva atithiḥ nāgaḥ buddhi śāstra viśāradaḥ tapaḥ damābhyām saṃyuktaḥ vṛttena an avareṇa ca yajvā dāna ruci kṣāntaḥ vṛtte ca parama sthā satya vāc anasūyuḥ ca śīlavān abhisaṃśritaḥ śeṣa anna bhoktā vacana anukūlaḥ hita ārjava utkṛṣṭa kṛtākṛta jñaḥ uvāca para āśvāsa karam vākyam idam me bhavataḥ śrutam tṛṣitasya ca pānīyam kṣudhā ārtasya ca bhojanam eṣitasya ātmanaḥ kāle vṛddhasya iva sutaḥ yathā prahrādayati mām vākyam bhavatā yat udīritam datta cakṣuḥ iva ākāśe paśyāmi vimṛśāmi ca prajñāna vacanāt yaḥ ayam upadeśaḥ hi me kṛtaḥ bāḍham evam kariṣyāmi yathā mām bhāṣate bhavān iha imām rajanīm sādho nivasasva mayā saha prabhāte yāsyati bhavān paryāśvastaḥ sukha uṣitaḥ uvāca tatas tena kṛta ātithyaḥ saḥ atithiḥ śatru sūdana vyatītā sā niśā kṛtsnā sukhena divasa upamā brāhmaṇena yathāśaktyā sva kāryam abhikāṅkṣatā yathā upadiṣṭam bhujaga indra saṃśrayam jagāma kāle sukṛta eka niścayaḥ uvāca sa vanāni vicitrāṇi tīrthāni ca sarāṃsi ca tam sa tena yathā uddiṣṭam nāgam vipreṇa brāhmaṇaḥ paryapṛcchat yathānyāyam śrutvā eva ca jagāma saḥ proktavan aham asmi iti bhoḥ śabda alaṃkṛtam vacaḥ tatas tasya vacaḥ śrutvā rūpiṇī dharma vatsalā darśayām āsa tam vipram nāga patnī pativratā sā tasmai vidhivat pūjām cakre dharma parāyaṇā svāgatena āgatam kṛtvā kim karomi iti ca abravīt uvāca viśrāntaḥ abhyarcitaḥ ca asmi bhavatyā ślakṣṇayā girā nāga bhāryā uvāca ārya sūrya ratham voḍhum gam asau māsacārikaḥ sapta aṣṭabhiḥ dinaiḥ vipra darśayiṣyati asaṃśayam uvāca anena niścayena aham sādho saṃprāptavān iha mama abhigamanam prāptaḥ vācyaḥ ca vacanam tvayā kālam parimita āhāraḥ yathoktam paripālayan uvāca tatas sa vipraḥ tām nāgīm samādhāya punar punar tat eva pulinam nadyāḥ prayayau brāhmaṇa ṛṣabhaḥ uvāca atha tena nara śreṣṭha brāhmaṇena tapasvinā nirāhāreṇa vasatā duḥkhitāḥ te bhujaṃgamāḥ sarve saṃbhūya sahitāḥ tasya nāgasya bāndhavāḥ bhrātaraḥ tanayāḥ bhāryāḥ yayuḥ tam brāhmaṇam prati samāsīnam nirāhāram dvijam japya parāyaṇam ūcuḥ vākyam asaṃdigdham ātitheyasya bāndhavāḥ na ca abhilaṣase kim cit āhāram dharma vatsala asmān abhigataḥ ca asi vayam ca tvām upasthitāḥ kāryam ca ātithyam asmābhiḥ vayam sarve kuṭumbinaḥ mūlam phalam vā parṇam vā payaḥ vā dvijasattama āhāra hetoḥ annam vā bhoktum arhasi brāhmaṇa tyakta āhāreṇa bhavatā vane nivasatā satā bāla vṛddham idam sarvam pīḍyate dharma saṃkaṭāt na hi naḥ bhrūṇa hā kaḥ cit rāja apathyaḥ anṛtaḥ api vā pūrva āśī vā kule hi asmin devatā atithi bandhuṣu uvāca upadeśena tvaṣmākam āhāraḥ ayam mayā vṛtaḥ dvis ūnam daśa rātram vai nāgasya āgamanam prati yadi aṣṭa rātre niryāte na āgamiṣyati pannagaḥ tad āhāram kariṣyāmi tad nimittam idam vratam uvāca tena te samanujñātāḥ brāhmaṇena bhujaṃgamāḥ uvāca atha kāle bahutithe pūrṇe prāptaḥ bhujaṃgamaḥ datta abhyanujñaḥ svam veśma kṛta karmā vivasvantaḥ tam bhāryā samabhikrāmat pāda śauca ādibhiḥ guṇaiḥ upapannām ca tām sādhvīm pannagaḥ paryapṛcchata na khalu asi akṛtārthena strī buddhyā mārdavīkṛtā nāga bhāryā uvāca śiṣyāṇām guru śuśrūṣā viprāṇām veda pāraṇam bhṛtyānām svāmi vacanam rājñām loka anupālanam vaiśyānām yajña saṃvṛttiḥ ātitheyī samanvitā vipra kṣatriya vaiśyānām śuśrūṣā śūdra karma tat niyata āhāra tā nityam vrata caryā yathākramam dharmaḥ hi dharma saṃbandhāt indriyāṇām viśeṣaṇam devatānām mahābhāga dharma caryā na hīyate sa ca kāryam na me khyāti darśanam tava kāṅkṣati āsīnaḥ brahma brāhmaṇaḥ saṃśita vrataḥ aham tu anena nāga indra sāma pūrvam samāhitā prasthāpyaḥ mad sakāśam sa saṃprāptaḥ bhujaga uttamaḥ dātum arhasi vā tasya darśanam darśana śravaḥ uvāca atha brāhmaṇa rūpeṇa kam tam samanupaśyasi mānuṣam kevalam vipram devam vā atha śuci smite kaḥ hi mām mānuṣaḥ śaktaḥ draṣṭu kāmaḥ yaśasvini saṃdarśanaruciḥ vākyam ājñā pūrvam vadiṣyati sura asura gaṇānām ca devarṣīṇām ca bhāmini nanu nāgāḥ mahā vīryāḥ sauraseyāḥ tarasvinaḥ vandanīyāḥ ca vara dāḥ vayam api anuyāyinaḥ manuṣyāṇām viśeṣeṇa dhana adhyakṣāḥ iti śrutiḥ nāga bhāryā uvāca ārjavena abhijānāmi na asau devaḥ anilāśana ekam tu asya vijānāmi bhaktimān ati roṣaṇaḥ dvijānām iha bhaktaḥ sa kāla vid kali roṣaṇaḥ saṃkalpa vihitam tu artham pūrayitvā anilāśana arthinām paramam lokam yaśaḥ ca agryam samaśnute prārthita artha abhihantā te mā bhūt kaḥ cit kule anagha sa hi kārya antara akāṅkṣī jala īpsuḥ stokakaḥ yathā varṣam varṣapriyaḥ pakṣī darśanam tava kāṅkṣati tat roṣam sahajam tyaktvā tvam enam draṣṭum arhasi āśā chedena tasya adya na ātmānam dagdhum arhasi āśayā tu abhipannānām a kṛtvā aśru pramārjanam rājā vā rāja putraḥ vā bhrūṇa hatyā eva yujyate maunāt jñāna phala avāptiḥ dānena ca yaśaḥ mahat bhūmi pradānena gatim labhati āśrama saṃmitām naṣṭasya arthasya saṃprāptim kṛtvā phalam upāśnute abhipretām asaṃkliṣṭām kṛtvā akāmavatīm kriyām uvāca abhimānena mānaḥ me jāti doṣeṇa vai mahān roṣaḥ saṃkalpa jaḥ sādho dagdhaḥ vācā agninā tvayā na ca roṣāt aham sādho paśyeyam adhikam tamaḥ yasya vaktavya tām yānti viśeṣeṇa bhujaṃgamāḥ doṣasya hi vaśam gatvā daśagrīvaḥ pratāpavān tathā śakra pratispardhī hataḥ rāmeṇa saṃyuge antaḥpura gatam vatsam śrutvā rāmeṇa nirhṛtam dharṣaṇāt roṣa saṃvignāḥ kārtavīrya sutāḥ hatāḥ saṃyuge nihataḥ roṣāt kārtavīryaḥ mahā balaḥ tathā śakra pratispardhī roṣasya vaśam āgataḥ māndhātā nihataḥ yuddhe lavaṇena iha rakṣasā tat eṣa tapasām śatruḥ śreyasaḥ ca nipātanaḥ nigṛhītaḥ mayā roṣaḥ śrutvā eva vacanam tava ātmānam ca viśeṣeṇa praśaṃsāmi anapāyini yasya me tvam viśāla akṣe bhāryā sarva guṇa anvitā sarvathā ca uktavan vākyam na akṛtārthaḥ prayāsyati uvāca tam eva manasā dhyāyan kāryavat tām vicārayan provāca madhuram vākyam prakṛtyāḥ dharma vatsalaḥ bho bho kṣāmya abhibhāṣe tvām na roṣam kartum arhasi vivikte gomatī tīre kim vā tvam paryupāsase uvāca dharmāraṇyam hi mām viddhi nāgam draṣṭum iha āgatam padmanābham dvijaśreṣṭham tatra mama kāryam āhitam tasya ca aham asāṃnidhyam śrutavān asmi tam gatam sva janam tam pratīkṣāmi parjanyam iva karṣakaḥ tasya ca akleśa karaṇam svastikāra samāhitam uvāca śrava āḍhyaḥ tvam mahābhāga param snehena paśyasi aham sa nāgaḥ vipra ṛṣe yathā mām vindate bhavān ājñāpaya yathā svairam kim karomi priyam tava bhavantam sva janāt asmi saṃprāptam śrutavān iha atas tvām svayam eva aham draṣṭum abhyāgataḥ dvija saṃprāptaḥ ca bhavān adya kṛtārthaḥ pratiyāsyati vayam hi bhavatā sarve guṇa krītāḥ viśeṣataḥ uvāca āgataḥ aham mahābhāga tava darśana lālasaḥ kam cit artham an artha jñaḥ praṣṭu kāmaḥ bhujaṃgama aham ātmānam ātma sthaḥ mārgamāṇaḥ hitam vāsa arthinam mahā prājña balavantam upāsmi ha śaśāṅka kara saṃsparśaiḥ hṛdyaiḥ ātma prakāśitaiḥ paścāt kāryam vadiṣyāmi śrotum arhati me bhavān uvāca āścarya bhūtam yadi tatra kim cit dṛṣṭam tvayā śaṃsitum arhasi tvam uvāca āścaryāṇām anekānām pratiṣṭhāḥ bhagavat raviḥ yasya raśmi sahasreṣu śākhāsu iva vihaṃgamāḥ yatas vāyuḥ viniḥsṛtya sūrya raśmi āśritaḥ mahān vibhajyatām tu viprarṣe prajānām hita kāmyayā toyam sṛjati varṣāsu kim āścaryam atas param dīptaḥ samīkṣate lokān kim āścaryam atas param śakracāpa aṅkita ghaṭaiḥ yaḥ sa vāri ghaṭa udaraiḥ śukraḥ nāma asitaḥ pādaḥ yasya vāridharaḥ ambare toyam sṛjati varṣāsu kim āścaryam atas param yaḥ aṣṭa māsān tu śucinā kiraṇena ujjhitam payaḥ paryādatte punar kāle kim āścaryam atas param yasya tejaḥ viśeṣeṣu nityam ātmā pratiṣṭhitaḥ yatas bījam mahī ca iyam dhāryate sacarācaram yatra devaḥ mahā bāhuḥ śāśvataḥ paramaḥ akṣaraḥ devaḥ mantra mayaḥ anādiḥ kāla ātmā tejasām nidhiḥ jagat mayasya kṣetrajñaḥ kim āścaryataram tatas āścaryāṇām iva āścaryam idam ekam tu me śṛṇu vimale yat mayā dṛṣṭam ambare sūrya saṃśrayāt prati āditya pratīkāśaḥ sarvatas pratyadṛśyata sa lokān tejasā sarvān sva bhāsā nirvibhāsayan anirdeśyena rūpeṇa dvitīyaḥ iva bhāskaraḥ ekībhūtam ca tat tejaḥ kṣaṇena āditya tām gatam tatra naḥ saṃśayaḥ jātaḥ tayoḥ tejaḥ samāgame te vayam jāta saṃdehāḥ paryapṛcchāmahe ravim kaḥ eṣa divam ākramya gataḥ sūryaḥ iva aparaḥ uvāca eṣa mūla phala āhāraḥ śīrṇa parṇa aśanaḥ tathā abbhakṣaḥ vāyubhakṣaḥ ca āsīt vipraḥ samāhitaḥ ṛcaḥ ca anena vipreṇa saṃhitā antar abhiṣṭutāḥ nityam uñcha śila aśanaḥ na hi devāḥ na gandharvāḥ na asurāḥ na ca pannagāḥ prabhavanti iha bhūtānām prāptānām paramām gatim uvāca etat evaṃvidham dṛṣṭam āścaryam tatra me dvija saṃsiddhaḥ mānuṣaḥ kāyaḥ yaḥ asau siddha gatim gataḥ uvāca āścaryam na atra saṃdehaḥ su prītaḥ asmi bhujaṃgama anvartha upagataiḥ vākyaiḥ panthānam ca asmi darśitaḥ smaraṇīyaḥ asmi bhavatā saṃpreṣaṇa niyojanaiḥ uvāca an uktvā mad gatam kāryam kva idānīm prasthitaḥ bhavān ucyatām dvija yat kāryam yad artham tvam iha āgataḥ na hi mām kevalam dṛṣṭvā tyaktvā praṇayavān iha tvayi ca mad dvijaśreṣṭha bhavān mayi na saṃśayaḥ uvāca evam etat mahā prājña vijñāta artha bhujaṃgama aham bhavān ca bhūtāni sarve sarvatragāḥ sadā āsīt tu me bhoga pate saṃśayaḥ puṇya saṃcaye eṣa me niścayaḥ sādho kṛtaḥ kāraṇavattaraḥ uvāca sa ca āmantrya uraga śreṣṭham brāhmaṇaḥ kṛta niścayaḥ dīkṣā ākāṅkṣī tadā rājñ cyavanam bhārgavam śritaḥ tathā eva ca kathām etām rājan kathitavan tadā kathā eṣā kathitā puṇyā nāradāya mahātmane kathitā bharata śreṣṭha pṛṣṭena akliṣṭa karmaṇā devarājena ca purā kathā eṣā kathitā śubhā yadā ca mama rāmeṇa yuddham āsīt su dāruṇam pṛcchamānāya tattvena mayā te viśām pate kathā iyam kathitā puṇyā dharmyā dharma bhṛtām vara a sanna dhīḥ an ākāṅkṣī dharma artha karaṇe nṛpa yama niyama samāhitaḥ vanāntam parigaṇita uñcha śila aśanaḥ praviṣṭaḥ
